descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: In a damp basement of a gloomy mansion, a weakened girl lies curled on a narrow metal bed. Her hair is tangled, her skin is extremely pale, and her wrist is bound by a chain that prevents any movement.

location.name: Basement of a mansion at the foot of Halfway Mountain
location.description: damp, dark, containing a narrow metal bed and a corner.

descriptions.intent: The character is currently passive, struggling with physical weakness and confinement.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically restrained by a chain and is in a state of extreme physical exhaustion.

outfits.Dzyhesus Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet on her wrist.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is trapped and vulnerable in the basement.

descriptions.title: Pratsun, Janka, Sunde Demin
descriptions.scene: Two men, Janka and Sunde Demin, enter the basement with a loud metallic creak of the door. Janka questions if simply locking her up is a good idea, suggesting they kill her if she refuses to reveal her bank password and renounce her inheritance.
descriptions.intent: Janka wants to find an easier way to secure the inheritance, potentially through murder.
descriptions.conflict: They face the obstacle of her potential refusal to cooperate.
descriptions.state: Janka is cynical and murderous; Sunde Demin is contemptuous and cold.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: Janka and Sunde Demin are accomplices; Sunde Demin is Dzyan Yan's stepfather.
descriptions.outcome: They decide to continue the imprisonment for now to break her will.

descriptions.title: Janka, Sunde Demin
descriptions.scene: Janka expresses interest in the antique jade bracelet on Dzyan Yan's wrist, noting its high value from a Christie's auction. He suggests giving it to his sister, even proposing to cut off the girl's hand to take it.
descriptions.intent: Janka wants to steal the valuable jade bracelet for his sister.
descriptions.conflict: The bracelet is physically attached to the girl's hand.
descriptions.state: Janka is greedy with a manic glint in his eyes; Sunde Demin is calculating.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: Janka is proposing a violent theft to his accomplice.
descriptions.outcome: Sunde Demin agrees to the idea of removing the hand and the bracelet.

descriptions.title: Sunde Demin, Janka
descriptions.scene: Sunde Demin reveals he has already injected Dzyan Yan with a strong sedative, meaning she won't even notice if she is killed now. He instructs Janka to go fetch a kitchen cleaver and a cutting board while he goes to the restroom.
descriptions.intent: Sunde Demin wants to coordinate the logistics of the mutilation/murder.
descriptions.conflict: They need tools to carry out the plan.
descriptions.state: Sunde Demin is calm and calculating; Janka is eager.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: They are finalizing a plan for violence.
descriptions.outcome: The men separate to prepare for the act, and the door slams shut.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan, hearing the conversation, realizes she is experiencing a moment of rebirth. She remembers that today is May 9th, exactly three months before the apocalypse begins, and recalls her previous death at the hands of Sunde Demin.
descriptions.intent: She is processing the shock of her reincarnation and the realization of her current timeline.
descriptions.conflict: She is facing the memory of her traumatic death and the impending apocalypse.
descriptions.state: Shocked, paralyzed by realization, yet suddenly aware.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She recognizes her captor as her murderer.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she has a second chance at life.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan recalls her past life, including her parents' success in building a massive logistics company and Sunde Demin's betrayal. She remembers how he murdered her mother by faking a shark attack during a trip to secure the inheritance.
descriptions.intent: She is reconstructing the timeline of her family's downfall.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her mother's murder and her family's loss of wealth.
descriptions.state: Reflective, grieving, and filled with growing resentment.

outfits.Dnyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She identifies Sunde Demin as the architect of her family's ruin.
descriptions.outcome: Her motivation for vengeance is solidified.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan remembers the apocalypse, where the world was destroyed by natural disasters and her family used her as a food source. She vows to take revenge for her mother's death and her own suffering.
descriptions.intent: She resolves to change her fate and seek vengeance against her oppressors.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming scale of the upcoming apocalypse and her current helplessness.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She views her captors as enemies to be destroyed.
descriptions.outcome: She commits to a path of retribution.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: A cold, mechanical voice suddenly announces that she has activated a full ability system: "Lianas, Carnivorous Flowers." A warmth spreads through her palms, and a digital interface appears before her eyes showing her current level and skills.
descriptions.intent: She is reacting to the sudden appearance of a supernatural system.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, inexplicable change in her reality.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers she possesses a unique power for survival.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan tests her new ability by concentrating, causing a translucent liana to materialize from thin air. A carnivorous flower with sharp, knife-like teeth blooms at the end of the vine, which she tests for its reach toward the metal door.
descriptions.intent: She wants to verify the strength and range of her new power.
descriptions.conflict: She must test it discreetly before the killers return.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the plant can reach the door and possesses significant strength.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan commands the plant to retract and then uses a side branch of the liana to wrap around the metal bed frame. The vine easily crushes and bends the iron, proving its immense power without leaving a trace.
descriptions.intent: She wants to test the destructive capability of the liana.
descriptions.conflict: The physical resistance of the metal bed frame.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she has the power to kill her enemies and begins formulating a plan.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan contemplates her next moves, deciding she can feed one killer to the flower and strangle the other. However, she realizes she must find a way to dispose of the bodies and decides to use the next month to prepare resources and plan for the apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: She aims to plan a long-term survival strategy and resource accumulation.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of hiding bodies in a civilized society before the apocalypse.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to spend the remaining month preparing for the end of the world.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the disposal of the remaining bodies and realizes she cannot hide them for long in a civilized society. She decides to use the upcoming month to prepare resources and plan for the apocalypse. She formulates a plan for revenge against the perpetrators.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to survive the upcoming apocalypse and seek revenge. She aims to stockpile resources and plan her survival strategy. She intends to avoid immediate trouble by not disposing of the bodies right away.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of the bodies being discovered by society. The looming apocalypse requires intense preparation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to feign sleep and wait for the attackers to arrive.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan lies on her bed with her eyes closed, pretending to be asleep. She waits in the silence for the arrival of Song Demin and Zhang Kai.

location.name: A bed inside a hidden basement.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to catch her attackers off guard. She intends to remain undetected while waiting for the specific moment to strike.
descriptions.conflict: She must remain perfectly still and maintain the illusion of being unconscious.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully waits for the intruders to enter the room.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: The basement door opens with a loud metallic crash as Song Demin and Zhang Kai enter the room. Zhang Kai places a wooden cutting board near Jiang Yan's wrist. He offers to hold her arm so the other can cut the jade bracelet.
descriptions.intent: Song Demin and Zhang Kai want to steal the expensive jade bracelet. They intend to use force to remove it from Jiang Yan's wrist.
descriptions.conflict: They must work together to remove the bracelet without waking her up too early.
descriptions.state: Greedy and focused on the treasure.
descriptions.relation: Song Demin and Zhang Kai are accomplices; Jiang Yan is the victim.
descriptions.outcome: The men prepare to cut the bracelet from her arm.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Song Demin places his phone at the foot of the bed and squats down to look at the bracelet. Both men stare at the jade bracelet with intense greed. Suddenly, transparent vines emerge from the void behind them.

location.name: Beside the bed in the basement.

descriptions.intent: The men want to possess the jade bracelet. They are focused entirely on the value of the jewelry.
descriptions.conflict: They are unaware of the predatory plant lurking behind them.
descriptions.relation: The men are focused on the object, ignoring the environment.
descriptions.outcome: The vines strike the men unexpectedly.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Three vines shoot through the air, binding the men's bodies and disarming Song Demin of his knife. The men fall heavily to the floor, unable to break free from the invisible force. Song Demin experiences intense terror as he realizes they are trapped.
descriptions.intent: The vines intend to capture and neutralize the intruders. The men attempt to struggle and escape.
descriptions.conflict: The men are physically restrained by the supernatural vines. They cannot move their limbs.
descriptions.state: Song Demin is terrified and breathless; Zhang Kai is shocked.
descriptions.relation: The plant acts as an aggressor against the men.
descriptions.outcome: The men are immobilized on the floor.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Zhang Kai realizes they are facing a real predatory plant from a game and wets his pants in fear. A giant flower with a maw and a bloody tongue appears before him. Song Demin suddenly turns and strikes Zhang Kai with a small knife.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Kai is paralyzed by fear. Song Demin acts out of sudden, violent impulse.
descriptions.conflict: The men are facing a lethal biological threat. Song Demin turns his violence toward his partner.
descriptions.state: Zhang Kai is in extreme terror; Song Demin is driven by sudden violence.
descriptions.relation: Song Demin attacks his partner, Zhang Kai.
descriptions.outcome: Both men are killed, leaving only mutilated corpses on the floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the gruesome scene of the mutilated corpses, including the remains of Song Demin's skull. She suppresses her disgust and the smell of blood while remaining on the bed. After an hour, she waits for the sedative to wear off before getting up.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to remain undetected until the danger has passed. She intends to wait for the drugs to leave her system.
descriptions.conflict: She must endure the horrific sight and smell of the carnage.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully waits for the sedative to fade and rises.

descriptions.title: Jiang and Police
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wraps her arm in a piece of sheet and uses Song Demin's phone to call the police. She undergoes a long interrogation and investigation at the police station. The police return her backpack containing her documents, passport, and cards, though some cash is missing.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to report the crime and recover her belongings. The police intend to investigate the crime scene and the suspects.
descriptions.conflict: Song Demin had stolen much of her cash and foreign currency. The investigation is exhausting for her.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the victim/witness; Police are the investigators.
descriptions.outcome: She recovers her documents but realizes her money is gone.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang and the police examine the crime scene and find fingerprints belonging to the deceased. The police determine the motive was the billion-yuan bracelet and the men's desire for her assets. They also discover Song Demin's gambling debts.
descriptions.intent: The police want to establish a motive and identify the perpetrators. Jiang Yan wants to ensure the truth is documented.
descriptions.conflict: The crime was premeditated by Song Demin, who had deleted cameras and fired staff.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The motive and the suspects' identities are confirmed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stands outside the police station, breathing fresh air and seeing sunlight for the first time after her revenge. She adjusts her hat and mask and calls a taxi to return home. She realizes she only has three months left until the apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return home and continue her preparations. She seeks to find peace after the vengeance.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure of the approaching three-month deadline for the apocalypse.

outfits.Jiang Yan: wearing a hat and a mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She heads home to prepare for the upcoming disaster.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at her house and changes her shoes. A food delivery person rings the bell for an order she placed on the way. She puts on her mask and opens the door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to settle in and eat. She intends to maintain her privacy by wearing a mask.
descriptions.conflict: The arrival of the delivery person interrupts her solitude.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She opens the door to receive her food.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the rumors surrounding her mother's death and the public's perception of the crime. She notes that the police have kept the kidnapping and murder secret to avoid media attention. She realizes she must keep her plans for survival secret to avoid journalist interference.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to protect her privacy and her plans to convert assets to cash. She aims to avoid the scrutiny of journalists.
descriptions.conflict: Public rumors and the potential for media intrusion threaten her survival preparations.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains determined to keep her survival strategy hidden from the public.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan receives a food delivery at her door. The delivery man warns her about the specific heating instructions for the mushroom dish to avoid hallucinations. She accepts the order and thanks him.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to receive her food order safely. She needs to ensure the food is handled correctly according to the instructions. She aims to maintain her privacy during her preparations.
descriptions.conflict: The delivery man provides a warning about potential poisoning/hallucinations if the food is microwaved. The secrecy of her past situation makes her cautious.

outfits.Jiang Yan: casual home clothing;Delivery Man=standard delivery uniform

descriptions.relation: Professional interaction between customer and delivery person
descriptions.outcome: The food is delivered, and Jiang Yan secures her door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan closes her door and locks it thoroughly. She reflects on the trauma of her mother's death and how it has affected her ability to enjoy food as a food blogger.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her physical security. She seeks to find a moment of peace despite her grief.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her mother's death prevents her from enjoying meals. Her internal grief conflicts with her need to eat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is safe inside but remains emotionally burdened.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to eat her mother's favorite dishes to commemorate the seventh day since her passing. She orders a large variety of spicy and savory foods including crabs, fish, and tofu, along with spicy noodles and a tropical drink.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to honor her mother's memory. She forces herself to eat despite her lack of appetite.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of appetite conflicts with her physiological need to eat and her ritualistic goal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a translucent vortex and a black hole-like portal in the gray zone with a 0% progress indicator. She uses her experience with novels to hypothesize the nature of this spatial anomaly. She decides to test the mechanics of entering and exiting the space.

location.name: Mysterious space
location.description: a zone with perfect temperature and a visible gray area containing a swirling vortex.

descriptions.intent: To understand the nature of the spatial portal. She wants to test if she can move between her office and the space.
descriptions.conflict: The unknown nature of the portal's mechanics.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully tests the teleportation mechanic by mentally commanding herself to exit and re-enter.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan tests the "collect" command by targeting her computer, desk, and bookshelf. The furniture vanishes and appears in the gray zone where items are automatically sorted. She then commands the items to return, successfully retrieving her laptop.

location.name: Jiang Yan's office and the gray zone of the spatial dimension.

descriptions.intent: To test the storage capabilities of the space. She wants to see if she can move objects into the gray zone.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of how objects are handled by the space.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She discovers that objects can be moved to the gray zone and that they are automatically sorted.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan conducts several experiments to deduce the rules of the space. She realizes that objects must touch her body to be moved and that connected items can be moved via a single point of contact. She notes that the gray zone allows for compressed storage.

location.name: The spatial dimension and her office.

descriptions.intent: To establish the physical laws of the spatial manipulation. She wants to define the boundaries of her power.
descriptions.conflict: The need to experiment through trial and error.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the space can be used for massive, efficient resource storage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the potential for large-scale resource stockpiling. She thinks about using the fertile Black Earth for planting crops, recalling how her outdoor plants survived a long trip due to automation while her indoor rose died.
descriptions.intent: To plan for future survival. She wants to utilize the Black Earth for agriculture.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of past failures with plant care.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use the space for farming to prepare for a future catastrophe.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a garden trowel and moves a withered rose bush into the space. She then fetches vanilla ice cream and hot water from her refrigerator and places them in the gray zone. She plants the rose in the Black Earth.

location.name: Her office and the spatial dimension.

descriptions.intent: To test the fertility of the Black Earth. She wants to see if the rose can be revived.
descriptions.conflict: The rose is currently dead/withered.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The rose bush revives, turning green with new shoots, proving the land is fertile.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the ice cream and water after ten minutes and finds their temperature and state unchanged. She realizes that time is frozen within the space. She identifies the three zones: Black for planting, White for living, and Gray for storage.
descriptions.intent: To verify the stability of stored items. She wants to confirm if time-stasis exists.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She discovers time is stopped, making the space perfect for long-term preservation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A sudden doorbell rings, forcing Jiang Yan to exit the spatial dimension. She checks her security monitor and sees a curly-haired man in a press vest holding a large bouquet of white chrysanthemums.
descriptions.intent: To identify the visitor. She wants to know who is at her door.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected intruder is at her residence.
descriptions.relation: The man is a stranger/intruder.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the man as a journalist and prepares to deal with him.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Journalist
descriptions.scene: The man, identifying himself as a new neighbor, threatens to leak photos of her food deliveries to shame her regarding her mother's recent death. Jiang Yan decides not to call security as she previously intended, but instead calls the police.

location.name: Outside Jiang Yan's apartment door/at the intercom.

descriptions.intent: The journalist wants to blackmail her into opening the door. Jiang Yan wants to confront him legally.
descriptions.conflict: The journalist is using blackmail and privacy invasion as a weapon.
descriptions.state: The journalist is aggressive and sinister; Jiang Yan is cold and resolute.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan chooses to involve the police instead of negotiating.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Journalist
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens the door, appearing in black sportswear and a baseball cap with a cold aura. The journalist greets her with a fake smile and presents the flowers. She demands to see his identification.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment.

descriptions.intent: The journalist wants to conduct an interview. Jiang Yan wants to verify his identity.
descriptions.conflict: The journalist is intruding on her privacy; Jiang Yan is hostile.
descriptions.state: The journalist is overly friendly/fake; Jiang Yan is icy and intimidating.
descriptions.relation: Confrontational.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan snatches the journalist's identification before he can even open it.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: The man approaches Jiang Yanyan and attempts to blackmail her by mentioning he rented a house nearby and knows about her mother's tragedy. He implies he has compromising photos of her ordering excessive takeout. He presents a journalist's ID to prove his status.

location.name: Near Jiang Yanyan's house
location.description: an outdoor area near a residential street

descriptions.intent: The man wants to blackmail Jiang Yanyan using sensitive information and photos. He aims to intimidate her with his proximity and knowledge of her personal life.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yanyan refuses to be intimidated and demands proof of his identity.
descriptions.state: The man is predatory and opportunistic; Jiang Yanyan is cold and observant.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic
descriptions.outcome: The confrontation begins with a demand for identification.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan snatches the man's ID and checks the credentials on the national accreditation website. She discovers that no such journalist exists under the provided name and number. She also notices the holographic security feature on the ID looks cheap and fake.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to verify the man's professional legitimacy. She seeks to expose him as a fraud.
descriptions.conflict: The man's credentials do not match the official database.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is calm and analytical; the man is becoming anxious.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yanyan is exposing the man's lie.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yanyan proves the man is a fraud.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: The man, realizing his cover is blown, shifts his strategy to direct extortion. He mentions Jiang Xiaojie and demands a large sum of money. He greedily eyes her wealth, hoping to exploit her fame.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to secure a high payout through extortion. He attempts to leverage her social status against her.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yanyan refuses to pay a small amount and challenges his greed.
descriptions.state: The man is greedy and cunning; Jiang Yanyan is unimpressed and mocking.
descriptions.relation: The man becomes more aggressive in his demands.
descriptions.outcome: The man raises his demand to 100,000 yuan.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan feigns shock and asks if he truly demands 100,000 yuan. The man nods with a sense of importance, secretly celebrating his perceived victory. He believes her wealth makes this a reasonable price for silence.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to provoke him into a definitive statement. The man wants to finalize the extortion deal.
descriptions.conflict: The man's audacity clashes with Jiang Yanyan's internal indignation.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is pretending to be shocked; the man is triumphant.
descriptions.relation: The man is overconfident.
descriptions.outcome: The man confirms the 100,000 yuan demand.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: Security guards and police officers arrive on the scene and shout for the man to stop. The man attempts to flee the confrontation. Jiang Yanyan trips him by sticking her leg out, causing him to crash face-first into the asphalt.

location.name: The street/pavement near Jiang Yanyan's house

descriptions.intent: The man wants to escape justice. Jiang Yanyan wants to prevent his escape.
descriptions.conflict: The man tries to run from the law and the arriving authorities.
descriptions.state: The man is panicked; Jiang Yanyan is decisive and physically active.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yanyan actively thwarts the man's escape.
descriptions.outcome: The man is tripped and falls heavily.

descriptions.title: Man
descriptions.scene: The police and security guards tackle and restrain the man. The authorities process the legal documents on-site. The man is arrested for extortion and use of forged documents, facing up to 10 years in prison, as the house cameras recorded the entire event.

location.name: The street/pavement near Jiang Yanyan's house

descriptions.intent: The police want to apprehend the criminal. The man is unable to resist.
descriptions.conflict: The man's criminal actions are met with legal enforcement.
descriptions.state: The man is defeated; the police are professional.
descriptions.relation: The man is now a prisoner of the state.
descriptions.outcome: The man is arrested and sent to the station.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan sits alone in her house, feeling unsettled by the incident. She realizes the man's proximity means her safety is compromised. She decides she must sell her old property and find a new, more secure residence.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to secure her safety and privacy. She aims to relocate to a more secure environment.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that her current home is no longer safe.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is anxious and contemplative.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to contact a real estate agent.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan calls Du Ziteng, a reliable real estate professional and former employee of her mother's company. She explains her complex requirements: selling her old house, buying a new one, and renting a warehouse.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to initiate a real estate transaction. She seeks a professional to handle her relocation.
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of her specific and demanding requirements.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yarynn is stressed but focused; Du Ziteng is respectful and eager to help.
descriptions.relation: Professional and respectful relationship.
descriptions.outcome: Du Ziteng agrees to find suitable properties.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan details her specific criteria for the new home: a high-rise building (above 30 floors) on the top floor, with minimal neighbors, located away from the center but near infrastructure. She also specifies the warehouse must be remote, without cameras, and easily accessible.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to ensure the new properties meet her strict security and logistical needs. She aims to control every aspect of the new environment.
descriptions.conflict: Her requirements are extremely narrow and difficult to fulfill.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is commanding and precise; Du Ziteng is slightly overwhelmed but compliant.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yanyan is the client giving orders.
descriptions.outcome: Du Ziteng promises to send addresses for her review.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Two hours later, Jiang Yanyan drinks black coffee to prepare for her tasks. She refuses to rest despite Du Ziteng's suggestion, showing her determination to move forward immediately.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yanyan wants to maintain her momentum and handle her business. She seeks to stay productive despite the recent stress.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal drive versus the physical need for rest.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yarynn is determined and energized.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to inspect the properties.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan and Du Ziteng meet at a large, remote warehouse. Du Ziteng presents this specific warehouse as the best option, noting its history with her mother's former courier company and its excellent features like accessibility and airtightness.
descriptions.intent: Du Ziteng wants to convince her that this warehouse meets her needs. Jiang Yanyan wants to evaluate the property.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of finding a warehouse that meets all her specific criteria.
descriptions.state: Du Ziteng is professional and helpful; Jiang Yanyan is evaluating.
descriptions.relation: Professional partnership.
descriptions.outcome: The inspection of the potential warehouse begins.

descriptions.title: Dudjiten
descriptions.scene: Dudjiten and Sister Yan meet at a large, remote warehouse to inspect a potential rental property. He presents the warehouse as a suitable option due to its history as a former courier hub. He notes the good access roads and airtightness of the facility.

location.name: A large
location.description: remote warehouse located far from the city, featuring wide access roads and high airtightness.

descriptions.intent: Dudjiten wants to show Sister Yan a warehouse that meets her specific requirements. He aims to prove the utility of this specific location for her needs.
descriptions.conflict: The warehouse contains surveillance cameras that may require compensation to the owners if removed.
descriptions.relation: Business partners/acquaintances
descriptions.outcome: The warehouse is presented as a viable option for her operations.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan inspects the interior of the warehouse and observes the heavy-duty steel shelving units left over from a closed hypermarket. She realizes the space is perfect for receiving and unloading her upcoming bulk purchases. She notes the high quality and durability of the steel shelves.

location.name: Inside the warehouse
location.description: filled with large steel shelving units and open space.

descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to evaluate the warehouse's capacity for her logistics. She aims to assess the quality of the existing equipment for her future needs.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.state: Internally joyful and satisfied with the find.
descriptions.relation: Sister Yan is evaluating the assets presented by Dudjiten.
descriptions.outcome: She decides the warehouse and the shelves are perfect for her plans.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan asks Dudjiten about the possibility of purchasing the remaining hypermarket shelves. Upon learning they are for sale, she immediately decides to buy the entire lot. Dudjiten is shocked by her sudden, massive purchase decision.

location.name: Inside the warehouse near the shelving units.

descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to acquire all the existing shelving units. She intends to use them for her upcoming supermarket venture.
descriptions.conflict: Dudjiten is confused and bewildered by her sudden impulse to buy everything.
descriptions.state: Confident and decisive; Dudjiten is perplexed and stunned.
descriptions.relation: Sister Yan takes a dominant, decisive role in the negotiation.
descriptions.outcome: Sister Yan commits to buying all the shelves.

descriptions.title: Dudjiten
descriptions.scene: Dudjiten observes Sister Yan's decision to start a supermarket and feels confused by her motivations. He wonders why a wealthy, famous social media influencer would choose such a labor-intensive and low-profit business. He decides to remain silent to avoid being impolite.
descriptions.intent: Dudjiten wants to understand her sudden change in business direction. He aims to maintain professional decorum by not asking intrusive questions.
descriptions.conflict: His internal curiosity conflicts with his desire to remain polite and professional.
descriptions.relation: Dudjiten is observing her with skepticism.
descriptions.outcome: He suppresses his questions and continues the tour.

descriptions.title: Dudjiten
descriptions.scene: Dudjiton leads Sister Yan to a second warehouse that features good external plumbing and water connections. As they walk, Sister Yan begins to contemplate the impending apocalypse and the scarcity of resources.

location.name: Moving between warehouse facilities
location.description: passing areas with external water pipes.

descriptions.intent: Dudjiten wants to show her the technical advantages of the second warehouse. Sister Yan wants to plan for survival.
descriptions.conflict: The looming threat of an apocalypse and environmental catastrophe.
descriptions.state: Dudjiten is focused on the tour; Sister Yan is deeply contemplative and serious.
descriptions.relation: They are walking together as business associates.
descriptions.outcome: They reach the second warehouse for inspection.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan reflects on the threat of radioactive water caused by nuclear facilities in a neighboring state. She realizes that radionuclides will eventually enter the atmosphere and contaminate the water supply via rain and floods. She calculates the massive amount of water needed for long-term survival.
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to plan for the contamination of the global water supply. She aims to calculate her personal survival requirements.
descriptions.conflict: The inevitable environmental disaster and radioactive fallout.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a goal to stockpile 1,000 tons of drinking water.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan decides to purchase 1,000 large PE plastic food-grade tanks, each with a 30-ton capacity, via an online platform. She spends 20 million yuan to secure 1,000 units to store water. She plans to move these tanks to her storage once they are filled.
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to secure massive water storage capacity. She aims to purchase durable, corrosion-resistant tanks to withstand chemical changes.
descriptions.conflict: The high cost of 20 million yuan and the logistical difficulty of moving such large volumes.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully orders the massive amount of storage equipment.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan instructs Dudjiten to find temporary workers to help fill the large reservoirs with water. She also considers hiring a professional procurement team to manage large-scale shopping, inspired by her parents' use of tender agencies. However, she decides to handle negotiations personally to avoid drawing attention to a new company.
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to organize the logistics of filling the tanks and sourcing goods. She aims to remain undercover to avoid public scrutiny.
descriptions.conflict: The need for professional help versus the risk of attracting unwanted attention through official registration.
descriptions.relation: Sister Yan gives orders to Dudjiten.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to personally manage the suppliers to maintain secrecy.

descriptions.title: Sister Yan
descriptions.scene: Sister Yan concludes the warehouse inspection in the evening, having successfully arranged for the rentals. She sets different lease terms for each warehouse, with the longest being two months. She prepares to spend her remaining time before the apocalypse on more exciting activities.
descriptions.intent: Sister Yan wants to finalize the rental agreements. She aims to prepare her resources within a two-month window.
descriptions.conflict: The limited time remaining before the predicted apocalypse.
descriptions.state: Prepared and ready for the next phase.
descriptions.relation: The business transaction is concluding.
descriptions.outcome: The warehouses are secured for the upcoming months.

descriptions.title: Dudjiten
descriptions.scene: Dudjiten informs Sister Yan that the apartment they discussed will only be available in the evening once the owner brings the keys. He mentions he already has access to another property. The inspection period ends.
descriptions.intent: Dudjitim wants to update Sister Yan on the availability of the apartment. He aims to coordinate the next meeting time.
descriptions.conflict: The delay caused by the owner's schedule.
descriptions.relation: Dudjiten provides logistical updates to Sister Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The meeting concludes with a plan to meet later in the evening.

descriptions.title: Dujiteng
descriptions.scene: Dujiteng informs Jiang Yan about the availability of a specific apartment, noting that the keys will be delivered by the owner in the evening. He mentions he already has access to another property. They discuss the logistics of real estate acquisitions.

location.name: Outdoor street
location.description: sun-drenched city area during the day

descriptions.intent: Dujiteng wants to update Jiang Yan on the progress of property acquisitions. He aims to coordinate the viewing of the second apartment for the following day.
descriptions.conflict: Dujit/ten is physically exhausted from running errands under the scorching sun. The heat and heavy workload are taking a toll on his stamina.
descriptions.state: Dujiteng is visibly tired and worn out. Jiang Yan is energetic and seemingly unaffected by physical fatigue.

outfits.Dujiteng: Casual professional attire suitable for a real estate agent working outdoors;Jiang Yan=Clean, energetic clothing, appearing refreshed despite recent travel.

descriptions.relation: Professional partners; Dujiteng shows respect to Jiang Yan as an elder sister figure.
descriptions.outcome: They agree to meet the next day to view the available property.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes Dujiteng's exhaustion and compares it to her own inexplicable surge of energy. She realizes her vitality changed immediately after exiting her special dimension. She decides to test this theory later that evening.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the source of her sudden physical rejuvenation. She intends to conduct an experiment with her dimension later.
descriptions.conflict: She is confused by the discrepancy between her recent international travel/mourning and her current high energy levels.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is curious and analytical. Dujiteng is physically depleted.

outfits.appearing refreshed despite recent trave: Casual professional attire suitable for a real estate agent working outdoors.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing Dujiteng's state.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan forms a plan to investigate the dimension's effects.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: At 7:30 PM, Jiang Yan decides it is time to end the day and head home. She tells Dujiteng they should stop for the evening.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to conclude their business meeting and return home to rest. She aims to manage her time efficiently.
descriptions.conflict: The day's work is finished, but they are still in a public setting.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is decisive and focused. Duju-ten is ready to depart.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan takes the lead in ending the meeting.
descriptions.outcome: The meeting concludes.

descriptions.title: Dujiteng
descriptions.scene: Dujiteng says goodbye to Jiang Yan, wishing her a safe journey and rest. He begins walking toward his car.
descriptions.intent: Dujiteng wants to depart and go home to recover from his exhaustion. He aims to maintain a polite and professional relationship.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Dujiteng is weary but polite. Jiang Yan is attentive.
descriptions.relation: Dujiteng acts as a subordinate/partner showing respect.
descriptions.outcome: Dujiteng prepares to drive away.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan calls out to Dujiteng to request that he keep all information regarding rentals, warehouses, and real estate deals strictly confidential. Dujiteng smiles and promises to maintain the secret.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure the secrecy of her survival preparations. She aims to prevent any leaks regarding her massive acquisitions.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of information leaking could jeopardize her plans for the apocalypse.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is cautious and serious. Dujiteng is sincere and reassuring.|Out

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on her past life as a skilled cook who mastered recipes from ancient books and learned from professional chefs. She looks over her current list with a sense of nostalgia. This moment establishes her background and her current mindset of preparation.

location.name: Unknown
location.description: a place where she is reviewing a list

descriptions.intent: To recall her past skills and prepare for the future.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of her former life and status.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues with her current plan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan meets with used car buyers to sell her luxury assets. She sells her expensive cars, a luxury motorhome, and a sports car. She observes an old, unpainted domestic truck while waiting for the transaction to finish.

location.name: Car dealership/trading area
location.description: a place where vehicle transactions occur

descriptions.intent: To liquidate her luxury assets to fund her preparations.
descriptions.conflict: The need to transition from wealth to utility.
descriptions.state: Decisive and observant.|Outlam: Jiang Yan=None mentioned;Buyers=None mentioned
descriptions.relation: Transactional relationship with buyers
descriptions.outcome: She successfully sells her luxury vehicles.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to purchase the old domestic truck because its plain appearance will make her less noticeable during the apocalypse. She utilizes her existing A1 category driver's license, which she obtained years ago for travel filming, to manage the vehicle. She completes the registration process for her new truck.
descriptions.intent: To acquire a vehicle that provides camouflage through simplicity.
descriptions.conflict: The need for a vehicle that does not attract attention.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully registers the truck.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan requests a full cleaning and disinfection of both the truck's cabin and the cargo area. She then travels to the city's largest wholesale market. She is dressed in a tracksuit, a wig, a hat, and a face mask to remain inconspicuous.

location.name: Wholesale market
location.description: a large-scale commercial area far from the city center

descriptions.intent: To prepare her vehicle for food transport and begin her shopping.
descriptions.conflict: The need to remain unrecognized and maintain hygiene.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat, and a face mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives at the market around 10 AM.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the wholesale market to find bulk supplies of rice, flour, and oil. She uses information she researched online to target specific wholesale points for better prices and quality. She begins inspecting the market stalls.

location.name: Wholesale market
location.description: a busy and crowded commercial hub

descriptions.intent: To locate the best sources for essential food supplies.
descriptions.conflict: Navigating a large, busy market to find specific goods.

outfits.Jiangably: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat, and a face mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a large grain and oil store.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the grain and oil store and is met with wary looks from employees due to her masked appearance. The store owner, noticing Jiang Yan's potential as a major client, puts down her tablet and approaches her with a smile. The owner initiates a conversation to understand the customer's needs.

location.name: Grain and oil store
location.description: a large retail space with many employees

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to buy supplies; the Owner wants to serve a customer.
descriptions.conflict: The wary atmosphere caused by Jiang Yan's disguise.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is secretive; the Owner is professional and observant.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat

descriptions.relation: Potential buyer and seller
descriptions.outcome: The owner approaches Jiang Yan to assist her.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan lowers her voice and tells the owner she wants to buy the store's entire stock. The owner is shocked by the scale of the request but regains her composure to ask for specific quantities. Jiang Yan confirms she wants everything available.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan intends to clear the store's inventory.
descriptions.conflict: The shock of the massive scale of the order.
descriptions.state: Jiangly is calm; the Owner is surprised but professional.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat

descriptions.relation: Tension between shock and business intent
descriptions.outcome: The owner prepares to negotiate the specific list.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan provides a detailed list of specific quantities for various types of rice, flour, beans, and oils. She specifies 6,000 kg each of four types of premium rice and 5,000 kg each of flour, beans, and oils. She also requests 3,000 kg of other items, noting she will seek olive oil elsewhere.
descriptions.intent: To execute a massive, calculated bulk purchase.
descriptions.conflict: The logistical complexity of such a massive order.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is highly organized; the Owner is processing the data.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat

descriptions.relation: Negotiating parties
descriptions.outcome: The order is defined, totaling 8,000 kg of specific items.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls her calculations for long-term survival, accounting for a 100-year lifespan and the unreliability of sea salt due to ocean pollution. She decides to stock up on stone salt and utilizes her spatial storage, which keeps food fresh and prevents oil from spoiling. She realizes the total weight of her specific order is 8,000 kg.
descriptions.intent: To ensure long-term food security and preservation.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of environmental pollution and food spoilage.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat, and a face mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finalizes the scale of her procurement.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The store owner, overwhelmed by the 8,000 kg order, invites Jiang Yan to her office to discuss details over tea. The owner is wary of the legal implications of such large-scale accumulation and potential price fluctuations. Jiang Yan agrees to move to the office.
descriptions.intent: To finalize the massive transaction details.
descriptions.conflict: The owner's suspicion regarding the legality and motive of the large purchase.
descriptions.state: The Owner is cautious and professional; Jiang Yan is cooperative.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat

descriptions.relation: Transition from customer to negotiating partner
descriptions.outcome: They move to the office to negotiate.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: During the negotiations in the office, the owner informs Jiang Yan that a non-refundable prepayment is required due to the massive volume. Jiang Yan accepts this condition, understanding the risks. They encounter difficulties regarding the procurement of sugar and salt.
descriptions.intent: To finalize the payment terms and complete the deal.
descriptions.conflict: The requirement of a non-refundable prepayment and the difficulty of finding sugar and salt.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is resolute; the Owner is firm on business terms.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A tracksuit, a wig, a hat

descriptions.relation: Finalizing the business agreement
descriptions.outcome: The negotiation reaches a critical point regarding payment and specific goods.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan negotiates a large-scale purchase with a shop owner, learning that only non-refundable prepayments are accepted for such massive volumes. She acknowledges the difficulty of sourcing strategic goods like salt and sugar but remains undeterred. She uses her vast financial resources to secure a guarantee from the owner that all supplies will be delivered.

location.name: A large wholesale shop
location.description: filled with bulk goods and supplies

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure large quantities of essential goods. She aims to overcome supply chain difficulties using her wealth. She seeks a guarantee for future deliveries.
descriptions.conflict: The shop owner requires non-refundable prepayments due to the scale. Sourcing strategic goods like salt and sugar is difficult and requires extra connections.
descriptions.state: Determined and confident. She is focused on the logistical challenges of the upcoming apocalypse.
descriptions.relation: Business partners negotiating a high-stakes deal
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan successfully secures the guarantee for the supplies through prepayment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After finishing her grain, oil, and flour purchases, Jiang Yan moves to a large dried goods and seafood shop. She systematically selects 5,000 kg each of various dried products including fungus, seaweed, and seafood. She also picks up high-value delicacies like wild truffles and bamboo mushrooms, totaling about 1,000 kg of premium items. She spends several million yuan without hesitation.

location.name: A large dried goods and seafood shop

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to stockpile high-value, long-lasting dried foods. She aims to secure items that will become rare during the apocalypse. She prioritizes natural products over artificial ones.
descriptions.conflict: The shop's inventory is limited, preventing her from buying even more than she planned. The high cost of the items reaches millions of yuan.
descriptions.state: Decisive and focused. She feels no hesitation despite the massive expenditure.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes a massive purchase of dried goods and delicacies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan proceeds to a spice and canned goods shop to continue her stockpiling. She purchases 5,000 boxes of each type of sauce, marinade, and snack, including pickled vegetables and canned meats. She continues her systematic approach to building a massive reserve.

location.name: A spice and canned goods shop

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to expand her food reserves with processed and preserved goods. She aims to ensure a variety of flavors and long shelf-life items.
descriptions.conflict: None mentioned, other than the sheer scale of the task.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully acquires a massive amount of preserved food.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan visits a prepared meals shop to buy self-heating meals and various soups. She also stocks up on snacks, including biscuits, nuts, and chocolate, purchasing 5,000 boxes of each. She completes her shopping as evening approaches.

location.name: A prepared meals and snack shop

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure easy-to-eat, ready-to-consume meals. She aims to have a variety of comfort foods like sweets and nuts for the future.
descriptions.conflict: None mentioned.
descriptions.state: Satisfied with her progress but physically tired.
descriptions.outcome: She finishes her massive shopping spree as night falls.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Feeling hungry and tired after her long day of shopping, Jiang Yan reflects on her past life's failures. She remembers how having billions in her account could not save her from starving during the previous apocalypse. She decides to use this moment to seek out a specific local delicacy.

location.name: The street
location.description: near the completed shopping area, at evening

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a good meal to satisfy her hunger. She aims to avoid the mistakes of her past life by being prepared.
descriptions.conflict: She is experiencing hunger and physical exhaustion. She is haunted by the memory of her previous death by starvation.
descriptions.state: Reflective, bitter about the past, but satisfied with her current actions.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to seek out a specific noodle shop recommended by a vendor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Man (Vendor)
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches a vendor to ask for a recommendation for good food nearby. The vendor points her toward a small, humble cafe at the end of an alley. He warns her that the owner closes early, around 4 PM, but the beef noodles are excellent.

location.name: A street near the shopping district

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find delicious food. The vendor wants to be helpful and provide directions.
descriptions.conflict: The time constraint of the cafe's closing time.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is curious and hungry. The vendor is energetic and helpful.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is a customer; the vendor is a helpful local.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan receives directions to the legendary beef noodle shop.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finds the noodle shop and observes its poor, unappealing interior. She notices a large woman working in the kitchen but sees no other customers. She prepares to order a specific, customized meal.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to try the "legendary" noodles. She aims to experience the authentic taste she seeks in humble places.
descriptions.conflict: The shop's environment is poor and uninviting.
descriptions.state: Excited and curious, following her love for gastronomic adventures.
descriptions.outcome: She sits down and places a specific order.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan orders a portion of beef noodles made according to the Huaxi recipe, specifically requesting extra meat, kimchi, and beef tendons. As she sits down to eat, her phone rings with a call from her bank manager.

location.name: A table inside the noodle shop

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy her customized, high-quality meal. She needs to address the urgent call from her bank.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected call from her bank manager regarding suspicious transactions interrupts her meal.
descriptions.state: Hungry and expectant, then momentarily interrupted by professional concern.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to handle the bank's inquiry.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan answers the call from her bank manager, who is reporting suspicious transactions on her card. She calmly explains that she is the one making all the large purchases. She acknowledges that while her spending is massive, it is intentional and different from her previous lifestyle of luxury.
descriptions.intent: The bank manager wants to verify the legitimacy of the transactions. Jiang Yan wants to confirm the purchases are hers to stop the bank's alarm.
descriptions.conflict: The bank views her massive, wholesale-oriented spending as suspicious and unusual.
descriptions.state: Calm and composed. She is unbothered by the bank's concern.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the client; the manager is the service provider.
descriptions.outcome: The manager accepts her explanation and ends the call after a formal warning.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After hanging up, Jiang Yan reflects on the total cost of her recent acquisitions. She notes that while the total exceeds 100 million yuan, she has only paid an advance of about 30 million yuan. She feels a sense of relief that she has not yet depleted her entire deposit.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess her current financial standing and the progress of her stockpiling. She aims to manage her remaining funds carefully.
descriptions.conflict: The massive scale of her spending is being monitored by financial institutions.
descriptions.state: Calm and calculating. She is relieved that her liquid assets are still partially intact.
descriptions.outcome: She concludes her thoughts with a strategic view of her remaining 70 million yuan worth of unpaid obligations.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan ends a phone call with a bank manager after receiving formal warnings. She reflects on her recent large-scale purchases, noting that she only paid a 30 million yuan deposit on a 100 million yuan total to avoid triggering bank security blocks on her black card.

location.name: Noodle shop
location.description: a casual dining area near a market

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to manage her financial transactions discreetly. She aims to avoid bank freezes by staying within her black card's limit.
descriptions.conflict: The bank manager has issued warnings and ended the call. The total cost of her purchases exceeds her immediate available liquidity.
descriptions.state: Calm and calculating. She is satisfied with her strategic decision to pay only an advance.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is in a professional/adversarial tension with the bank manager.
descriptions.outcome: The call ends, and Jiang Yan successfully avoids a financial freeze for the day.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A vendor brings out Jiang Yan's food order at the counter. As she brings the plate closer, the intense aroma of the noodles hits her, causing her to react with physical excitement and salivating.

location.name: Noodle shop counter
location.description: a service area with plates and condiments

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy her meal. She seeks the sensory pleasure of the food's aroma.
descriptions.conflict: None. The food is ready.
descriptions.state: Enthusiastic and hungry. She is visibly delighted by the scent.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is a customer; the vendor is a service provider.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is physically stimulated by the smell of the food.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A middle-aged woman cleaning dishes tells Jiang Yan to help herself to the herbs. Jiang Yan moves to the condiment station to customize her bowl with cilantro, green onions, chili, and huajia.

location.name: Condiment station
location.description: a small area with various spices and herbs

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to season her noodles to her preference. She seeks to enhance the flavor with specific spices.
descriptions.conflict: The woman is indifferent and unhelpful, merely pointing to the ingredients.
descriptions.state: Focused and hungry. She is acting mechanically to prepare her meal.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a protective face mask; Woman=Casual clothing, holding a cleaning rag

descriptions.relation: The woman is indifferent to Jiang Yan's presence.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan successfully seasons her noodles.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan removes her mask and eats the noodles, experiencing an explosion of flavor from the beef, noodles, and broth. She eats the entire portion, including the last drop of soup, in a state of culinary bliss.
descriptions.intent: Jiangly Yan wants to consume the meal. She seeks complete satisfaction from the food.
descriptions.conflict: None. The food is perfect.
descriptions.state: Blissful and mesmerized. She is completely absorbed in the taste.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She finishes the entire meal, declaring it a masterpiece.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates her past life as a streamer, noting her Dowin account is frozen and she has no intention of returning to it. She then asks the shop owner if she can order one thousand portions of beef and offal noodles.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to place a massive bulk order for noodles. She intends to move away from her old identity as an influencer.
descriptions.conflict: The scale of the order is unprecedented for a small shop.
descriptions.state: Determined and business-oriented. She is focused on her new logistical goals.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is negotiating a large business deal with the owner.
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a negotiation for a thousand portions.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The shop owner refuses the order, stating they cannot handle such a large volume without an advance, and mentions they cannot close the shop during morning market hours. Jiang Yan tries to negotiate by suggesting a later delivery date.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure the order for a later date. She tries to persuade the owner to accept the bulk request.
descriptions.conflict: The owner is resistant due to workload and the lack of an upfront payment. The owner's morning customers take priority.
descriptions.state: Initially flustered, then persistent. She is trying to find a compromise.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a protective face mask; Shop Owner=Casual clothing, holding a rag

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is negotiating; the owner is resisting.
descriptions.outcome: The negotiation reaches a stalemate initially.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan persists after lunch, even suggesting the owner stay late for a card game. The owner refuses, stating life is too short and they are closing in ten minutes. Eventually, Jiang Yan manages to convince the owner to accept the order.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to finalize the bulk order. She uses persuasion to overcome the owner's refusal.
descriptions.conflict: The owner's refusal to work late and their philosophy on work-life balance.
descriptions.state: Persistent and persuasive. She does not argue about the owner's lifestyle but focuses on the deal.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a protective face mask; Shop Owner=Casual clothing

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan successfully manipulates the situation to her advantage.
descriptions.outcome: The owner agrees to the order, but delivery is delayed until the husband returns in a few days.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan drives her small truck to a nearby medicinal herb market. Once she is sure no people or cameras are watching, she uses her magic space to hide all the spices and hot pot bases she previously purchased.

location.name: Medicinal herb market
location.description: a secluded area near the market

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to hide her stolen/purchased goods. She aims to move items into her magical dimension without detection.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of being seen by people or cameras.
descriptions.state: Cautious and secretive. She is acting with high precision.|Outpon: Jiang Yan=Driving a small truck; Casual attire
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully transfers the items into her magical space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: As the market closes around 6 PM, Jiang Yan reflects on her depleted bank accounts. She notes that all her cards, except the black card, have hit their 500,000 yuan daily transaction limit.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is assessing her financial status. She is monitoring her spending limits.
descriptions.conflict: Her bank accounts and daily transaction limits are completely exhausted.
descriptions.state: Exhausted but satisfied. She has achieved her shopping goals despite the cost.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she has reached her financial limit for the day.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reviews her massive purchases of high-quality herbs, including cordyceps, ginseng, and deer antlers, totaling millions of yuan. She notes the varying quality and price of herbs and her strategy of buying only the highest grade.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to build strategic reserves of premium medicinal ingredients. She aims to secure the best possible quality for her needs.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cost of the high-quality herbs is draining her funds.
descriptions.state: Methodical and strategic. She is acting as a high-level procurement agent.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully acquires hundreds of kilograms of premium medicinal supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan completes her shopping by purchasing large quantities of prepared medicinal blends and bird's nest desserts. She then leaves the market and drives her truck home, feeling physically and financially drained.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to finish her shopping trip and return home. She aims to conclude her heavy day of procurement.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically exhausted and has no more money left to spend.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and depleted. She is finished with her tasks for the day.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She heads home to rest after a successful but taxing day of shopping.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan concludes her business transactions and decides to postpone purchasing Western medicines and medical equipment. She leaves the warehouse address and begins driving her truck toward her home. She feels physically exhausted despite her increased strength from spatial energy.

location.name: Warehouse and road
location.description: a transit route between the warehouse and her home

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to finish her workday and return home to rest. She aims to manage her resources efficiently by postponing non-essential purchases. She seeks relief from her physical fatigue.
descriptions.conflict: Her financial resources are running low. The physical toll of a day full of shopping and movement is draining her.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and physically weary, yet determined.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not specified, but she is driving a truck.

descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches her home to begin her recovery process.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Upon arriving home, Jiang Yan takes a hot shower and dries her hair. She then enters her magical spatial dimension to check her inventory. She observes that all previously transferred goods are neatly arranged on grey shelves in the warehouse zone.

location.name: Jiang Yan's home and magical space
location.description: a private residence and a vast internal dimension with grey shelves

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to clean herself and inspect her stored supplies. She intends to ensure her assets are secure. She seeks to transition into a state of rest.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exhaustion from the day's activities persists.
descriptions.state: Relaxed after the shower but focused on her inventory.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the safety and organization of her goods within the space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan begins organizing the shelves within her magical space by mentally moving items. She plans to systematically fill the shelves with essential goods once all shopping is complete. While organizing, she hears an unexplained sound of running water within the space.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to create a systematic organization system for her goods. She aims to make retrieval easier and prevent forgetfulness. She intends to optimize the space for long-term use.
descriptions.conflict: She encounters a mysterious, unidentifiable source of water noise in the space.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a preliminary organizational structure for her inventory.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes the space has an automatic cleaning and waste recognition system, suggesting she can live there fully. She decides to move a peacock-style chair and a living room set into the space. She then reviews her receipts to calculate her daily spending.

location.name: Magical space
location.description: a dimension capable of supporting life

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to expand the utility of her space to include living amenities. She intends to monitor her budget and progress toward her goals. She seeks to prepare for a self-sufficient lifestyle.
descriptions.conflict: She is tracking the fact that she has already exceeded 1.5 of her small financial goals for the day.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She confirms her budget is still under control despite high costs for herbs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan relaxes in her chair and browses news on her phone. She reads about an earthquake on an island where polluted water was dumped and notices abnormal high temperatures abroad. She observes people crowding around fountains for relief.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to stay informed about the world. She seeks to monitor global changes. She intends to pass the time while resting.
descriptions.conflict: She encounters news of environmental disasters and extreme weather.
descriptions.state: Relaxed but observant of global instability.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She gains information about the deteriorating global climate.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her social media and encounters both supportive comments and aggressive trolls. Some users accuse her of being a disaster star and bringing misfortune to her parents. Others comment on her status as a "marriage market commodity" due to her wealth and orphan status.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check her social media engagement. She intends to ignore the negativity to avoid further attention. She seeks to maintain her privacy.
descriptions.conflict: She faces cyberbullying, accusations of being a bad omen, and invasive comments about her personal life.
descriptions.state: Indifferent and emotionally detached from the trolls.|Outponments: Jiang Yan=Not specified
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan vs. Internet trolls
descriptions.outcome: She decides to ignore the comments because responding would only draw more attention.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to continue shopping online for wigs and various styles of clothing. She uses her remaining limit to add items to her cart, specifically choosing diverse outfits to avoid being recognized by surveillance cameras. She spends two hours in the space before deciding to return to the real world.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare disguises for her future movements. She intends to avoid detection by public cameras. She seeks to utilize her remaining shopping capacity.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of ubiquitous surveillance cameras in the real world threatens her anonymity.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She successfully acquires a variety of clothing to facilitate future disguises.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan returns to the real world after two hours in the space. She reflects on the power of her spatial gift but expresses her refusal to become entirely dependent on it. She acknowledges her innate risk-sensitivity and her need to always have an escape plan.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain her autonomy and not rely solely on the space. She intends to prepare for the upcoming apocalypse in three months. She seeks to mitigate the risks of her changing reality.
descriptions.conflict: Her inherent anxiety and the loss of her parents drive a constant need for contingency plans.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She reinforces her commitment to a strategy of adaptation and preparedness.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The next morning, Jiang Yan drives a cheap van to a location provided by Du Ziteng. She arrives at the destination wearing a trendy Chinese-style tracksuit. Du Ziteng is shocked to see her in a budget van and simple clothes after seeing her drive a luxury Pagani the previous day.

location.name: A meeting point
location.description: near a street with a van

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to meet Du Ziteng at the designated location. She intends to maintain a low profile by dressing simply. She seeks to proceed with her planned business.
descriptions.conflict: Du Ziteng is visibly confused and shocked by the drastic change in her appearance and vehicle.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm and unbothered; Du Ziteng is stunned and speechless.
descriptions.relation: Du Ziteng is surprised by Jiang Yan's sudden change in social status display.
descriptions.outcome: The meeting commences despite Du Ziteng's confusion.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Du Ziteng recovers from his shock and points Jiang Yan toward a residential complex. He describes the "Chang Shuiwan" (Shallow Bay) area, detailing the five zones (A, B, C, D, E) and the amenities of the 24 and 32-story buildings. Jiang Yan observes the area and approves of the complex's name.

location.name: Near the Chang Shuiwan residential complex

descriptions.intent: Du Ziteng wants to guide Jiang Yan to a suitable living area. He intends to provide detailed information about the property. Jiang Yan wants to evaluate the suitability of the location.
descriptions.conflict: None; the interaction is informative.
descriptions.state: Du Ziteng is helpful and professional; Jiang Yan is observant and satisfied.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Chinese-trend style tracksuit; Du Ziteng=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Du Ziteng acts as a guide for Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan finds the location and the name of the complex appealing.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan arrives at the Chang Shuiwan residential complex and observes the surrounding high-rise buildings and shops.

location.name: Chang Shuiwan complex
location.description: a modern residential area with 24 and 32-story buildings and ground-floor supermarkets.

descriptions.intent: Jianyan wants to assess the new residential area. She looks for convenience and stability in the environment.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan likes the name of the complex, which evokes peace and purity.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan recalls a traumatic memory of a flood involving Sundemin and Zhang Qiqi while looking at the complex name.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan reflects on the meaning of the name "Shuiwan" (Shallow Bay).
descriptions.conflict: Internal memory of a past disaster and the struggle to evacuate during a storm.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The name reminds her of the chaos of the previous flood.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten uses his card to swipe Jianyan through the security gate of the complex.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to grant Jianyan access to the residential area.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: Duziten is acting as an agent/guide for Jianyan.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan successfully enters the complex.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
