descriptions.scene: Jianyan walks through the complex, inspecting the gardens, the pond with dead algae, and the laundry lines.

location.name: Inner courtyard of the complex
location.description: featuring five buildings around a garden and a pond.

descriptions.intent: Jianyan evaluates the maintenance and quality of the property management.
descriptions.conflict: The poor state of the garden and dead algae suggests neglect by the management company.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan concludes that management quality is low, but decides it doesn't matter because of the upcoming apocalypse.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten leads Jianyan through the complex and explains the details of the apartment for sale on the 32nd floor.

location.name: Walking paths within the residential complex.

descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to inform Jianyan about the specific property details and the owner's situation.
descriptions.conflict: The owner is selling because his fiancée fled, creating a somewhat sad backstory.
descriptions.relation: Duziten is guiding Jianyan.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan dismisses the drama, prioritizing business over personal tragedy.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten informs Jianyan about the good offers received for her old villas and suggests a quick sale.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to encourage a timely sale of her previous properties.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan decides to sell as quickly as possible to avoid financial gaps.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten observes Jianyan's old truck and her urgent need to sell the villa, feeling anxious about her finances.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to understand if Jianyan is facing a financial crisis.
descriptions.conflict: Duziten's internal anxiety regarding Jianyan's sudden change in lifestyle and apparent loss of wealth.
descriptions.relation: Duziten feels a sense of protective concern for Jianyan.
descriptions.outcome: Duziten decides to confront her about her potential problems.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten nervously offers financial help to Jianyan, citing his gratitude for her family's past support.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to offer assistance if she is in financial trouble.
descriptions.conflict: Duziten's fear of overstepping and his struggle to articulate his thoughts.
descriptions.relation: Duziten expresses deep gratitude for past medical help provided by the Jian family.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan responds with a smile, which confuses Duziten's stuttering speech.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten explains that his offer is motivated by the help the Jian family gave his father during his cancer treatment.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to justify his sudden offer of help.
descriptions.conflict: He hides the fact that his agency also profited from the Jian family's business.
descriptions.relation: Duziten reveals his underlying debt of gratitude.
descriptions.outcome: Duziten successfully explains his motivation without mentioning his business interests.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan reveals her secret plan to Duziten, warning him about the upcoming apocalypse in three months.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan wants to warn Duziten to prepare for the end of the world.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme nature of her claim (apocalypse) vs. the reality of the world.
descriptions.relation: Jianyan takes on a role of a prophet/warned individual.
descriptions.outcome: Duziten is shocked and assumes she is suffering from mental instability due to grief.

descriptions.title: Duziten
descriptions.scene: Duziten avoids the topic of the apocalypse by talking about his own preparations, like masks and ibuprofen.
descriptions.intent: Duziten wants to change the subject to avoid discussing her "delusion."
descriptions.conflict: The tension between her serious warning and his attempt to normalize the conversation.
descriptions.relation: Duziten tries to steer the conversation away from her warning.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan insists that he must listen to her and follow her instructions.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan and Duziten arrive at Building A, a pyramid-shaped structure at the top of the complex.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan arrives at the destination to view the property.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: They reach the target building.

descriptions.title: Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan spots a woman in black and a young boy wearing black mourning ribbons, directing movers.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan observes the scene of people moving furniture.
descriptions.conflict: The sight of the woman in mourning triggers a realization.

outfits.Woman in black: Black clothing;Young boy=Black clothing with black ribbons;Movers=Blue uniforms

descriptions.relation: Jianyan recognizes the woman as her stepfather's mistress, Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan is consumed by rage upon seeing her enemy.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan observes Zhang Qiqi directing workers at a construction site. She notices the black mourning ribbons on both women's arms and recognizes Zhang Qiqi as her stepfather's mistress. Jian Yan feels a surge of intense rage upon seeing her enemy.

location.name: A residential area
location.description: near a construction site with workers

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to process her emotions and observe her enemy. She seeks to understand the current state of her rival.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of Zhang Qiqi triggers deep-seated resentment and memories of past betrayal.

outfits.Jian Yan: A face mask and a hat that hides her identity;Zhang Qiqi=Clothing adorned with black mourning ribbons.

descriptions.relation: Jian Yan views Zhang Qiqi with hatred and murderous intent.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan decides to suppress her rage and wait for the apocalypse to enact her revenge.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan reflects on her rebirth and how her new life in this residential area differs from her previous life in a rented villa. She contemplates whether the death of her stepfather might change Zhang Qixi's destiny. She realizes she must prepare a plan for any shifts in fate.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to strategize for the future. She aims to prepare for any changes in the timeline caused by her rebirth.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of how the timeline has shifted affects her planning.

outfits.Jian Yan: A face mask and a hat.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan decides to remain patient and plan her actions for after the end of the world.

descriptions.title: Dudzen
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi begins shouting at the workers regarding the value of her furniture. Dudzen watches the interaction and expresses his dislike for people with such a sense of superiority. Jian Yan remains silent and watches the scene unfold.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to protect her property. Dudzen wants to express his disapproval of Zhang Qiqi's attitude.
descriptions.conflict: Zhang Qiqi's arrogance creates tension with the workers and Dudzen.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qiqi is aggressive; Dudzen is dismissive; Jian Yan is observant.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: Clothing adorned with black mourning ribbons

descriptions.relation: Dudzen and Jian Yan are observing Zhang Qiqi's behavior.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi continues her behavior while Jian Yan watches silently.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan watches Zhang Qiqi enter the elevator with the workers. She contemplates the future uselessness of elevators once the apocalypse hits and all systems fail. She observes the staircase next to the elevator and notices the filth and the smell of urine.

location.name: Near the elevator and the staircase of the building

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to assess the environment. She is thinking about the structural survival of the building.
descriptions.conflict: The unpleasant smell and filth of the staircase cause physical discomfort.
descriptions.state: Thoughtful and disgusted.|Outably: Jian Yan=A face mask and a hat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan turns away from the staircase in disgust.

descriptions.title: Dudzen
descriptions.scene: Dudzen notices Jian Yan walking toward the elevator and then quickly turning back. He asks her what happened. Jian Yan remains silent at first before calmly explaining that she was merely inspecting the stairs.
descriptions.intent: Dudzen wants to check on Jian Yan's well-being. Jian Yan wants to maintain her composure.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden movement of Jian Yan causes Dudzen concern.
descriptions.state: Dudzen is curious; Jian Yan is calm and composed.
descriptions.relation: Dudzen is acting as an assistant/companion to Jian Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan proceeds to the passenger elevator with Dudzen.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan and Dudzen inspect the new apartment, which is 120 square meters with four bedrooms and three living rooms. Jian Yan calculates the actual livable area after accounting for the necessary wall reinforcements. She notes the technical space usage in high-rise buildings.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to evaluate the apartment's suitability for fortification. She aims to determine the usable space for her survival plan.
descriptions.conflict: The need for structural reinforcement will reduce the actual living space.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan is leading the inspection.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan completes the inspection of the interior.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan examines the apartment's utilities, noting the presence of water, electricity, and gas. She observes that the kitchen is fully equipped but the unit is unfurnished. She also inspects the neighboring apartments, noting which ones appear inhabited.

location.name: Inside the apartment and the hallway of the floor

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to ensure the apartment is ready for immediate habitation. She seeks to understand the neighborhood's occupancy.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of furniture means she will need to furnish it later.
props: pine and calamus branches on doors
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan identifies the state of the surrounding units.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan considers the possibility of buying the entire floor but decides against it to avoid drawing attention. She observes a clean, well-maintained door that suggests an empty unit. She decides to proceed with the current apartment.

location.name: The hallway of the apartment floor

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to expand her territory without being noticed. She aims to remain inconspicuous.
descriptions.conflict: The desire for more space conflicts with the need for secrecy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan decides to stick to the single apartment purchase.

descriptions.title: Dudzen
descriptions.scene: Dudzen asks Jian Yan if the apartment is suitable or if she wants to see other complexes. Jian Yan responds decisively that she will take this one without hesitation. She realizes her decision was influenced by seeing Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.intent: Dudzen wants to ensure client satisfaction. Jian Yan wants to secure a strategic position.
descriptions.conflict: The choice is driven by a desire for a tactical advantage over Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.state: Dudzen is surprised; Jian Yan is resolute.
descriptions.relation: Dudzen is acting as a real estate agent/assistant.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan commits to the purchase.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan reflects on the fact that during the flood apocalypse, water levels rise above the twentieth floor. She realizes that by living here, she can observe Zhang Qiqi from a higher vantage point. She confirms her plan for future revenge.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to secure a high-ground advantage. She intends to execute her revenge plan.
descriptions.conflict: The upcoming flood poses a threat to lower floors.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan solidifies her long-term revenge strategy.

descriptions.title: Dudzen
descriptions.scene: Dudzen asks Jian Yan where she will stay since she sold her villa and suggests she stay with his family. He mentions his wife's recent return from culinary school. Jian Yan politely declines the offer, stating she has a room at the Intercontinental Hotel.
descriptions.intent: Dudzen wants to be hospitable and helpful. Jian Yan wants to maintain her independence and privacy.
descriptions.conflict: The social pressure of a kind invitation versus the need for solitude.
descriptions.state: Dudzen is friendly; Jian Yan is polite but firm.
descriptions.relation: Dudzen is being friendly/hospitable.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan refuses the invitation and maintains her distance.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan instructs Dudzen to handle all the legal formalities for the property deal. She also hires a well-known company to handle renovations, specifically focusing on insulation, fire protection, water protection, and soundproofing.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to finalize the purchase. She aims to turn the apartment into a fortified stronghold.
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of the renovation requirements.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan is directing Dudzen's actions.
descriptions.outcome: The process for purchasing and fortifying the apartment begins.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan delegates all transaction formalities to Dudzeta and selects a renowned company for renovation and security system installation. She defines specific tasks including reinforcing thermal insulation, fire and water protection, and installing soundproof panels.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to secure her premises against all environmental and physical threats. She aims to delegate administrative burdens to focus on technical requirements.
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of the technical requirements requires finding a specialized company. The scale of the renovation is massive.
descriptions.relation: Dzy/Yan is the employer/leader; Dudzeta is the subordinate/executor.
descriptions.outcome: The renovation and security installation processes are officially initiated.

descriptions.title: Renovation Crew Leader
descriptions.scene: The renovation crew begins reinforcing walls and ceilings with metal elements and replacing the entrance door with ultra-strong, bulletproof steel. They replace windows with impact-resistant, thermally insulated glass and install floor heating and emergency exit holes in external walls.
descriptions.intent: The crew leader wants to complete the structural reinforcements as instructed. He aims to follow the technical specifications provided by the client.
descriptions.conflict: The crew leader is confused and puzzled by the extreme requirements, such as bricking up windows and balconies. He wonders if they are building a tomb.
descriptions.relation: The crew leader is working under the strict orders of Dzyanya Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The structural fortification of the room is completed according to the extreme specifications.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan signs a contract with a security systems company, specifying the precise placement of cameras on multiple floors and external surfaces. She demands that cameras be installed discreetly and connected to backup power sources.
descriptions.intent: Dzylam Yan wants to establish a comprehensive surveillance network. She aims to ensure the system is hidden from the building management.
descriptions.conflict: The installation must be done without attracting the attention of the building's management company.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the client negotiating with the security company.
descriptions.outcome: The security contract is signed, and the budget is used to bypass management interference.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan signs non-disclosure agreements with both the renovation and security companies to ensure total privacy. She then shifts her focus to large-scale food procurement, specifically targeting fresh meat and dairy.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to protect her plans through confidentiality. She aims to secure high-quality, fresh food supplies for her space.
descriptions.conflict: Many farms already have permanent clients, making large-scale acquisition difficult.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the primary buyer.
descriptions.outcome: Confidentiality is secured, and the initial phase of food procurement begins.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan manages the massive purchase of meat, including 5 tons of beef/pork, 3 tons of lamb/poultry, and 1,000 kg each of duck, goose, and pigeon. She also orders a massive amount of hot pot ingredients like beef tendons and organ meats.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to stock up on high-quality proteins. She aims to avoid frozen products to maintain her taste preferences.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of meat requires direct negotiation with various farms.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the direct buyer from farms.
descriptions.outcome: A massive amount of fresh meat is successfully secured.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya and Logistics
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan procures 30,000 chicken eggs, 8,000 units of duck/goose products, 10 tons of cow milk, and various other dairy products including 5 tons each of cream and cheese. The products are moved to rented cold storage before being transferred to her space.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to ensure a massive supply of dairy and eggs. She aims to move the products efficiently into her private space.
descriptions.conflict: The logistics of moving such massive quantities of perishable goods requires careful timing.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is managing the logistics chain.
descriptions.outcome: The dairy and egg supplies are successfully stored in her space.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan spends a month procuring various seafood, including 3-5 tons of fish, shrimp, crabs, and mollusks. The process is slow due to irregular supply schedules and the need to distribute shipments over time.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to complete her seafood stockpile. She aims to manage the staggered delivery of different species.
descriptions.conflict: Irregular supply chains and the difficulty of coordinating multiple shipments.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the buyer.
descriptions.outcome: The seafood stockpile is completed after one month of effort.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan purchases energy-related equipment, including 100 charging stations, wind generators, hand dynamos, and 300 wireless chargers. She also invests 40 million yuan in 2,000 square meters of high-end solar panels costing 20,000 yuan per square meter.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to ensure energy independence. She aims to install solar panels in her space where sunlight is constant.
descriptions.conflict: The cost of the solar panels is extremely high, totaling 40 million yuan.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the investor/buyer.
descriptions.outcome: A massive energy infrastructure is purchased and ready for installation.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan purchases 500 tons each of liquid hydrogen and natural gas, along with 1,000 tons each of gasoline and diesel, and 500 tons of motor oil. She feels a sense of anxiety regarding the danger of storing these substances.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to secure fuel reserves for long-term survival. She aims to store enough energy for various needs.
descriptions.conflict: The storage of these highly flammable substances creates a feeling of extreme danger, like "time bombs."
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the owner of the hazardous materials.
descriptions.outcome: The fuel reserves are successfully placed in her storage, despite the psychological tension.

descriptions.title: Dzyanya Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanya Yan completes her preparations by purchasing 1,000 tons each of coal and charcoal, along with 3,000 units of various heating devices including electric heaters and graphene mats. She prepares for the possibility of an extremely cold winter.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanya Yan wants to be prepared for extreme temperature drops. She aims to have redundant heating methods available.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for an unprecedentedly cold winter necessitates massive, redundant quantities.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanya Yan is the buyer.
descriptions.outcome: The heating and thermal protection supplies are fully stockpiled.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan purchases massive quantities of coal and wood charcoal to prepare for a cold winter. She acquires 1,000 tons of each material. This action is part of her large-scale survival preparation.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to ensure a heat source for the upcoming winter. She aims to secure enough fuel to survive extreme temperature drops.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of a cold winter and potential energy shortages.
descriptions.outcome: The fuel supply is secured for the winter.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan buys 3,000 units each of various heating devices including heat fans, electric heaters, infrared heaters, graphene mats, and electric blankets. She also acquires 300 air filters and 20 dehumidifiers. This expansion of supplies covers heating and air quality.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to maintain a controlled environment. She aims to protect against air pollution, humidity, and flooding.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of air pollution, flooding, and high humidity in a post-apocalyptic setting.
descriptions.outcome: The climate control equipment is successfully stockpiled.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan procures large quantities of seeds, saplings, alcohol, and tobacco. She specifically buys 1,000 crates of white wine, 3,000 of red wine, 5,000 of spirits, and various amounts of beer. She also stocks 5,000 crates each of high, medium, and low-segment cigarettes.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to secure food sources and luxury goods. She recognizes that alcohol and tobacco will serve as vital currency in a chaotic future.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for total societal collapse and the loss of traditional currency.
descriptions.outcome: Essential survival commodities and future trade goods are acquired.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan organizes her massive stockpile of alcohol and tobacco into her storage space. She reflects on the fact that these items will become "liquid gold" during the apocalypse. She contemplates the unpredictability of the future while working.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to organize her supplies for easy access. She aims to prepare for a future where resources are scarce.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the future and the looming chaos.
descriptions.outcome: The supplies are safely tucked away in her storage.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: SCINE: Dzenyan purchases a massive amount of clothing, focusing on specialized gear and practical everyday wear. She selects high-quality but inconspicuous brands in black, white, and gray. The collection includes thermal underwear, protective suits, and masks.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to be prepared for extreme temperatures and environmental hazards. She aims to avoid attracting attention by choosing non-flashy clothing.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of being targeted by looters if her wealth is visible.
descriptions.outcome: A versatile wardrobe of functional, low-profile clothing is acquired.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan buys 10,000 sets of seasonal clothing, footwear, and accessories. She chooses all sizes to account for potential physical changes. She also purchases large quantities of bedding, including mattresses, pillows, and blankets.
descriptions.intent: Dzenary wants to ensure long-term comfort and physical readiness. She aims to have enough supplies for any bodily changes or seasonal shifts.
descriptions.conflict: The possibility of her body changing due to stress or environment.
descriptions.outcome: Essential textiles and seasonal gear are stockpiled.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan acquires 500 units each of large, medium, and small tents and mosquito nets. This is done to prepare for temporary outdoor living and insect protection. She also moves furniture and appliances from her old house to her new apartment and storage.

location.name: Wholesale market and her old/new homes

descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to be able to survive outdoors if necessary. She aims to maintain some level of domestic comfort in her new space.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of insects and the need for mobile shelter.
descriptions.outcome: Outdoor survival gear and domestic comforts are relocated and secured.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan visits every pharmacy in the city to buy massive amounts of medicine and medical equipment. She specifically stocks 3,000 bottles of Potassium Iodide and 1,000 bottles of Prussian Blue for radiation protection. She also buys antibiotics, antiseptics, and treatments for common illnesses.
descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to prepare for radiation exposure and disease outbreaks. She aims to have a complete medical arsenal for herself and others.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of radiation, infections, and widespread disease.
descriptions.outcome: A comprehensive medical stockpile is established.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan purchases specialized medical vehicles, including ambulances equipped with negative pressure. She also acquires various medical devices like massage chairs. She integrates these into her existing space.

location.name: Medical suppliers and her storage space

descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to have advanced medical capabilities. She aims to be able to provide high-level care even in a crisis.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of providing medical care in a collapsed infrastructure.
descriptions.outcome: Advanced mobile medical units are added to her assets.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan begins building a new home directly within her spatial storage. She purchases 20 sets of modern appliances, including refrigerators, washing machines, and smart toilets. She also buys 30 sets of various cookware and utensils.

location.name: Her spatial storage/New home construction site

descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to create a self-sustaining, high-tech living environment. She aims to have a fully functional kitchen and household setup inside her storage.
descriptions.conflict: The challenge of setting up a modern lifestyle in a post-apocalyptic setting.
descriptions.outcome: The foundation for a modern, high-tech home within the storage is laid.

descriptions.title: Dzenyan
descriptions.scene: Dzenyan purchases automatic cooking devices and food preparation tools to simplify cooking. She also buys portable gas stoves, alcohol burners, and wood-burning stoves. She stocks up on rice, flour, oil, and paper products.

location.name: Wholesale markets and kitchen supply stores

descriptions.intent: Dzenyan wants to ensure she can cook even without electricity or gas. She aims to minimize the labor required for food preparation.
descriptions.conflict: The potential loss of modern utilities like electricity and gas.
descriptions.outcome: A redundant and efficient food preparation system is secured.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan decides to stockpile massive quantities of paper products and hygiene items to prepare for potential equipment failure. She purchases 50,000 units each of toilet paper, paper towels, facial tissues, wet wipes, and kitchen rolls. She also buys 10,000 packs each of various menstrual pads and 500 menstrual cups.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to ensure long-term survival by replacing disposable items. She aims to prevent shortages of essential sanitary goods. She seeks to prepare for any breakdown of modern plumbing.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for future equipment failure and lack of repairability. The need to manage massive quantities of goods.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Large quantities of hygiene products are successfully secured.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan focuses on medical supplies and disinfection to avoid a repeat of past mask shortages. She acquires 100,000 masks, 10 tons of alcohol and disinfectant liquid, and 10,000 packs of disinfectant wipes. She also buys 1,000 units each of various pest control agents.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to prevent disease outbreaks and pest infestations. She aims to replicate the safety measures needed during previous medical crises. She seeks to maintain a sterile environment.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of past medical shortages. The threat of biological and insect-based hazards.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: A significant stockpile of medical and defensive supplies is established.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan manages the logistics of food stockpiling based on available warehouse space. She purchases 6 tons each of cabbage, potatoes, onions, lettuce, tomatoes, corn, broccoli, mushrooms, and eggplant. She also buys 1 ton each of sweet potato, bamboo, and celery, along with 5,000 kg each of garlic, ginger, and pepper. Finally, she secures 10,000 kg each of various fruits including oranges, durians, apples, watermelons, mangoes, and grapes.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to secure a diverse food supply for the long term. She aims to balance nutritional variety with storage capacity. She seeks to stock up on both staples and perishables.
descriptions.conflict: Limited warehouse space restricts the volume of certain items. The logistical challenge of managing massive weights of produce.
descriptions.state: Organized and strategic.|Outments: Dian Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: A massive, diverse food reserve is successfully created.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan purchases personal care items, cleaning supplies, and pet supplies. She selects neutral-scented hygiene products to avoid detection and buys minimal amounts of cosmetics from South Korean brands. She also acquires cleaning tools and 100 tons of cat litter.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to maintain personal hygiene and cleanliness without attracting attention. She aims to keep her living space orderly. She seeks to provide for her pet's needs.
descriptions.conflict: The need to remain inconspicuous to others. The massive scale of the cat litter purchase.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Personal and domestic maintenance supplies are secured.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan invests in agricultural technology and intellectual enrichment. She buys automated hydroponic systems for growing greens and vegetables. She also visits a bookstore to purchase a wide range of literature, scientific works, agricultural manuals, and cookbooks. For entertainment, she buys LEGO, puzzles, art supplies, and electronic books.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to ensure sustainable food production through technology. She aims to prevent boredom during the post-apocalyptic period. She seeks to maintain her mental and creative skills.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for long-term isolation and lack of stimulation. The need for self-sufficiency.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The hero secures both the means for production and the means for mental survival.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan prepares digital entertainment and physical fitness resources. She downloads massive amounts of music and video files, ranging from classics to modern shows, onto hard drives. She also orders five complete sets of gym equipment.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to ensure access to culture and entertainment. She aims to maintain physical health during the crisis. She seeks to preserve digital media for offline use.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of internet or power in a post-apocalyptic scenario. The need for physical maintenance.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Digital and physical training resources are fully stocked.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan calculates her total expenditures and remaining wealth. She notes that her total spending reached 900 million, mostly on fuel and luxury goods. She realizes that selling her family villa and other assets brought in 2.3 billion yuan, leaving her with a total of approximately 22 to 23 billion yuan (over 3 billion USD).
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to assess her financial standing for future purchases. She aims to track her liquid assets. She seeks to understand her purchasing power in different currencies.
descriptions.conflict: The high cost of high-quality resources and fuel. The uncertainty of weapon pricing.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The hero confirms she has massive financial reserves for the upcoming crisis.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan prepares for a major international move and executes a massive food transfer. On June 1st, she places 30,000 ready-to-eat meals from various restaurants, including Michelin-starred venues, and 8,000 cups of milk tea into her space. She then departs on an international flight to Canada.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to secure high-quality prepared food for immediate consumption. She aims to move her base of operations to a new country. She seeks to utilize her travel blogger status to move unnoticed.
descriptions.conflict: The logistical difficulty of transporting massive amounts of perishable food. The physical exhaustion of long-distance travel.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The hero successfully relocates to Canada with a massive food stockpile.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan arrives in Vancouver and begins her new procurement phase. She uses her travel experience and visa status to navigate the city. She purchases a used iPhone and several anonymous SIM cards to maintain privacy.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to establish a secure communication line. She aims to purchase necessary technology without being tracked. She seeks to utilize the local Chinese community for easier logistics.
descriptions.conflict: The expiration of her Canadian visa. The need for anonymity in a new environment.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The hero establishes a foundation for anonymous operations in Canada.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan sits in a cafe and initiates her warning to the world. After ordering an Iced Americano, she accesses several famous Chinese websites. She anonymously posts a warning regarding a natural disaster occurring in early August.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to alert others to the impending disaster. She aims to disseminate information without revealing her identity. She seeks to use the internet as a tool for early warning.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of being identified or dismissed. The tension of knowing the truth while others are unaware.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The warning is officially released to the public.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan purchases a used iPhone and several anonymous SIM cards to establish a secure communication line. She prepares herself for a period of anonymous activity. This is her first step in establishing a way to warn others without being traced.

location.name: Unknown
location.description: a place where she can conduct private transactions

descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to secure her anonymity. She needs tools to communicate without revealing her identity.
descriptions.conflict: She needs to avoid being traced by authorities or others.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully acquires the necessary tools for anonymous communication.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan enters a cafe and orders a Cold Americano. She sits down to begin her digital warning campaign. She uses the internet to reach a wide audience.

location.name: A cafe
location.description: a public setting with internet access

descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to warn the public about the upcoming disaster. She aims to spread information effectively.
descriptions.conflict: She faces the risk of the post being deleted or ignored.
descriptions.state: Anxious about the reaction of the public but resolute.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to post her warning.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan accesses several famous Chinese websites and posts an anonymous warning about a natural disaster occurring in early August. She includes a list of basic recommendations for stockpiling resources at home. She successfully submits the post.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to alert people to the impending disaster. She intends to provide actionable advice for survival.
descriptions.conflict: She fears the post might be deleted or that people will not believe her.
descriptions.state: Uncertain and feeling a lack of control over the consequences.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The post is successfully published online.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan decides to continue posting anonymous warnings every day while she is abroad. She plans her future actions as a whistleblower. She reflects on her current limitations while still in China.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to maintain a consistent stream of warnings. She plans to use her platform to influence people's preparations.
descriptions.conflict: She fears causing unnecessary trouble while still residing in China.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a long-term plan for her anonymous warnings.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan begins a massive shopping spree in Canada, focusing on survival gear and cold-weather clothing. She manages the rental of a warehouse which she arranged while still in China. She navigates through various suppliers for specialized equipment.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to stockpile essential goods for the disaster. She aims to secure high-quality items from reliable sources.
descriptions.conflict: She must manage complex logistics and avoid supply shortages.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a large-scale procurement process.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan purchases large quantities of cold-weather clothing, including down jackets, fleece, and thermal gear. She buys 200 units of each clothing category and 3,000 units of accessories like masks and thermal socks. She spends over 10 million yuan on this category alone.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to secure massive amounts of protection against extreme cold. She seeks better prices than those available in China.
descriptions.conflict: The high cost of premium items like down jackets drains her funds.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully acquires a massive stockpile of winter apparel.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan moves to the procurement of food and heavy machinery. She buys 1,000 kg each of various seafood, including lobster and crab. She also purchases 500 tons of wood and several pieces of heavy machinery, including loaders and excavators.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to secure long-term food resources and heavy equipment for her operations. She aims to diversify her supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer scale of the purchase requires significant logistical coordination.
descriptions.state: Driven and impulsive regarding the machinery.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes the acquisition of food and heavy industrial equipment.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan travels to the USA to acquire weapons, yachts, and amphibious vehicles. She realizes she cannot legally purchase weapons through official channels due to her lack of US citizenship and a green card. She decides to use a specialized security agency to facilitate the deal.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to acquire high-grade weaponry and maritime vessels. She seeks a way to bypass legal restrictions.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of legal status prevents her from owning weapons legally.
descriptions.relation: Danyan seeks the services of a security agency.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a reliable agency to act as her intermediary.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danyan contacts a prestigious security agency known for its connections and shadow operations. She agrees to pay a high commission to ensure the weapons are sourced safely and without risk from shady dealers. She also uses them to help exchange large sums of money.
descriptions.intent: Danyan wants to avoid dangerous, unreliable suppliers. She intends to use the agency's power to secure her supply chain.
descriptions.conflict: The agency's services require a significant financial commission.
descriptions.state: Confident and willing to pay for security.
descriptions.relation: Danyan enters a business relationship with the security agency.
descriptions.outcome: The agency agrees to handle her complex procurement and financial needs.

descriptions.title: Danyan
descriptions.scene: Danya transfers 15 billion yuan through special channels into several brokerage accounts in Hong Kong. She manages the massive movement of capital to fund her global operations. The weapons are delivered to her warehouse as instructed.
descriptions.intent: Danya wants to move her wealth into accessible accounts for large-scale purchases. She needs to fund her massive arsenal.
descriptions.conflict: Moving such a large sum requires specialized, discreet channels.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The funds are successfully moved and the weapons arrive at the warehouse.

descriptions.title: Danya
descriptions.scene: Danya completes the purchase of a massive arsenal, including machine guns, sniper rifles, AK-47s, and various ammunition and tactical gear. The seller notes she has emptied their entire stock. Danya jokes about emptying her six wallets to pay for it.
descriptions.intent: Danya wants to acquire every available weapon and tactical tool. She aims to be fully prepared for any combat scenario.
descriptions.conflict: The massive purchase exhausts her vast financial resources.
descriptions.state: Humorous yet exhausted by the cost.
descriptions.relation: Danya interacts with the seller as a high-value client.
descriptions.outcome: Danya successfully acquires a massive arsenal, but the cost significantly depletes her funds.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan completes a massive purchase of various weapons at a shop, emptying six of her wallets. The seller notices her massive haul with a smile. She jokes about her depleted finances while paying for the arsenal and commissions.

location.name: Weapon shop
location.description: a store filled with an immense arsenal of firearms and melee weapons

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to secure a wide variety of weaponry for future survival. She aims to exhaust her current funds to ensure she is prepared for any combat scenario. She seeks to arm herself with everything from pistols to heavy machine guns.
descriptions.conflict: Her financial reserves are being rapidly depleted. The high cost of weapons and commissions consumes her carefully managed funds. The loss of money feels painful, like water slipping through her fingers.
descriptions.state: Amused but financially stressed. She maintains a joking demeanor despite the heavy cost.
descriptions.relation: Friendly and professional interaction between buyer and seller
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully acquires a massive arsenal of weapons.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan requests and receives access to virtual 3D training programs for her new weapons. These programs include holographic modes for home practice. She plans to use them to master shooting, reloading, and combat simulations.

location.name: Weapon shop
location.description: a place where digital services are provided

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to master the use of her new weapons without physical danger. She intends to practice shooting, magazine changes, and combat scenarios at home. She seeks to overcome the technical difficulties of recoil and reloading.
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of weapons like machine guns poses a physical challenge. Without skill, the weapons could be difficult to handle due to recoil.
descriptions.state: Determined and focused on preparation. She is proactive about skill acquisition.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan gains the tools necessary to train herself in a controlled environment.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan expands her shopping list to include melee weapons, tools, and survival gear. She selects axes, knives, crossbows, lockpicks, and tactical clothing. She also picks up heavy tools like chainsaws and drills.

location.name: Weapon and equipment store
location.description: a shop containing various blades and power tools

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to diversify her arsenal beyond firearms. She aims to acquire tools for utility and different combat ranges. She seeks to be prepared for both close-quarters combat and manual labor.
descriptions.conflict: The need to prepare for a post-apocalyptic world with mutated flora and fauna. The lack of social order necessitates a wide range of self-defense tools.
descriptions.state: Methodical and thorough. She is systematically checking items off her survival list.|Outras: Djan Yan=not mentioned
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully acquires a massive variety of melee and utility equipment.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan purchases specialized survival and outdoor equipment. She buys survival watches, signal rockets, binoculars, and waterproof clothing. She also acquires fishing gear, oxygen tanks, and fire-starting tools.

location.name: Outdoor gear section
location.description: a part of the store dedicated to survival and exploration

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to be prepared for extreme environmental conditions. She aims to secure gear for water, land, and specialized survival tasks. She seeks to ensure she can navigate and survive in the wild.
descriptions.conflict: The unpredictable nature of a post-apocalyptic environment. The necessity of having specialized gear for different biomes.
descriptions.state: Prepared and strategic. She is thinking about long-term survival needs.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan completes her collection of survival-specific gear.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan moves to large-scale vehicle procurement, buying helicopters, SUVs, yachts, and boats. She purchases an expensive mobile home, a "bunker on wheels," for over 2 million dollars. This purchase further reduces her budget by half a million dollars.

location.name: Vehicle dealership/port
location.description: a place for high-end transport and heavy machinery

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to secure reliable transportation for various terrains. She aims to have mobile living quarters and watercraft. She seeks to establish a mobile base of operations.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cost of these vehicles significantly drains her remaining budget. The high price of the motorhome is a major financial burden.
descriptions.state: Decisive but financially strained. She is making high-stakes investments.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan acquires a fleet of vehicles and a luxury mobile home.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan travels to the Australian continent to restock food supplies. She focuses on purchasing large quantities of meat and dairy products. This is a strategic move to ensure nutritional stability.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to replenish her food reserves. She aims to secure protein and dairy sources. She seeks to prevent food shortages in the future.
descriptions.conflict: The need for long-term food security in a world with limited resources. The necessity of finding reliable agricultural hubs.
descriptions.state: Purposeful and hungry for resources. She is executing a global logistics plan.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully stocks up on essential food supplies.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan travels to the Netherlands to purchase a high-tech solar yacht. The ship features a unique hydraulic system to rise 3 meters above water during storms. She pays over 2 million dollars for this advanced vessel.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to acquire a vessel capable of surviving natural disasters. She aims to secure a home on the water that is resistant to floods and hurricanes. She seeks advanced energy efficiency through solar power.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of high-speed winds (251 km/h) and rising sea levels. The massive financial cost of the yacht.
descriptions.state: Strategic and forward-thinking. She is investing in disaster-proof technology.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan acquires a highly advanced, flood-resistant solar yacht.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan travels to France to buy luxury goods. She purchases collection wines and high-quality cosmetics, specifically skincare products. She intends to maintain her appearance even in survival conditions.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to maintain her personal well-being and appearance. She aims to secure high-quality skincare for long-term use. She seeks to preserve a sense of normalcy and self-care.
descriptions.conflict: The potential degradation of personal hygiene and appearance in a post-apocalyptic setting. The difficulty of maintaining luxury in a crisis.
descriptions.state: Refined and self-aware. She values personal maintenance as part of her survival strategy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully acquires luxury and beauty supplies.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan travels to Spain to purchase premium food items. She buys elite olive oil and famous black hams. This completes her food-related shopping spree in Europe.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to secure high-quality, long-lasting food resources. She aims to stock up on calorie-dense and flavorful items. She seeks to diversify her food pantry with premium goods.
descriptions.conflict: The need to find high-quality, non-perishable or easily preserved luxury foods. The logistical challenge of traveling across multiple countries.
descriptions.state: Satisfied and completing her mission. She is finalizing her food stocks.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully acquires premium food supplies.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan arrives in the Middle Eastern Emirates to purchase fuel and energy resources. She buys massive amounts of gasoline and natural gas. She also acquires large quantities of oil and alcohol for various uses.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to secure the energy needed to power her vehicles and machinery. She aims to obtain fuel for heating and lighting. She seeks to acquire alcohol for its use as a high-performance fuel and disinfectant.
descriptions.conflict: The necessity of securing large volumes of combustible materials. The importance of managing these volatile resources.
descriptions.state: Focused and strategic. She is securing the lifeblood of her technological assets.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully secures vital energy resources.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan completes her global shopping by acquiring medical supplies. She buys one thousand first aid kits and 20 automated external defibrillators (AED). She also manages to secure a limited amount of regulated prescription drugs through her private channels.

location.name: Various international locations and her home base

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to ensure medical readiness for herself and others. She aims to have enough supplies for mass casualties or injuries. She seeks to bypass legal restrictions to obtain necessary prescription medications.
descriptions.conflict: The strict regulation and legal difficulty of obtaining prescription drugs. The high demand and limited availability of medical resources.
descriptions.state: Prepared and resourceful. She is utilizing her connections to overcome legal barriers.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan successfully completes her global procurement, fully prepared for the future.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan completes her massive procurement of medical supplies across various countries. She successfully acquires one thousand first aid kits and twenty automated external defibrillators. She also manages to secure a limited amount of strictly regulated prescription drugs through her private channels.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to prepare for the upcoming apocalypse. She aims to stockpile essential medical equipment and medicines. She seeks to bypass legal restrictions to ensure survival.
descriptions.conflict: Prescription drugs are strictly regulated both abroad and at home. Her supply channels are limited in capacity. The logistics of international procurement are difficult.
descriptions.state: Determined and focused. She is working towards a long-scale survival plan.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes the purchase of all necessary supplies, though her funds are significantly depleted.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan boards a flight back to her home country on the morning of July 6th. She reflects on her depleted finances, noting that only a small portion of her 32 billion remains. She carries her massive stockpile within her spatial storage.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to return home after her exhausting journey. She intends to settle back in her home country with her supplies. She seeks to rest after the intense mission.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically exhausted from the strenuous multi-country journey. Her wealth has been drastically reduced by the purchases.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and weary. She is preoccupied with the logistics of her survival preparations.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives at her destination, physically drained but prepared.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Upon exiting the plane, Jiang Yanyan is hit by a wave of intense, hot air. She notices the temperature is much higher than the weather forecast predicted. She begins to fear that the predicted catastrophe of August 8th might arrive earlier than expected.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to assess the current environmental situation. She seeks to verify if the climate shift is a sign of the approaching apocalypse. She tries to process her growing dread.
descriptions.conflict: The actual heat is much more extreme than the official meteorological reports. The sudden temperature spike threatens her timeline for preparation.
descriptions.state: Anxious and fearful. Her heart tightedly constricts due to a bad premonition.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a sense of dread regarding the accelerated timeline of the disaster.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan, Driver
descriptions.scene: A young driver in a white shirt and black trousers meets Jiang Yanyan at the airport stairs. He greets her as a VIP client and takes her small suitcase. He assists her into a luxury business-class vehicle and takes the driver's seat.
descriptions.intent: The driver wants to provide professional service to a VIP client. Jiang Yanyan wants to reach her home comfortably. The driver aims to facilitate her transfer.
descriptions.conflict: The family no longer has a personal driver due to her mother selling the company. She must rely on hired airport transfers.
descriptions.state: The driver is polite and professional. Jiang Yanyan is distracted and preoccupied.
descriptions.relation: Professional service provider and VIP client
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yanyan is successfully transported into the car and begins her journey on the highway.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan, Driver
descriptions.scene: While driving on the ring highway, the driver asks if the air conditioning temperature is comfortable. Jiang Yanyan responds distractedly while looking at the car's dashboard. She notices the car's display shows 38°C, which is far higher than the usual 18-25°C range for Anmin.

location.name: Business-class car
location.description: moving on the Anmin ring highway

descriptions.intent: The driver wants to ensure passenger comfort. Jiang Yanyan wants to monitor the environmental changes. She seeks to understand the cause of the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The temperature is abnormally high and deviates from the city's known mild climate. This discrepancy suggests a massive environmental shift.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is distracted and increasingly worried. The driver is attentive and polite.
descriptions.relation: Passenger and driver
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yanyan realizes the climate is behaving abnormally.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan takes out her phone to check her previous posts about the apocalypse. She discovers that many of her warnings have been deleted or her anonymous accounts blocked. She finds one remaining post on a popular site, though it is being mocked by commenters.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to check the public's reaction to her warnings. She seeks to see if her information is still circulating. She wants to gauge the level of social awareness.
descriptions.conflict: Internet platforms are censoring her warnings. The public is actively mocking and dismissing her predictions as attention-seeking.
descriptions.state: Observant and grim. She feels the weight of the impending disaster alone.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that the public is largely unaware and dismissive of the coming danger.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan reads various comments from internet users. Some users joke about the end of the world, while others express suspicion about her foreign IP address. Some users discuss the strange weather and plan to buy food or flee to the mountains.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to understand the different perspectives of the populace. She seeks to identify any signs of widespread panic or preparation. She monitors the social climate.
descriptions.conflict: There is a divide between those mocking the idea and those noticing the strange weather. Some users are even accusing her of having hidden motives.
descriptions.state: Focused and analytical. She is processing the social landscape.|Outting: None
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes that while some are preparing, the majority are still in denial.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan, Driver
descriptions.scene: A sudden, violent impact strikes the car's windshield. The car jerks sideways and the brakes screech loudly. Jiang Yanyan leans forward, saved by her seatbelt, while the driver reacts with shock and anger.
descriptions.intent: The driver wants to maintain control of the vehicle. Jiang Yanyan wants to avoid injury. The driver reacts to the sudden obstacle.
descriptions.conflict: An unidentified object or creature has collided with the car. The sudden impact threatens the safety of the passengers.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is startled and nearly instinctively tries to access her storage. The driver is angry and shaken.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The car comes to a halt, but the passengers are physically unharmed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yanyan, Driver
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yanyan looks at the windshield and sees a bloody smear and a black, segmented, bamboo-like limb embedded in the glass. A strange creature is dying from the wound. The driver, wearing sunglasses, gets out of the car to inspect the damage, placing a warning triangle on the road.
descriptions.intent: The driver wants to check the cause of the collision. Jiang Yanyan wants to understand what hit them. The driver aims to secure the scene with a warning triangle.
descriptions.conflict: A strange, biological entity has struck the car. The presence of the creature is inexplicable and frightening.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yanyan is frozen in shock. The driver is focused on the task of inspection.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The driver exits the vehicle to investigate the mysterious impact.

descriptions.title: Driver
descriptions.scene: An unidentified insect hits the car windshield and falls onto the road. The driver instructs Jiang Yan to stay in the car and prepares to investigate the impact. He puts on sunglasses and sets up a red emergency triangle behind the vehicle.

location.name: Road
location.description: a paved highway during the day

descriptions.intent: The driver wants to check the cause of the impact and ensure safety. He aims to secure the vehicle's position on the road. He intends to identify what hit the car.
descriptions.conflict: An unknown object has struck the car, causing an unexpected stop. The driver must manage the roadside hazard.
descriptions.relation: Driver is serving Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: The driver approaches the front of the car to inspect the damage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a bloodstain on the windshield from inside the car. She retrieves a medical mask from storage and puts it on to protect herself from the smell of blood. She realizes the creature that hit the car is a massive, crushed insect.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to protect herself from the smell and potential pathogens. She aims to observe the nature of the impact. She seeks to understand what hit the vehicle.
descriptions.conflict: The intense smell of blood permeates the air even through the mask. The sight of the creature causes her profound terror.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a hat, glasses, and a medical mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the creature as a giant, crushed mosquito.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan examines the remains of the insect, noting its long proboscis, broken wings, and black legs with white spots. She observes that the head is crushed by the car wheel. She notes the creature is as large as two adult hands.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to analyze the biological features of the insect. She aims to determine if this is a known species. She seeks to assess the threat level.
descriptions.conflict: The creature's size is biologically impossible for a known mosquito species. The sheer scale of the insect is unsettling.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes this is an unknown, potentially mutated species.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: SCNE: Jiang Yan uses her phone to take a photo of the insect from a safe distance. After checking for other creatures, she quickly retreats into the car, closes the door, and rolls up the windows.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to document the evidence. She aims to escape any potential danger from other insects. She seeks to secure her immediate environment.
descriptions.conflict: There is a potential threat of more creatures being nearby. She must act quickly to seal herself inside.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a hat, glasses, and a medical mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully secures herself inside the vehicle.

descriptions.title: Driver
descriptions.scene: The driver finishes his phone call and retrieves cleaning supplies and water from the trunk. He meticulously washes the blood from the windshield. He then returns to the car and apologizes to Jiang Yan for the delay before restarting the engine.
descriptions.intent: The driver wants to clean the vehicle of the biological residue. He aims to resume the journey. He intends to apologize for the interruption.
descriptions.conflict: The bloodstain is a disturbing reminder of the impact. The delay disrupts their schedule.
descriptions.relation: Driver is apologetic toward Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: The car is cleaned and the journey resumes.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: While the driver is cleaning, Jiang Yan uploads the photo to the internet to identify the insect. She discovers the characteristics match the Aedes genus, known for spreading diseases like Yellow Fever and Encephalitis. She realizes that no known mosquito reaches this size or consumes such a large amount of blood.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the species via an online search. She aims to find scientific information about the insect. She seeks to understand the implications of its existence.
descriptions.conflict: The search results contradict the physical reality of the giant insect. The biological impossibility of the creature's size creates a scientific mystery.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a hat, glasses, and a medical mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the insect is a mutation that could threaten all living beings.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to post the photo anonymously on the internet, asking for help to identify the unknown giant mosquito. She tags several science bloggers and official academic accounts in her post.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to crowdsource identification. She aims to alert the scientific community. She seeks anonymous help to avoid panic while gathering info.
descriptions.conflict: She must remain anonymous to avoid direct responsibility or panic. She needs expert input which is hard to find.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a hat, glasses, and a medical mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The post is published to the public and academic accounts.

descriptions.title: Driver
descriptions.scene: The driver expresses his shock at the size of the insect. He then notices the car's dashboard temperature is rising rapidly. He realizes the outside temperature has reached 40 degrees Celsius despite it being only 5 PM.
descriptions.intent: The driver wants to express his disbelief. He aims to monitor the vehicle's environment. He seeks to understand the sudden heat spike.
descriptions.conflict: The temperature is rising unnaturally fast for the time of day. The heat is becoming extreme.
descriptions.relation: Driver is interacting with Jiang and expressing fear
descriptions.outcome: They realize an abnormal heatwave is occurring.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the news of rising temperatures in Anming and other regions. She contemplates the possibility of an approaching apocalypse. She reflects on her lack of preparation for such extreme weather.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the global temperature changes. She aims to evaluate the severity of the situation. She seeks to identify what else she needs to prepare.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden climate shift suggests a global catastrophe. The heat is becoming an existential threat.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing a hat, glasses, and a medical mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins to worry about her lack of survival preparations.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at her residential complex, Qinshuiwan, at 7:00 PM during heavy traffic. She finds the entrance surrounded by ambulances and police cars with flashing lights. A crowd of panicked residents has gathered near the cordoned-off underground parking.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her home. She aims to navigate the traffic. She seeks to understand the commotion at her building.
descriptions.conflict: The area is cordoned off by police. The presence of emergency vehicles indicates a crisis. The heat and the crowd create a sense of dread.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is an observer of the crowd
descriptions.outcome: She enters a scene of high tension and emergency.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan exits the car and feels the suffocating heat. She overhears residents discussing rumors of a person being drained of blood by a swarm of giant mosquitoes. The crowd discusses the horror of the mutation and the possibility of the end of the world.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to share information and express their fear. Jiang Yan wants to listen to the rumors to understand the local situation. Some residents seek the original internet post.
descriptions.conflict: The rumors are terrifying and suggest a mass casualty event. The heat makes breathing difficult. The community is in a state of panic.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is listening to the residents
descriptions.outcome: The scale of the threat is revealed to be a swarm of mutated insects, not just one.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan searches through her phone for a specific warning post about the heat written by a foreigner. She attempts to find if the messages were deleted while observing the intense heat.
descriptions.intent: The protagonist wants to find a specific online prediction regarding the current weather. She seeks information to understand the rising danger.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat makes the environment unbearable. She struggles to locate the specific deleted or hidden post.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She fails to find the post immediately but notes the ongoing public discussion about the heat.

descriptions.title: Ambulance Staff, Police, Official Woman
descriptions.scene: Emergency medical workers in protective suits emerge from a residential complex carrying a stretcher covered in white cloth. They are followed by police officers and a short-haired woman representing the authorities.

location.name: Entrance of a residential complex
location.description: near a large square used for evening dancing

descriptions.intent: The medical staff aims to transport a patient. The official woman intends to manage the crowd and issue safety instructions.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a medical emergency and the heat create tension in the crowd. The official must prevent panic.

outfits.Ambulance Staff: Full protective suits;Official Woman=Professional attire, short hair

descriptions.relation: The official is commanding the crowd and the police are securing the area.
descriptions.outcome: The official instructs residents to go home and avoid the square.

descriptions.title: Official Woman, Crowd
descriptions.scene: The official woman addresses the crowd, telling them to stay indoors and close windows due to the heat. She specifically warns them not to attend evening gymnastics on the square.

location.name: Large square near the residential complex

descriptions.intent: The official wants to minimize heatstroke risks and prevent people from gathering. She aims to suppress rumors.
descriptions.conflict: A member of the crowd challenges her with questions about the mutated mosquitoes. The official must ignore the provocation.
descriptions.relation: The official ignores the crowd's direct questions.
descriptions.outcome: The official tells the crowd to wait for official news and dismisses the mosquito rumors.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to leave the street and heads toward Building A to avoid potential danger from mutated mosquitoes. She observes that most people are ignoring the threat, believing it is an isolated incident.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the safety of her apartment. She seeks to avoid any mutated insects.
descriptions.conflict: The perceived threat of mutated mosquitoes vs. the public's apathy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully moves toward her building.

descriptions.title: Sanitation Workers, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the disinfection process occurring around Building D, which has been cordoned off. People in protective suits are actively disinfecting the area where the victim was found.
descriptions.intent: The workers aim to sanitize the site of the incident. Jiang Yan is observing the level of danger.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a biological threat requires heavy disinfection.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The area is being heavily processed, signaling a real threat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at the 32nd floor and stands before her apartment door, 3.201. She instinctively inspects the neighboring apartment, 3.204, noticing a pair of shoes left outside.
descriptions.intent: She wants to check the security and status of her surroundings. She observes the neighbors' presence.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the neighbors' safety or presence.
descriptions.state: Alert and observant.|Outability: Jiang Yan=Not specified
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies that the neighbors have recently returned home.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to reset the digital lock on her door because she had previously given a repair company a temporary password while she was abroad. She prepares to enter her apartment.
descriptions.intent: She wants to secure her home by invalidating old access codes. She aims to ensure no unauthorized person can enter.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of the old password being used by the repair company.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to reset the system before entering.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After entering and locking all doors, Jiang Yan turns on the air conditioner to 28 degrees and collapses onto her sofa in exhaustion. She utilizes a spatial artifact to refresh her physical state.
descriptions.intent: She wants to escape the heat and recover from physical exhaustion. She uses the artifact to heal her body.
descriptions.conflict: Extreme physical and mental fatigue from recent stresses.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a surge of energy after using the artifact.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan begins a thorough inspection of her apartment to ensure it is a functional shelter. She checks the modified layout, the sealed plumbing, and the fireplace systems.
descriptions.intent: She wants to verify that her preparations for a crisis are intact. She checks the plumbing, the chimneys, and the ventilation.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for intruders or pests to enter through vents or pipes.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that the plumbing and fireplaces are properly prepared.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan inspects the ventilation shafts to ensure they are sealed against mosquitoes. She then uses a device to check for hidden cameras in her apartment.

location.name: Apartment 3.201
location.description: near ventilation shafts and throughout the rooms

descriptions.intent: She wants to prevent mutated mosquitoes from entering through vents. She also wants to ensure her privacy from surveillance.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of biological invasion and the threat of spying.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the valves are closed and no cameras are present.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes a warm shower to relax, but is interrupted by intense hunger. She realizes she has been eating only restaurant food and craves a home-cooked meal but lacks the energy to cook.
descriptions.intent: She wants to satisfy her hunger with something homemade. She seeks relaxation through hygiene.
descriptions.conflict: Hunger vs. extreme physical exhaustion. The lack of energy to prepare food.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is left feeling hungry and unable to cook a complex meal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finishes her checks and takes a warm shower to relax. She feels hunger pangs due to recent reliance on restaurant food. She contemplates her desire for a home-cooked meal despite her exhaustion.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to satisfy her hunger with something homemade. She seeks comfort after a long day. She aims to find relief from the fatigue of her recent activities.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical exhaustion makes complex cooking difficult. Her recent diet of hotel food has left her craving different flavors.
descriptions.state: Tired but physically refreshed from the shower.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She decides to prepare a simple meal using her spatial storage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves an egg and green onions from her spatial storage. She quickly prepares an omelet with rice, a light vegetable soup, and spicy marinated vegetables. She eats the entire meal and drinks cold soda.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare a quick, nutritious meal. She intends to satisfy her hunger efficiently. She aims to enjoy a taste of home.
descriptions.conflict: She lacks the energy for complex cooking. She must use simple ingredients to avoid long preparation.
descriptions.state: Hungry and focused on the task.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She successfully eats a satisfying meal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts the dishes in the dishwasher and sits down with a bottle of soda and the television. She begins watching economic news while playing short gaming sessions. She learns about Japan's radioactive water discharge and the global temperature crisis.
