descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to relax and stay informed. She intends to monitor global economic and environmental shifts. She aims to pass the time through entertainment.
descriptions.conflict: The news presents a growing global crisis. The rising temperatures and environmental disasters create a sense of impending doom.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She becomes aware of the worsening global situation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices that the news failed to mention mutating blood-sucking insects. She checks her thermometer and sees the outdoor temperature is still 41°C. She realizes the temperature has remained abnormally stable for hours.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify the accuracy of the news. She seeks to confirm if the insect threat is real. She intends to monitor the local climate.
descriptions.conflict: The official news omits critical information about mutated insects. The lack of temperature fluctuation is an anomaly.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She feels a sense of unease regarding the unmentioned biological threats.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns off the TV sound and opens her tablet to check surveillance footage of her building's entrance. She observes men in protective gear carrying large bags. She also sees neighbors walking dogs and couriers delivering cooling supplies.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the activity around her building. She intends to assess the local reaction to the heatwave. She aims to see if anyone is preparing for a crisis.
descriptions.conflict: Some neighbors are being reckless in the heat. The influx of delivery drivers shows a surge in panic-buying.
descriptions.state: Analytical and observant.|Outting: Jiang Yan=none mentioned
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that some people are preparing for the insect threat while others are oblivious.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to consolidate her tasks for the following day. She reviews her upcoming deliveries of hydroponic units, ice makers, and protective capsules. She also notes the arrival of expensive British jet suits.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to organize her schedule. She intends to ensure all critical supplies arrive on time. She aims to prepare for the upcoming period of chaos.
descriptions.conflict: She has a massive amount of logistics to manage in a single day. The high cost of the equipment requires careful financial management.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She successfully rearranges her schedule to be ready for the next day.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reviews her financial plans, including a large cash withdrawal and converting money to gold. She plans to hide the remaining cash in her spatial storage. She prepares to collect her mother's jewelry from a bank vault.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her wealth. She intends to move from digital assets to physical gold and cash. She aims to protect her assets from the impending economic collapse.
descriptions.conflict: The transition from stability to chaos makes digital currency risky. She must manage large amounts of physical goods and cash.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a plan for total financial self-sufficiency.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares for sleep by turning off the lights. She considers the importance of having cash on hand rather than digital balances. She prepares her mind for the life-changing day ahead.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest before her busy day. She intends to mentally prepare for the upcoming challenges. She aims to achieve a state of readiness.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the future creates mental pressure. The need for physical cash vs digital balance is a central concern.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She settles in for sleep, but her peace is interrupted.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan attempts to enter her spatial storage via thought, but a loud, violent pounding on her door interrupts her. She becomes alarmed and grabs her tablet to check the security camera.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to investigate the source of the disturbance. She intends to identify the person at her door. She aims to maintain her security.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected and aggressive person is banging on her door. The sudden noise breaks her attempt to access her storage.
descriptions.relation: none
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the visitors through the camera.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan views the camera feed, seeing a large middle-aged man and a thin woman with hair in a bun. The woman holds a tray with a melting peach cake and a plastic fork. Both individuals are sweating profusely and flushed from the heat.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the threat level of the visitors. She intends to see why they are at her door. She aims to understand their condition.
descriptions.conflict: The visitors are visibly suffering from the extreme heat. The peach cake is melting, symbolizing the breakdown of order.

outfits.middle-aged man: none mentioned;woman=hair in a tight bun

descriptions.relation: The visitors are strangers approaching Jiang Yan's home.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes the neighbors are struggling with the heatwave.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan examines a surveillance image of a man who appears intoxicated with an unsteady gait and a blurred gaze. She questions the suspicious timing of the neighbors' visit with a cake at 10:00 PM. She contemplates apocalyptic scenarios where neighbors harbor ill intentions but tries to dismiss her anxiety.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the neighbors' motives. She seeks to determine if the late-night visit poses a threat. She attempts to rationalize her suspicion.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the neighbors' intentions creates internal tension. The sudden heatwave in Anmin makes the situation unpredictable.
descriptions.state: Suspicious and anxious, yet trying to remain rational.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan views the neighbors as potential threats.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to ignore the knocking initially but remains wary.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Zhou Guangfu, Zhang Chunmei
descriptions.scene: The neighbors, Zhou Guangfu and Zhang Chunmei, knock loudly and insistently on the door. Zhang Chunmei calls out to Jiang Yan, identifying themselves as neighbors from apartment 3203. Zhou Guangfu attempts to be polite and supports his wife's plea.
descriptions.intent: The neighbors want Jiang Yan to open the door. They aim to establish a friendly connection to gain entry. Zhou Guangfu wants to maintain politeness.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan refuses to answer, creating a barrier. The neighbors' persistence creates a confrontation.
descriptions.state: The neighbors are desperate and persistent; Jiang Yan is defensive.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors are attempting to bridge the gap with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The knocking intensifies, forcing Jiang Yan to make a decision.

descriptions.title: Zhang Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhang Chunmei snaps at her husband, Zhou Guangfu, for calling Jiang Yan a "girl" and accusing him of being an old lecher. Zhou Guangfu becomes embarrassed and flustered by her outburst. Zhang Chunmei ignores his reaction and continues knocking on the door.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Chunmei wants to correct her husband's terminology. She intends to focus solely on getting the door opened. Zhou Guangfu wants to de-escalate the tension.
descriptions.conflict: Internal conflict between the spouses regarding social etiquette. The tension of the situation causes friction.
descriptions.state: Zhang Chunmei is angry and aggressive; Zhou Guangfu is embarrassed and awkward.|Outability: None mentioned.
descriptions.relation: The couple is experiencing interpersonal friction.
descriptions.outcome: The verbal argument highlights the neighbors' unstable emotional state.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to check the neighbors' intentions since the apocalypse has not yet begun. She puts on a medical mask and prepares to open the inner door of her double-layered security system. She ensures her entryway is configured to prevent guests from seeing the rest of her apartment.

location.name: Jiang Yan's apartment entryway
location.description: featuring a bulletproof steel inner door and a metal grate outer door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to investigate the neighbors' request. She aims to maintain her privacy and security. She prepares herself for potential confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of letting strangers into her private space. The physical effort of moving to the door.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is preparing to face the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: She opens the inner door, exposing herself to the heat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Zhang Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: As the door opens, a wave of hot air from the hallway rushes into the air-conditioned apartment. The neighbors, Zhang Chunmei and Zhou Guangfu, feel immediate relief from the cool air. They step forward but freeze when they meet Jiang Yan's icy gaze.

location.name: The threshold of Jiang Yan's apartment
location.description: where cold air meets hot air

descriptions.intent: The neighbors want to enter the cool environment. Jiang Yan wants to maintain a boundary and intimidate them.
descriptions.conflict: The physical clash of temperatures. The social tension between the host and the intruders.
descriptions.state: The neighbors are relieved yet intimidated; Jiang and Yan is cold and unyielding.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors attempt to approach, but Jiang Yan asserts dominance.
descriptions.outcome: A tense standoff occurs at the doorway.

descriptions.title: Zhang Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhang Chunmei introduces herself and her husband, claiming they are neighbors from 323. She explains they want to share birthday cake with Jiang Yan. She also mentions they tried to contact her via the owners' chat but received no response.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: Zhang Chunmei wants to present a friendly, non-threatening persona. She aims to justify their unannounced visit. Zhou Guangfu supports the friendly narrative.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between their friendly words and their suspicious timing. Jiang Yan's skepticism.
descriptions.state: Zhang Chunmei is forcedly smiling and polite; Jiang Yan is indifferent.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors are attempting to build rapport through shared community.
descriptions.outcome: The neighbors present their initial "gift" as a pretext.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls her decision to leave the owners' chat to avoid unnecessary information. She dismisses the cake offer by stating she does not eat sweets. She tells the neighbors not to knock again and prepares to close the door.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to terminate the interaction. She aims to protect her solitude and privacy. She wants to avoid any further engagement with the neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbors' persistence versus Jiang Yan's desire for isolation.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is actively pushing the neighbors away.
descriptions.outcome: She turns to close the door, ending the conversation temporarily.

descriptions.title: Zhang Chunmei, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhang Chunmei stops Jiang Yan from closing the door by making a sudden request. Jiang Yan turns back with a dark, suspicious expression, demanding to know what they want. Zhang Chunmei becomes visibly nervous under the scrutiny.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: Zhang Chunmei wants to present her true request. Jiang Yan wants to uncover their hidden motive.
descriptions.conflict: The confrontation between the neighbors' hidden agenda and Jiang Yan's suspicion.
descriptions.state: Zhang Chunmei is nervous; Jiang Yan is menacing and suspicious.
descriptions.relation: The relationship shifts from polite neighbors to a confrontation of interests.
descriptions.outcome: The true purpose of the visit is revealed.

descriptions.title: Zhang Chunmu, Zhou Guangfu, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhang Chunmei explains that the 42-degree heat is unbearable for her children and elderly parents with heart problems. She reveals they have ordered an air conditioner but it won't arrive until tomorrow. She asks if they can stay in Jiang Yan's living room, offering to pay for the stay and electricity.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: The neighbors want to use Jiang Yan's apartment as a temporary hotel. They aim to use their family's vulnerability to gain sympathy. They want to negotiate a financial arrangement.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbors' need for cooling versus Jiang Yan's need for privacy and security. The imposition of their family's problems on her.
descriptions.state: Zhang Chunmei is pleading and desperate; Jiang Yan is listening.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors are attempting to manipulate Jiang Yan through guilt.
descriptions.outcome: The request is placed on the table, creating high tension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Zhang Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan suddenly breaks into a violent coughing fit, covering her mouth with her hand. The neighbors react with horror, turning pale and stepping back as they notice her medical mask. Jiang Yan continues to stare at them through the mask while coughing.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan uses the cough as a tactical move to scare them. The neighbors want to avoid contagion.
descriptions.conflict: The perceived threat of illness. The physical disruption of the conversation.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is performing/suffering; the neighbors are terrified.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors now view Jiang Yan as a biological threat.
descriptions.outcome: The neighbors' fear of infection becomes the central focus.

descriptions.title: Zhang Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhang Chunmei decides to proceed despite the perceived illness, suggesting the children and elderly wear double masks. Zhou Guangfu adds that they cannot stay in a hotel because of the heat and the recent reports of blood-sucking mosquitoes in Building D. They insist on staying near their home to monitor the situation.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: The neighbors want to finalize their plan to stay in Jiang Yan's apartment. They aim to neutralize the fear of infection with a solution. Zhou Guangfu wants to provide a logical reason for not using a hotel.
descriptions.conflict: The conflict between the risk of infection and the necessity of staying near their family. The threat of the mosquitoes.
descriptions.state: Zhang Chunmei is determined and resolute; Zhou Guangfu is persuasive and smiling.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors are doubling down on their attempt to move in.
descriptions.outcome: The neighbors present a finalized, albeit desperate, plan for occupation.

descriptions.title: Chou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Chou Guangfu presents a fake excuse to Dian Yan, claiming his parents have health issues and citing blood-sucking mosquitoes in Building D as a reason to stay near her apartment. He uses a forced smile to mask his true intentions.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to persuade Dian Yan to let them stay in her apartment. He uses family health and local pests as a pretext to justify proximity.
descriptions.conflict: Dian Yan is observing them from behind the door, skeptical of their performance.
descriptions.relation: Chou Guangfu is attempting to manipulate Dian Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The first part of the manipulation is completed, setting the stage for He Chunmei's intervention.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei joins the conversation, adding logical arguments and offering 100 yuan per night including electricity. She proposes they live in a tent for a few days while waiting for her air conditioner to be installed, promising to cook for Dian Yan.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to finalize the agreement by offering financial incentives and convenience. She aims to make the stay seem non-intrusive.
descriptions.conflict: She must overcome Dian Yan's potential resistance to strangers in her home.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is acting as a partner in the scheme with Chou Guangfu.
descriptions.outcome: The pressure on Dian Yan increases as the offer becomes more detailed.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan pretends to agree with the neighbors' sentiment about helping each other, but then mischievously asks them to pay off her credit card and mortgage debts. She uses their logic against them to mock their request.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to reject their request by using a ridiculous counter-offer. She aims to expose the absurdity of their "neighborly help" logic.
descriptions.conflict: She is facing the aggressive persuasion of the neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Dian Yan shifts from a passive observer to an active challenger.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully disrupts He Chunmei's momentum.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei's smile vanishes as Dian Yan's demand for debt payment hits her like a bucket of cold water. She experiences a physical shock, her face turning various shades of red and white, and she attempts to protest.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to defend her position and reject the absurd demand. She tries to clarify that debt payment is a different matter.
descriptions.conflict: Dian Yan's unexpected demand has insulted her and ruined her plan.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is now in direct confrontation with Dian Yan.
descriptions.outcome: He Chunmei is unable to finish her protest.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan slams the door shut with a loud bang, abruptly ending the interaction and cutting off He Chunmei's attempt to argue.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to terminate the conversation and exclude the neighbors. She seeks to end the social pressure.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbors are still standing right outside her door.
descriptions.relation: Dian Yan asserts her dominance by ignoring the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The door is closed, leaving the neighbors outside.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei stands stunned by the door, feeling insulted because she is used to commanding people. In a fit of rage, she raises her foot to kick the door, but stops when she catches Dian Yan's cold gaze through the door.

location.name: Apartment hallway
location.description: in front of the closed door

descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to retaliate against the disrespect. She initially intends to use physical force to express her anger.
descriptions.conflict: Dian Yan's intimidating gaze prevents her from kicking the door.
descriptions.state: Furious and insulted.|Outlam: She settles for stomping on the floor instead of kicking.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei feels victimized by Dian Yan's behavior.
descriptions.outcome: She vents her frustration by stomping the floor.

descriptions.title: Chou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Chou Guangfu attempts to calm his wife, arguing that their plan failed and that no one wants to live with strangers. He tries to justify the stay by mentioning the cheap rent and the layout of the apartment.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to de-escalate the conflict and persuade his wife to leave. He tries to use logic to minimize the failure.
descriptions.conflict: His wife is too angry to listen to reason.
descriptions.relation: Chou Guangfu acts as a mediator between his wife and the situation.
descriptions.outcome: He fails to immediately stop He Chunmei's outburst.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei begins to badmouth Dian Yan, calling her a "kept woman" and speculating that she bought the apartment with a man's money. She insults Dian Yan's character and suggests she is hiding her identity.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to vent her spite and justify her anger by demeaning the target. She seeks to reclaim her sense of superiority.
descriptions.conflict: Chou Guangfu tries to silence her to avoid being overheard.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is being aggressive and gossiping.
descriptions.outcome: Her insults become loud and public.

descriptions.title: Chou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Chou Guangfu tries to pull his wife away, fearing that others might overhear their scandalous gossip. He becomes sobered by the realization of the potential social consequences.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to avoid a public scene and protect their reputation. He attempts to lead his wife away from the scene.
descriptions.conflict: He Chunmei refuses to be quiet and continues to lash out.
descriptions.relation: Chou Guangfu is trying to control his wife's behavior.
descriptions.outcome: He manages to move her away, but the conflict continues.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei explodes at her husband, calling him a spineless loser and physically twisting his arm in rage. She then abruptly shifts to a manipulative tone, promising to give him her husband's pension money to appease him.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to express her total contempt for her husband. She then uses a bribe to end the immediate physical struggle.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically attacking her husband in her fury.
descriptions.relation: The relationship between the couple is highly toxic and violent.
descriptions.outcome: She hands him a cake and walks away, temporarily pacifying the situation.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan enters her secret space, observing the empty black soil and the unplanted rose bushes. She notes that the seedlings are in good condition but are not growing. She also looks at her living area, which currently only has a desk and a chair.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to check the progress of her hidden dimension. She plans to expand her living area.
descriptions.conflict: The plants are not growing despite being healthy.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares for the next phase of development.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: Dian Yan contemplates the construction of a new three-story mobile hotel module costing 6,000 yuan per square meter, featuring luxury amenities like a pool and cinema. She plans to install solar panels on the roof tomorrow.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to upgrade her living conditions to a luxury level. She aims to move her daily life into this module.
descriptions.conflict: The high cost of materials and the need for manual installation.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a clear goal for her upcoming tasks.

descriptions.title: Dian Yan
descriptions.scene: After spending time in her secret space, Dian Yan returns to her real apartment. She sets her air conditioner to night mode and goes to sleep to recover from her month of traveling.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to rest and recover from exhaustion. She seeks a full night of sleep.
descriptions.conflict: Physical exhaustion from recent travels.
descriptions.outcome: She falls asleep, ending the day's events.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan returns to her apartment after spending time in space. She configures her air conditioner to night mode and prepares for sleep. She seeks a full rest after a month of traveling abroad.

location.name: Jiang Yan's apartment
location.description: a private living space equipped with an air conditioner.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and recover from her travels. She aims to stabilize her environment for sleep. She seeks physical rejuvenation.
descriptions.conflict: The exhaustion from a month of international travel. The need for deep sleep after intense activity.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully settles into her apartment and goes to sleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up at seven in the morning and checks the thermometer. She is shocked to see the temperature has reached 45 degrees. She checks weather forecasts for different countries and realizes the heat is a global phenomenon.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the daily weather. She seeks to understand the current temperature. She aims to monitor environmental changes.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden and extreme rise in global temperature. The unexpected heatwave of 45 degrees.
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a global heatwave is occurring.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens a popular social media application to read the news. She encounters posts with hundreds of thousands of likes and comments regarding various disasters. She reads about typhoons, earthquakes, and the emergence of giant mutant mosquitoes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the public and governmental reaction to the heat. She seeks information on current global events. She aims to stay informed.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming amount of catastrophic news. The sudden appearance of biological and geological threats.
descriptions.outcome: She learns about the simultaneous occurrence of typhube, earthquakes, and mutant mosquitoes.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reads specific details about giant blood-sucking mosquitoes near an abandoned nuclear power plant. She learns that these mutants have double jaws and can drain a human completely. She notes that even the poles are no longer safe.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the level of biological threat. She seeks to understand the capabilities of the mutants. She aims to identify safe zones.
descriptions.conflict: The invasion of previously safe, frozen territories by mutants. The extreme lethality of the new species.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the scale of the biological catastrophe is global.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on her old social media post about the approaching Apocalypse. She realizes her post has become a trending topic, with people calling her a prophet. She remembers destroying her old SIM card while abroad.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the irony of her fame. She seeks to recall her previous actions regarding her identity. She aims to acknowledge her role in the current discourse.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between her current anonymity and her sudden fame. The destruction of her original digital identity.
props: Memories of a destroyed SIM card
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes that her warnings are being validated by the current chaos.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan analyzes the government's handling of the mosquito outbreak. She realizes that the government initially hid the information because the numbers were small. She observes that the sudden mass emergence suggests a deliberate activation.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to uncover the truth behind the news. She seeks to understand why the government is only speaking up now. She aims to identify the cause of the sudden surge.
descriptions.conflict: The government's initial suppression of information. The suspicious timing of the mass outbreak.
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the situation is being manipulated or has reached a breaking point.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan investigates the biological traits of the mutant mosquitoes. She learns they are resistant to extreme temperatures and have an increased life cycle. She notes the presence of radioactive traces in their bodies linked to the abandoned power plant.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the mutation's origin. She seeks to identify the link between radiation and evolution. She aims to comprehend the biological threat.
descriptions.conflict: The scientific impossibility of such rapid evolution. The presence of radioactive contamination in the ecosystem.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the environmental disaster began long before the official announcements.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reads about the extreme heat reaching 50-60 degrees in tropical regions. She sees news of people being advised to stockpile water and food. She observes the shift to remote learning and power grid strain.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the impact of the heat on civilization. She seeks to understand the societal response. She aims to monitor the stability of essential services.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme temperature spikes. The potential collapse of the power grid and food supplies.
descriptions.outcome: She understands that the global infrastructure is reaching its limit.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiangly Yan observes the chaos in Anmin, where the demand for air conditioner installers has skyrocketed. She sees images of emptied supermarkets and the rise of survivalist bloggers. She realizes the world is entering a state of total chaos.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to gauge the local impact in her city. She seeks to understand the level of public panic. She aims to observe the new social order.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming demand for services. The breakdown of the supply chain and the rise of panic.
descriptions.state: Realizing the gravity of the situation.
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes that the apocalypse has arrived earlier than expected.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan concludes that she returned to the country at the perfect, yet most dangerous, time. She realizes the approaching typhoons mean she must complete all her plans immediately. She decides there is no turning back and must act before it becomes impossible to go outside.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her survival. She seeks to finish her preparations before the weather worsens. She aims to execute her remaining plans before total lockdown.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching typhoons and the imminent impossibility of leaving the house. The shrinking window of opportunity.
descriptions.outcome: She commits to an urgent course of action to complete her plans.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reads news about approaching typhoons and realizes the apocalypse has arrived a month early. She decides she must complete all her plans immediately because leaving the house will soon become impossible. She feels a sense of extreme urgency and desperation.
descriptions.intent: To finalize all preparations before the weather becomes impassable.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching typhoons and the onset of the apocalypse threaten her ability to move.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to act immediately.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan calls her driver to arrange a pickup. The driver, who was considering canceling due to the news, agrees after she offers him triple pay. Dzyan Yan prepares her gear, including a protective suit, a helmet, and a portable fan.
descriptions.intent: To secure transportation despite the dangerous conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The driver's reluctance to leave his home due to the news.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: A protective suit, a helmet, and a small portable fan hanging from her neck.

descriptions.relation: Dzyan Yan uses financial leverage to persuade the driver.
descriptions.outcome: The driver agrees to the trip.

descriptions.title: Dzyan and Guards
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan exits her apartment building and finds the courtyards and entrances partially blocked by security. Guards explain that these are temporary measures to prevent panic and looting during the food shortage. They enforce a rule that only one person per family may go shopping.
descriptions.intent: To pass through the security checkpoint to reach her destination.
descriptions.conflict: Security restrictions and the threat of social chaos/looting.
descriptions.relation: Dzyan Yan interacts with the authorities.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to move toward the taxi.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan and Guards
descriptions.scene: The guards observe Dzyan Yan's heavy protective equipment with surprise. After checking her exit permit, they allow her to pass through the gates. She finds her taxi waiting for her.
descriptions.intent: To exit the residential area.
descriptions.conflict: The guards' scrutiny of her unusual gear.
descriptions.state: Dzyan Yan is prepared; Guards are surprised.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Full protective gear including a suit and helmet.

descriptions.relation: The guards permit her passage.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyan Yan successfully exits the gates.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan rides in the taxi through a city that appears to be on pause. The streets are nearly empty of people and cars, while water trucks spray moisture to combat the intense heat. Emergency vehicles pass by, highlighting the ongoing crisis.
descriptions.intent: To reach the rented warehouse.
descriptions.conflict: Extreme heat and the desolate, high-tension atmosphere of the city.
descriptions.outcome: She arrives at the warehouse.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Upon arriving at the warehouse, Dzyan Yan pays the driver and dismisses him. She decides to use her spatial storage to retrieve solar panels before the delivery truck arrives. She sets up a folding chair and sits down to wait.
descriptions.intent: To prepare the site by retrieving solar panels from her spatial storage.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure of time and the need to be ready for the arrival.
descriptions.relation: Dzyan Yan concludes her transaction with the driver.
descriptions.outcome: She is seated and ready for the delivery.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan, Lyu, and Crew
descriptions.scene: A truck arrives at the warehouse carrying a mobile capsule, a mounting crew, and the company owner, Mr. Lyu. Several cleaners in uniforms arrive with disinfection equipment. Lyu is present to personally oversee the 6-million-yuan project and meet Dzyan Yan.
descriptions.intent: To deliver and install the mobile capsule.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the logistical scale of the installation.
descriptions.relation: Lyu seeks to establish a business relationship with Dzyan Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The installation process begins.

descriptions.title: Lyu and Assistant
descriptions.scene: Lyu is startled by Dzyan Yan's heavy protective gear. His assistant quickly takes charge by distributing electrolytic water to the workers and ordering the cleaners to spray mosquito repellent throughout the warehouse. Lyu motivates the workers by promising bonuses and fans.
descriptions.intent: To manage the crew and ensure the work proceeds despite the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat and the threat of mutated mosquitoes.
descriptions.state: The assistant is proactive; the workers are motivated by rewards.
descriptions.relation: The assistant directs the workers.
descriptions.outcome: The workers begin working energetically.

descriptions.title: Lyu and Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Lyu approaches Dzyan Yan and offers her a chilled bottle of electrolytic water from his car fridge. He expresses concern that her protective suit will not prevent heatstroke. Dzyan Yan accepts the water and thanks him.
descriptions.intent: Lyu wants to show care and professionalism; Dzyan Yan wants to stay hydrated.
descriptions.conflict: The physical danger of heatstroke.
descriptions.state: Lyu is attentive and observant; Dzyan Yan is polite but brief.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Protective suit and helmet; Lyu=Fashionable clothing.

descriptions.relation: Lyu shows hospitality to a major client.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyan Yan accepts the water.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan and Lyu
descriptions.scene: Lyu questions the wisdom of installing the capsule in a warehouse, noting the lack of sunlight for the panels and the danger of mutated mosquitoes from the nearby weeds. Dzyan Yan gives a short, definitive "Yes" to his inquiry. Lyu accepts her decision and focuses on his job.
descriptions.intent: Lyu seeks clarification; Dzyan Yan intends to stick to her plan.
descriptions.conflict: The mismatch between the capsule's luxury design and the warehouse's harsh environment.
descriptions.state: Lyu is skeptical but respectful; Dzyan Yan is resolute.
descriptions.relation: Dzyan Yan asserts her authority as the client.
descriptions.outcome: The workers proceed with the heavy lifting and installation.

descriptions.title: Lulei
descriptions.scene: Lulei decides not to ask questions regarding the client's decision, maintaining his professional boundaries as a consultant. He observes the workers using two lifting mechanisms to unload and install a capsule.

location.name: Construction site
location.description: an area where a capsule is being mounted using heavy machinery

descriptions.intent: Lulei wants to fulfill his professional role by providing recommendations without overstepping. He aims to observe the technical process of the installation.
descriptions.conflict: The physical strain of the workers is evident as they struggle with the heavy capsule.

outfits.Lulely: business attire suitable for a consultant;Dzyanyan=casual clothing

descriptions.relation: Lulei acts as a professional advisor to Dzyanyan
descriptions.outcome: The installation process continues under the workers' supervision.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: After a brief conversation with Lulei, Dzyanyan finishes drinking water and prepares to check her news. Suddenly, her smart home security system triggers an alarm indicating an unauthorized presence at the entrance.

location.name: Dzyanyan's modern house
location.description: a high-tech residence equipped with advanced security sensors and cameras

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to check her news and maintain her home security. She intends to monitor the alert triggered by the system.
descriptions.conflict: An unauthorized intrusion is detected at her front door.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is the owner of the house being intruded upon
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan identifies a potential threat through her security interface.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan opens her security application to inspect the cameras. She discovers Hei Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu, two young children (Baubo and Beibei), and two elderly people standing at her door.

location.name: Dzyanyan's front door
location.description: a narrow passage blocked by the group of people

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to identify the people standing outside her door. She seeks to understand the nature of the intrusion.
descriptions.conflict: The group is physically blocking her entrance and appears to be part of a protest or plea.

outfits.Hei Chunmei: casual clothing;Zhou Guangfu=casual clothing;Baubo=child's clothing;Beibei=child's clothing;Elderly Man=aged clothing;Elderly Woman=aged clothing

descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan observes the group from a distance
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan realizes the group is her neighbors and they are in a state of distress.

descriptions.title: Hei Chunmei
descriptions.scene: Hei Chunmei instructs the children, Baubo and Beibei, to sit in front of Dzyanyan's door. She commands them to beg for entry to escape the heat and to grab Dzyanyan's legs if she refuses.
descriptions.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to force Dzyan Yan to open the door by using the children as leverage. She aims to use emotional manipulation to gain access to the air conditioning.
descriptions.conflict: The children are hesitant and fearful of their mother's hammer.
descriptions.relation: Hei Chunmei is the mother of the children and leader of the group
descriptions.outcome: The boy, Baubo, obeys silently while the girl remains more active.

descriptions.title: Zhou Shanyu
descriptions.scene: The elderly man, Zhou Shanyu, reacts with outrage to the idea of begging. He strikes his cane against the ground and pulls his wife away, declaring that he would rather die in the heat than live in shame.

location.name: The narrow passage in front of the door

descriptions.intent: Zhou Shanyu wants to preserve his dignity and refuse the act of begging. He intends to retreat from the door to avoid humiliation.
descriptions.conflict: His internal pride conflicts with the desperate need for relief from the heat.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Shanyu is the husband of the elderly woman
descriptions.outcome: He pulls his wife away from the door, attempting to end the confrontation.

descriptions.title: Hei Chunmei
descriptions.scene: Hei Chunmei confronts the elderly couple with harsh truths about the extreme heat and the lack of medical resources. She argues that they must abandon pride because the children are sick and the hospitals are full.
descriptions.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to convince the couple to continue the protest. She aims to break their resistance by highlighting the life-threatening situation.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat (47 degrees) and the medical crisis in the city.
descriptions.state: Aggressive and forceful, like a machine gun.

outfits.Hei Chunmei: casual clothing;Zhou Shanyu=aged clothing;Elderly Woman=aged clothing

descriptions.relation: Hei Chunmei is arguing against the couple's principles
descriptions.outcome: She delivers a scathing verbal attack to motivate them.

descriptions.title: Zhou Shanyu
descriptions.scene: Overwhelmed by the intensity of the argument and the heat, Zhou Shanyu becomes enraged. He strikes the floor with his cane so hard that the tiles vibrate, but then suddenly turns pale and collapses.

location.name: The tiled area in front of the door

descriptions.intent: Zhou Sharyu wants to express his anger and reject the accusations. He intends to assert his dominance through physical force.
descriptions.conflict: The physical and emotional stress of the heat and the argument.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Shanyu collapses onto the floor.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Upon seeing his father collapse, Zhou Guangfu rushes to pick him up. The children, Baubo and Beibei, jump up in fear, knocking over chairs in the process.

location.name: The area in front of the door

descriptions.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to save his father. The children want to react to the sudden chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden medical emergency of the patriarch.

outfits.Zhou Guangfu: casual clothing;Baubo=child's clothing;Beibei=child's clothing;Dzyan Lifan=casual clothing

descriptions.relation: Zhou Guangfu is the son of the collapsed man
descriptions.outcome: The father is lifted into his son's arms.

descriptions.title: Hei Chunmei
descriptions.scene: Despite the chaos, Hei Chunmei regains her composure and instructs Zhou Guangfu to take his father home to rest. She declares her intention to continue knocking on Dzyanyan's door.
descriptions.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to maintain the pressure on Dzyanyan. She intends to keep the protest going despite the setback.
descriptions.conflict: The physical collapse of the protest leader's father.
descriptions.relation: Hei Chunmei is directing Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Guangfu begins to move his father away.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhou Guangfu sighs heavily and urges his wife to stop the protest and return home. He is motivated by the need to care for his father and the stability of the family income.

location.name: The path leading away from the door

descriptions.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to end the confrontation and return home. He aims to protect the family's remaining stability.
descriptions.conflict: The conflict between his wife's persistence and his need for domestic stability.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Guangfu is the husband of Hei Chunmei
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to retreat from the door.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhou Guangfu sighs heavily and attempts to persuade his wife to leave the apartment door and return home. He emphasizes the stability of his pension and the lack of value in Lifan. He wants to avoid further conflict and return to the safety of their home.

location.name: Apartment hallway
location.description: outside apartment 3.202, hot and tense atmosphere

descriptions.intent: He wants to convince his wife to stop the confrontation and go home. He seeks to avoid escalation and maintain family stability.
descriptions.conflict: Hechunmei's extreme anxiety and refusal to leave the children in the heat.
descriptions.relation: Husband to wife
descriptions.outcome: He fails to change her mind immediately but prepares to retreat.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei declares her refusal to leave the children to suffer from heatstroke. She expresses her willingness to face imprisonment if it means securing an air conditioner for her children. She commands the children to stay by her side.
descriptions.intent: She wants to ensure her children's survival and obtain an air conditioner. She is driven by a desperate need to protect them from the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the physical symptoms of her children (vomiting and fever).
descriptions.relation: Mother to children
descriptions.outcome: She decides to stay and fight for the apartment.

descriptions.title: He Chunintmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei begins violently pounding on the door of apartment 3.202. She screams for the girl inside to open the door immediately. Her actions are fueled by desperation and rage.
descriptions.intent: She wants the door to be opened so the children can enter the cooled apartment.
descriptions.conflict: The locked door and the lack of response from the resident.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor to resident
descriptions.outcome: The door remains closed, and Zhou Guangfu leads the parents away.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the confrontation through her security camera. She recognizes the situation as a classic case of people fighting over resources. She decides not to open the door to prevent the neighbors from seizing her apartment.
descriptions.intent: She wants to protect her resources and prevent the neighbors from taking over her home. She aims to maintain her boundaries during the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The persistent and aggressive neighbors threatening her peace and property.
descriptions.relation: Observer to neighbors
descriptions.outcome: She decides to implement a defensive measure.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei threatens to break the door using a small hammer. She swings the hammer at the electronic lock with great force. She is sweating heavily from the heat and the physical exertion.
descriptions.intent: She wants to break the electronic lock to gain entry to the apartment.
descriptions.conflict: The electronic lock is too strong to be broken by a small hammer.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor to the door
descriptions.outcome: The lock remains intact, and she realizes the door cannot be easily breached.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan activates the apartment's defense system at a minimal level of 110V. She chooses not to kill the intruder because the apocalypse has not fully arrived and children are nearby. She allows the system to react to the physical contact with the door.
descriptions.intent: She wants to deter the intruder without causing death. She aims to use a non-lethal warning.
descriptions.conflict: The need to defend the apartment versus the ethical constraint of not killing.
descriptions.relation: Defender to intruder
descriptions.outcome: The system delivers an electric shock to He Chunmei.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei strikes the door with her palm and receives a powerful electric shock. She feels a sensation like thousands of ants biting her skin. She screams in pain and falls back, dropping her hammer.
descriptions.intent: She was attempting to force entry through physical force.
descriptions.conflict: The electric shock from the activated defense system.
descriptions.state: In intense physical pain and shock.
descriptions.relation: Victim of the defense system
descriptions.outcome: She is physically incapacitated by the shock.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei looks through the peephole but sees nothing suspicious. She realizes she has been repelled but begins to formulate a new plan. She decides to recruit other vulnerable neighbors to use collective pressure to take the apartment.
descriptions.intent: She wants to organize a group of neighbors to pressure Jiang Yan. She aims to use social and moral pressure to achieve her goal.
descriptions.conflict: Her inability to break in alone.
descriptions.relation: Strategizing against Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use a group tactic.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei uses her phone to send a message to the building's group chat. She invites neighbors with elderly, children, or pregnant members to contact her regarding the need for air conditioning. She receives an immediate reply from a resident of A71.
descriptions.intent: She wants to gather allies for her cause. She seeks to create a coalition of people in need.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of acting alone against a fortified apartment.
descriptions.relation: Initiator of a group movement
descriptions.outcome: She establishes contact with a potential ally.

descriptions.title: Lu Lei
descriptions.scene: Lu Lei and his team finish assembling the apple capsule and installing solar panels. They wait for the cleaning crew to wash the interior and exterior of the equipment. They also receive new supplies like jet suits and irrigation systems.
descriptions.intent: He wants to complete the technical setup and ensure all equipment is clean and functional. He aims to prepare for the upcoming challenges.
descriptions.conflict: The need for thorough cleaning and the logistical management of new arrivals.
descriptions.relation: Leader to his team
descriptions.outcome: The equipment is ready and stored.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan collects the newly arrived equipment and supplies into her storage space. She prepares for a break before the bank opens. She eats a meal of spicy cold beef noodles and a coconut milk cocktail.
descriptions.intent: She wants to secure her resources and nourish herself. She aims to maintain her strength and energy.
descriptions.conflict: Hunger and the need for replenishment.
descriptions.relation: Owner of the supplies
descriptions.outcome: She successfully stores the items and eats her meal.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan retrieves a portion of cold beef noodles and a coconut milk cocktail from her spatial storage to eat. She enjoys the spicy, sour taste of the noodles she previously bought from a small, hidden shop. She sits on a bench to rest and eat her meal.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to quickly eat a meal to regain energy. She seeks a moment of rest during her busy day. She wants to enjoy the specific taste of her favorite noodles.
descriptions.conflict: The heat of the day is approaching. She must balance her need for rest with her upcoming travel.
descriptions.state: Calm and focused on the meal.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan finishes her meal and prepares for her next task.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan decides not to enter her temperature-controlled storage space to avoid a sudden temperature shock. She prepares herself for a long day of traveling through the intense heat. She retrieves a brand new Harley motorcycle from her spatial storage.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyenu wants to avoid getting sick from temperature changes. She intends to start her journey to the bank. She wants to use the most efficient vehicle for her needs.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat of the street threatens her health. The transition from storage to the outside is physically risky.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan begins her journey on the motorcycle.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan rides the unregistered Harley motorcycle at full speed toward the bank. She acknowledges the risk of being fined or having the bike confiscated by the police. She prioritizes saving time due to the approaching apocalypse over legal compliance.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to reach the bank as quickly as possible. She aims to secure her assets before the situation worsens. She intends to bypass legal risks to save time.
descriptions.conflict: The motorcycle is illegal and lacks license plates. The threat of police intervention and vehicle seizure exists. The approaching apocalypse creates extreme urgency.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan reaches her destination despite the legal risks.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan arrives at the bank and observes the skyrocketing price of gold, which has risen from 800 to over 2000 yuan per gram. She notices the panic and the crowd of people rushing to jewelry stores to buy gold. She decides to bypass the queues by using her mother's VIP status.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to purchase gold bullion. She aims to avoid the long lines of panicked citizens. She intends to use her family connections to expedite the process.
descriptions.conflict: Gold prices are rising rapidly due to economic panic. Jewelry stores are overcrowded with people seeking protection.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan successfully acquires gold.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan visits a gold refinery belonging to a major brand to utilize her mother's VIP status. She also retrieves family jewelry from the bank's vault. After completing her transactions, she mounts her motorcycle to head toward the Tianshuiwan residential area.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to complete her gold purchase at the refinery. She intends to collect her family's precious jewelry. She aims to return to her residential area.
descriptions.conflict: The need to move quickly before the situation deteriorates. The pressure of the ongoing economic crisis.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan departs for Tianshuiwan with her new assets.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan rides through the city, listening to news via her Bluetooth headset. She observes the extreme 50-degree heat, the melting asphalt, and the crowds of people fainting from the heat. She sees long lines at gas stations, shops, and pharmacies.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to stay informed about the current situation. She is navigating through a chaotic urban landscape. She intends to reach her destination safely.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme temperature of 50 degrees Celsius. The physical danger of the melting asphalt. The chaos of crowded essential services.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan continues her journey through the heat.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyuan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyuan observes the social breakdown, including people bypassing security to find air conditioning in malls and the overcrowding of the metro. She notes that people are working in offices despite work-from-home orders just to escape the heat. She sees the threat of giant mosquitoes and the danger of car fires.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyuan is monitoring the level of societal collapse. She observes the various ways people are struggling to survive the heat. She is aware of the biological threats.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of giant mosquitoes. The danger of vehicle fires and building fires. The breakdown of social order and security.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyuan gains a full picture of the escalating crisis.

descriptions.title: Jou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: In Tianshuiwan, Jou Guangfu helps his father into their home and ensures his condition is stable. He grabs his electric bicycle keys and rushes outside. He realizes the family needs to restock food and medicine, especially for the children.
descriptions.intent: Jou Guangfu wants to ensure his father's safety. He intends to go out and replenish much-needed supplies. He aims to protect his family from the growing scarcity.
descriptions.conflict: The depletion of essential medicines like fever reducers and aspirin. The difficulty of accessing hospitals due to massive queues. The threat of giant mosquitoes.
descriptions.relation: Jou Guangfu is caring for his father.
descriptions.outcome: Jou Guangfu leaves the house to find supplies.

descriptions.title: Jou Guangfu's Family
descriptions.scene: Jou Guangfu's mother helps care for the grandchildren by wiping their bodies with wet towels to lower their fever. The young boy wipes himself with water from a basin. The apartment is stiflingly hot like a sauna, and the water from the tap is scalding hot.
descriptions.intent: The mother wants to reduce the children's fever. The boy wants to clean himself. The family aims to survive the heat and the mosquito threat.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat inside the apartment. The lack of cold water. The threat of giant mosquitoes entering through windows. The scarcity of water.
descriptions.relation: The mother is caretaking for the children.
descriptions.outcome: The family remains trapped in the heat, struggling to maintain health.

descriptions.title: Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: Haechun Mei stays in her sweltering apartment, observing the extreme heat and the lack of cold water. She decides to keep her plan to attack the neighbors in apartment 3201 a secret from her husband and the general residents' chat. She prepares for a coordinated action with other residents.

location.name: Haechun Mei's apartment
location.description: a top-floor unit that feels like a sauna with closed windows and hot running water

descriptions.intent: She wants to organize a group to seize access to a cooled room. She intends to act without alerting her husband to avoid domestic conflict.
descriptions.conflict: The unbearable heat and the depletion of cold water supplies. The physical discomfort of the environment threatens their survival.

outfits.Haechun Mei: casual home clothing suitable for extreme heat.

descriptions.relation: Keeping secrets from her husband
descriptions.outcome: The plan is set in motion in secret.

descriptions.title: Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: A crowd of over twenty people gathers on the 32nd floor, consisting mostly of young mothers and two pregnant women. Some mothers, seeing their children's health declining due to the heat, join the group after reading Haechun Mei's message. The group prepares to confront the neighbor.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a crowded area filled with distressed residents

descriptions.intent: The mothers want to protect their children from heatstroke. They seek to find a way to access air-conditioned space.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat is causing health issues in children and the elderly. The moral dilemma of invading someone else's space.
descriptions.relation: The residents unite under Haechun Mei's leadership.
descriptions.outcome: A large, motivated group is formed.

descriptions.title: Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: The group arrives at the target location but discovers there is no ready air conditioner to take. Haechun Mei proposes a new plan: to collectively demand access to the cooled room. Some residents feel uncomfortable with this immoral approach and leave the group.
descriptions.intent: Haechun Mei wants to pivot the plan from taking a machine to demanding entry to the room. She aims to maintain the group's momentum.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of a physical object to seize. The moral conflict regarding the legality and ethics of their actions.

outfits.Haechun Mei: casual summer attire; Residents=various summer clothes

descriptions.relation: Tension between the leader and the morally hesitant members.
descriptions.outcome: The group splits into those who leave and those who stay.

descriptions.title: Haechun and a Young Girl
descriptions.scene: Haechun Mei stands at a distance from the door, holding a megaphone found in a storage closet. A young girl from the crowd questions the legality of their plan, searching for information on her phone. Haechun Mei avoids knocking on the door to prevent a repeat of a previous confrontation involving a stun gun.
descriptions.intent: Haechun Mei wants to use noise to force the neighbor, Zian Yan, out of the apartment. The girl wants to verify if their actions are lawful.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of legal repercussions and the memory of past violent encounters. The heat makes using phones difficult.
descriptions.state: Haechun Mei is strategic; the girl is cautious.
descriptions.relation: The girl acts as a skeptical subordinate.
descriptions.outcome: The legality of the protest is brought into question.

descriptions.title: Young Girl and the Crowd
descriptions.scene: The young girl reads aloud from her phone that blocking doors is a civil offense and a violation of freedom of movement. The crowd falls silent as they process this legal information. The heat causes the phones to overheat, making the task difficult.
descriptions.intent: The girl intends to inform the group of the legal risks. The crowd seeks clarity on their standing.
descriptions.conflict: The legal definition of their actions as a crime. The physical difficulty of using technology in the heat.
descriptions.state: The crowd is stunned and contemplative.
descriptions.relation: The crowd listens to the girl's findings.
descriptions.outcome: A moment of hesitation occurs within the group.

descriptions.title: Haechun Mei and Residents
descriptions.scene: Haechun Mei dismisses the concern about the law, noting that most security guards have been called to the police due to manpower shortages. Another woman joins in, noting that riots and looting are happening elsewhere, making the law currently ineffective. The group discusses the chaos of the current era.
descriptions.intent: Haechun Mei wants to invalidate the fear of the law. The woman wants to validate the sense of lawlessness.
descriptions.conflict: The breakdown of social order and the absence of police presence. The fear of the "end of the world."
descriptions.state: Haechun Mei is indignant; the woman is cynical.
descriptions.relation: The women reinforce each other's cynicism.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to feel that the law cannot protect the neighbor.

descriptions.title: A Mother and the Crowd
descriptions.scene: A mother mentions that the police won't bother with small matters because they are overwhelmed by the heat and the "end of the world." She shares a story about her husband being pushed away while trying to buy a refrigerator. The crowd discusses the scarcity of cooling resources.
descriptions.intent: The mother wants to highlight the desperation of the situation. The crowd seeks to vent their frustrations.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme scarcity of cooling appliances and the breakdown of commerce. The struggle to survive the heat.
descriptions.relation: The mother shares personal hardship with the group.
descriptions.outcome: The sense of shared struggle deepens the group's resolve.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi expresses her anger, accusing the neighbor of being an egoist for using air conditioning alone while others suffer. She reveals her personal tragedy: her son is sick with fever, and her husband died because of the neighbor's actions. She expresses a desire to physically crush the neighbor.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to condemn the neighbor's selfishness. She seeks vengeance for her family's loss.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbor's perceived selfishness versus the group's need. Zhang Qiqi's personal vendetta and past debt.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qiqi is boiling with hatred.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi becomes the emotional catalyst for the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group's anger is redirected toward a specific target.

descriptions.title: Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: Haechun Mei notices the hesitation in the crowd and uses the threat of heatstroke to motivate them. She reminds them that doctors warn of death from heatstroke and that hospitals are full. Her speech successfully pushes the remaining hesitant members, including an elderly man, to stay.
descriptions.intent: Haechun Mei wants to eliminate any remaining doubt. She aims to use fear for the children's safety to solidify the group.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of death and the medical crisis. The internal struggle of the elderly man to leave.
descriptions.state: Haechun Mei is manipulative and motivating.
descriptions.relation: Haechun Mei takes command of the group's emotions.
descriptions.outcome: The group's resolve is fully strengthened.

descriptions.title: Pregnant Woman and Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: A pregnant woman mentions seeing a beautiful, strangely dressed woman leaving the building earlier that morning. Haechun Mei realizes this explains why the neighbor hasn't opened the door. The group begins to formulate a plan to wait for the neighbor's return.
descriptions.intent: The woman provides new information. Haechun Mei wants to interpret this information to refine the plan.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of the stranger's identity. The uncertainty of when the target will return.
descriptions.state: The woman is observant; Haechun Mei is realization-driven.
descriptions.relation: New information links the group to the neighbor's movements.
descriptions.outcome: The group decides to wait for the neighbor.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi and Haechun Mei
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi proposes a more aggressive plan: if the neighbor won't open the door, they will take the keys. She notes the neighbor has a fingerprint and code lock, but she remains undeterred. Haechun Mei nods, agreeing to the plan of waiting and waiting for the opportunity.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to seize the apartment by force. Haechun Mei wants to execute the plan of waiting.
descriptions.conflict: The high-tech security of the apartment (fingerprint/code). The physical difficulty of bypassing the lock.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qiqi is cunning and determined; Haechun Mei is resolute.
descriptions.relation: The two leaders align on a new, more aggressive strategy.
descriptions.outcome: The group commits to a siege-like waiting tactic.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi makes eye contact with Hechun Mei and nods to signal a shared plan to wait. She decides to stay put since there is no urgent business and her children are resting at home. She observes the growing crowd's determination.

location.name: Residential courtyard
location.description: a crowded area outside apartment buildings during a heatwave

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to coordinate a plan with Hechun Mei to wait out the heat. She aims to maintain a calm facade despite the tension.
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat and the growing unrest of the crowd.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: A tight-fitting dress with a floral pattern that emphasizes her slender figure.

descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi and Hechun Mei are allies/neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The two women agree to wait together.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi asks Hechun Mei if she has disposable cups available. She uses a flirtatious gesture, adjusting her long hair, to mask her true intentions. She proposes a plan to make a plum drink for everyone.

location.name: Residential courtyard
location.description: near the entrance of the apartment block

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to obtain cups to facilitate a social gathering. She intends to use the drink as a way to bring her son into the group.
descriptions.conflict: Hechun Mei is initially surprised by the request.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: A tight-fitting dress with a floral pattern; Hechun Mei=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is acting friendly toward Hechun Mei.
descriptions.outcome: The idea of making a drink is presented to the crowd.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: The gathered neighbors begin whispering and admiring Zhang Qiqi's youth and beauty. A woman who previously protested the door blockade expresses shock at Qiqi's motherhood. Other women comment on her fit physique and fresh face.
descriptions.intent: The neighbors want to gossip and evaluate Zhang Qiqi's character.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbors' judgment of the "selfish" resident in apartment 3021.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: Floral tight dress; A young woman=Not specified; A middle-aged woman=Not specified

descriptions.relation: The crowd views Zhang Qiqi as a model of good neighborliness.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi gains social approval and becomes the center of positive attention.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: A pregnant woman asks Zhang Qiqi about her husband's occupation and why he left her alone in the heat. Zhang Qiqi lies, claiming her husband is a distant sailor facing hardships at sea. She pretends to sigh heavily to gain sympathy.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to hide the truth about her husband's absence. She aims to deflect curiosity about her private life.
descriptions.conflict: The pregnant woman's intrusive curiosity about her husband.
descriptions.relation: The pregnant woman is interrogating Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi successfully creates a sympathetic persona through a lie.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: The neighbors praise the high salary of a sailor and congratulate Qiqi on her beauty. Zhang Qiqi feels internal conflict and tension despite her forced smile. She quickly ends the conversation to go fetch the plum powder.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to escape the intense questioning. She needs to retrieve the supplies she promised.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure of social scrutiny and the heat.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is distancing herself from the group.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi leaves the crowd toward the elevator.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: As soon as the elevator doors close, Zhang Qiqi's expression shifts from charming to cold and stern. She drops her social mask entirely.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to regain her true composure.
descriptions.conflict: The need to maintain a facade in public.
descriptions.state: Cold and severe.|Outting: Zhang Qiqi=Not specified
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Her true personality is revealed in private.

descriptions.title: Hechun Mei
descriptions.scene: Hechun Mei proposes that the majority of the neighbors move to her apartment to wait out the heat. She suggests a rotation where some stay outside to watch for the elevator's arrival at the 30th floor. The exhausted crowd agrees to the plan.
descriptions.intent: Hechun Mei wants to organize the crowd for safety and comfort. She aims to keep a lookout for the residents.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and exhaustion of the neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Hechun Mei takes charge of the group.
descriptions.outcome: The neighbors agree to move to Hechun Mei's home.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan returns to the Cianshuiwan complex around 5 PM in 55-degree heat. She enters a quiet alleyway to hide her motorcycle in a secret storage spot to avoid cameras. She prepares a backpack with noodles and paper towels to look like a normal shopper.

location.name: A quiet alleyway near Cianshuiwan complex

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid detection by surveillance. She aims to maintain a cover story of being a regular shopper.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme temperature and the need for secrecy.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A strange hat (later removed), a cap, and sunglasses

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully hides her motorcycle and prepares her disguise.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the residential complex and discovers dead black birds and a dead cat on the ground. She observes the carnage caused by the heat. She notices the intense heat is even felt through her clothing.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her apartment. She observes the environmental impact of the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the sight of dead animals.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues toward her building despite the grim scene.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the elevator, noting that her smart home system has been silent. She reaches the 32nd floor and steps out of the elevator. Upon opening the doors, she freezes in shock at a sight that haunts her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return to her apartment. She is interrupted by a traumatic discovery.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected and shocking scene at her doorstep.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is left staring at a life-altering sight.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan assumes Hunm will not disturb her and enters the elevator while carrying a heavy load. She travels up to the thirty-second floor. Upon the doors opening, she stops abruptly in shock.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return to her apartment and rest. She intends to avoid any confrontation with Hunm. She seeks to reach her home undisturbed.
descriptions.conflict: The physical weight of the load she carries. The unexpected sight of a crowd blocking her path.
descriptions.state: Initially calm and unbothered, then suddenly shocked and frozen.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing sunglasses that hide her facial expressions.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a crowd blocking her apartment entrance.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan steps out of the elevator and sees a crowd of about ten people, including men, women, the elderly, and pregnant women, blocking the narrow passage. The crowd turns to stare at her with a mix of hope, hostility, and envy. She recognizes He Chunmei and Zhang Qiqi leading the group.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a narrow passage blocked by a crowd of diverse neighbors

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the situation and identify the leaders. She seeks to understand why the neighbors are gathered at her door.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is physically obstructing her path. The neighbors' gazes are filled with malice and resentment.
descriptions.state: Shocked, then deeply irritated and physically tense.

outfits.Jiang and neighbors: Not specifically described beyond the presence of various ages and types.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan recognizes the hostility of the neighbors and the alliance between He Chunmei and Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes her neighbors have formed an alliance against her.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei approaches Jiang Yan with a forced smile and greets her. She claims the neighbors want to stay in Jiang Yan's apartment because it has two air conditioners. She hides her previous malice to avoid looking rude in front of the neighbors.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: in front of Jiang Yan's apartment

descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to secure a place to stay in the air-conditioned apartment. She wants to avoid being excluded from the group's plan. She aims to manipulate Jiang Yan without causing a public scene.
descriptions.conflict: Her previous hatred for Jiang Yan conflicts with her need to be polite. The risk of being rejected by the group if she is too aggressive.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is acting as a deceptive negotiator toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: She presents a demand for housing under the guise of a polite request.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks coldly at the crowd, expressing her irritation. She asks the crowd if they are certain they intend to continue standing there. She uses her voice to exert pressure and a sense of reproach.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reclaim her space and force the crowd to move. She intends to intimidate them into leaving her doorstep.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's physical presence and their refusal to move. The social pressure of the gathered neighbors.
descriptions.state: Cold, irritated, and authoritative.|Outably: Jiang Yan=Wearing sunglasses that hide her eyes.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan asserts dominance over the gathered neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd falls silent and turns to look at the leaders, Zhang Qiqi and He Chunmei.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi feels a tremor of fear because Jiang Yan's voice sounds familiar. She recognizes the facial features of Jiang Yan, recalling a person from her past. She remembers her secret connection to Jiang Yan's deceased mother through Sundemin.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to process the recognition of Jiang Yan's identity. She seeks to reconcile her past knowledge with the current person standing before her.
descriptions.conflict: The internal conflict of recognizing a target she previously stalked as a hater. The fear of being identified.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi recognizes Jiang Yan's lineage but believes she is still unrecognized.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the connection between Jiang Yan and the person she used to spy on.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi recalls her history as a hater of Jiang Yan's blog and her secret surveillance of her. She concludes that Jiang Yan could not be the billionaire's daughter hiding from justice because she lives in such an old complex. She then decides to propose a financial deal to the group.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to limit the number of people who want to stay in the apartment. She intends to use a high price to ensure only she and her son can stay comfortably. She wants to avoid sharing the space with the elderly.
