descriptions.conflict: The desire to live comfortably versus the need to appear part of the group's movement. The risk of being seen as greedy.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi manipulates the group's expectations.
descriptions.outcome: She proposes a price of 500 yuan per person per day.

descriptions.title: Neighbors
descriptions.scene: The neighbors are stunned by the high price of 500 yuan per person. He Chunmei looks at Zhang Qiqi in surprise at the audacity of the amount. The crowd realizes Zhang Qiqi is intentionally inflating the price.
descriptions.intent: The neighbors want to understand the sudden change in the negotiation. He Chunmei wants to gauge Zhang Qict's true intention.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cost of the proposed stay. The shock of the sudden price hike.
descriptions.relation: The neighbors are reacting to Zhang Qiqi's manipulation.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is left in a state of disbelief.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi tells her son, Song Fei, to try and persuade the "beautiful aunt" (Jiang Yan). She pats her son on the shoulder to encourage him. She watches Jiang Yan's reaction closely.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants her son to help negotiate the deal. She intends to use her son as a tool for persuasion.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of persuading someone who is clearly uninterested.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is directing her son to interact with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The plan is interrupted by Jiang Yan's sudden movement.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan suddenly turns around and walks back toward the elevator. She presses the button to call the elevator and descends to the first floor. She leaves the crowd behind without saying a word.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to escape the confrontation. She intends to avoid the negotiation and the crowd entirely.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's presence and the ongoing negotiation attempt.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan abandons the confrontation with the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is left in a state of total shock.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunly assures the crowd that Jiang Yan will return. She pulls Zhang Qiqi toward a window and instructs her to alert the group if the elevator starts going back up. She remains vigilant for Jiang Yan's return.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to maintain the blockade. She intends to catch Jiang Yan when she returns.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether Jiang Yan will actually come back.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei takes charge of the group's monitoring.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi agrees to watch the elevator.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the first floor but does not exit the building. Instead, she slips into the stairwell to think. She realizes that calling the police is useless due to overloaded lines and that a direct confrontation is too dangerous. She considers using a jetpack from her spatial storage.

location.name: First floor stairwell of the apartment building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to devise a plan to get home safely. She intends to avoid a public shootout or a physical fight with the crowd. She seeks a way to bypass the blockade.
descriptions.conflict: Overloaded police lines. The impossibility of a direct physical breakthrough against a crowd. The risk of a public scene.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides that she needs a more sophisticated plan than just running or fighting.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan examines her jetpack and contemplates her escape options. She considers hiding in a secluded place or returning home through a window at night. She decides that running away is a sign of weakness that would embolden her neighbors.

location.name: Dzyanyan's apartment
location.description: a room containing a jetpack inspired by Bear Grylls' show.

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to avoid appearing weak to her neighbors. She aims to establish a position of strength to stop the bullying once and for all.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure from neighbors and the specific provocation from Zhang Qiqi.
props: A jetpack capable of 8-10 minutes of flight at 18/800m altitude.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan views her neighbors as oppressors.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to confront her enemies instead of fleeing.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan checks her surroundings to ensure she is alone. She accesses her spatial storage to retrieve a powerful German-made lithium chainsaw with a 15m blade. She activates the saw, listening to its piercing hum with satisfaction.

location.name: Dzyanyan's apartment
location.description: near the spatial storage access point.

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to prepare a weapon for confrontation. She seeks a tool that can effectively intimidate or strike back.
descriptions.conflict: The need for a powerful weapon to face the crowd.
descriptions.state: Cunning and satisfied with a smirk.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is preparing for a physical confrontation.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully arms herself and begins moving up the stairs.

descriptions.title: Hechun
descriptions.scene: Songfei notices the elevator rising. Hechun tells Zhang Qiqi that Dzyanyan is returning. She warns that the arrival coincides with the time when blood mosquitoes begin their mass attack.
descriptions.intent: Hechun wants to warn Zhang Qiqi about the danger of Dzyanyan's return. She aims to predict the timing of the mosquito attack.
descriptions.conflict: The impending arrival of Dzyanyan and the biological threat of the mosquitoes.

outfits.Hechun: Not specified; Zhang Qiqi=Not specified; Songly=Not specified.

descriptions.relation: Hechun is acting as a protective/instructive figure to Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: The group becomes aware of the timing of the potential conflict.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: The protesters realize the severity of the situation due to the government warning about blood mosquitoes. They recall the instruction to stay indoors and close windows before 5:30 PM. Some residents from other buildings are also present.
descriptions.intent: The crowd wants to continue their siege of apartment 3.201. They aim to capture the apartment despite the biological risk.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of the blood mosquito attack versus the desire to complete the siege.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is united in their goal to take the apartment.
descriptions.outcome: The group decides to stay and continue the protest despite the danger.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: The elevator struggles to reach the 32nd floor because it keeps stopping at other levels. This is caused by the heavy flow of residents returning home. The crowd begins to feel doubt about Dzyanness's actual arrival.
descriptions.intent: The crowd wants the elevator to reach the target floor. They are waiting for visual confirmation of Dzyanyan.
descriptions.conflict: The physical delay of the elevator due to other residents.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is waiting for a specific person.
descriptions.outcome: Uncertainty grows among the protesters.

descriptions.title: Su Dai and Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: A young couple, Su Dai and Sun Zhentao, exits apartment 3.24. The man is muscular with short hair, and the woman has a high ponytail. They are wearing athletic clothes and fitness bracelets.
descriptions.intent: The couple is returning home after a walk. They are simply moving through the building.
descriptions.conflict: They are walking into the middle of a protest.

outfits.fitness bracelet;Sun Zhentao: Light athletic clothing, short hair, muscular build, fitness bracelet.

descriptions.relation: They are neighbors to the protesters.
descriptions.outcome: They encounter the group of protesters.

descriptions.title: Hechun
descriptions.scene: Hechun enthusiastically greets the couple and invites them to join the protest. She suggests they all go to Dzyanyan's apartment to enjoy the powerful air conditioning.
descriptions.intent: Hechun wants to expand the group of protesters. She aims to recruit the couple by offering the comfort of air conditioning.
descriptions.conflict: The couple's refusal to participate in the social pressure.
descriptions.state: Enthusiastic and welcoming.|Outras: Hechun=Not specified;Su Dai=Light athletic clothing;Sun Zhentao=Light athletic clothing.
descriptions.relation: Hechun is trying to manipulate the couple into joining the "front".
descriptions.outcome: The couple refuses the invitation.

descriptions.title: Su Dai and Hechun
descriptions.scene: Su Dai politely refuses Hechun's invitation to join the group. Hechun becomes visibly upset and tries to use the heat as a way to pressure them further. Su Dai remains calm and refuses to be provoked.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to avoid the conflict and stay neutral. Hechun wants to force them to join the group.
descriptions.conflict: Hechun's social pressure versus Su Dai's refusal.
descriptions.state: Hechun is offended and prideful;Su Dai is calm and composed.
descriptions.relation: Hechun is pressuring Su Dai.
descriptions.outcome: The tension between the neighbors increases.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao and Hechun
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao intervenes sharply, accusing Hechun of creating a "circus" and dividing neighbors into fronts. Hechun retaliates by accusing him of being unfair and demanding justice for the heat. Sun Zhentively argues that people should help voluntarily, not through coercion.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to stop the bullying and defend the principle of voluntary help. Hechun wants to justify the group's actions as a quest for justice.
descriptions.conflict: Ideological clash between community solidarity (forced) and individual freedom (voluntary).
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is firm and stern;Hechun is angry and defensive.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is confronting Hechun's leadership.
descriptions.outcome: The argument escalates into a heated debate.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao and Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Hechun makes a stinging comment about children suffering in the heat, hitting a sensitive spot for the couple. Su Dai becomes pale and clenches her fists in anger. Sun Zhentao steps in to calm his wife and tells her not to pay attention to the insults.
descriptions.intent: Hechun wants to hurt the couple emotionally. Sun Zhentao wants to protect his wife from the emotional attack.
descriptions.conflict: Hechun's verbal attack against the couple's personal feelings.
descriptions.state: Hechun is malicious;Su Dai is distressed and angry;Sun Zhentao is protective.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: Light athletic clothing;Su Dai=Light athletic clothing;Hechun=Not specified.

descriptions.relation: Hechun is attacking the couple;Sun Zhentao is defending Su Dai.
descriptions.outcome: The couple is emotionally shaken but remains physically apart from the group.

descriptions.title: The Boy and the Group
descriptions.scene: A boy screams excitedly that the elevator has almost reached the 32nd floor. The entire crowd turns their heads toward the elevator in unison. Hechun stops her argument mid-sentence.
descriptions.intent: The boy is expressing excitement about the arrival. The crowd wants to see Dzyanyan.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden interruption of the argument by the news of Dzyanyan's arrival.
descriptions.state: The boy is excited;Hechun is silenced;Su Dai is observant.

outfits.The Boy: Not specified;Hechun=Not specified;Su Dai=Light athletic clothing.

descriptions.relation: The boy's news shifts the focus of everyone.
descriptions.outcome: The focus of the entire group shifts back to the approaching Dzyanyan.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai watches the scene unfold and whispers to her husband that the drama is opening the door for more absurdity. She observes the ridiculousness of the situation.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to express her disdain for the unfolding drama. She aims to process the absurdity of the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The absurdity of the social situation.

outfits.Su Dai: Light athletic clothing;Sun Zhentao=Light athletic clothing.

descriptions.relation: Su Dai and Sun Zhentao are observers of the chaos.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with the group waiting for the arrival of the protagonist.

descriptions.title: Hatchun
descriptions.scene: Hatchun stops her verbal argument with Sudai and Sun Ziyintao immediately. She observes the sudden shift in the atmosphere. The tension of the confrontation breaks as a new element enters the scene.

location.name: Near the elevator/stairwell area
location.description: an urban setting with a fire escape

descriptions.intent: Hatchun wants to continue her argument but is silenced by a sudden event. She seeks to maintain her aggressive stance.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a new threat interrupts her verbal conflict.
descriptions.state: Initially aggressive, then suddenly silenced and stunned.
descriptions.relation: Hatchun is in a heated dispute with Sudel and Sun Ziyintao.
descriptions.outcome: Hatchun ceases her shouting.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai shakes her head at the absurdity of the situation. She whispers a comment to her husband about the escalating drama. She observes Hatchun's sudden silence.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to comment on the absurdity of the unfolding farce. She seeks to share her observation with her husband.
descriptions.conflict: The chaotic and absurd nature of the surrounding events.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is the wife of the man she is whispering to.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai identifies the scene as a piece of unfolding absurdity.

descriptions.title: Hatchun
descriptions.scene: Hatchun decides she no longer wants to participate in the farce. She physically pulls her husband toward the fire escape to leave the area. The elevator doors open to reveal a new figure.

location.name: Near the elevator and fire escape

descriptions.intent: Hatchun wants to escape the ridiculous scene. She seeks to distance herself from the crowd.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is gathered around the elevator, blocking the path.
descriptions.relation: Hatchram is leading her husband away.
descriptions.outcome: They move toward the fire escape as the elevator opens.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan steps out of the elevator holding a large, buzzing chainsaw. The crowd instinctively recoils in fear at her appearance. She looks like a character from a zombie apocalypse movie.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan enters the space, wielding a weapon. She does not explicitly state a goal yet, but her presence is confrontational.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is gathered in her way, and her presence creates immediate terror.
descriptions.state: Powerful, intimidating, and menacing.|Outlam: Jiang Yan=168cm tall, wearing silver aluminum futuristic thermal suit, thick non-slip platform boots, and sunglasses;Crowd=Various onlookers
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is an intruder/threat to the gathered crowd.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd retreats in fear.

descriptions.title: Hatchun
descriptions.scene: Hatchun wipes sweat from her forehead and whispers to Zhang Qiqi. She wonders where Jiang Yan obtained such a large chainsaw. Zhang Qiqi speculates if it was rented from the first-floor management.
descriptions.intent: Hatchun wants to understand the origin of the weapon. She seeks information about the chainsaw.
descriptions.conflict: The confusion regarding the sudden appearance of the weapon.
descriptions.relation: Hatchun and Zhang Qiqi are communicating as observers.
descriptions.outcome: They speculate about the rental service.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns off the chainsaw and stares sternly at the crowd. She issues a final warning to the people to clear her doorway within ten seconds. The crowd freezes in realization of the danger.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants the crowd to disperse immediately. She seeks to protect her personal space and privacy.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is blocking her doorway and lingering for various reasons.

outfits.Jiang Yan: silver aluminum futuristic thermal suit, thick non-slip platform boots

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is threatening the crowd.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is paralyzed by her ultimatum.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi attempts to de-escalate the situation by stepping forward with a smile. She calls Jiang Yan a neighbor and friend to encourage calm dialogue. Jiang Yan responds by pressing the cold, heavy chainsaw against Zhang Qiqi's shoulder/neck.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to mediate and talk peacefully. She seeks to use their perceived friendship to stop the violence.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's violent physical response to the attempt at mediation.
descriptions.state: Attempting to be friendly, then suddenly terrified.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi tries to act as a friend, but Jiang Yan treats her as an adversary.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi is held at chainsaw point.

descriptions.title: Song Xiaofei
descriptions.scene: Little Song Xiaofei runs to Jiang Yan and hugs her leg. He begs her not to hurt his mother. Hatchun tries to intervene but stops when she sees the blade positioned against the neck.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: The child wants to protect his mother. Hatchun wants to stop the violence.
descriptions.conflict: The physical threat of the chainsaw against Zhang Qiqi's throat.
descriptions.state: Song Xiaofei is desperate and pleading; Hatchun is shocked.

outfits.flushed face due to heat/fever;Jiang Yan: silver aluminum futuristic thermal suit;Zhang Qiqi=Standard clothing

descriptions.relation: The child is pleading with Jiang Yan; Hatchun is an onlooker.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan maintains the blade against the neck.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: Members of the crowd begin to panic and some try to call emergency services, but the lines are busy. A woman attempts to record the event on her phone. Jiang Yan roars at her to put the phone away.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: The woman wants to document the incident. Jiang Yan wants the recording to stop.
descriptions.conflict: The woman's attempt to film vs. Jiang Yan's demand for privacy.
descriptions.state: Panic and curiosity among the crowd; Aggression from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is observing and reacting to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The woman quickly hides her device.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan delivers a speech about her right to privacy and her refusal to be bothered. She declares that her help is a matter of goodwill, not an obligation. She warns that blocking her path is a violation of the law.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assert her boundaries and legal rights. She seeks to justify her aggressive stance as a defense of her privacy.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's intrusion into her personal life and physical path.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is lecturing the crowd.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd begins to disperse.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi is left alone and trembling in front of Jiang Yan. She pleads for mercy and blames Hatchun for the entire conflict. Jiang Yan reveals that she knows Hatchun called her a mistress.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to save herself and clear her name. She seeks to distance herself from Hatchun's lies.
descriptions.conflict: The revelation of Hatchun's lies and the immediate threat of Jiang Yan's wrath.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is the victim of Jiang Yan's anger; Hatchun is the instigator.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi collapses in fear.

descriptions.title: Song Xiaofei
descriptions.scene: Song Xiaofei continues to cling to Jiang Yan's leg, crying hysterically. He begs for his mother's life. The boy's face is red from heat and a slight fever.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: The child wants to stop the perceived threat to his mother. He seeks mercy through emotional pleading.
descriptions.conflict: The intense emotional distress of the child against the coldness of the situation.

outfits.Song Xiaofei: Small child, flushed/red face, appearing feverish

descriptions.relation: The child is clinging to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The boy's plea is desperate and ongoing.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi trembles and admits her mistake, promising never to do this again. She is too afraid to even call Jiang Yan "sister." She realizes that Hatchun's actions led to this moment.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's door

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to appease Jiang Yan and avoid further provocation. She seeks to end the confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming wave of rage and hatred emanating from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is terrified of Jiang Yan's reaction.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi remains in a state of extreme fear and submission.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi stands facing Jiang Yan, feeling the intense wave of rage and hatred emanating from her. She recalls that the conflict began because of Hechunmei but realizes she is now the target. The heat and fear cloud her ability to think clearly.

location.name: Stairwell landing
location.description: an area equipped with surveillance cameras

descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi wants to avoid provoking the unstable Jiang Yan. She seeks to understand the source of the sudden hostility.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's palpable fury and unpredictable behavior. The extreme heat is causing mental fog.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic tension
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qiqi remains paralyzed by fear and confusion.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan ignores the pleas of Hechunmei and her son. She grips an electric saw tightly, her thumb hovering over the power switch. She glances at the security cameras on the landing before lowering the saw from Jiang Qiqi's shoulder.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to intimidate Jiang Qiqi. She is calculating her movements in view of the cameras.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of witnesses and cameras might limit her actions. She is fighting her own internal rage.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor toward Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan prepares to use the saw for a sudden strike.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The electric saw roars back to life with a deafening sound. Jiang Yan suddenly thrusts the running saw toward Jiang Qiqi's ear. Hechunmei watches with wide eyes, covering her mouth in horror.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan intends to physically threaten or harm Jiang Qiqi. She aims to strike with sudden violence.
descriptions.conflict: The suddenness of the action shocks all witnesses. Hechunmei is paralyzed by fear.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan attacks Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.outcome: A moment of extreme terror for all present.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei stands frozen, terrified by the sight of the saw. She tries to reassure herself that the rule of law will prevent a murder in public. She remains at the scene despite her intense fear.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to maintain her composure and rely on social order. She hopes the legal system will prevent violence.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal fear clashes with her rational belief in the law. The immediate threat is overwhelming.
descriptions.state: Petrified but attempting to be rational.
descriptions.relation: Witness to the violence
descriptions.outcome: She stays to watch the confrontation unfold.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi closes her eyes and screams hysterically as the saw approaches. Sweat pours down her forehead in large drops. Her young son, Xiao Fei, runs toward her, crying.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi wants to escape the immediate physical threat. She reacts instinctively to the danger.
descriptions.conflict: The physical proximity of the saw and the emotional distress of her child. The heat is physically draining.
descriptions.state: Hysterical and desperate.|Outras: No specific clothing mentioned.
descriptions.relation: Mother and son
descriptions.outcome: She is in a state of total panic.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The saw blade stops just a millimeter from Jiang Qiqi's ear, but it catches and cuts off a thick cloud of her burgundy hair. Jiang Yan turns the saw off and looks indifferently at the boy before turning her icy gaze back to Jiang Qiqi.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deliver a terrifying lesson. She uses the near-miss to demonstrate her power.
descriptions.conflict: The physical contact with the hair serves as a warning. The tension remains high.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan asserts dominance over Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qiqi's hair is damaged, serving as a physical warning.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan coldly tells Jiang Qiqi that this was a lesson and that luck won't last next time. She loudly commands Jiang Qiqi to get out, stating her goal of demonstrating strength has been achieved. She predicts that social order will collapse during the upcoming heatwave.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to expel Jiang Qiqi from the area. She wants to establish her dominance and warn of future consequences.
descriptions.conflict: She is expressing a desire for vengeance or power demonstration. She anticipates a future societal breakdown.
descriptions.relation: Dominant figure
descriptions.outcome: She successfully drives Jiang Qiqi away.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi says nothing and grabs her son Xiao Fei's hand. She runs toward the stairs, pushing through the exhausting heat and holding her breath to manage the physical strain.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi wants to escape the scene as quickly as possible. She seeks safety for herself and her son.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the physical exhaustion of running. The lingering fear of being attacked.
descriptions.relation: Protecting her son
descriptions.outcome: She successfully retreats from the confrontation.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei approaches Jiang Yan to apologize for the disturbance. She stammers an apology to her "sister" before running away to follow her husband.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to smooth over the tension and apologize for the chaos. She seeks to avoid further conflict.
descriptions.conflict: The awkwardness of the situation and the need to flee the presence of the dangerous Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: Seeking reconciliation/apology
descriptions.outcome: She leaves the scene to follow her husband.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches Hechunmei leave with indifference. Without saying a word, she turns and enters her own apartment, closing the door behind her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to retreat to her private space. She seeks to end the public interaction.
descriptions.conflict: None mentioned, she is simply withdrawing.
descriptions.state: Indifferent and solitary.|Outments: No specific clothing mentioned.
descriptions.relation: Withdrawing from others
descriptions.outcome: She is alone in her apartment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Inside her apartment, Jiang Yan reflects on her physical strength, noting she can hold an 8kg saw for a long time despite slight wrist pain. She realizes her strength is superhuman but acknowledges the need for more training.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess her current physical capabilities. She recognizes the need for further preparation.
descriptions.conflict: The physical pain in her wrist. The realization that her current strength is insufficient for a true apocalypse.
descriptions.relation: Self-reflection
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the need for more training in combat and weaponry.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the upcoming apocalypse, noting that food supplies are only the beginning. She realizes she must prepare for natural disasters, human conflicts, and unknown threats. She acknowledges that in a true collapse, the weak will not survive.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare for a total societal collapse. She aims to master hand-to-hand combat and various weapons.
descriptions.conflict: The looming threat of a lawless world where human nature becomes brutal. The struggle for survival against all odds.
descriptions.relation: Planning for the future
descriptions.outcome: She forms a long-term survival strategy.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides not to become dependent on her mysterious space, viewing it as a tool for training rather than a permanent refuge. She resolves to become strong enough to face reality rather than hiding like a "fragile flower."
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to use her special space as a training ground. She aims to achieve true strength and adaptability.
descriptions.conflict: The temptation to hide in the luxury of the space versus the necessity of facing the harsh world. The risk of the space disappearing.
descriptions.relation: Self-empowerment
descriptions.outcome: She commits to a path of active preparation and strength.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides that while her plans for the future are set, she will allow herself to relax for the remainder of the day. She chooses to rest before the hard work begins.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and recover from the day's tension. She seeks a moment of peace.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the need for immediate rest and the necessity of future preparation.
descriptions.relation: Self-care
descriptions.outcome: She concludes the day by choosing relaxation.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reflects on her strategy to use her current situation as a training tool rather than a source of dependency. She resolves to become strong to survive the upcoming global challenges. She decides to allow herself a moment of relaxation before facing the future.

location.name: Dzyan Yan's apartment
location.description: a comfortable interior where she is resting.

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to establish a long-term survival mindset. She aims to transform her circumstances into a preparation phase. She seeks to find a balance between vigilance and temporary rest.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the future and the potential for sudden disappearance of her current advantages.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a mental plan for future strength.

descriptions.title: Dzylar Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan gets up from the sofa and retrieves a bottle of chilled coconut water from her spatial storage. She drinks several sips to hydrate herself. She then checks the thermometer to monitor the external temperature.

location.name: Dzyan Yan's apartment
location.description: near the sofa and a window.

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to recover her strength and monitor the environmental conditions. She seeks to stay hydrated. She needs to assess the severity of the heatwave.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme rising temperature of 57 degrees Celsius.
descriptions.outcome: She discovers the temperature is dangerously high and approaching 60 degrees.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reads multiple emergency messages from city authorities on her phone. The messages warn of imminent shutdowns of water, electricity, and gas due to equipment overheating. She learns that shops have already been looted and food spoilage is imminent.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to understand the scope of the impending utility failures. She seeks to prepare for the lack of resources. She needs to evaluate the state of the city's supply chain.
descriptions.conflict: The total collapse of urban infrastructure and the loss of food security.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the gravity of the situation regarding food and energy.

descriptions.title: Dzyanc Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reads a specific warning about giant, blood-sucking mosquitoes that are resistant to standard insecticides. She learns that scientists recommend herbal pouches for protection. She notes that mosquito populations will explode once temperatures hit 60 degrees.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to identify new biological threats. She seeks information on effective deterrents. She aims to prepare for the insect infestation.
descriptions.conflict: The emergence of mutated, pesticide-resistant mosquitoes.
descriptions.outcome: She understands the biological danger posed by the heat-driven mosquito breeding.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan contemplates the terrifying prospect of temperatures reaching 70 degrees Celsius. She recalls news reports suggesting that mutated mosquitoes and ancient viruses from melting glaciers are caused by nuclear leaks. She notices that such sensitive information is being deleted to prevent mass panic.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to piece together the true cause of the global catastrophe. She seeks the truth behind the mutations. She aims to understand the scale of the environmental collapse.
descriptions.conflict: The suppression of information by authorities to prevent panic.
props: information about nuclear leaks and glaciers.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the true scale of the disaster is being hidden from the public.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan frowns and pulls the curtains, noting the blinding sunlight outside. She looks out and notices a large crowd gathered in the courtyard of her residential complex. She wonders why the people are not afraid of the heat or the mosquitoes.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to observe the external environment. She seeks to understand the behavior of the crowd. She aims to check the safety of her immediate surroundings.
descriptions.conflict: The intense, blinding sunlight and the presence of an unexplained crowd.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a large gathering in the courtyard but cannot see details from her height.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan retrieves a powerful pair of binoculars from her spatial storage. She adjusts the focus and parameters to get a clear view of the courtyard. She examines the specialized window film that provides heat insulation and privacy.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to spy on the activities in the courtyard. She seeks to identify the individuals in the crowd. She aims to use her technological advantages to gather intelligence.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of seeing from the 32nd floor.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully gains a clear view of the people below.

descriptions.title: Dozan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan observes several officials in white shirts and black trousers interacting with the management company staff. She sees the managers of the residential complex present. She watches them all move toward the underground garage.

location.name: The courtyard of the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to identify the purpose of the meeting. She seeks to understand the movement of the authorities. She aims to deduce the next steps of the management.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of why the officials are meeting in the heat.

outfits.Officials: white shirts and black trousers, helmets

descriptions.outcome: She observes the group heading toward the underground parking area.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan observes the red, heat-exhausted faces of the officials, noting they look like lobsters from a hot oven. She calculates the capacity of the underground garage, noting it has over 5,000 square meters of space. She hypothesizes that the garage is being converted into a heat shelter.

location.name: Dzyan Yan's apartment
location.description: looking down at the garage entrance.

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to deduce the officials' plan. She seeks to confirm if the garage is becoming a shelter. She aims to predict the impact on the residents.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat affecting the officials and the potential conflict with car owners.
descriptions.outcome: She concludes the garage is likely being repurposed as a temporary shelter.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan contemplates the difficulty of moving cars to make room for the shelter. She questions how the authorities will handle the owners of the 500 parking spaces. She finds it suspicious that officials arrived in person rather than just sending a phone call.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to understand the necessity of the physical presence of officials. She seeks to identify the potential for social conflict. She aims to evaluate the stability of the complex.
descriptions.conflict: The potential resistance from car owners and the unusual nature of the official visit.
descriptions.outcome: She remains puzzled by the direct, in-person approach of the authorities.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the construction quality of the local complex and contemplates the stability of the soil during rainy seasons. She wonders if high-ranking officials anticipated the upcoming heavy rains. She concludes that the mystery of the officials' foresight can only be solved with time.

location.name: Observation point near a residential complex
location.description: overlooking stable ground and underground passages

descriptions.intent: To analyze the environmental stability of her surroundings. She seeks to understand if the infrastructure was prepared for the disaster.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty regarding whether the government planned for the extreme weather.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to stop obsessing over the mystery and focus on more immediate needs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts away her binoculars and begins thinking about her dinner plans. She recalls her simple lunch of sesame noodles eaten in the warehouse. She decides that tonight requires a true celebration because she has successfully replenished her supplies before the catastrophe.
descriptions.intent: To decide on a celebratory meal. She wants to reward herself for completing a vital survival milestone.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance simple survival with the desire for luxury.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to host a grand feast to celebrate her successful preparations.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a bottle of premium red wine worth 70,000 yuan, a crystal decanter, and glasses from her spatial storage. She also brings out a candelabra and an exquisite tablecloth from her old house to decorate the table. She pours the wine into the decanter to let it aerate.
descriptions.intent: To create a festive and sophisticated atmosphere for her meal. She wants to transform her space into a celebratory setting.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between the approaching disaster and her luxurious setup.
descriptions.state: Methodical and celebratory.|Outlan: Jiang Yan=Not mentioned
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The table is prepared and the wine is aerating.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes a relaxing pink bath and dries her hair. After dressing in a light silk dress, she returns to the table to smell the wine. She notices the perfect aroma of linden flower in the decanter.

location.name: Bathroom and then back to the dining table

descriptions.intent: To relax and prepare herself for the meal. She wants to enjoy the sensory experience of the wine.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is ready to begin her dinner.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks out at the dark, 58-degree night environment. She observes large, blood-sucking mosquitoes swarming in the distance. She notices lights in neighboring windows and hears the sounds of domestic chaos, such as people preparing food, parents scolding children, and relatives mourning the dead.
descriptions.intent: To observe the state of the outside world. She is briefly noting the surrounding chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the encroaching biological threats (mosquitoes) and social decay.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She dismisses the external chaos as a mere episode and closes her curtains.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses her smartphone to close the curtains. She recalls her decision to order a high-end menu from a "Black Pearl" rated restaurant. She prepares to manifest the food using her spatial abilities.
descriptions.intent: To shut out the external world. She wants to focus entirely on her private celebration.
descriptions.conflict: The intrusion of the outside world's atmosphere into her sanctuary.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The curtains are closed, and she prepares for the feast.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan manifests a massive variety of gourmet dishes onto her table, including Angus beef sashimi, shrimp balls, cold duck, lobster, and various soups and desserts. She ensures the dishes are presented with the elegance of a food blogger. She uses her spatial storage to keep everything fresh and warm.

location.name: Dining table
location.description: now covered in various gourmet plates

descriptions.intent: To execute a perfect, aesthetically pleasing feast. She wants the food to be both delicious and visually stunning.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of maintaining high-quality presentation and temperature.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: A complete, high-end feast is laid out on the table.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan eats her dinner while listening to relaxing blues music. She enjoys each bite of the meal as a victory over the external chaos. After finishing the meal, she cleans up by putting the dishes into an automatic dishwasher.
descriptions.intent: To enjoy her victory meal. She wants to savor the food and the moment of peace.
descriptions.conflict: The underlying threat of the approaching power outage.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The meal is finished and the dishes are cleaned.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns on the television for news and starts playing a mobile game called "King's Glory." She notices that the game servers are unusually empty due to the heat. She struggles to find a match because her phone is overheating significantly due to the 60-degree temperature.
descriptions.intent: To pass the time before the electricity goes out. She wants to find entertainment.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat is causing her phone to overheat to dangerous levels.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She eventually finds a match despite the technical difficulties.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters a match in the game and finds her teammates playing exceptionally well, almost like cheaters. She wins every match and repeatedly earns the MVP title. This streak of luck contrasts with her previous series of failures.
descriptions.intent: To win the game. She seeks a sense of accomplishment and success.
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion that she might be playing with bots due to the ease of victory.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves unprecedented success and multiple MVP titles.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan plays mobile games in extreme heat, experiencing an unprecedented winning streak and earning MVP titles. She suspects she might be playing against bots due to the ease of victory. The heat is so intense that her phone becomes dangerously hot.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy her gaming session and achieve victory. She seeks entertainment despite the physical discomfort of the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme 60°C temperature causes her phone to overheat significantly. The heat makes the environment nearly unbearable.
descriptions.state: Focused and experiencing a sense of unprecedented luck and pleasure.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves a series of victories and maintains her winning streak.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: At 10:00 PM, a sudden power outage plunges the entire city into darkness, extinguishing street lamps. Residents react with immediate chaos, shouting and banging metal basins on balconies. The sudden loss of light triggers widespread distress.
descriptions.intent: Residents are reacting to the sudden loss of electricity. Some are trying to signal or express frustration.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden blackout disrupts the city's infrastructure and causes panic. The heat continues to persist.
descriptions.relation: Residents are in a state of collective agitation.
descriptions.outcome: The city enters a state of darkness and social disorder.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: People use flashlights, laptops, and phones to find light in their homes. Some families attempt to use red candles, but the 60°C heat causes the wax to soften and melt rapidly. Families must use special holders to prevent the candles from collapsing.

location.name: Various homes within the residential complexes

descriptions.intent: Residents want to provide light for themselves during the blackout. They attempt to use traditional methods like candles.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat melts the candles, making them difficult to use. The lack of electricity limits their options.
descriptions.state: Precautionary and struggling with the heat.|Outlam: Residents manage to maintain some light using various devices and stabilized candles.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Minimal light is maintained despite the heat-induced difficulty.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: Water supply ceases on the upper floors simultaneously with the electricity outage. While lower floors continue their activities under dim light, the temperature continues to rise, fueling growing fear and panic among the population.
descriptions.intent: Residents are trying to continue their daily routines despite the lack of water and light. They are attempting to cope with the rising heat.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of water supply on upper floors adds to the crisis. The rising temperature increases the level of fear.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The situation becomes increasingly dire as heat and fear escalate.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: SCNE: The Wi-Fi signal disappears, but mobile communication remains functional due to battery backups and cooling compressors at base stations. A resident group chat explodes with over 999 messages. Residents argue about requesting backup power from the management company, while others search for medicine or alcohol burners.
descriptions.intent: Residents are communicating via group chat to share information and vent frustrations. Some are looking for essential supplies like medicine.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of Wi-Fi limits communication. The massive influx of messages creates digital chaos. There is tension between residents and the management company.
descriptions.state: Angry, frantic, and some are trying to remain optimistic.
descriptions.relation: Residents are in conflict with the management company.
descriptions.outcome: The group chat becomes a hub of intense debate and urgent information seeking.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan verifies that her intrusion protection system's backup power is functioning correctly. Satisfied with her security, she retreats to her private, luxurious capsule. She decides to stay hidden and avoid drawing attention during the first night of the blackout.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her security system is operational. She intends to remain unnoticed and comfortable.
descriptions.conflict: The external world is in chaos and extreme heat, which she must avoid.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully secures her environment and prepares for rest.

descriptions.title: Management Company
descriptions.scene: At midnight, the management company posts a message in the group chat stating that backup generators will not be connected to residential floors. They explain that the outage is a protective measure against grid overload caused by the heat. They announce that the underground parking will be used for cooling purposes.
descriptions.intent: The management company wants to explain the reason for the blackout and manage the use of resources. They aim to protect the electrical grid.
descriptions.conflict: The decision to withhold power from residents causes significant resentment and criticism.
descriptions.relation: Management company is the target of resident criticism.
descriptions.outcome: Residents receive news that increases their dissatisfaction.

descriptions.title: Management Company
descriptions.scene: SCNE: The management company announces that the underground parking will serve as a temporary cooling zone. They warn residents that all cars must be moved by 8:00 AM to avoid the activity of giant mosquitoes. They also announce that all city shelters in Anming will open the following day, provided residents register in advance.
descriptions.intent: The company aims to manage the parking area and prepare for the mass use of shelters. They want to prevent chaos through a registration system.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of giant mosquitoes and the need for organized shelter access.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Residents are informed of the new rules and the availability of shelters.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Inside her private space, Jiang Yan enjoys a perfectly controlled environment with sunlight, automated systems, and the scent of chinxiang incense. She uses blackout curtains to maintain her privacy. While the outside world is like a steamer, her room remains at an ideal temperature and humidity.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain a comfortable, cozy, and private atmosphere. She seeks to insulate herself from the external heat.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme external heat and humidity threaten her comfort.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves a state of perfect environmental control.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After two months of chaos, Jiang Yan falls into a deep sleep. The next morning at 7:30 AM, her automated curtains open, letting in sunlight. She wakes up, stretches, and begins her day in her serene environment.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and recover from recent stresses. She follows her morning routine.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She wakes up refreshed and ready for the day.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: While observing her surroundings, Jiang Yan contemplates planting roses and hydrangeas in the black soil she has available. She also experiences a moment of loneliness and considers getting a small pet, like a yellow-winged parrot, but hesitates due to her fear of loss.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to engage in gardening and considers companionship. She contemplates the possibility of a pet.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal emotional trauma and fear of attachment prevent her from pursuing a pet.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to focus on planting but remains emotionally guarded.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares her breakfast consisting of a green onion pancake and coffee. She adds milk, sugar, and a few drops of 52% ABV Baijiu to create her unique "sauce latte."
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare a flavorful breakfast to start her day. She seeks to enhance her coffee with a specific alcoholic twist.
descriptions.conflict: She feels a lack of flavor in the initial coffee preparation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully creates her unique alcoholic coffee drink.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reviews her daily schedule, which includes fitness, shooting, excavator and yacht training, and gardening. She decides to check her security cameras and the residents' chat for news.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to stay informed about her residential complex. She plans to manage her time effectively through monitoring.
descriptions.conflict: She needs to check for any recent updates or threats in the building.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers an unpleasant man approaching her door on the screen.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The security system triggers a threat alert as Jiang Yan observes a middle-aged man, Zhang Qimin, approaching her door. She recognizes him as the committee chairman.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the person approaching her door. She observes the intruder's identity.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected guest is approaching her private residence, triggering a security alert.
descriptions.relation: Acquaintances through apartment purchase formalities.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the man as Zhang Qimin.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin stands outside the door, looking disheveled and sweaty due to the extreme heat. His hair is matted with sweat, and his skin is glistening with a mixture of oil and water.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin is attempting to reach Jiang Yan's apartment.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and lack of water have made him physically miserable.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He waits by the door and prepares to call her.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin attempts to call Jiang Yan via voice call. Jiang Yan immediately presses the button to reject the call, leaving him with a "number unavailable" message.

location.name: Inside Jiang Yan's apartment / Hallway outside

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to contact Jiang Yan directly. Jiang Yan wants to avoid the interaction.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan actively rejects his attempt to communicate.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is avoidant; Zhang Qimin is initially persistent.
descriptions.relation: Tension between the two.
descriptions.outcome: The call is disconnected, but Zhang Qimin realizes she is likely ignoring him.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin decides to knock on the metal door. As soon as his hand touches the surface, a strong electric shock from a 110V low-voltage defense system jolts through his body.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to get her attention by knocking.
descriptions.conflict: The door is electrified, causing a painful physical shock.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He is physically jolted and experiences a sensation of burning.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin recoils in pain, convulsing and shouting after the shock. He realizes the intensity of the discharge due to his sweaty hands.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin tries to recover from the physical shock.
descriptions.conflict: The electric shock causes intense pain and physical convulsions.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He pulls back in fear, his face turning pale.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin gathers his courage to shout through the door, calling her "Xiaojiang" and claiming he has an important matter. He also offers his portable batteries for her to charge her phone.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to initiate a conversation and offer a way to help her charge her phone. Jiang Yan wants to remain unheard.
descriptions.conflict: He is trying to force an interaction while she is intentionally ignoring him.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qimin is desperate and persistent; Jiang Yan is irritated.
descriptions.relation: He uses a familiar, somewhat flirtatious tone.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan becomes more irritated by his presence.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin realizes the shock was not static electricity but a real electric shock. He deduces that Jiang Yan must have backup power because her air conditioner is running.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to understand the source of the shock. He seeks a reason to enter the apartment.
descriptions.conflict: He must reconcile his engineering knowledge with the unexpected shock.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He discovers a potential reason to approach her (the working AC).

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin shouts one last time, asking her to open the door because her AC is working. When he receives no response, he assumes she is sleeping and walks away toward the stairs.

location.name: Hallway outside Jiang Yan's door and the staircase

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qrimin wants her to open the door. Jiang Yan wants to maintain her silence.
descriptions.conflict: He is met with total silence and no response from the apartment.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qimin is frustrated and defeated.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qimin gives up and leaves the floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan mutes her monitor and pretends to be absent while listening to the hallway. She remains motionless to avoid detection. She waits for the noise to cease.

location.name: Apartment 3201
location.description: a quiet interior space with a monitor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid interaction with the person outside. She seeks to maintain her cover of being asleep or unavailable. She wants to monitor the situation without being noticed.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan is being monitored by someone outside her door. The noise from the hallway threatens to reveal her presence.
descriptions.state: Alert and cautious. She is performing a facade of being unconscious.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is hiding from Jiang Qimin
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qimin assumes she is in the bedroom and stops knocking.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qannis shouts a few times at the door and assumes Jiang Yan is in the bedroom. He decides not to knock again. He turns around with an irritated expression and walks toward the stairs.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qimin wants to wake or engage Jiang Yan. He attempts to communicate through the door. He eventually seeks to leave the area.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of response from the apartment frustrates him. He cannot reach the person inside.
descriptions.state: Irritated and frustrated. He feels ignored.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qimin is trying to interact with Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: He turns away to walk toward the stairs.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei opens the door of apartment 3203 with a creak. She approaches Jiang Qimin with a wide smile and asks to borrow a charger. She attempts to engage him in conversation.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to borrow a charging cable. She also wants to satisfy her curiosity about the neighbor. She seeks social interaction.
descriptions.conflict: She is interrupted by the tension between the neighbors. Her curiosity leads to a confrontation.
descriptions.state: Cheerful and inquisitive. She is eager to gossip.|Outlam: He Chunmei initiates a conversation with Jiang Qimin.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is a neighbor attempting to gossip with Jiang Qimin
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qimin responds with mockery.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qimin turns to He Chunmei and mocks her for eavesdropping. He points out that she is an adult with children yet still spies on neighbors. He tells her she was too loud and that he heard everything.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qimin wants to shut down He Chunmei's curiosity. He intends to reprimand her for her behavior. He wants to end the conversation.
descriptions.conflict: He Chunmei's intrusive questions and eavesdropping behavior. Her curiosity creates a social friction.
descriptions.state: Mocking and dismissive. He is annoyed by her presence.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qimin is rebuking He Chunmei
descriptions.outcome: He walks away without looking back.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei stands frozen with a strained smile after being rebuked. She mutters curses to herself as she returns to her apartment. She reflects on her failed plan to investigate the neighbor due to the heat and her children's illness.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to process her embarrassment. She intends to return to her home. She contemplates the rumors circulating in the building.
descriptions.conflict: The social rejection from Jiang Qimin. The physical hardship of the heat and her children's sickness.
descriptions.state: Embarrassed and angry. She is internally cursing.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is left alone after the confrontation
descriptions.outcome: She returns to her apartment in silence.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan waits for Jiang Qimin to leave before turning on her phone. She sees a flood of notifications and news in the residents' chat. She notices a strange photo of the courtyard taken at dawn.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the status of the building. She seeks to understand the recent events. She investigates the contents of the chat.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming amount of distressing news in the chat. The disturbing nature of the photo.
descriptions.state: Attentive and increasingly shocked. She is transitioning from quiet observation to horror.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing the community's reaction
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a horrifying image of dead bodies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan zooms in on the photo and sees desiccated, disfigured human bodies in the courtyard. She notices large, blood-red mosquitoes feeding on a relatively fresh corpse. She feels intense disgust and claustrophobia.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify what is in the photo. She tries to process the visual horror. She struggles to comprehend the scene.
descriptions.conflict: The gruesome sight of the decomposing bodies. The biological horror of the giant mosquitoes. The sensory memory of the smell.
descriptions.state: Horrified and nauseated. She experiences a sense of physical revulsion.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is a witness to the carnage
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the scale of the tragedy.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan analyzes the state of the bodies and concludes they died less than 24 hours before being thrown from windows. She notes the presence of bloodstains and the timing of blood clotting. She begins to wonder about the motive behind this massacre.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deduce the timeline of the deaths. She seeks to understand the motive of the perpetrator. She attempts to make sense of the carnage.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of who committed the crime and why. The realization of the extreme violence.
descriptions.state: Analytical yet terrified. She is gripped by a deep sense of dread.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is investigating the crime scene via photo
descriptions.outcome: She enters a state of profound questioning.

descriptions.title: Residents of the Complex
descriptions.scene: Various residents post angry and terrified messages in the group chat. They discuss the immorality of throwing bodies from heights and the difficulty of contacting the police. They report that the management company burned the bodies at the entrance.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to vent their anger. They seek help from the police. They express fear for their own safety.
descriptions.conflict: The breakdown of social morality. The inability to reach emergency services. The extreme heat and impending weather.
descriptions.state: Angry, terrified, and desperate. They are experiencing a loss of humanity.
descriptions.relation: The residents are reacting to the shared tragedy
descriptions.outcome: The bodies are burned by the management company.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts down her phone with a heavy heart, reflecting on the loss of humanity. She receives a private message from Jiang Qimin. The message contains a video file and a claim about finding something in the surveillance room.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the news. She receives information from Jiang Qimin. She prepares to view the provided video.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle with the worsening situation. The intrusion of Jiang Qimin's message.
descriptions.state: Heavy-hearted and somber. She is burdened by the news.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qimin is contacting Jiang Yan privately
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan opens the video.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the video and sees herself exiting the elevator carrying a chainsaw. Jiang Qimin sends messages complimenting her appearance and joking about a soundtrack. He also informs her that he has secured a spot for her in the underground shelter.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see the footage. Jiang Qimin wants to share the video and offer her a place in the shelter. He intends to be helpful/flirtatious.
descriptions.conflict: The unsettling sight of her own violent-looking actions on camera. The intrusive and persistent nature of Jiang Qimin's messages.
descriptions.state: Startled and uneasy. She is overwhelmed by his persistence.
props: Video of Jiang Yan with a chainsaw
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qitimn is acting as a self-appointed protector/informant
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan's suspicions about the situation are confirmed.

descriptions.title: Djang Yanni
descriptions.scene: Djang Yanni receives a phone call from Djang Qimin informing her that he has added her to the list of residents moving to the underground shelter. He mentions he secured a private corner for her with limited food and water. She realizes the underground parking is being converted into a temporary refuge.

location.name: Djang Yanni's apartment
location.description: a place experiencing extreme heat of 70 degrees

descriptions.intent: Djang Yanni wants to understand her living situation. She seeks to confirm her suspicions about the underground shelter. She aims to survive the rising temperatures.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat of 70 degrees makes staying in the apartment a death sentence. The underground conditions are uncomfortable and scarce.
descriptions.state: Disturbed by the man's intrusiveness but relieved by the information.
descriptions.relation: Djang Yanni feels intruded upon by Djang Qimin's persistence.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Yanni confirms the underground parking is being repurposed and decides to prepare for the move.

descriptions.title: Djang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Qimin descends the stairs from the twenty-eighth floor toward the lower levels. As he turns from the stairs into the corridor, he spots a familiar figure in the distance. He recognizes her as the girl from Djang Qiqi's video recording.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qimin is moving through the building. He intends to continue his descent.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: He recognizes Djang Qiqi from previous encounters.
descriptions.outcome: He slows his pace to look at her.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi stands in the corridor, looking different than before with short hair and a floral dress. She is sweating profusely due to the heat but maintains a graceful appearance. She notices Djang Qimin approaching.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi is simply present in the hallway. She notices the man approaching her.
descriptions.conflict: The intense heat is causing her to sweat heavily.
descriptions.state: Graceful yet physically strained by the heat.

outfits.Djang Qiqi: A light dress with a floral pattern, which is quite revealing.

descriptions.relation: She recognizes him and responds with a slight smirk.
descriptions.outcome: She acknowledges his presence with a comment.

descriptions.title: Djang Qimin, Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: A piercing siren wails outside, causing both characters to tense up instantly. Djang Qiqi asks what is happening in surprise. Djang Qimin observes the surroundings and suggests a new evacuation has begun due to a potential cooling system failure in the shelter.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to know the cause of the alarm. Djang Qimin wants to assess the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden siren creates immediate tension and uncertainty.
descriptions.state: Both characters are tense and surprised.
descriptions.relation: They are momentarily united by the shared alarm.
descriptions.outcome: They realize the situation is escalating.

descriptions.title: Duju Residents
descriptions.scene: An announcement over the loudspeaker warns all residents to prepare for emergency evacuation due to rising temperatures and potential oxygen failure. Crowds of people begin rushing out of their apartments toward the emergency exits. Djang Qimin tells Djang Qiqi they must move immediately.
descriptions.intent: The authorities want to evacuate the building. Djang Qimin wants to escape the heat quickly.
descriptions.conflict: The rising temperature and oxygen failure threaten the lives of all residents. The crowd is panicking and pushing.
descriptions.relation: Djang Qimin takes a leadership role in the moment.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Qimin and Djang Qiqi begin to move toward the exit.

descriptions.title: Djang Yanni
descriptions.scene: Djang Yanni is finishing her morning workout on the second floor when she hears the sirens. She quickly turns off her treadmill and runs to the window to observe the chaos. She realizes the situation is becoming much more serious.
descriptions.intent: Djang Yanni wants to check the status of the outside world. She wants to monitor the unfolding crisis.
descriptions.conflict: The sirens signal an escalating environmental disaster.
descriptions.relation: None.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the severity of the heatwave and the evacuation.

descriptions.title: Djang Yanni
descriptions.scene: Duju Yanni quickly changes her clothes and gathers her essential belongings. She prepares to leave her apartment to join the evacuation. She is preoccupied with thoughts of what will happen when there is no more place to retreat.
descriptions.intent: Djang Yanni wants to prepare for the evacuation. She seeks to gather enough supplies to survive.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of a safe retreat in the future.
descriptions.state: Focused and anxious about the future.

outfits.Djang Yanni: Changed into clothes suitable for moving/evacuating.

descriptions.relation: None.
descriptions.outcome: She heads toward the exit to join the evacuation.

descriptions.title: Djang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Qimin reflects on the information he recently discovered about Djang Yanni. He recalls seeing footage of her surrounded by He Chunmei and her friends. He realizes she is a wealthy heiress with a thirty-billion fortune and a famous internet personality.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qimin is processing new information about a person's identity. He is re-evaluating his knowledge of Djang Yanni.
descriptions.conflict: The shock of discovering her true social status and wealth.
descriptions.relation: His perception of Djang Yuju changes from a simple resident to a powerful heiress.
descriptions.outcome: He realizes the person he thought was just a resident is actually a billionaire.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi, Djang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi catches up to Djang Qimin and calls out to him with a charming smile. She reveals that she had been calling and messaging him without response. She explains she climbed from the 7th floor to the 28th floor specifically to find him.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to interact with Djang Qimin. She wants to show her effort in finding him.
descriptions.conflict: She had been ignored by him previously.
descriptions.state: Djang Qiqi is charming and energetic; Djang Qimin is composed.
descriptions.relation: She is pursuing his attention; he is being somewhat distant.
descriptions.outcome: They are reunited in the hallway during the chaos.

descriptions.title: Djang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Qimin speaks to Djang Qiqi with a tone of care mixed with light irony. He questions her endurance for climbing so many floors. Internally, he reveals he ignored her calls because he is prioritizing Djang Yanni after learning her true identity. He contemplates the potential for a relationship with the wealthy Djang Yanni, drawing parallels to a news story about a billionaire and a gardener.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qimin wants to maintain a polite, slightly detached persona. He intends to pursue Djang Yanni for the potential benefits of her wealth and status.
descriptions.conflict: His internal conflict between his current social interaction and his new strategic interest in Djang Yanni.
descriptions.relation: He is intentionally distancing himself from Qiqi to focus on Yanni.
descriptions.outcome: He feels optimistic about the potential for new romantic and social horizons through the crisis.

descriptions.title: Djang Cimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Cimin reflects on his romantic potential with women like Djang Qiqi, imagining a future of new relationship horizons. He feels a sense of growing joy and optimism about his prospects. He smiles to himself while lost in these hopeful thoughts.

location.name: An unspecified upper floor or balcony

descriptions.intent: He wants to envision a successful future in relationships. He seeks emotional satisfaction through daydreaming. He hopes to find stability through new connections.
descriptions.conflict: He is currently facing a personal crisis and a changing world. The heat and social collapse threaten his stability.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He becomes visibly happy, which attracts attention.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi approaches Djang Cimin and asks why he is smiling so broadly. Djang Cimin reacts with embarrassment, scratching the back of his head. He then asks her why she has come up to see him.

location.name: An upper floor or balcony area

descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to confront him about his strange behavior. She wants to initiate a conversation. She intends to check on him.
descriptions.conflict: Djang Cimin is embarrassed by her direct questioning. He is caught off guard by her presence.

outfits.Djang Qiqi: A slender figure, clothing not specified.

descriptions.relation: Djang Qiqi is being playful/flirtatious; Djang Cimin is being defensive/embarrassed.
descriptions.outcome: A conversation begins regarding her reason for visiting.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi reveals she came in person because he ignored her calls and messages. She smiles mischievously at his reaction. Djang Cimin looks at her body, and his voice becomes low and husky.

location.name: An upper floor or balcony area

descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to tease him about his lack of responsiveness. She wants to assert her presence. She aims to flirt.
descriptions.conflict: Djang Cimin's previous avoidance of her communication creates a minor tension. The intense heat in the air adds physical tension.
descriptions.relation: The tension between them becomes more sexual/intimate.
descriptions.outcome: The atmosphere becomes heavy with heat and attraction.

descriptions.title: Djang Cimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Cimin suggests that Djang Qiqi should come inside to drink water because she must be tired from the climb. He informs her that he already has the records and information she requested. He speaks directly and plainly.

location.name: Near the entrance of his living space

descriptions.intent: Djang Cimin wants to invite her into his space. He wants to provide her with relief from the heat. He wants to show he is useful by providing information.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat makes physical movement difficult. The social collapse makes such direct offers loaded with subtext.
descriptions.relation: Djang Cimin is taking a lead in the interaction.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Qiqi understands the underlying sexual subtext of his invitation.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qqi considers the changing world where moral norms are collapsing due to the heat and resource scarcity. She realizes that while she wouldn't normally be interested in Djang Cimin, his influence and resources are now vital for her survival as a single mother. She decides not to enter his home yet.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to maintain her independence while calculating her survival needs. She intends to decline the immediate invitation to keep her leverage. She seeks to protect her son.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the end of the world create a desperate need for resources. Her personal morals clash with her survival instincts.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She declines his offer to come inside.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi mentions the upcoming relocation to the underground parking and the need to get food rations. Her expression of grievance causes Djang Cimin's heart to race. He enthusiastically promises to help her and her son.

location.name: Near the entrance of Djang Cimin's living space

descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to express her hardship. Djang Cimin wants to prove his worth to her. He aims to secure her affection by offering protection.
descriptions.conflict: The looming threat of relocation and food scarcity. Djang Cimin's emotional instability caused by her grievance.
descriptions.state: Djang Qiqi is aggrieved; Djang Cimin is excited and eager.
