descriptions.relation: Djang Cimin becomes more devoted to her.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Qiqi agrees to visit him for a glass of water.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi leaves the area and begins a slow, difficult descent down the stairs. She leans on the railing because her legs are shaking from her racing heartbeat and the intense heat. She moves in a trance-like state until she reaches her apartment on the seventh floor.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to reach her home safely. She aims to recover from the physical strain of the heat. She seeks rest.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme temperature threatens her health. Her physical weakness makes the descent dangerous.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She reaches her apartment.

descriptions.title: Djang Qixi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi receives a scheduled message from Djang Cimin on her phone. The message reveals that the owner of apartment 3201 is Jiang Yan, the wealthy daughter of a missing woman and a billionaire heiress. Djang Cimin warns her to keep this information secret and promises a reward.
descriptions.intent: Djang Cimin wants to provide her with valuable intelligence. He wants to build a bond through shared secrets. He aims to reward her later.
descriptions.conflict: The weight of the secret information. The danger of the information being leaked.
descriptions.state: Djang Qiqi is shocked and stunned.
descriptions.relation: Djang Cimin acts as an informant/ally.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Qiqi realizes the true identity of her rival.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi realizes that Jiang Yan is the daughter of Li Meizheng and understands why she was humiliated the previous day. She leans against her door, breathing deeply and clenching her fists. She feels a surge of hatred toward Jiang Yan, her son's father's death, and her deceased father.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to process her intense emotions. She seeks to find a way to handle her enemies. She aims to vent her internal rage.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming grief and hatred from past traumas. The realization of a powerful enemy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to plan a way to eliminate Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Dlam Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi realizes she cannot face Jiang Yan head-on but plans to use the upcoming relocation to the underground parking to her advantage. She decides to "cut the grass by the roots" to end the threat forever. She opens a chat with Djang Cimin to manipulate the situation.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to eliminate Jiang Yan permanently. She intends to use the chaos of the relocation to strike. She seeks to manipulate Djang Cimin.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's superior power and status. The difficulty of acting in a crowded, monitored environment.
descriptions.relation: Djang Qiqi is planning to use Djang Cimin.
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a conversation with Djang Cimin.

descriptions.title: Djang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi asks Djang Cimin to request that she and Jiang Yan be placed in adjacent rooms. Djang Cimin is confused because they fought recently. Djang Qiqi lies, claiming she is a "fan" and wants to make peace to establish contact.
descriptions.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to be positioned near her enemy for an assassination attempt. She aims to deceive Djang Cimin. She wants to use his influence.
descriptions.conflict: Djang Cimin's suspicion regarding their recent fight. The deception required to achieve her goal.
descriptions.state: Djang Qiqi is manipulative; Djang Cimin is helpful and unsuspecting.
descriptions.relation: Djang Qiqi is manipulating Dlam Cimin.
descriptions.outcome: Djang Cimin agrees to talk to the management company to arrange the placement.

descriptions.title: Djang Cimin
descriptions.scene: Djang Cimin agrees to the request, stating the management company organizes the placement and he will speak to the manager. He expresses affection for Djang Qiqi, calling her "brother" and sending a "mua" (kiss) emoji. Djang Qiqi feels a wave of nausea after sending the message.
descriptions.intent: Djang Cimin wants to please Djang Qiqi. He aims to fulfill her request. He wants to maintain their flirtatious connection.
descriptions.conflict: The moral conflict within Djang Qiqi as she manipulates him. The physical reaction of nausea.
descriptions.state: Djang Cimin is affectionate and eager; Djang Qiqi is nauseated and disgusted.
descriptions.relation: Djang Cimin is being affectionate; Djang Qiqi is being deceptive.
descriptions.outcome: The plan to be placed near Jiang Yan is set in motion.

descriptions.title: Sunyao
descriptions.scene: Djang Qiqi's son, Sunyao, enters the room looking sleepy and disheveled. He sees his mother and asks if he is going to have a new brother. Djang Qiqi is interrupted by his presence.
descriptions.intent: Sunyao wants to know about the change in his family. Djang Qiqi is caught in her moment of dark planning.
descriptions.conflict: The intrusion of her son's innocence into her murderous plot. The physical state of the child.
descriptions.state: Sunyao is sleepy and apprehensive; Djang Qiqi is in a state of post-manipulation nausea.
descriptions.relation: Mother and son.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with the child's question hanging in the air.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi sends a message to her brother, Jian Qiqi, expressing affection and mentioning a conversation with a manager. After sending it, she feels a sudden wave of nausea.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to maintain a connection with her brother. She seeks to communicate her affection and business intentions.
descriptions.conflict: She experiences a physical bout of nausea immediately after the social interaction.
descriptions.relation: Sister to Jian Qiqi
descriptions.outcome: The message is sent, but she is left feeling physically unwell.

descriptions.title: Sun Yao
descriptions.scene: Sun Yao, Zhang Qiqi's son, emerges from his bedroom looking disheveled and sleepy. He asks his mother if he is going to have a new baby brother.
descriptions.intent: Sun Yao wants to understand the implications of his mother's recent behavior/message. He seeks clarification on a potential new sibling.
descriptions.conflict: The child's question puts Zhang Qiqi on the spot regarding a sensitive topic.
descriptions.state: Sun Yao is sleepy and apprehensive; Zhang Qiqi is frozen in shock.
descriptions.relation: Mother and son
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi is left speechless and unable to answer him.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: In apartment 3201, Jiang Yan finishes a strength training session and spends thirty minutes on an elliptical trainer. She completes her workout with stretching exercises.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to complete her daily physical fitness routine. She aims to maintain her physical conditioning.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes her workout and prepares for hygiene.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes a long shower lasting approximately one and a                half hours. Afterward, she dresses in light athletic clothing and ties her hair into a high ponytail.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to clean herself and prepare for her next training session. She seeks physical refreshment.
descriptions.conflict: None.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Light athletic clothing, hair tied in a high ponytail.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is ready for her simulated combat training.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the multimedia room and configures the holographic shooting system. She accesses her inventory to activate a 4D combat suit provided by a military supplier.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to set up a realistic training environment. She aims to use advanced technology to simulate combat sensations.
descriptions.conflict: She must manually navigate the system and inventory to activate the gear.

outfits.Jiang Yan: 4D combat suit capable of simulating smell, recoil, and impact.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The high-tech training environment is successfully activated.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan practices shooting with a pistol, utilizing her previous experience to master the basics. She struggles with precision and continues practicing until her right hand aches from fatigue.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to improve her accuracy with firearms. She aims to bridge the gap between basic skill and precision.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of hitting targets precisely challenges her existing skills. Physical fatigue sets in.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves basic mastery but suffers physical pain in her hand.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on her past gaming habits, regretting that she played King of Glory instead of tactical shooters like PUBG or CS. She then shuts down the holographic system and heads to the living room.

location.name: Apartment 3201
location.description: multimedia room moving to living room

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process her regrets regarding her skill development. She intends to transition to a period of rest.
descriptions.conflict: Internal conflict regarding her past choices and lack of preparation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes her training and moves to the living area.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: SCENЕ: Jiang Yan drinks fresh orange juice from the refrigerator and checks her phone. She observes that the security system has reported no intrusions and finds no new news updates.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check for any security threats or global news. She seeks information on the state of the world.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of news updates is suspicious to her.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finds the news stagnant, leading her to suspect a technical error.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan attempts to refresh the news page multiple times but fails. She tries to post a message, but receives a red error message stating the server is temporarily unavailable.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify if the lack of news is a bug. She attempts to communicate via the network.
descriptions.conflict: The server is down, preventing her from accessing information or posting.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The server error triggers a sense of dread and bad premonition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the residential complex chat and reads urgent messages from the management company regarding parking assignments and heatwave warnings. She learns that residents must move belongings to the underground parking by midnight.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the new residential regulations. She seeks information regarding the upcoming heatwave and evacuation protocols.
descriptions.conflict: The management is imposing strict, sudden rules for survival in extreme temperatures.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes a major relocation is mandatory and time-sensitive.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reviews the photos of the underground parking lot, noting the Spartan setup with waterproof film. She reads the specific instructions for the Tianshuiwan complex regarding the 3-item limit and the deadline.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the quality of the temporary shelter. She aims to plan her relocation logistics.
descriptions.conflict: The shelter conditions are extremely primitive and limited in space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She understands the difficulty of the upcoming transition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her specific placement in the provided spreadsheet. She discovers she is assigned to a shared zone (F414) with three other people in a space smaller than 10 square meters.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find her specific assigned location. She seeks to know her living conditions in the shelter.
descriptions.conflict: She must share a tiny, cramped space with multiple strangers.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the extreme lack of privacy and space she will face.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the broader situation of the residents, noting that many are renters or elderly people who have chosen to stay in their apartments. She realizes the gravity of the situation for those left behind.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the social impact of the heatwave. She seeks to contextualize her own struggle within the community.
descriptions.conflict: The vulnerability of neighbors who cannot or will not evacuate.
descriptions.state: Somber and observant.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the impending tragedy for the residents who remain in their homes.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes her neighbors' living situations, noting that many are renters and some elderly residents have chosen to stay in their apartments despite the heat. She contemplates the difficulty of the current heatwave for the elderly and the crowded nature of public shelters. She decides that she cannot stay in the penthouse alone because the roof heats up too much, but she also dreads the crowded underground shelters.

location.name: Penthouse apartment
location.description: a high-end residence with large windows overlooking the city.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to survive the heatwave without enduring the discomfort of a public shelter. She seeks a balance between safety and personal comfort.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat threatens the penthouse, while public shelters are overcrowded and unpleasant. The heat is physically taxing for all living beings.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides on a plan to visit the official shelter by day and return home by night using her jet suit.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares her gear by putting on protective clothing. She decides to create herbal pouches to repel mutant mosquitoes using a recipe from old news reports. She assembles the herbs and attaches the finished pouches to her backpack.

location.name: Inside the penthouse
location.description: a prepared area for gear assembly.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to protect herself from attacks by mutated mosquitoes. She aims to create effective herbal repellents.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of mutated, blood-sucking mosquitoes that are resistant to heat and sunlight.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Protective clothing, heavy insulation suit, and a wide-brim and heavy insulation boots.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes the protective pouches and attaches them to her backpack.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her apartment one last time before leaving. She activates the high-voltage security system on her door to protect her home while she is away. She looks out the window at the deserted, heat-stricken city streets.

location.name: Penthouse apartment
location.description: near the exit and the window.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her property and ensure her home is safe from intruders. She also monitors the external environment.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat of 62 degrees outside and the presence of mutated mosquitoes in the streets.
descriptions.state: Cautious and vigilant.|Outponments: Jiang Yan=Heavy insulation suit, protective gear.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The apartment is secured, and she prepares to step into the extreme heat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan steps out of her apartment and is immediately hit by the intense 62-degree heat. She notices the streets are empty of humans, inhabited only by large, mutated, blood-sucking mosquitoes. She observes the desolate state of the urban landscape.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan intends to begin her journey to the official shelter. She seeks to move through the heat as efficiently as possible.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming heat of 62 degrees acts like a heavy blanket. The mutated mosquitoes pose a direct physical threat.
descriptions.state: Determined but aware of the danger.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins her descent through the building.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan descends the stairs of the building and encounters several residents. These people are carrying basins and thin blankets, looking exhausted and red-faced from the heat. They acknowledge her with silent nods and thumbs-up, though they look at her bulky gear with surprise.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the ground floor without unnecessary interaction. She observes the suffering of others.
descriptions.conflict: The residents are struggling with extreme heat and exhaustion. Jiang Yan's bulky gear makes her stand out like a "walking beacon."

outfits.Jiang Yan: Bulky heat-protection equipment, heavy insulation suit
outfits.and a large hat; Residents: Red-faced, exhausted, carrying basins and thin blankets.

descriptions.relation: The residents are surprised by Jiang Yan's appearance; they share a silent, weary acknowledgment.
descriptions.outcome: She continues her descent toward the first floor.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the first floor after a thirty-minute descent. She reflects on the biology of the mutant mosquitoes, noting their long lifespans and the fact that females need blood to reproduce. She realizes that the extreme heat is actually killing off the remaining prey, which will eventually lead to the mosquitoes starving.

location.name: First floor of the apartment complex.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the ecological shifts to better navigate the environment. She seeks to assess the level of danger from the insects.
descriptions.conflict: The biological reality of the heatwave is that it is destroying the food chain, leading to a slow death for all.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Heavy insulation suit, heavy insulation boots, and a large hat.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She gains a clearer understanding of the environmental threat and decides to move quickly toward the exit.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan exits the building and enters the garden area. She experiences the extreme heat through the deformation of the plastic paths and the softening of the ground under her boots. She observes the horrific scene of dried corpses and trash scattered throughout the garden.

location.name: The complex garden
location.description: featuring deformed plastic paths, scorched earth, and dried-up ponds.

descriptions.intent: Jiangly Yan wants to exit the complex and reach her destination. She tries to maintain her pace despite the gruesome surroundings.
descriptions.conflict: The heat is so intense that the ground is becoming sticky and soft. The stench of decay and trash is overwhelming.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Heavy insulation suit, heavy insulation boots.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She pushes through the garden toward the complex gates.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the gates of the complex and finds them locked with a U-shaped lock. She discovers that the electronic access control is non-functional due to the power outage. She observes the dead insects, worms, and fish in the dried-up pond and the bloodless bodies in the flowerbeds.

location.name: The gates of the residential complex.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to pass through the gates to continue her journey. She needs to find a way to bypass the locked gate.
descriptions.conflict: The gate is physically locked and the electronic system is dead. The environment is filled with the stench of death and decay.
descriptions.state: Alert and focused on the obstacle.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Heavy insulation suit, heavy insulation boots.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She faces a new physical barrier to her journey.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan walks quickly through a landscape of clay and decaying fish and crayfish. The stench of rot is so intense it penetrates her protective gear. She approaches the complex gates and finds them locked with a Yu-brazium lock and the access control disabled due to power failure.

location.name: Complex entrance
location.description: a desolate area filled with clay and decomposing organic matter, featuring a locked gate with a Yu-brazium lock.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to exit the complex to reach the official evacuation point. She needs to bypass the locked gate despite the lack of electricity.
descriptions.conflict: The gate is locked and the electronic access system is non-functional. The overwhelming smell of decay creates physical discomfort.
descriptions.state: Determined and focused, despite the unpleasant environment.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Full protective isolation gear designed to withstand environmental toxins.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She reaches the gate and prepares her next move to bypass the lock.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the empty security booth and decides to use her pre-planned strategy. She sends a message to the residents' group chat from unit A3201, requesting the gates be opened for evacuation. A resident replies immediately, stating she hasn't filed an exit request and must wait until tomorrow according to the rules.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to convince the residents to open the gates for her. She aims to bypass the official protocol through direct communication.
descriptions.conflict: The residents refuse to open the gates because she hasn't followed the official exit application procedure.
descriptions.state: Calm and prepared, having anticipated this resistance.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is communicating with anonymous residents via text.
descriptions.outcome: The residents deny her request, insisting on the rules.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Guard
descriptions.scene: A young guard in full protective gear appears at the gate and unlocks the Yu-brazium lock. He looks at Jiang Yan with surprise and asks how she intends to travel. Jiang Yan calmly replies that she will go on foot. The guard shakes his head in disbelief and suggests she wait for the heat-protected supply vehicles.

location.name: Complex gate
location.description: a transition point between the complex and the outside.

descriptions.intent: The guard wants to ensure her safety by suggesting the official transport. Jiang Yan wants to leave immediately on her own terms.
descriptions.conflict: The guard believes walking is too dangerous due to the heat and lack of protection. Jiang Yan refuses the offered assistance.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm and composed; the guard is skeptical and concerned.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Full protective isolation gear;Guard=Full protective gear including a mask and suit.

descriptions.relation: The guard is skeptical of Jiang Yan's autonomy.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan refuses the supply vehicle and exits the complex.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan walks out of the complex gates. The guard watches her depart, feeling an involuntary sense of admiration for her bravery and strength of spirit. He then turns to re-lock the gates.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan intends to proceed to the evacuation point. The guard intends to secure the perimeter.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is resolute; the guard is impressed.|Outlar: Jiang Yan successfully exits the complex.
descriptions.relation: The guard views Jiang Yan as a person of great courage.|Outcomes: Jiang Yan is free of the complex, and the guard secures the gate.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin, Liu Dahun, Residents
descriptions.scene: Immediately after the gate is locked, Zhang Qimin (Council President) and Liu Dahun (Complex Manager) approach the gate with a group of people. They are all heavily bundled and wearing motorcycle helmets. Liu Dahun complains about the delay of the supply vehicle, which was expected at five o'clock.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to find the supply vehicle. Zhang Qimin wants to find shelter from the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The supply vehicle is late, and the heat is becoming unbearable.
descriptions.state: The group is frustrated and physically burdened by the heat.

outfits.Zhang Qimin: Heavily bundled clothing and a motorcycle helmet;Liu Dahun=Heavily bundled clothing and a motorcycle helmet;Residents=Heavy protective clothing and motorcycle helmets.

descriptions.relation: The group is working together under shared stress.
descriptions.outcome: They decide to enter the security booth to seek shade.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin, Liu Dahun
descriptions.scene: The group enters the security booth and closes the door to escape the sun. Zhang Qimin addresses Liu Dahun regarding a مهم task he was assigned. Liu Dahun complains about the lack of manpower and funds, as well as the difficulty of relocating people to the underground parking within one day.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to discuss official duties. Liu Dahun wants to vent his frustrations regarding management.
descriptions.conflict: Liu Dahun is overwhelmed by the chaos, lack of resources, and the pressure of the relocation task.
descriptions.state: Liu Dahun is complaining and stressed; Zhang Qimin is focused on business.

outfits.Zhang Qimin: Heavily bundled clothing;Liu Dahun=Heavily bundled clothing.

descriptions.relation: Professional relationship between a council president and a manager.
descriptions.outcome: The conversation shifts toward the difficulties of managing the residents.

descriptions.title: A Girl, Zhang Qimin, Liu Dahun
descriptions.scene: A girl standing near Zhang Qimin interrupts the conversation with a cold smirk. She suggests that if Liu Dahun wants fewer problems, he should use "other people's hands" to remove the "excess" people. Her chilling suggestion of using a borrowed knife for murder shocks the entire group.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to propose a radical, violent solution to the management problems. The others are caught off guard.
descriptions.conflict: Her extreme suggestion clashes with the social norms of the group.
descriptions.state: The girl is cold and indifferent; the group is in shock.

outfits.A Girl: Heavy protective clothing;Zhang Qormin=Bundled clothing;Liu Dahun=Bundled clothing.

descriptions.relation: The girl is a member of the group but acts as a provocateur.
descriptions.outcome: The group is left in a state of shock and tension.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Zhang Qimin, A Girl
descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun, his eyelid twitching, looks around the booth to ensure no one is listening outside. He turns to Zhang Qimin and asks for clarification regarding the "borrowed knife" and who they intend to kill. The girl's gaze shifts toward the security staff, who are visibly nervous.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to understand the true meaning of the girl's threat. The girl wants to clarify her stance.
descriptions.conflict: The ambiguity of the girl's statement creates fear and suspicion.
descriptions.state: Liu Dahun is suspicious and anxious; the security staff are nervous.

outfits.Liu Dahun: Bundled clothing;Zhang Qimin=Bundled clothing;A Girl=Heavy protective clothing;Security Staff=Protective uniforms.

descriptions.relation: The security staff are intimidated by the girl.
descriptions.outcome: The tension in the room increases as the group waits for an explanation.

descriptions.title: A Girl, Liu Dahun
descriptions.scene: The girl calmly explains that they should "borrow knives" to get rid of those who are unlucky. She pulls out her phone and shows Liu Dahun a chat log between Jiang Yan and the General Manager. Liu Dahun frowns, trying to process the information, and narrows his eyes in suspicion.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to provide evidence for her logic. Liu Dahun wants to understand the connection between the chat and the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The information presented is confusing and potentially incriminating.
descriptions.state: The girl is calm and composed; Liu Dahun is suspicious and confused.
props: Mobile phone showing a chat log
descriptions.relation: The girl is presenting information to Liu Dahun.
descriptions.outcome: Liu Dahun is left contemplating the implications of the message.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin, A Girl
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin takes the phone to look at the message himself. He recognizes the message is from Jiang Yan. He pulls the girl into a corner and whispers to her, expressing confusion and concern that she is involving Jiang Yan in such dangerous matters, especially since she previously wanted to get to know her.

location.name: A corner of the security booth.

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to protect Jiang Yan from the girl's schemes. The girl remains silent and cold.
descriptions.conflict: Zhang Qimin's desire for stability conflicts with the girl's predatory tactics.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qimin is bewildered and cautious; the girl is cold and unyielding.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qimin acts as a concerned elder/peer to the girl.
descriptions.outcome: The girl does not respond to his plea, maintaining her cold demeanor.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin, A Girl
descriptions.scene: The girl smirks and warns Zhang Qimin that Jiang Yan is a woman with over 30 billion in capital and should not be messed with. Zhang Qimin realizes his attitude toward her must change to one of caution. The girl asserts that times are changing, noting how people quickly adapt to horrific things like corpses in the garden.

location.name: A corner of the security booth.

descriptions.intent: The girl wants to assert the power of Jiang Yan's wealth. Zhang Qimin wants to reassess his social standing.
descriptions.conflict: The shift in social power due to extreme wealth and the changing nature of morality.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qimin is becoming more cautious; the girl is firm and cynical.|Outabilities: Zhang Qimin=Bundled clothing;A Girl=Heavy protective clothing.
descriptions.relation: The girl is lecturing Zhang Qimin on the new reality.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qimin begins to fear the implications of the changing world.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin, Liu Dahun, A Girl
descriptions.scene: The girl concludes that having resources and reducing competition is more important than worrying about billions. Zhang Qimin contemplates the catastrophic heat and wonders if this is the beginning of the end. Liu Dahun interrupts, asking if she meant using "blood mosquitoes" to destroy residents. The girl suggests not opening the doors to lure them in.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to clarify the horrific nature of her plan. The girl wants to propose a way to use the monsters to their advantage.
descriptions.conflict: The plan involves using biological threats (monsters/mosquitoes) against the residents.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qimin is existential and fearful; Liu Dahun is horrified; the girl is calculating.

outfits.Zhang Qrimin: Bundled clothing;Liu Dahun=Bundled clothing;A Girl=Heavy protective clothing.

descriptions.relation: The group is now complicit in a dark, survivalist planning session.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to plan how to use the monsters to eliminate competition.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Character
descriptions.scene: The character confronts Zhang Qiqi regarding her proposal to use blood mosquitoes to eliminate residents. He questions the morality and the method of her plan. The group begins to deliberate on how to lure the monsters into the building.

location.name: Inside a residential complex
location.description: a gathering area for staff and residents

descriptions.intent: The character wants to clarify the lethal implications of Zhang Qussy's plan. He seeks to understand the mechanics of the trap. He aims to confront the cruelty of the suggestion.
descriptions.conflict: The ethical dilemma of using monsters to kill humans. The danger of letting monsters into the living space.
descriptions.relation: Confrontational towards Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.outcome: The group begins planning the infiltration of the monsters into the house.

descriptions.title: Luda Hun
descriptions.scene: Luda Hun remains silent for several seconds, observing the group's reaction. He then calmly states that reducing the population will make management easier. His statement shifts the focus of the entire room toward him.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hun wants to propose a way to simplify the administration of the complex. He aims to present a cold, logical solution to the resource crisis. He seeks to assert his influence.
descriptions.conflict: The shocking nature of his suggestion to reduce the population. The confusion and disbelief of the staff.
descriptions.relation: Dominating the attention of the staff
descriptions.outcome: The staff members turn their gaze toward him in confusion and shock.

descriptions.title: Staff Members
descriptions.scene: The staff members exchange bewildered looks and direct their questions to Luda Hun. They demand to know how reducing the number of people can facilitate management. The atmosphere becomes heavy with tension.
descriptions.intent: The staff members want to understand the logic behind Luda Hun's statement. They seek clarification on the consequences of his words. They aim to grasp the meaning of his unsettling proposal.
descriptions.conflict: The ambiguity and the disturbing implications of Luda Hun's words. The heavy, shocking silence in the room.
descriptions.relation: Questioning Luda Hun
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of uncertainty and dread.

descriptions.title: Luda Hun
descriptions.scene: Luda Hun explains that fewer people mean easier control and fewer resources required for sustenance. He warns that while this is efficient, the consequences are known to everyone. He acknowledges the gravity of the situation.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hun wants to justify his logic regarding resource management. He aims to present the necessity of population reduction. He seeks to acknowledge the dark reality of their survival.
descriptions.conflict: The moral weight of the decision to let people die. The fear of the unknown consequences.
descriptions.relation: Explaining his vision to the staff
descriptions.outcome: A sense of anxiety hangs in the air as the staff members look at each other with fear.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi smiles coldly and addresses the group about the changing era. She declares that they will manage those who remain and that some will pay for their lack of understanding. She asserts her confidence in the new order.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to establish her dominance in the new social hierarchy. She aims to intimidate those who do not align with the new plan. She seeks to solidify her position as a leader.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of retribution against those who do not comply. The shift in social power.
descriptions.relation: Asserting authority over the staff
descriptions.outcome: Her words leave the others in deep thought and apprehension.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi reminds the group that official resources will only last for three days due to the heat. She points out that once resources vanish, the shelters in Shinshuiwan will descend into chaos. She warns that those interacting with officials will become targets of suspicion.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to highlight the imminent resource depletion. She aims to warn the managers about the coming chaos. She seeks to illustrate the danger of being associated with official authorities.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and the scarcity of food and supplies. The threat of accusations and social collapse.
descriptions.relation: Warning Jianqing and the others
descriptions.outcome: The attendees are stunned by the reality of the impending crisis.

descriptions.title: Jianqing
descriptions.scene: Jianqing feels a wave of anxiety upon hearing the warnings but is simultaneously gripped by ambition. He realizes that controlling the remaining resources means controlling everything. He proposes that they should be the ones to decide the distribution of resources.
descriptions.intent: Jianqing wants to seize power through resource control. He aims to transform the crisis into an opportunity for dominance. He seeks to establish a new rule over Shinshuiwan.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle between fear and ambition. The risk of attempting to usurp power.
descriptions.relation: Proposing a coup-like management style to Luda Hun
descriptions.outcome: He presents a plan to control the entire area by controlling the resources.

descriptions.title: Luda Hun
descriptions.scene: Luda Hun places an unlit cigarette in his mouth and takes a deep breath. He observes the group coldly and sets two conditions for their plan. He insists on absolute secrecy and that they must only act after official supplies are gone.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hun wants to set the terms for the new clandestine operation. He aims to ensure the secrecy of their plan to avoid detection. He seeks to prevent the staff from acting prematurely.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of being caught by authorities or residents. The need for strict discipline among the conspirators.
descriptions.relation: Setting conditions for the group's cooperation
descriptions.outcome: He establishes the boundaries for their secret management strategy.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang leaves the residential complex and finds a secluded corner. She retrieves a hidden backpack containing supplies. She prepares her electric fumigators, hoping they can combat the mutated mosquitoes.

location.name: A secluded corner outside the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to access her hidden survival supplies. She aims to prepare her weapons against the mosquito threat. She seeks to ensure her personal safety.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the fumigators will work against the large mosquitoes. The need for secrecy regarding her supplies.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She readies her equipment for a potential encounter.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang walks through the empty streets toward a nearby shopping center. She observes the desolate, burnt landscape of the city, filled with abandoned cars and charred buildings. She notices the presence of dead bodies and a layer of black dust everywhere.

location.name: Empty streets and sidewalks near a shopping center

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to reach the shopping center safely. She aims to navigate the wasteland without being noticed. She seeks to avoid the dangers present in the abandoned city.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of unseen observers in the windows. The decaying and dangerous environment of the city.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues her journey through the dead city.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Mosquitoes
descriptions.scene: A swarm of bloodthirsty mosquitoes descends upon a corpse that has just hit the ground. The insects move with incredible speed to consume the remains. The scene depicts the brutal reality of the mutated ecosystem.

location.name: A street covered in black dust and remains

descriptions.intent: The mosquitoes want to feed on the fallen body.
descriptions.conflict: The biological drive of the predators against the remains of the dead.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The swarm successfully attacks the body.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: A corpse falls from a height and hits the ground with a heavy thud amidst black dust. A swarm of bloodthirsty mosquitoes immediately descends upon the body to feed. Jianyang continues walking through the desolate area, ignoring the carnage.

location.name: A road covered in black dust and debris

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to continue her journey through the wasteland. She aims to navigate the environment despite the growing tension and the sight of the corpse.
descriptions.conflict: The environment is filled with the remains of burnt bodies and a swarm of predatory insects. The world feels increasingly uncontrollable and terrifying.
descriptions.state: Tense and observant, feeling the weight of the world's decay.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is an observer of the surrounding decay.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyang reaches the perimeter of the shopping center.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: As Jianyang enters the shopping center territory, the swarm of mosquitoes divides into groups and dives toward her. Her enhanced spatial abilities allow her to perceive the attack with heightened senses. She begins to physically deflect the insects.

location.name: Shopping center territory
location.description: an area with high heat and intense insect activity

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to defend herself from the descending swarm. She aims to use her enhanced physical strength and senses to intercept the mosquitoes.
descriptions.conflict: Dozens of hungry, blood-sucking mosquitoes are attacking her from multiple directions.
descriptions.state: Focused and agile, utilizing her heightened senses.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is being hunted by the swarm.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyang successfully begins to deflect the mosquitoes with precise movements.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang uses an electric shocker to strike the mosquitoes, but the larger insects cause the device to drain its battery quickly. She mentally summons replacement shockers from her spatial storage to continue the fight. Within a minute, she has exhausted several devices, leaving a pile of dead mosquito parts around her.
descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to eliminate the attacking mosquitoes. She aims to maintain her defense by constantly replacing depleted electronic weapons.
descriptions.conflict: The mosquitoes are too large for the shocker to be effective for long, and the battery drains rapidly. The extreme heat causes mosquito blood to evaporate into black powder.
descriptions.state: Efficient and determined, working under intense heat.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is in active combat with the swarm.
descriptions.outcome: The swarm is significantly weakened, and a pile of dead insects surrounds her.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang moves toward a specific store while spraying mosquito repellent around herself. She maintains her defensive perimeter using her protective gear. Despite her safety, the sound of the insects triggers a deep desire in her to annihilate them.

location.name: Near a branded cafe with high-quality renovations

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to reach a specific store to find supplies. She aims to protect herself from the remaining insects using chemical repellents.
descriptions.conflict: The irritating sound of the mosquitoes causes her psychological distress and anger. The heat is intense enough to fry an egg.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is avoiding the insects.
descriptions.outcome: She reaches the entrance of the branded cafe.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang examines the storefront of the branded cafe and notices signs of attempted vandalism. She observes that while there are scratches on the metal, the locks remain intact. She checks the perimeter and realizes the building is currently empty.

location.name: Entrance of a high-end branded cafe
location.description: showing signs of wear and scratches

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to enter the store to scavenge. She aims to assess the security and the presence of any potential threats or people inside.
descriptions.conflict: The store shows signs of previous break-in attempts by vandals. She must determine if anyone is still inside.
descriptions.state: Cautious and observant.|Outlam: Jianyang concludes that the store is unoccupied.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang focuses her mind to summon an electric saw from her spatial storage. She uses the thin blade of the saw to work through the gaps in the three U-shaped locks on the armored door. The saw creates loud buzzing sounds and flying sparks, making her ears ache.

location.name: The armored door of the cafe

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to break into the cafe. She aims to bypass the heavy security locks using her summoned tool.
descriptions.conflict: The noise of the saw is deafening and physically painful to her ears. The task requires precision to fit the blade into the lock gaps.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is performing a forced entry.
descriptions.outcome: The three locks are successfully opened.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: A new swarm of mosquitoes gathers behind Jianyang while she is working on the door. She quickly puts away the saw and sprays more repellent toward the approaching insects. She manages to open the door and slip inside, closing it immediately to prevent the monsters from entering.

location.name: The threshold of the cafe door

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to secure her position inside the building. She aims to block the mosquitoes from following her into the store.
descriptions.conflict: A new group of mosquitoes is closing in on her back. The hot wind threatens to blow her repellent away.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is escaping the swarm.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully seals herself inside the cafe.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: The mosquitoes continue to batter against the glass door, unable to enter. Jianyang feels a sense of disgust as she watches them. She reinforces the door by installing new locks on both sides to ensure her safety.

location.name: Inside the cafe
location.description: looking out through the glass door

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to ensure the store is completely secure. She aims to prevent any further intrusion from the insects.
descriptions.conflict: The mosquitoes are aggressively hitting the glass, creating a persistent threat. She feels disgust toward the creatures.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is sealing herself away from the swarm.
descriptions.outcome: The door is reinforced and the perimeter is secure.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang enters the interior of the 200 m² store to conduct a thorough security check. She discovers a side door that shows signs of being tampered with from the inside. She concludes that intruders likely fled through this door into the underground supermarket or parking lot.
descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to ensure no threats remain in the building. She aims to investigate the source of the potential intruders.
descriptions.conflict: There is evidence that someone was inside and has since escaped. She must decide whether to pursue or move on.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is searching for intruders.
descriptions.outcome: She decides not to pursue the intruders and focuses on scavenging.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang begins searching the store for useful items, specifically looking for coffee. She finds two beautiful, stylish display shelves filled with colorful cups. She also discovers several bottles of high-quality water and adds them to her spatial storage.
descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to replenish her supplies. She aims to find coffee and other valuable goods to add to her existing stocks.
descriptions.conflict: She must decide what is worth the effort to carry. She is motivated by the opportunity to take items for free.

outfits.Jianyang: A heavy protective suit including a protective hat and gloves.

descriptions.relation: Jianyang is looting the store.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully collects cups, interesting items, and water into her spatial storage.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang explores a shop to collect free items, quickly grabbing cups and other interesting objects. She continues her search until she discovers several bottles of high-quality water, which she adds to her storage space.

location.name: A shop
location.description: filled with various goods and items for collection

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to gather as many useful resources as possible for free. She seeks to maximize her supplies before moving on.
descriptions.conflict: The temptation to take everything is high, but she must remain efficient.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully expands her supplies with water and various shop items.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang finishes the process of breaking locks and preparing a safe shelter. She takes a few more items for herself and prepares to continue her journey through the heat.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to find something useful while taking a brief respite. She aims to prepare for the next stage of her journey.
descriptions.conflict: The knowledge that more trials await her in the future.

outfits.Jian and Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes her immediate task of securing the area and prepares to move.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang reaches a hidden door and feels a wave of hot, stuffy, coffee-scented air. The temperature inside the room is significantly higher than the outside, exceeding 70 degrees.

location.name: Entrance of a hidden room
location.description: characterized by intense heat and the smell of coffee

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to assess the situation inside the room before entering. She waits for the hot air to mix with the outside air to avoid a sudden thermal shock.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat inside the room threatens her safety.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains at the threshold to monitor the environment.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang uses an emergency flashlight to illuminate the dark interior of the room. She discovers large, neatly stacked boxes and confirms that there is no immediate danger after the heat stabilizes.

location.name: A dark
location.description: indoor storage room filled with boxes

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to see what is inside the dark room. She aims to verify if the environment is safe to enter.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness and the lingering heat from the room's interior.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized and heavy-duty footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She determines the room is safe and enters the storage area.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang finds various valuable goods including coffee beans, sugar, cinnamon, nuts, and gift sets. She also discovers expensive imported coffee machines and stacks of paper cups.

location.name: A well-stocked storage room with shelves and boxes

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to loot the valuable items. She aims to collect high-value goods like coffee and machinery.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of items makes it a task of selection.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins moving the valuable items into her storage space.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang decides to ignore spoiled items like nut cream, chocolate, milk, and cream due to the heat. She then discovers several boxes of premium Fei Man Tai alcohol, totaling 30 bottles.

location.name: The storage room
location.description: specifically near the shelves containing alcohol

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to avoid spoiled food to maintain quality. She seeks out high-value alcohol to add to her collection.
descriptions.conflict: The high temperature has already ruined some of the perishable goods.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

props: 30 bottles of Fei Man Tai alcohol
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully collects all 30 bottles of expensive alcohol.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang finishes cleaning the warehouse and returns to the dining area. It is nearly 6:00 PM, and she checks her phone to see the outdoor temperature is 60 degrees.

location.name: Dining area
location.description: a cleaner part of the shelter

descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to return to her base area. She seeks to monitor the environmental conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme external temperature remains a constant threat.
descriptions.state: Tired but satisfied with her looting.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She settles back into her dining area to rest.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang enters her storage space and removes her protective helmet. She turns on her surveillance cameras, which are still functioning due to her specialized heat-resistant wiring.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to check on the security of her surroundings. She aims to monitor the building's hallways via her cameras.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat has disabled standard building cameras.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and no helmet (removed)

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She observes people moving supplies in the basement through her screens.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: Jian Yang drinks a bottle of chilled soda water and goes to the second-floor gym. She puts on boxing gloves and begins training on a heavy bag to practice martial arts for self-defense.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to stay physically fit and prepare for combat. She aims to master self-defense techniques learned from watching UFC.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exhaustion from the day's activities.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and boxing gloves.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She trains intensely for several hours.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: At 9:00 PM, Jian Yang puts her protective gear back on and checks her cameras one last time. She discovers that the hallways of the first and seventh floors are covered in blood and bodies.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yang wants to ensure her safety before heading out. She aims to check for any new threats in the building.
descriptions.conflict: A horrific scene of mass death and mutated mosquitoes is revealed.
descriptions.state: Shocked and horrified.|Outments: Jian Yang=A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She witnesses a massacre caused by mutated mosquitoes.

descriptions.title: Jian Yang
descriptions.scene: The surveillance audio plays the sounds of chaos, including screams of children and people begging for help. The audio captures the sounds of panic, running, and the sounds of attacks.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yang is forced to listen to the unfolding tragedy. She is witnessing the total breakdown of order in the building.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming terror and the presence of giant mutated mosquitoes.
descriptions.state: Distressed and overwhelmed by the sounds of suffering.

outfits.Jian Yang: A protective suit, specialized footwear, and a protective helmet.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends on a note of extreme horror and chaos.

descriptions.title: Unknown Voice
descriptions.scene: A recording plays through speakers featuring a person screaming for their mother to run away from mosquitoes. The voice expresses terror and confusion about an unlocked door. The audio captures sounds of physical violence and frantic running.

location.name: Unknown
location.description: a place where audio is being broadcast via speakers

descriptions.intent: The speaker wants to warn their mother and escape the approaching mosquitoes. They are desperately trying to flee the danger.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of mosquitoes and the unlocked door threaten their survival. The speaker is trapped in a state of panic.
descriptions.relation: The speaker is the child of the person they are addressing.
descriptions.outcome: The audio ends, leaving the listener in shock.

descriptions.title: Jin Yan
descriptions.scene: Jin Yan watches the horrific footage on her screen, realizing the safe Tianshuiwan complex has become a slaughterhouse. She experiences a physical reaction of cold breath and narrowed vision. She struggles to comprehend how the security of the complex failed so quickly.

location.name: Jin Yan's residence
location.description: a secure area with a sofa and a screen

descriptions.intent: Jin Yan wants to understand the cause of the sudden massacre. She seeks to verify if what she is seeing is real.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden transformation of a safe zone into a bloodbath creates intense psychological distress. The visual evidence contradicts her understanding of the complex's security.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to investigate the footage further.

descriptions.title: Jin Yan
descriptions.scene: Jin Yan removes her protective helmet and sits on a sofa to examine the surveillance footage. She uses a tablet to play the recordings on fast-leveled playback. She identifies that the entrance door was left open at approximately 8:30 PM.
descriptions.intent: Jin Yan wants to find the exact moment the security breach occurred. She aims to pinpoint the time the door was left unsecured.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of why the door was left open creates internal tension. She must navigate through hours of footage to find the truth.

outfits.Jin Yan: No specific clothing mentioned after removing the helmet.

descriptions.outcome: She discovers the door was opened at 8:30 PM.

descriptions.title: Jin Yan
descriptions.scene: Jin Yan switches the footage to real-time to observe the period when mosquitoes are most active. She observes a young man in full protective gear opening the door. She notes that the door should have been closed between 6:00 PM and 7:30 AM.
descriptions.intent: Jin Yan wants to observe the breach during the high-risk period. She seeks to confirm if the rules of the complex were violated.
descriptions.conflict: The violation of safety protocols during the peak hunting hours of the mosquitoes. The discrepancy between rules and reality creates confusion.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan reads a repetitive announcement from the management company in the chat regarding the lockdown of all residential buildings. The message explains that a resident left a door open, allowing blood-sucking mosquitoes to invade the complex. The management announces that all entrance doors will be locked indefinitely.

location.name: Residential complex
location.description: an indoor area with access to a digital chat

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to understand the current situation and the cause of the insect invasion. She seeks information regarding the safety of the residential buildings.
descriptions.conflict: The management company has locked all doors, restricting movement. An insect infestation is spreading through the complex.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is a resident under the management's authority
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan realizes the scope of the infestation extends to all buildings.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan reads about the management company's ongoing disinfection efforts on the lower floors. The announcement instructs those not yet in the bunker to stay in their apartments or protect their skin if moving. The company reports high heat and casualties from heat and mosquito attacks.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to assess the level of danger and the effectiveness of the management's response. She evaluates the risks of moving through the complex.
descriptions.conflict: Extreme heat and deadly mosquito swarms threaten the residents. Staff shortages hinder the disinfection process.
descriptions.relation: Dzyaller is a resident observing the management's actions
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan understands the extreme environmental conditions and the high mortality rate.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan views photos of exhausted and deceased employees and victims sent by the management company. She notices the phrase "all buildings," realizing the attack is widespread. She contemplates whether the open door was an accident or sabotage.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to determine if the insect invasion was a deliberate act. She tries to deduce the scale of the catastrophe.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that the entire complex is compromised. The uncertainty of whether the cause was intentional.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is an investigator of the situation's truth
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan decides not to play detective for now to focus on survival.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: The chat erupts with anger as residents insult the management company and the residents who evacuated early, including Dzyanyan. Dzyanyan sees numerous notifications tagging her but chooses to ignore them. She decides not to reveal her surveillance footage to avoid being accused of illegal monitoring.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to avoid conflict with the angry mob. She intends to keep her secret surveillance footage to herself.
descriptions.conflict: The mob is attacking her personally in the chat. The social pressure of being a "privileged" evacueer.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is being targeted by the angry residents
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan decides to remain silent and focus on her escape plan.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan formulates her plan to leave the city before the temperature reaches 70-80 degrees. She decides that arguing with the crowd is useless. She turns off her phone, puts on her protective gear, and leaves the shelter.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to escape the "hellish city" before the heat becomes unsurvivable. She aims to prepare herself for the journey.
descriptions.conflict: The impending extreme heat and the need for physical preparation.

outfits.Dzyanyan: Full protective gear designed for extreme heat and insect protection.

descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is acting independently of the group
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan exits the shelter to begin her journey.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan walks through the streets at 10 PM under a blood-red full moon. The temperature continues to rise despite the night. She observes groups of people moving through the streets carrying heavy backpacks and wearing makeshift protective suits.

location.name: City streets
location.description: dark environment under a red moon

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan is navigating the streets toward her destination. She is observing the state of other survivors.
descriptions.conflict: The rising nighttime temperature and the presence of other struggling survivors.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Strangers peer through the glass door of a coffee shop. Jiang Yan hides in a dark corner of the establishment, remaining unseen. The heat inside the shop is even more intense than the outdoor temperature.

location.name: Coffee shop
location.description: a dark interior with glass doors, much hotter than the outside

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to remain undetected by the strangers. She seeks to stay hidden in the shadows to avoid interaction.
descriptions.conflict: The strangers are looking into the shop, potentially threatening her anonymity. The extreme heat makes the indoor environment uncomfortable.
descriptions.state: Cautious and observant. She is focused on maintaining her concealment.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is avoiding the strangers
descriptions.outcome: The strangers do not enter the shop, and Jiang Yan remains hidden.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The streets become empty as the heat drives people into underground areas. Jiang Yan decides it is time to move. She retrieves a bulky jetpack from her spatial storage and puts it on over her fireproof gear.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to depart from her hiding spot. She intends to prepare herself for flight by donning her heavy equipment.
descriptions.conflict: The weight of the jetpack is immense, exceeding her own body weight. She must rely on her enhanced physical strength to move.
descriptions.state: Determined and prepared. She is calculating her next move based on the environment.|Outables: Jiang Yan=fireproof gear,a bulky 60kg jetpack
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is fully equipped and ready to depart.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan locks the door of the shop and notices movement on the pavement. Several dried, mummified corpses begin to twitch. She experiences a moment of intense shock and fear.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand if the corpses are coming back to life. She is monitoring her immediate surroundings for threats.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden movement of the dead creates a terrifying realization. She faces the possibility of a zombie-like outbreak.
descriptions.state: Terrified and shocked. Her heart stops as she witnesses the movement.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the corpses are not zombies but hosts for insects.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The skin of the dead bodies ruptures, releasing hundreds of tiny, fingernail-sized insects. Jiang Yan realizes that the dried-up water sources have forced these mosquitoes to use corpses as incubators. She feels a sense of revulsion.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan seeks to comprehend the biological mechanism of the swarm. She tries to process the horror of the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The swarm of insects represents a biological threat. The realization of the corpses acting as incubators causes physical distress.
descriptions.state: Horrified and nauseated. Her pupils constrict and her breathing catches.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She understands how the mosquitoes are surviving the extreme heat.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan waits patiently for the young insects to fly away. Once the swarm has passed, she exits the shop. She knows she cannot use weapons like rackets or sprays because her jetpack requires free hand movement.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid the swarm of insects. She intends to reach a high altitude where the insects are less frequent.
descriptions.conflict: She lacks defensive tools like aerosols or rackets due to the jetpack's controls. The insects are a direct threat to her.
descriptions.state: Patient and calculating. She is waiting for a safe window to move.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully waits for the swarm to clear before proceeding.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan tests the jetpack's stability by hovering half a meter above the ground. After confirming the system is stable, she increases thrust and begins her ascent toward the seventh floor and then the eighth floor. The ruins of the city shrink below her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach a safe altitude. She aims to fly toward Shanshuiwan while avoiding the insects.
descriptions.conflict: She must manage the heavy weight of the suit and the difficulty of controlling the ascent. She must fly fast enough to avoid being caught by mutated insects.
descriptions.state: Focused and controlled. She is performing a technical flight test.|Outlaments: Jiang Yan=heavy jetpack,fireproof gear
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the eighth floor and continues climbing.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan continues her flight, passing the ninth floor and heading toward Shanshuiwan. She reaches an old district and decides to stop to observe the surroundings. The windows of the buildings are all dark.

location.name: High altitude above an old residential district

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to survey the area. She seeks to check for any signs of life or danger in the abandoned buildings.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness of the buildings makes it difficult to see anything. The city appears like a ghost fortress.
descriptions.state: Observant and cautious. She is scanning the environment for any movement.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She notices a flicker of light in a seventh-floor apartment.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: In a seventh-floor apartment, a small girl with a pink dress and a tiara stands by the window. Her parents sit silently beside her in a state of extreme exhaustion. The mother struggles to stay awake and asks the girl if she is unwell.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to show her parents what she saw. The mother wants to comfort her daughter.
descriptions.conflict: The family is dying from heat and lack of resources. The mother is struggling to maintain consciousness.
descriptions.state: The girl is excited; the parents are dying and exhausted. The mother is struggling to open her eyes.

outfits.bracelet;Mother: light summer dress with floral pattern

descriptions.relation: The girl is the daughter of the seated couple.
descriptions.outcome: The girl reveals she saw "Superman" flying by.

descriptions.scene: The girl tells her parents she saw Superman flying past. The father reacts with shock and looks at the mother. The girl's excitement is short-lived as her breathing becomes heavy and labored.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to share her discovery. The parents want to process the news of the flying figure.
descriptions.conflict: The girl's physical health is rapidly declining. The family is facing their end.
descriptions.state: The girl is energetic then suddenly lethargic. The father is visibly shaken.

outfits.bracelet;Mother: light summer dress with floral pattern

descriptions.relation: The family is bonded by their shared tragedy.
descriptions.outcome: The girl begins to lose consciousness.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The mother kisses the girl's forehead and tells her to sleep, promising that fairies will come. The girl asks if the fairies will heal her and if they have an air conditioner. The mother comforts her with lies about magic and travel.
descriptions.intent: The mother wants to ease her daughter's fear and pain. The girl wants to be healed and to meet characters like Peppa Pig.
descriptions.conflict: The girl is in pain from medical treatments and heat. The parents are using fantasy to mask a grim reality.
descriptions.state: The girl is vulnerable and hopeful. The mother is heartbroken and weeping.

outfits.bracelet;Mother: light summer dress with floral pattern

descriptions.relation: The mother is comforting the dying child.
descriptions.outcome: The girl falls into a deep, heavy sleep.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The father holds the girl and the mother close, trying to hide his trembling voice. The girl expresses her love and says she is tired. She closes her eyes and her hand slips down. The parents whisper their love back as the mother begins to drift into unconsciousness.
descriptions.intent: The father wants to provide a final moment of warmth. The girl wants to rest.
descriptions.conflict: The family is experiencing their final moments together. Death is imminent.
descriptions.state: The girl is dying. The father is sobbing. The mother is fading.

outfits.bracelet;Mother: light summer dress with floral pattern

descriptions.relation: The family is embracing in their final moments.
descriptions.outcome: The girl passes away, and the scene falls silent.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the 32nd floor of a building. She flies at a controlled speed, being careful due to her lack of experience despite the jetpack's ability to reach 200 km/h.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her destination safely. She intends to maintain control over the heavy suit.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of experience makes high-speed flight dangerous. She must balance speed with stability.
descriptions.state: Focused and cautious. She is concentrating on the mechanics of flight.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues her ascent toward Shanshuiwan.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan flies her jetpack toward the 32nd floor of the building. She navigates the flight cautiously due to her lack of experience, despite the suit's high speed. She successfully reaches her destination.

location.name: Air
location.description: approaching the 32nd floor of a high-rise building

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to reach her apartment safely. She aims to navigate the flight without crashing or being too slow.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of experience makes high-speed flight dangerous. The jetpack's speed is high, but she must fly slowly to maintain control.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: A bulky jetpack suit that makes her look like a Michelin Man.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She reaches the 32nd floor safely.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan hovers in front of the living room's panoramic window and checks her phone. She discovers there is no network signal, indicated by a large exclamation mark. This realization frustrates her.

location.name: In front of a panoramic window

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to check her communication status. She needs to see if she can still control her smart home system.
descriptions.conflict: The absence of a network signal prevents her from controlling the smart home. This renders her original plan of entering through the window impossible.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she cannot enter through the window and must find an alternative way inside.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan evaluates three different entry methods to her apartment. She considers descending from the roof, climbing through a window, or entering through the main entrance. She decides that the roof is the easiest option because the door lock is simple.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to find a way into her apartment. She seeks the path of least resistance and least noise.
descriptions.conflict: The window is too narrow for her bulky suit. The main entrance requires loud power tools that might attract mosquitoes.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She chooses to fly to the roof to enter through the metal door.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan flies up to the roof and lands. She observes the desolate environment, noting a water tank, electrical boxes, and withered flower beds. She feels the intense heat even through her thermal boots.

location.name: The building's rooftop
location.description: featuring a water tank, electrical panels, and dead plants

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to find the door to the building. She is scouting the area for her next move.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat is palpable even through her protective gear. The rooftop is empty and desolate.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: A bulky jetpack suit, thermal boots.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the location of the metal door.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan prepares her tools and approaches the metal door. She retrieves a knife and a flashlight from her spatial storage. She uses a lockpick to successfully unlock the simple door.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to enter the building. She aims to bypass the lock without making excessive noise.
descriptions.conflict: She must be careful not to attract attention. The door is locked.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The lock yields, and the door opens.

descriptions.title: Dzyan and Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan enters the dark stairwell. She ties a rope to the door handle to prevent it from slamming shut behind her. She descends smoothly into the dark corridor.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to reach her apartment. She aims to descend the stairs without getting trapped.
descriptions.conflict: The stairwell is dark and potentially dangerous. She risks the door locking her inside.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the hallway of her floor.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reaches her apartment door (3.201) but finds the security system active. She realizes that attempting to open the door will trigger a 500-volt electric shock. She cannot disable it remotely due to the lack of signal.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to enter her apartment. She needs to bypass the security system.
descriptions.conflict: The security system is active and will electrocute her. She cannot use her phone to disable it.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she is stuck outside her own apartment.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan decides to retreat to her spatial storage, her private pocket dimension. She activates the storage and teleports inside. The environment inside is bright, fresh, and cool, providing relief from the heat.
