descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to escape the heat and the predicament. She seeks refuge in her safe space.
descriptions.conflict: The outside world is unbearably hot and she is stuck outside her apartment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters her safe dimension.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan removes her heavy jetpack suit and takes a shower. She changes into comfortable loungewear and lies down on her bed to watch a reality show on her tablet. She begins to feel hungry as her stomach growls.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to rest and recover. She aims to relax after her ordeal.
descriptions.conflict: Physical exhaustion and hunger.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Initially the bulky jetpack suit, then comfortable loungewear.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She settles in to watch TV but is interrupted by hunger.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan goes to the kitchen to prepare a meal. She starts boiling water with a spicy base and adds noodles, pickled cabbage, and various seafood from her storage. She finishes the dish with mushrooms and cilantro.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to satisfy her hunger. She aims to cook a delicious, high-quality meal.
descriptions.conflict: She must find and prepare ingredients from her storage.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finishes a large, delicious meal.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan finishes her meal and checks her phone. She discovers that the network connection has been restored. She decides to leave her spatial storage and return to the real world.

location.name: Inside the spatial storage
location.description: then transitioning to the real world

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to check her status and return to her apartment. She aims to capitalize on the restored signal.
descriptions.conflict: The transition back to the real world brings the intense heat back.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She exits the storage and is immediately hit by the suffocating heat of the real world.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan finishes her dinner in her underground shelter and checks her phone. She discovers that the mobile connection has been restored. Feeling encouraged by the news, she prepares to leave her safe space.

location.name: Underground shelter
location.description: a safe and comfortable private space.

descriptions.intent: Dzyuityan wants to check for news and reconnect with the outside world. She seeks information regarding the current state of the world. She aims to see if communication is functional.
descriptions.conflict: The post-apocalyptic conditions make communication unreliable. The world outside is dangerous and extreme.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan decides to exit the shelter to face the heat.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan exits the shelter and is immediately hit by a wave of suffocating heat. She approaches her apartment door and enters the code into the keypad. She places her finger on the scanner, and the lock clicks open.

location.name: Entrance to the apartment
location.description: a transition zone between the shelter and the apartment.

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to enter her home. She seeks the relative safety of her living quarters. She aims to complete the entry process mechanically.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme external heat threatens her physical well-being. The environment is oppressive and sweltering.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzylar enters her apartment.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan enters her apartment, which feels like a closed oven due to the stifling heat. She decides not to turn on the lights to save energy. She moves through the dark apartment toward her bedroom to return to her shelter.

location.name: Apartment
location.description: a dark, sweltering, and stuffy residential unit.

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to reach her bedroom. She seeks to avoid using electricity. She aims to retreat back to her controlled environment.
descriptions.conflict: The apartment is unbearably hot and dark. The heat makes the indoor environment nearly as difficult as the outdoors.
descriptions.state: Determined to stay in the dark and conserve resources.|Outments: Dzyanyan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan reaches her bedroom and enters her shelter.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Inside her shelter, Dzyanyan opens a messaging app to check the Qingshuiwan residents' chat. She reads through the heated discussions where people are complaining, cursing her for not sharing supplies, and sharing videos of the underground shelter.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to monitor the social situation. She seeks to understand the community's reaction to the crisis. She aims to catch up on news from the residents.
descriptions.conflict: The community is in turmoil and some residents are angry with her. The news is filled with horror and suffering.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan is being criticized by the group members.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan learns about the desperate state of the residents and the energy crisis.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan observes the conditions in the underground parking lot shelter through the chat. She notes the use of air conditioners by the elderly and families with infants, but realizes the cooling is ineffective due to the massive heat load. She sees the physical exhaustion of the people.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to assess the survival conditions of others. She seeks to understand the technical limitations of the shelter. She aims to gauge the severity of the heatwave.
descriptions.conflict: The air conditioners are too weak for the large space. The heat from human bodies overrides the cooling effect.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan realizes the cooling efforts are largely futile.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan views a photo in the chat showing fresh bloodstains on a wall in the residential complex. She reads the subsequent wave of curses directed at the unknown perpetrators who allowed bloodsuckers to enter through the pedestrian passage.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to identify the cause of the recent violence. She seeks to understand how the monsters breached the security. She aims to process the news of the intrusion.
descriptions.conflict: Bloodsucking monsters have infiltrated the human sanctuary. The residents are reacting with rage and blame.
props: photo of blood on a wall
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan learns about the security breach and the ongoing threat.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan examines a photo of a giant pillar of smoke and red flames. She realizes with horror that the dried-up pond in the center of the complex has been turned into an improvised crematorium for the dead.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to identify the source of the smoke. She seeks to understand the fate of the deceased. She aims to comprehend the scale of the death toll.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer number of bodies is too high to transport. The heat and insects make the dead a massive biohazard.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan understands the grim reality of the mass cremation.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan watches a live video of the parking lot shelter. She sees people sleeping, playing cards, and families weeping over lost loved ones. She notices the lack of smoking, wondering if it is due to peace or a lack of supplies.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to witness the current atmosphere of the survivors. She seeks to see the human impact of the disaster. She aims to evaluate the social order in the shelter.
descriptions.conflict: The atmosphere is one of extreme grief and exhaustion. The survivors are struggling to maintain any semblance of normalcy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan observes the profound suffering and fragmentation of the group.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan notices the participant count in the Qingshuiwan 306 chat has dropped from 500 to 306. She calculates that at least 600 people have died. She recognizes a pair of shoes in a video belonging to the security chief who distributed rations.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to quantify the loss of life. She seeks to find connections between the news and known individuals. She aims to investigate the sudden disappearance of residents.
descriptions.conflict: The massive drop in participants indicates a catastrophic loss of life. The presence of the security chief's shoes suggests he may be among the dead.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan connects the news to a specific person she knows.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan develops a deep sense of dread and suspicion.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyan observes the rising temperatures as they surpass 70 degrees Celsius. She reads government messages about new shelters and free food supplies, but notes that people must travel to them alone. She realizes the government is using VChat to maintain control.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyan wants to understand the government's strategy. She seeks to find information on survival resources. She aims to interpret the stability of the communication apps.
descriptions.conflict: Resources are limited and people are vulnerable during transit. The government is manipulating communication to manage the population. Conflicts in the chats are intensifying.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyan realizes the government's role in controlling information.
descriptions.outcome: Dzyanyan understands the growing chaos and the government's attempt at population management.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The protagonist realizes that the VChat application remained stable during the mass outage because the government maintained control over it to communicate with the population. Tensions rise in the chats as meaningless conversations decrease and conflicts intensify. Residents begin to suspect that the Housing Management and the Residents' Council are misappropriating food supplies.
descriptions.intent: The protagonist seeks to understand the stability of communication. She observes the shifting social dynamics within the digital community.
descriptions.conflict: Scarcity of food supplies leads to survival struggles and distrust of local authorities. Social friction increases despite the government's presence.
descriptions.relation: Residents vs. Local Authorities
descriptions.outcome: Increased social tension and suspicion of corruption within the residential complex.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The temperature remains extremely high, and blood mosquitoes continue to swarm in massive clouds. As the heat reaches 75 degrees, the mosquito population finally begins to decline and eventually disappears. The extreme heat persists, making the environment increasingly uninhabitable.
descriptions.intent: The mosquitoes seek hosts for feeding. The environment undergoes a biological shift due to temperature.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat threatens all life, but the mosquitoes represent a biological threat that only subsides at lethal temperatures.
descriptions.relation: Nature vs. Inhabitants
descriptions.outcome: The blood mosquitoes completely vanish from the area.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: On the tenth day of the heatwave, the government sends a mass message announcing that the blood mosquitoes have disappeared worldwide. The message provides hope by stating there is an 80% chance the heat will subside in ten days. This serves as the first piece of good news since the catastrophe began.
descriptions.intent: The government aims to maintain public morale and provide a timeline for relief. The people seek a reason to keep surviving.
descriptions.conflict: The looming threat of the next ten days of even more intense heat.
descriptions.relation: Government to Population
descriptions.outcome: The survivors gain a "ray of hope" despite the impending heat.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Cellular communication fails completely as the backup power supply in the Qinshuiwan underground parking lot runs out. The chat goes silent, leaving the survivors in total isolation. Jang Yan remains in her shelter, dedicating her time to intensive training.
descriptions.intent: Jang Yan wants to prepare herself for the future difficulties. She seeks to master various survival skills.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of all external communication and the depletion of energy resources.
descriptions.state: Disciplined and focused.|Outters: Jang Yan=None mentioned
descriptions.relation: Jang Yan is isolated from the world
descriptions.outcome: Jang Yan becomes highly skilled in piloting, driving, shooting, and farming.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jang Yan continues her rigorous training schedule from morning until late at night, absorbing knowledge like a sponge. She masters piloting planes, yachts, and excavators, as well as shooting and agriculture. She ignores entertainment like movies to focus entirely on survival preparation.
descriptions.intent: Jang Yan intends to become self-sufficient and capable of handling any machine or weapon. She wants to utilize the period of isolation to build strength.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle to remain disciplined and avoid the temptation of distractions.
descriptions.relation: Jang Yan is alone in her pursuit
descriptions.outcome: She achieves a high level of technical proficiency.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The temperature begins to drop significantly, from 60 degrees on the eighteenth day to 50 degrees on the nineteenth day. Jang Yan observes movement on the streets through her binoculars. She spots a convoy of trucks painted with heat-resistant paint arriving at the gates of the residential complex.
descriptions.intent: Jang Yan wants to monitor the external environment. She seeks to see if any aid is arriving.
descriptions.conflict: The transition from a period of isolation to a period of potential human confrontation.
descriptions.relation: Jang Yan observing the outside world
descriptions.outcome: A supply convoy arrives at the complex.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Armed military personnel exit the trucks and establish order among the crowd at the gates. People begin to emerge from the underground shelters as the temperature drops to 37 degrees on the twentieth day. A sudden, heavy rain begins to fall, accompanied by thunder and lightning.
descriptions.intent: The military aims to maintain order and deliver supplies. The residents seek relief from the heat.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the armed military and the hungry, desperate crowd.
descriptions.relation: Military vs. Residents
descriptions.outcome: The heatwave breaks, and the rain begins.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The sudden downpour causes car alarms to trigger throughout the parking area. Residents, driven by madness and joy, rush out from the underground parking to stand in the rain. Some people scream in delight, while others weep hysterically, overwhelmed by the sudden change in weather.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to experience the rain and escape the suffocating underground environment. They seek emotional release.
descriptions.conflict: The psychological breakdown of people who have been trapped in heat and darkness.
descriptions.relation: Residents interacting with each other in a frenzy
descriptions.outcome: A mass display of emotional release and physical relief.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: People fall to the ground, catching the warm, murky rainwater with their mouths and hands. They are so blinded by the joy of survival that they ignore the filth and the bitter taste of the water. The physical sensation of the rain provides a momentary escape from the stench of their own bodies.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to hydrate and feel the water on their skin. They seek to wash away the grime of the underground.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme dehydration and the physical filth of the survivors.
descriptions.relation: Residents acting in a collective frenzy
descriptions.outcome: The residents drink the rainwater despite its poor quality.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: A voice rises from the crowd, warning others not to drink the water because it might be contaminated with chemicals or toxins from disinfection. Others point out the danger of pathogens from dead mosquitoes or radioactive fallout from distant islands. These warnings are ignored by the dehydrated crowd.

location.name: Amidst the crowd in the rain

descriptions.intent: Some residents want to prevent mass poisoning. The majority want to satisfy their immediate thirst.
descriptions.conflict: The conflict between the biological need for hydration and the logical fear of contamination.
descriptions.state: Divided between panic and desperate thirst.
descriptions.relation: Warning voices vs. the thirsty crowd
descriptions.outcome: The warnings fail to stop the people from drinking the rain.

descriptions.title: People
descriptions.scene: Radioactive emissions occur during a period of intense heat, but the crowd ignores warnings due to extreme dehydration. People are desperately drinking their own urine and scraping condensation from air conditioning units. The crowd celebrates despite the presence of human ash and radiation in the water.

location.name: An outdoor area near residential buildings
location.description: characterized by extreme heat and radioactive fallout

descriptions.intent: The people want to survive the dehydration and find any source of liquid.
descriptions.conflict: Radioactive emissions and the lack of clean water threaten the population.
descriptions.state: Dehydrated, indifferent to death, and desperate.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is united by a shared sense of apathy and survival instinct.
descriptions.outcome: The people continue to endure the heat and radiation, focusing only on immediate hydration.

descriptions.title: People
descriptions.scene: A heavy rain begins to fall, transitioning from light streams to a massive deluge that floods the ground. The rain washes away the grey ash of cremated bodies from the lake. The streets quickly transform into flowing rivers.

location.name: The streets and a nearby lake that previously acted as a crematorium

descriptions.intent: The rain falls to end the heat, but it brings the threat of flooding.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, massive influx of water threatens to flood the urban area.
descriptions.state: The people are relieved that the heat has passed but wary of the rain.
descriptions.outcome: The landscape is physically altered as the lake overflows and streets turn into streams.

descriptions.title: People
descriptions.scene: As residents of the underground shelter begin to disperse to their apartments, Liu Dahun attempts to gather the men. Most residents ignore his calls and continue walking toward their homes. A small group of younger and middle-aged men stops to listen to him.

location.name: The exit of an underground shelter leading to residential apartment blocks

descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to organize the men for a task; the residents want to go home.
descriptions.conflict: The residents are indifferent to Liu Dahun's authority and want to avoid labor.
descriptions.state: Liu Dahun is trying to lead; the residents are indifferent and exhausted.
descriptions.relation: The residents show a lack of respect for Liu Dahun's leadership.
descriptions.outcome: Only a few men stop to engage with Liu Dahun.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Men
descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun explains the necessity of moving sandbags to the building entrances to prevent flooding. He points out the known issues with the drainage system in Anming. He argues that the sandbags currently at the parking lot could protect the residential entrances.

location.name: Near the entrance of the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Liu Dahuan wants to prevent the flooding of the apartment entrances.
descriptions.conflict: The men are hesitant to perform manual labor.
descriptions.state: Liu Dahun is proactive and concerned; the men are skeptical.
descriptions.relation: Liu Dahun acts as a temporary leader; the men act as reluctant subordinates.
descriptions.outcome: Liu Dahun proposes a plan to move the sandbags.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Angry Resident
descriptions.scene: An angry resident confronts Liu Dahun, accusing him of overstepping his authority after only a few days of managing food distribution. The resident refuses to act as a laborer, stating they only pay for services. He insists that the cleaning staff should handle the mess.
descriptions.intent: The resident wants to avoid work and assert his rights as a payer.
descriptions.conflict: The resident challenges Liu Dahun's right to give orders.
descriptions.state: The resident is irritated and aggressive; Liu Dahun is being insulted.
descriptions.relation: The resident is openly hostile toward Liu Dahun.
descriptions.outcome: The resident rejects the proposal and insults Liu Dahun's leadership.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Crowd
descriptions.scene: The crowd grows increasingly agitated and begins to turn against Liu Dahun. Residents of the first floors express distrust because the management company's negligence previously allowed bloodsucking creatures into the buildings. The crowd's irritation reaches a boiling point.

location.name: The street near the residential buildings

descriptions.intent: The crowd wants to vent their frustration and avoid responsibility.
descriptions.conflict: The residents' past trauma with the management company fuels their anger.
descriptions.state: The crowd is angry and distrustful; Liu Dahun is internally fuming.
descriptions.relation: The crowd is actively opposing Liu Dahun's initiative.
descriptions.outcome: The tension escalates, leaving Liu Dahun feeling isolated.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao interrupts the argument to propose a solution. Drawing on his military experience with flood relief, he decides to help despite his exhaustion. He grabs two sandbags and begins carrying them toward the entrance.

location.name: The street near the residential buildings

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to assist the community despite his physical weakness.
descriptions.conflict: Sun Zhentao's physical exhaustion fights against his sense of duty.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is tired but determined; Liu Dahun is internally resentful.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as a mediator and a helper.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao begins the physical work of moving the sandbags.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda grabs her husband Sun Zhentao's arm, expressing deep anxiety about him working in the rain. Sun Zhentao gently holds her hand to reassure her. He promises that they will return home together soon.

location.name: Near the entrance of the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Suda wants to protect her husband from danger; Sun Zhentao wants to calm her.
descriptions.conflict: Suda's fear of his safety versus Sun Zhentao's commitment to help.
descriptions.state: Suda is anxious; Sun Zhentao is calm and affectionate.
descriptions.relation: Husband and wife; Sun Zhentao is being protective and comforting.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao manages to soothe Suda's immediate panic.

descriptions.title: Jian Qimin, Sun Zhentao, Suda
descriptions.scene: Jian Qimin joins the effort, calling for unity among the residents of the complex. He uses an official tone to encourage everyone to work together. He appears physically worn down, with stubble and a tired gaze, but remains focused on the task.

location.name: The street near the residential complex

descriptions.intent: Jian Qimin wants to foster solidarity and ensure the community's survival.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of motivating a fractured and exhausted group.
descriptions.state: Jian Qimin is exhausted but strategically focused; Suda is still worried.
descriptions.relation: Jian Qimin acts as a formal leader/organizer.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Qimin reinforces the need for collective action.

descriptions.title: Jian Qimin
descriptions.scene: Jian Qimin reflects on his decision to give away all his remaining supplies to others. He feels a strange sense of excitement, driven by a gut feeling that his recent sacrifices and investments will soon pay off.
descriptions.intent: Jian Qimin is internally processing his long-term survival strategy.
descriptions.conflict: The struggle between his current physical depletion and his future hope.
descriptions.state: Jian Qimin is physically depleted but internally excited and expectant.

outfits.Jian Qimin: haggard appearance, facial stubble, tired eyes

descriptions.outcome: Jian Qimin remains committed to his plan, feeling a sense of impending reward.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi, looking gaunt with facial stubble and a tired gaze, reflects on his recent sacrifices. He has been giving all his personal and government-provided supplies to Jantsy. He feels a strange excitement because his intuition tells him his investments will soon pay off.

location.name: An unspecified area
location.description: likely a residential or communal zone, during a period of hardship.

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi wants to find meaning in his sacrifices and anticipates a future reward. He seeks validation for his intuition regarding his resource allocation.
descriptions.conflict: He is physically depleted and lacks supplies due to his generosity.
descriptions.state: Physically exhausted but internally expectant and strangely excited.

outfits.Dzy-anyi: unspecified, appearing gaunt with facial stubble and a tired expression.

descriptions.relation: Dzyanyi is a provider for Jantsy.
descriptions.outcome: He remains driven by the hope of future profit despite his current deprivation.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi, Guards, Residents, Lyudahun
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi and several guards begin moving sandbags to reinforce a position. A group of residents from low-rise apartments follows them to assist. Lyudahun follows behind the group in silence with a frowning expression.

location.name: Near the entrance of a residential building

descriptions.intent: The group aims to move sandbags to prevent flooding. Dzyanyi leads the physical labor to protect the area.
descriptions.conflict: The physical labor is difficult, and the environment is deteriorating.
descriptions.state: The workers are focused on the task; Lyudahun is brooding and silent.
descriptions.relation: Dzyanyi is leading the guards; Lyudahun is an observer/follower.
descriptions.outcome: The sandbags are being moved as the rain intensifies.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: Residents enter the building's stairwell and are immediately hit by the stench of decaying bodies and dried blood. The interior is pitch black due to the lack of light.

location.name: The dark
location.description: unlit entrance hall/stairwell of a residential building.

descriptions.intent: The residents are seeking shelter in their apartments.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming smell of death and the darkness create a hostile environment.
descriptions.state: Disgusted and overwhelmed by the sensory input.|Outments: Residents=unspecified
descriptions.relation: Residents are fleeing the rain into the building.
descriptions.outcome: They enter the building but encounter a horrific scene.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: In the darkness, a person trips and falls directly onto a forgotten, unremoved corpse. They feel the dried, sticky skin of the body and encounter maggots crawling in the eyes and mouth of the corpse. The stench of decay is suffocating.

location.name: A dark corridor inside the building.

descriptions.intent: The person is trying to navigate the dark hallway.
descriptions.conflict: Physical contact with a decomposing corpse and the intense smell of rot.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The person is physically and sensorily traumatized.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: Another person steps on a decaying, giant blood-sucking mosquito, causing its internal fluids to splatter. The stench of the decomposing insect adds to the unbearable odor in the hallway. The crowd begins to panic, with people screaming, cursing, and crying.
descriptions.intent: The residents are trying to move through the hallway to reach their homes.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme stench and the sight of decay cause mass panic.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The atmosphere descends into chaos and terror.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: A sudden clap of thunder and a flash of lightning illuminate the corridor. For a brief moment, the residents see the horrific reality: walls covered in dried blood, distorted faces of the dead, and scattered limbs. The scene looks like a horror movie.
descriptions.intent: The residents are caught in a moment of sudden visibility.
descriptions.conflict: The visual horror of the carnage is revealed by the lightning.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The residents are confronted with the gruesome reality of the carnage.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: After thirty minutes of intense terror, the residents of the lower floors finally reach their apartments. Meanwhile, those living on higher floors struggle to climb the stairs, hindered by extreme hunger and dehydration.

location.name: The stairwells of the residential building.

descriptions.intent: The residents want to reach the safety of their individual apartments.
descriptions.conflict: Physical weakness from starvation and dehydration makes climbing difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The residents reach their homes but are in a state of physical decline.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi Yan stands by her bedroom window, silently watching the street. She observes that while some lights are turning on in nearby apartments, most windows remain dark due to lack of electricity, lack of candles, or death.

location.name: A bedroom in a high-floor apartment

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi Yan is monitoring the state of the neighborhood.
descriptions.conflict: The widespread darkness signifies a lack of resources or a high death toll.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She assesses the grim situation of the surrounding community.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: The rain intensifies, flooding the pool used for corpse cremation. The descent to the underground parking becomes a rapid stream of muddy water, carrying trash, excrement, and dead insects.

location.name: The area outside/below the building
location.description: near the parking and cremation pool.

descriptions.intent: The natural elements are moving uncontrollably.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwaters are threatening the infrastructure and carrying filth.
descriptions.state: The environment is becoming increasingly chaotic.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The flood threatens to overtake the lower levels of the building.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi Yan contemplates the timeline of the disaster, recalling that the previous heatwave lasted less than a month. She realizes that based on previous information, these rains might last at least a month, signaling a new period of testing.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi Yan wants to predict the duration of the current disaster.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that a long-term catastrophe is approaching.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares herself mentally for a prolonged struggle.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi Yan reflects on the systemic failures of the city, noting how the lack of air conditioning and poor drainage in Anmin makes them vulnerable compared to tropical cities. She realizes the city's "greenhouse" protection has left them unprepared for extreme weather like frost or snow.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi Yan is analyzing the structural and social vulnerabilities of her city.
descriptions.conflict: The city's lack of preparation and infrastructure for extreme weather.
descriptions.state: Deep in thought, recognizing the impending danger.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the upcoming weather will be even more difficult.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi Yan decides against fleeing to another city because she prefers the familiarity of her current home. However, she acknowledges that she cannot simply hide and must be ready for active survival.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi Yan wants to decide on a survival strategy.
descriptions.conflict: The choice between the safety of fleeing versus the comfort of staying.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She commits to staying but prepares for active engagement with the new world.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyi Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyi Yan focuses on the immediate need for food, noting she hasn't eaten all day. She sneezes and checks the thermometer, noting the temperature has dropped to 21-22°C. She perceives this as a cold chill following the recent extreme heat.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyi Yan intends to find food and monitor the temperature.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden temperature drop feels like extreme cold after the heatwave.
descriptions.state: Hungry and physically reacting to the temperature change.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains in her apartment, hungry and monitoring the changing climate.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes her surroundings all day without eating. She sneezes and checks the thermometer, noting the temperature has dropped to 21-22°C. She feels the sudden drop as a chill after weeks of extreme heat.

location.name: Jiang Yan's apartment
location.description: a high-rise unit on the 32nd floor, currently dim and cooling down.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the environmental changes and her safety. She is checking the temperature to assess the impact of the weather shift.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden temperature drop feels like cold due to the recent heatwave. She is physically weakened by hunger.
descriptions.state: Hungry, physically sensitive to the temperature change, and observant.
descriptions.relation: Alone
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the weather is shifting significantly.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan closes the curtains and turns on a nightlight. She retrieves tablets and opens the surveillance camera feeds to check the building.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the activity in the building. She seeks to see if the flooding or people are approaching her floor.
descriptions.conflict: The building's power is out, forcing her to rely on battery-operated devices.
descriptions.relation: Monitoring the residents
descriptions.outcome: She begins observing the lower floors.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the first-floor camera and sees water reaching the bottom steps of the entrance. She observes residents dragging suitcases and moving toward the stairs.

location.name: First floor of the apartment building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the level of the flood and the movement of the residents. She is looking for signs of danger or intrusion.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of electricity forces the cameras to switch to infrared mode, making the view grainy.
descriptions.state: Analytical and detached.|Outters: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: Observing the fleeing residents
descriptions.outcome: She sees people moving upward, likely seeking refuge in higher floors.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the 7th floor, where Zhang Qiqi lives, and finds it empty. She then switches to her own floor and sees He Chunmei standing outside her door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check on specific neighbors and monitor her immediate vicinity. She is looking for any direct threats to her door.
descriptions.conflict: He Chunmei has arrived at her doorstep, representing a potential intrusion.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing He Chunmei from a distance.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan identifies He Chunmei as the first "guest" at her door.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei stands one meter from Jiang Yan's door, holding a dim flashlight. She shines the light on a wire mesh stretched over the door and asks Zhou Guangfu if the girl from the neighboring apartment will return from the official shelter.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: near Jiang Yan's door, dark and damp.

descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to discuss the fate of Zhang Qiqi with her husband. She is expressing her speculation about the official shelters.
descriptions.conflict: The flashlight is nearly dead, providing very little light. The environment is uncertain due to the storm.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is talking to her husband, Zhou Guangfu.
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a conversation about the neighbor's return.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhou Guangfu opens the door to let his son and daughter into their apartment. He responds to his wife, stating he believes the girl will likely return.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to protect his children from the rain and provide them shelter. He wants to answer his wife's question.
descriptions.conflict: The family is dealing with the aftermath of a storm and the loss of relatives.
descriptions.state: Protective and somewhat skeptical of his wife's pessimism.

outfits.Zhou's son: Not specified; Zhou's daughter=Not specified; He Chunmei=Not specified; Zhou Guangfu=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Husband and wife, father to children.
descriptions.outcome: He enters the apartment with his children.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei questions why Zhou thinks the girl will return, noting that official shelters are now flood zones. She predicts the girl will return home because she cannot handle the storm.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to challenge her husband's optimism. She is analyzing the logistics of the current disaster.
descriptions.conflict: The shift from heat to heavy rain has made official shelters dangerous due to floods and landslides.
descriptions.relation: Arguing with her husband.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to argue her point about the upcoming chaos.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei smirks and expresses malicious joy, stating she doesn't care if the girl returns because there will be "showdowns and scandals."
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to revel in the anticipated social conflict. She seeks excitement in the upcoming chaos.
descriptions.conflict: Zhou Guangfu is disturbed by her lack of empathy and her focus on drama.
descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is provoking her husband.
descriptions.outcome: She intensifies the argument.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhou Guangfu frowns and reprimands his wife, reminding her of their own dire situation and the death of his parents. He expresses his refusal to tolerate her behavior anymore.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to stop his wife's vitriol and focus on their survival. He wants to assert his new boundaries.
descriptions.conflict: He Chunmei's behavior is insensitive to the recent deaths of his parents in the underground shelter.
descriptions.relation: Husband is confronting his wife.
descriptions.outcome: He decides to stop tolerating her outbursts.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei waves her hands defensively and brings up the past negligence of Zhang Qiqi, mentioning how many people died because of an unlocked door. She claims a group is planning to attack Zhang Qiqi upon her return.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to justify her hatred by citing past grievances. She wants to boast about the planned retaliation.
descriptions.conflict: She is bringing up traumatic past events to support her argument.
descriptions.relation: She is trying to manipulate the conversation.
descriptions.outcome: She continues her long-winded rant about the upcoming confrontation.

descriptions.title: Zhou Guangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhou Guangfu tells his wife to stop protesting and notes he hasn't slept in 20 days. He sighs deeply, turns around, and slams the door shut, leaving He Chunmei alone.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to escape the argument and find rest. He wants to end the interaction.
descriptions.conflict: He is physically and mentally exhausted from the prolonged crisis.
descriptions.relation: He breaks the interaction with his wife.
descriptions.outcome: He leaves her alone in the hallway.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei stands alone in the hallway, confused by her husband's sudden outburst. She hears footsteps approaching in the stairwell.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to process her husband's reaction. She is interrupted by the arrival of others.
descriptions.conflict: She is left in a state of shock by the sudden change in her husband's attitude.

outfits.He Chunmei: Not specified; Sun Jintao=Not specified; Su Dai=Not specified

descriptions.relation: She is surprised by her husband's behavior.
descriptions.outcome: She notices new people arriving.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei sees Sun Jintao and Su Dai, who are soaking wet. She mocks them by calling them "wet chickens" and making a sarcastic comment about a "romantic walk in the rain."
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to regain her sense of superiority by insulting the newcomers. She seeks to deflect her confusion through mockery.
descriptions.conflict: The young people are visibly miserable and drenched from the storm.

outfits.Sun Jintao: Soaking wet clothing; Su Dai=Soaking wet clothing; He Chunmei=Not specified

descriptions.relation: He Chunmei is insulting the younger residents.
descriptions.outcome: She continues her pattern of verbal aggression toward others.

descriptions.title: Hatchun Mei
descriptions.scene: Hatchun Mei encounters Sun, Jintao, and Sudai walking in the rain. She mocks them for their "romantic walk" to mask her own feelings of humiliation. She attempts to sting them with sarcasm.

location.name: Outdoors
location.description: a rainy area where the characters are soaked.

descriptions.intent: Hatchun Mei wants to insult the young couple to regain a sense of superiority. She seeks to provoke a reaction through sarcasm.
descriptions.conflict: The couple ignores her insults, leaving her feeling humiliated.
descriptions.relation: Hatchun Mei is antagonistic toward Sun and Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: Sun ignores her and leads Sudai away, leaving Hatchun Mei alone in an awkward position.

descriptions.title: Hatchun Mei
descriptions.scene: Hatchun Mei realizes she is standing in a foolish position. She turns around and enters her apartment in frustration.
descriptions.intent: Hatchun Mei wants to escape the social embarrassment. She seeks to hide her vulnerability by retreating.
descriptions.conflict: Her own realization of her social failure.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She enters her apartment to be alone.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Inside her apartment, Jiang Yan sits before a monitor, reflecting on the news about Zhang Qiqi's "warm welcome." She decides to wait for her enemies to come to her instead of initiating a confrontation.

location.name: Inside Jiang Yan's apartment
location.description: in front of a computer monitor.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the information she received. She plans to adopt a passive-aggressive strategy of waiting for her opponents.
descriptions.conflict: The realization of a potential trap or confrontation set by Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is contemplating her relationship with Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to wait for the conflict to come to her.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Feeling hungry, Jiang Yan puts away her tablet and goes to her closet. She selects a light silk wrap, choosing something mild for her stomach because she has been eating too much spicy food lately.

location.name: Inside the apartment
location.description: near a closet and a secret compartment.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to satisfy her hunger. She seeks to eat a meal that is easy on her digestion.
descriptions.conflict: Physical hunger and the need to manage her dietary habits.
descriptions.state: Hungry and practical.|Outability: Jiang Yan=Not specified
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to eat a meal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan summons a Cantonese dinner from her spatial storage. She eats a variety of dishes including rice porridge with ribs, vegetables, chicken feet, fish, and lotus salad.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy a high-quality meal. She seeks satisfaction through food.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a rare moment of true satisfaction.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After finishing her meal at 8:00 PM, Jiang Yan decides to take a break from her intensive training. She decides to check her agricultural skills and tend to her black soil plot.

location.name: Inside the spatial storage
location.description: a bright area with constant sunlight.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to transition from training to leisure. She seeks to apply her theoretical knowledge to her garden.
descriptions.conflict: The need for a mental break after 2-0 days of intense training.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She moves to her agricultural plot.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan inspects her black soil plot, which contains only a single rose bush. She decides to plant a variety of new vegetable seeds she retrieved from her storage.

location.name: A black soil plot within the spatial storage

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to expand her garden. She seeks to utilize her surplus of seeds and practice farming.
descriptions.conflict: The plot has been empty and neglected for some time.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins the planting process.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares the leek seeds by soaking them in water in a small bowl. She follows instructions from a training video to ensure high germination rates.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure the success of her leek crop. She seeks to follow proper agricultural techniques.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of planting leeks directly into the soil without preparation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The seeds are soaking and will be transplanted in 2-3 days.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan scatters the remaining seeds across the soil and plans to water them. She envisions a future where she uses bricks or white fences to create organized zones for different types of plants.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to organize her garden into specific zones. She seeks to improve the aesthetics and ease of maintenance.
descriptions.conflict: The current lack of structure and organization in the garden.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a plan for future garden expansion and organization.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the soil's moisture retention but worries about the use of tap water with nutrients. She realizes she needs pure spring water to prevent soil compaction.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a better water source. She seeks to avoid the negative effects of tap water on her soil.
descriptions.conflict: The current water supply is suboptimal and may damage the soil.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins searching for a natural water source within her space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls hearing the sound of water near the boundary between the white living zone and the black planting zone. She contemplates the mysteries of the white fog and the hidden water source.

location.name: The boundary between the white living zone and the black planting zone.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to locate the hidden spring. She seeks to understand the mysteries of her spatial dimension.
descriptions.conflict: The water source and the fog are invisible and mysterious.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is left with many unanswered questions about her environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to read post-apocalyptic novels to find clues about her space. She finishes by soaking rosehip seeds, planning to plant them around the perimeter in two days.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find answers to her spatial mysteries. She seeks to expand her rosehip hedge.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of immediate knowledge regarding the space's expansion.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares the rosehip seeds for future planting.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan decides to re-read post-apocalyptic novels to find clues for the mystery. She retrieves a small packet of rosehip seeds from storage and soaks them in water. She plans to plant them around the perimeter of her black earth plot in two days.

location.name: Storage area and garden plot
location.description: a fertile area with black earth

descriptions.intent: She wants to find answers to the current world situation. She also aims to create a living hedge for beauty and aroma. She plans to expand her garden with a flower bed.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the post-all-apocalyptic world provides a lack of information.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The seeds are prepared for planting in two days.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan begins extracting bulbs and seedlings from her backup storage. She selects various species including peonies, tulips, lilies, daisies, hyacinths, hydrangeas, peace lilies, strelitzia, and roses. She uses a small trowel to dig holes and carefully plants them in the soil.

location.name: Garden plot
location.description: a large area of black earth near an apple section

descriptions.intent: She wants to transform part of the land near the apple section into a flower bed. She aims to create a beautiful view to enjoy every morning. She intends to plant a wide variety of flowers.
descriptions.conflict: The physical labor of digging and planting requires effort.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The flowers are successfully planted in their designated plots.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan observes that the peonies turn lush green immediately after planting. She recalls that the only professional cultivation of such sensitive plants was in the Anmin Botanical Garden. She feels as though the Earth itself is helping her pass an exam.
descriptions.intent: She wants to learn the art of gardening. She seeks to master the cultivation of difficult plants.
descriptions.conflict: Peonies are notoriously difficult and sensitive to soil and climate.
descriptions.state: Surprised and humbled.|Outlam: She feels a sense of connection to the Earth's assistance.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a moment of wonder at the plants' rapid growth.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan finishes her gardening work after two hours. She assesses her progress, noting she has planted vegetables on a quarter of a basketball court and the flower bed occupies over a third of a court. She decides to wait for these plants to sprout before planting more.

location.name: Large garden area
location.description: roughly one-third of a football field in size

descriptions.intent: She wants to complete the initial planting phase. She decides to pause her gardening to allow the current plants to grow. She seeks satisfaction through her first experience with farming.
descriptions.conflict: The physical strain of gardening causes back and leg pain.
descriptions.state: Satisfied and peaceful, despite the physical fatigue.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The planting task is completed, and she decides on a period of waiting.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan collects her gardening tools and removes her soiled boots. She goes to the bathroom to clean herself and takes a shower. After drying her hair, she moves to the terrace to read by the pool.

location.name: Bathroom and terrace near a swimming pool

descriptions.intent: She wants to clean herself after the dirty work. She seeks relaxation through reading.
descriptions.conflict: The physical dirt from the garden needs to be washed off.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She transitions from a state of labor to a state of leisure.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: At 11:00 PM, Jian Yan leaves the terrace. Outside, it is pitch black with heavy rain and frequent lightning. She decides to stay in the "real world" for the night.

location.name: Terrace and exterior of the building

descriptions.intent: She decides to spend the night in the real world. She seeks to maintain her connection to the surrounding world.
descriptions.conflict: A violent storm with heavy rain and lightning is occurring.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to spend the night amidst the storm.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Before going to sleep, Jian Yan turns off her nightlight and pulls back the curtains. She looks out the window and notices mysterious figures moving in the darkness of the courtyard. She uses her enhanced senses to identify that people are creeping toward the tallest building in Block A.

location.name: Bedroom
location.description: near a window overlooking the courtyard

descriptions.intent: She wants to check on the surroundings before sleeping. She intends to observe the movement in the courtyard.
descriptions.conflict: Unknown intruders are moving stealthily in the dark.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a potential security threat in the residential complex.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan turns on the monitor connected to the first-floor cameras. She sees that the locked door of Block A has been breached. Flooded water reaches the intruders' calves as they move through the building toward the stairs with luggage.
descriptions.intent: She wants to investigate the intruders using her surveillance system. She seeks to identify who these people are.
descriptions.conflict: The security of the building has been compromised by intruders.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that unauthorized people have entered the building.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan uses binoculars to observe the entrance of the complex. She notices more people climbing over the fence. She observes that the previously effective electric wire and cameras are now useless against these organized intruders.

location.name: Near a window overlooking the complex entrance

descriptions.intent: She wants to assess the scale of the intrusion. She aims to understand the organization of the group.
descriptions.conflict: The intruders are bypassing the security fences and electrified wires.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the intruders are organized and acting according to a plan.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan closes her blackout window and switches to her tablet monitor. She checks cameras on the 7th, 20th, 31st, and 32nd floors, but finds the corridors empty and silent, save for the storm. She realizes the intruders are likely hiding in the corridors.
descriptions.intent: She wants to track the movement of the intruders through the building. She seeks to find where they have settled.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of noise makes it difficult to locate the intruders' exact position.
descriptions.state: Puzzled and analytical.|Outlar: She concludes the intruders are staying in the corridors.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She determines the intruders are hiding within the building's corridors.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan contemplates the long-term impact of the intrusion on the building's resources. She realizes the situation will worsen with the approaching crisis. She decides she must check her weapons and prepare her defenses.
descriptions.intent: She wants to prepare for the upcoming resource scarcity and potential conflict. She intends to inspect her weapons and choose defensive tools.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of strangers and the worsening weather threaten her stability.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares herself for a potential confrontation.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Overcome by fatigue, Jian Yan yawns and prepares for bed. Before sleeping, she activates the anti-intrusion system, setting the voltage to 500V. She then climbs into her warm, soft bed.
descriptions.intent: She wants to secure her room against further intrusion. She intends to go to sleep.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of the intruders remains a lingering concern.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The security system is armed, and she falls asleep.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang contemplates selecting appropriate protective equipment before feeling the onset of sleep. She fights the urge to nod off while thinking about her safety. She eventually succumbs to exhaustion.

location.name: Jianyang's apartment
location.description: a private and secure living space

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to prepare for potential threats. She aims to maintain her safety protocols before resting.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exhaustion and the urge to sleep interfere with her planning.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jianyang falls asleep.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang covers her mouth and yawns several times before getting up from her bed. She approaches her security system to activate the anti-intrusion measures. She sets the voltage to 500V to ensure the perimeter is electrified.

location.name: Jianyang's apartment
location.description: bedroom area near the security interface

descriptions.intent: Jianyang wants to secure her apartment against intruders. She intends to establish a high-voltage deterrent.
descriptions.conflict: The physical fatigue makes the task feel heavy.
descriptions.state: Exhausted but determined to be prepared.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The security system is activated and set to a high voltage.

descriptions.title: Jianyang
descriptions.scene: Jianyang climbs into her warm and soft blanket to sleep. She settles in for the night after completing her security tasks.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyang
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyang waits for the heavy rain and heat to subside so she can search for living beings. She monitors the situation through her screens. She decides to wait for a moment of opportunity to venture out.

location.name: Dzyanyang's apartment
location.description: a secure room equipped with monitoring technology

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyang wants to find living creatures to care for. She intends to wait for the weather to improve before leaving her shelter.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme heat and heavy rain prevent her from leaving. The uncertainty of finding survivors creates internal doubt.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains in her apartment, monitoring the surroundings.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyang
descriptions.scene: In the morning after breakfast, Dzyanyang hears strange noises coming through her monitor. She quickly grabs her tablet to investigate the source of the sound. She switches the screen to the twentieth floor.
descriptions.intent: Dzyanyang wants to identify the source of the strange noises. She seeks to understand what is happening in the building.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden noise disrupts her morning routine. The unknown nature of the sound creates tension.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a crowd of people on the twentieth floor.

descriptions.title: Dzyanyang
descriptions.scene: Dzyanyang observes the twentieth floor corridor, which is now crowded with people of various ages and genders. Some are in makeshift beds or tents, while others gather near apartment 2003. The atmosphere is tense due to an obvious recent quarrel.

location.name: 20th floor corridor
location.description: crowded with tents, makeshift beds, and people

descriptions.intent: Dzyanyang wants to observe the situation on the twentieth floor. She attempts to understand the nature of the gathering.
descriptions.conflict: The corridor is no longer empty, indicating a breach of privacy or a gathering of survivors. A visible conflict is occurring among the group.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a group of people in conflict.

descriptions.title: Tall Man
descriptions.scene: A tall, strong man with a square face and sharp eyes confronts Chou Xiaobo. He accuses Chou Xiaobo of illegally seizing an apartment on Xuilaifu. The man displays black and red tattoos on his arm.
descriptions.intent: The Tall Man wants to prevent Chou Xiaobo from taking over the apartment. He seeks to challenge the occupation of the unit.
descriptions.conflict: The man is angry at Chou Xiaobo's actions. There is a dispute over property rights in the post-disaster setting.
descriptions.state: Angry and aggressive.|Outlar: Tall Man=strong build, square face, sharp eyes, black and red tattoos on arm, disheveled appearance;Chou Xiaobo=unspecified appearance
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic toward Chou Xiaobo
descriptions.outcome: A heated verbal confrontation ensues.

descriptions.title: Group of Men
descriptions.scene: Several men and women stand near the Tall Man, brandishing kitchen knives, hammers, and large wrenches. Another man with messy hair and angry wrinkles joins the shouting. The group appears threatening and ready for violence.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to defend their interests or intimidate the occupants. They are prepared to use force.
descriptions.conflict: The group is armed with improvised weapons. The tension is escalating toward physical violence.
descriptions.relation: The group is aligned with the Tall Man against the occupants.
descriptions.outcome: The group prepares for an imminent physical fight.

descriptions.title: Group of Men
descriptions.scene: One of the aggressors waves a hammer and suggests breaking into the apartment despite it being empty. A full-scale brawl erupts among the participants. The scene is filled with screams of pain and the sound of metal clashing against metal.
descriptions.intent: The aggressors want to force their way into the apartment. They aim to use violence to achieve their goal.
descriptions.conflict: The verbal argument turns into a physical fight. The participants are clashing with weapons.
descriptions.relation: The group is in active combat with each other.
descriptions.outcome: A violent fight breaks out, causing injury and chaos.

descriptions.title: Two Fighters
descriptions.scene: Two of the most violent participants are forcibly removed from the room. Their bodies are covered in blood. They are thrown out of an open window, where the falling rain washes the blood away.
descriptions.intent: The fighters are attempting to dominate the brawl. They are being forcibly expelled from the area.
descriptions.conflict: They are being physically overpowered and ejected from the group.
descriptions.relation: They are being cast out by the others.
descriptions.outcome: The fighters are thrown out of the window and washed by the rain.

descriptions.title: Liu Da Xun
descriptions.scene: Liu Da Xun calls out from the far corridor with a soft, playful tone. He invites the group to move to the upper floors, noting that space is limited. His voice interrupts the aftermath of the fight.

location.name: Far end of the 20th floor corridor

descriptions.intent: Liu Da Xun wants to encourage the group to move upward. He seeks to manage the distribution of space.
descriptions.conflict: The group is currently preoccupied with the fight and the recent violence.
descriptions.relation: He is addressing the group in the corridor.
descriptions.outcome: The tall man stops and turns to face the newcomers.

descriptions.title: Tall Man
descriptions.scene: The tall man stops and turns to see Liu Da Xun, Zhang Qiqi, and Zhang Qimin approaching. He is accompanied by several guards and apartment owners armed with clubs, knives, and saws. The man expresses doubt and asks if they have a good place for them.
descriptions.intent: The Tall Man wants to find a safe place to stay. He is questioning the validity of the newcomers' offer.
descriptions.conflict: The man is wary of the newcomers' intentions. There is a power struggle between the armed owners and the group.

outfits.tattooed;Zhang Qiqi: unspecified clothing;Zhang Qimin=unspecified clothing;Guards=unspecified clothing;Apartment Owners=unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: The Tall Man is suspicious of the approaching group.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi smirks and confirms they have a place. She reveals her cunning nature, having spent time in the underground shelter with Liu Da Xun and Zhang Qimin. She uses her previous connections to assert authority.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to assert her control over the situation. She intends to use her social standing to influence the group.
descriptions.conflict: She is manipulating the group using her perceived power and resources.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: unloooking cunning;Liu Da Xun=unspecified clothing;Zhang Qimin=unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: She is asserting dominance through social manipulation.

descriptions.title: Gaozhuang
descriptions.scene: Gaozhuang notices that Liu Da Xun and the others are not moving further. He asks Zhang Qiqia to clarify her meaning. He is aware of the tension caused by the control of resources.
descriptions.intent: Gaozhuang wants clarification on the plan. He seeks to understand the movement of the group.
descriptions.conflict: The group's lack of movement creates uncertainty. The underlying tension regarding resource control is present.
descriptions.relation: Gaozhuang is challenging the group's direction.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi steps forward and points out that the building has a 32nd floor. Gaozhuang argues that the floodwater is unlikely to reach the 20th floor. The conversation shifts toward the logistics of moving.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to direct the group to a specific floor. She aims to utilize the available space in the building.
descriptions.conflict: There is a disagreement regarding the feasibility of moving to higher floors due to the flood.
descriptions.relation: They are debating the logistics of relocation.

descriptions.title: Gaozhuang
descriptions.scene: Gaozhuang remains silent about his plan to move to the 32nd floor because his lower apartments contain vital supplies. He cannot risk revealing his food and medicine stocks due to the widespread scarcity. He decides to change the subject.
descriptions.intent: Gaozhuang wants to protect his supplies. He intends to hide the existence of his resources to avoid theft.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of food and medicine makes him a target. He must balance the need for safety with the need to hide his assets.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He changes the topic to avoid revealing his supplies.

descriptions.title: Gaozhuang
descriptions.scene: Gaozhuang mentions that the 32nd floor has residents and notes that Xiao Xiaobo and his brother previously occupied apartments without paying. He expresses his unwillingness to kill living owners. He points out that the floodwater has already reached the 10th floor.
descriptions.intent: Gaozhuang wants to avoid a violent takeover of the 32nd floor. He seeks to prevent further conflict and death.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwater threatens the lower floors. There is a moral conflict regarding the seizure of property.
descriptions.relation: He is referencing the past actions of Xiao Xiaobo.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang and Zhang Qiqi discuss the rising floodwaters reaching the tenth floor and the opportunity to seize apartments on the thirty-second floor. Zhang Qiqi expresses hatred for the current owners and argues they should act before others do. Gao Dazhuang hesitates because he does not want to kill living owners like the brothers Zyao Xiaobo did.

location.name: A corridor near the tenth floor
location.description: flooded and dark due to heavy rain.

descriptions.intent: Gao Dazhuang wants to avoid violence and killing, while Zhang Qiqi wants to seize higher ground.
descriptions.conflict: The moral dilemma of occupying apartments versus the necessity of survival as floods rise.
descriptions.state: Gao Dazhuang is hesitant and cautious; Zhang Qiqi is hateful and determined.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is pressuring Gao Dazhuang to join her plan.
descriptions.outcome: Gao Dazhuang remains silent, weighing the logic of her argument.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang realizes that the group of armed people is not acting by chance but is planning a coordinated takeover of apartments. He connects this movement to previous incidents like the blood mosquito attack and Zhang Qiqi's recent agitation. He specifically identifies that the target is apartment 3201 and the girl named Jiang Yan.

location.name: A corridor near the tenth floor.

descriptions.intent: Gao Dazhuang wants to understand the true motive behind the sudden mobilization of residents.
descriptions.conflict: He recognizes a coordinated threat and a potential conspiracy against a specific target.
descriptions.relation: Gao Dazhuang is observing the group's patterns.
descriptions.outcome: He decides to accept the offer to join the takeover to seize the opportunity.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang asks the group why they want him to join and questions why they would share such a good opportunity. He addresses the leader, Luda Ahun, regarding the group's strength. Luda Ahun responds that sharing resources makes it easier to handle large numbers of people.

location.name: A corridor near the tenth floor.

descriptions.intent: Gao Dazhuang wants to clarify the terms of the alliance and the distribution of loot.
descriptions.conflict: Uncertainty about the group's intentions and the fairness of the division.
descriptions.relation: Gao Dazhuang is negotiating with Luda Ahun and Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: A plan is proposed to take two apartments and leave the rest for the others.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi proposes a specific division of the seized territory, suggesting they take two apartments and leave the corridors and elevator zones for the others. She argues that the thirty-second floor provides better defensive advantages against others. Gao Dazhuang turns to his men to ask for their opinion.

location.name: A corridor near the tenth floor.

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to establish a structured plan for the takeover and long-term habitation.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance the seizure of property with the need to maintain an alliance.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is leading the negotiation.
descriptions.outcome: Gao Dazhuang's men agree to the plan.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang confirms the decision to join the group and leads his men toward the elevator. A group of people living in tents notices the conversation and asks to join the ascent. They express their willingness to help the group move upward.
descriptions.intent: Gao Dazzaung wants to execute the plan to move to the higher floor.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden influx of new, uninvited participants.
descriptions.relation: The tent residents are seeking an alliance with Gao Dazhuang's group.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins moving toward the elevator.

descriptions.title: Young Man
descriptions.scene: A young man from the group of tent residents asks Luda Ahun for food, water, or medicine. The members of Gao Dazhuang's group respond that they have nothing and have been starving for days. The young man mocks the elderly residents, telling them they won't survive ten days with such weak bodies.
descriptions.intent: The young man wants to secure resources for the group.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme scarcity of food and water creates tension and cruelty between the groups.
descriptions.state: The young man is cold and mocking; the elderly are desperate and hopeful.
descriptions.relation: The young man shows contempt for the weaker residents.
descriptions.outcome: The elderly residents are left in despair as the group moves on.

descriptions.title: Luda Ahun
descriptions.scene: Luda Ahun dismisses the pleas of the starving residents with a wave of his hand and continues the ascent. The armed group proceeds to the elevator with a sense of excitement. Meanwhile, Jiang Yan watches the group disappear from the security cameras on the twentieth floor.

location.name: The elevator and the 20th floor monitoring area.

descriptions.intent: Luda Ahun wants to proceed with the takeover; Jiang Yan wants to prepare for the upcoming confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: The physical movement of the group toward the target.
descriptions.state: Luda Ahun is indifferent; Jiang Yan is calm and predatory.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing the group's progress.
descriptions.outcome: The group reaches the elevator, and Jiang Yan begins her preparations.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the fact that the group is coming for her and that it is time for Zhang Qiqi to die. She notes that while the number of people is higher than expected, she is prepared because they are an irregular army and it will take them time to reach the 32nd floor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare her defenses and eliminate her enemies.
descriptions.conflict: The large number of approaching attackers.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is anticipating the arrival of Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use her prepared resources.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the wardrobe of her "Cosmic Apple" space to retrieve her gear. She selects weapons, ammunition, and body armor. She puts on a black combat uniform, a tactical vest, and fingerless combat gloves.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to arm herself for the upcoming battle.
descriptions.conflict: The need to remain hidden while preparing.
descriptions.state: Focused and methodical.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Black combat uniform, tactical body armor, fingerless combat gloves.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is fully equipped for combat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan considers using her more powerful weapons like machine guns and heavy bombs from her inventory but decides against it. She realizes that the bombs would kill her own people and the machine guns are too much of a giveaway. She decides to keep her true strength hidden to avoid unnecessary exposure.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to defend herself without revealing her full capabilities or harming her allies.
descriptions.conflict: The dilemma between using overwhelming force and maintaining secrecy/safety.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Black combat uniform, tactical body armor, fingerless combat gloves.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She chooses to use only moderate, concealed weaponry.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares herself in a dark corridor by putting on a black skull mask. She checks the anti-hacking security system on her outer door to ensure it is set to a high voltage of 500V. She feels a sense of being part of a special forces unit.

location.name: Dark corridor
location.description: dim lighting, near Jiang Yan's apartment door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her perimeter and prepare for potential intruders. She aims to ensure her defenses are active and intimidating. She seeks to maintain her safety through technological fortification.
descriptions.conflict: The potential threat of the approaching group. The uncertainty of when the attack will occur.
descriptions.state: Focused and cautious. She feels a sense of empowerment from her gear.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A black mask with a skull print; tactical-style gear that gives a special forces impression.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The door is secured and the defense system is activated.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to stay hidden and observe the situation rather than confronting the group directly. She drinks a cup of coconut latte while monitoring the 32nd floor via a tablet. She waits to see the actions of the incoming group.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid direct conflict by hiding. She intends to monitor the progress of the attackers using surveillance. She seeks to gather information before making a move.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching group intends to target the 32th floor. The tension of waiting for an unknown event.
descriptions.state: Calm but observant. She is strategically waiting.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not explicitly described in this scene, but previously wearing a skull mask.

props: tablet with live surveillance feed of the 32nd floor
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is positioned to observe the incoming group's movements.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Gauda Juan, and group
