descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun leads a group of people onto the 32nd floor, having left women and children on the 31st floor. The group stops at the entrance of the floor. They notice the 32nd floor is cleaner than the chaotic lower floors.

location.name: 32nd floor corridor
location.description: relatively clean compared to lower floors, heavy rain outside

descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to lead his group to secure the floor. Gauda Juan wants to identify which household to target first. The group seeks to navigate the floor during the storm.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and chaos on other floors. The need to decide on a target among the four families.
descriptions.state: Determined and focused. The group is in a state of organized movement.
descriptions.relation: Liu Dahun is the leader of the group; Gauda Juan is a member.
descriptions.outcome: The group has successfully reached the 32nd floor and is preparing to act.

descriptions.title: Gauda Juan, Jiang Qiqi, and group
descriptions.scene: Gauda Juan asks which of the four families they should deal with first. Jiang Qiqi identifies Jiang Yan's apartment (3201) as the primary target. She expresses a desire to punish Jiang Yan if she has returned from the official shelter.
descriptions.intent: Gauda Juan wants to strategize the attack. Jiang Qixi wants to target Jiang Yan specifically. She intends to make Jiang Yan suffer for her past actions.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether Jiang Yan is currently in the apartment. The group's need to choose a target.
descriptions.state: Aggressive and vengeful. Jiang Qiqi is motivated by spite.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qiqi is part of the attacking group.
descriptions.outcome: The group decides to target apartment 3201.

descriptions.title: Pot-man, Zhangmin, and group
descriptions.scene: A man carrying a pot attempts to rush forward to break down the door, but Zhangmin stops him. Zhangmin warns that the door is electrified and the thunderstorm makes it dangerous to touch.
descriptions.intent: The pot-man wants to force entry immediately. Zhangmin wants to prevent the group from getting electrocuted. He seeks to ensure safety during the approach.
descriptions.conflict: The electrified door poses a physical danger to the attackers. The thunderstorm increases the risk of electrical accidents.
descriptions.state: The pot-man is impulsive and eager. Zhangmin is cautious and wary.
descriptions.relation: Zhangmin acts as a cautious deterrent to the pot-man.
descriptions.outcome: The immediate attempt to break the door is halted.

descriptions.title: Pot-man and group
descriptions.scene: The pot-man reacts with disbelief and mockery toward the idea of an electrified door. He complains about the lack of electricity in the community and mocks the idea of someone intentionally wiring a door for defense. He expresses frustration at the absurdity of the situation.
descriptions.intent: The pot-man wants to vent his frustration. He seeks to ridicule the person who installed the electricity. He wants to highlight the scarcity of resources.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of electricity in the community. The absurdity of the defensive measure.
descriptions.state: Angry, incredulous, and mocking. He is highly agitated.
descriptions.relation: The group observes his outburst.
descriptions.outcome: The pot-man's outburst highlights the community's desperation for power.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun and group
descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun interrupts the group to share information about Jiang Yan's previous renovations. He reveals that a decoration company once paid him a bribe to overlook her extensive electrical and structural work. He notes that the property management was complicit.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to warn the group about the potential danger. He intends to provide context regarding the apartment's modified state. He seeks to ensure they are not caught off guard by hidden traps.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that the apartment has been heavily modified with potentially dangerous electrical systems. The risk of a trap.
descriptions.state: Serious and warning. He is acting as a source of intelligence.
descriptions.relation: Liu Dahun provides critical information to the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group becomes aware that the apartment is a potential trap.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun, Liu Rui, and the young man
descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun orders Liu Rui to go ahead and check the door. He warns the young man to be careful due to the lightning and rain. The young man, carrying a large toolbox, begins to move forward toward the door.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to test the door's defenses. Liu Rui wants to execute the command and inspect the door. The young man wants to perform the task safely.
descriptions.conflict: The electrical danger of the door. The environmental hazards of the thunderstorm. The physical weight of the tools.
descriptions.state: Liu Dahun is commanding. The young man is focused and professional.

outfits.Young man: Thickened/insulated shoes and gloves;Carrying a large toolbox

descriptions.relation: Liu Dahun is the boss/leader; Liu Rui is the subordinate.
descriptions.outcome: The young man begins the dangerous task of approaching the electrified door.

descriptions.title: Luyuzui
descriptions.scene: Luyuzui approaches door 3.201 carrying a heavy toolbox while walking through rain and lightning. He follows the instructions of his boss, Liudahun, to check the electrical status of the room. The weather is extremely hazardous with active thunderstorms.

location.name: Hallway near room 3.201
location.description: a corridor experiencing heavy rain, thunder, and lightning strikes.

descriptions.intent: Luyuzui wants to fulfill his task of inspecting the electrical supply. He aims to navigate the dangerous weather to reach the target door.
descriptions.conflict: Severe weather conditions including lightning and heavy rain threaten his safety. The physical weight of the toolbox makes movement difficult.
descriptions.state: Cautious and focused on the task.

outfits.Luyuzui: wearing insulated boots and heavy gloves suitable for electrical work.

props: A large toolbox containing electrical equipment.
descriptions.relation: Luyuzui is a subordinate following the orders of Liudahun.
descriptions.outcome: Luyuzui successfully reaches the door of room 3.201.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang observes Luyuzui's professional approach and gives Liudahun a thumbs up. Liudahun responds by explaining that their preparation was based on previous information from Brother Qiming. Luyuzui begins setting up the testing equipment.

location.name: Hallway near room 3.201
location.description: damp and dark due to the storm.

descriptions.intent: Gao Dazhuang wants to express his admiration for the team's professionalism. Liudahun wants to acknowledge the team's readiness.
descriptions.conflict: The ongoing storm creates a sense of urgency and danger.
descriptions.state: Gao Dazhuang is impressed and enthusiastic; Liudahun is composed and professional.
props: and a high-voltage sound and light tester.
descriptions.relation: Gao Darant is an observer/ally to Liudahun's team.
descriptions.outcome: The team begins the technical inspection of the door.

descriptions.title: Luyuzui
descriptions.scene: Luyuzui places an insulating mat on the door and activates the high-voltage tester. A sharp, loud alarm rings out from the device. Luyuzui recoils in fear from the sudden noise and the realization of the voltage level.
descriptions.intent: Luyuzui wants to test the electrical current behind the door. He intends to identify if the power is active.
descriptions.conflict: The high-voltage alarm startles him. The discovery of 500V electricity presents a significant physical danger.
descriptions.state: Terrified and shocked by the sudden loud noise and the high voltage reading.
descriptions.relation: Luyuzui is reacting to the technical data found.
descriptions.outcome: Luyuity discovers that the door is live with 500V of electricity.

descriptions.title: Man in Pot
descriptions.scene: A man covered in soot/pot residue reacts hysterically to the news of the electricity. He screams and nearly falls to his knees, calling the situation desperate. He emphasizes that electricity is the most vital resource needed alongside food and water.

location.name: Near the group in the hallway.

descriptions.intent: The man wants to express the desperation of the survivors. He seeks to highlight the importance of electricity.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of electricity is a life-threatening crisis for the community.

outfits.Man in Pot: covered in soot or pot residue.

descriptions.relation: He is a survivor reacting to the news brought by the workers.
descriptions.outcome: The group realizes the immense value of the power behind the door.

descriptions.title: Liudahun
descriptions.scene: Liudahun contemplates the situation and realizes their signal jammer is dead. He considers the possibility of breaking a roof window to access the power, noting that the management company has replacement glass. He dismisses the idea of permanent damage to the building.
descriptions.intent: Liudahun wants to find a way to access the electricity. He seeks a solution that doesn't involve permanent structural destruction.
descriptions.conflict: The signal jammer is out of power, preventing easy access. The weather makes external entry difficult.
descriptions.relation: Liudahlar is leading the group and discussing plans with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: He proposes breaking a window as a potential fallback plan.

descriptions.title: Gao Dazhuang
descriptions.scene: Gao Dazhuang warns Liudahun against the cost of breaking the window, comparing it to selling tofu at the price of meat. He argues that the electricity is worth the effort because it provides access to power switches and equipment. He insists they need the power to defend themselves against other communities.
descriptions.intent: Gao Dazhuang wants to convince Liudahun to take the risk. He aims to secure electrical resources for defense.
descriptions.conflict: The high cost of property damage versus the necessity of survival. The threat of hostile survivors from other communities.
descriptions.relation: Gao Dazhuang acts as a strategist/advisor to Liudahun.
descriptions.outcome: Liudahun acknowledges the logic of using the electricity for defense.

descriptions.title: Man in Pot
descriptions.scene: The man in the pot makes a dark joke about the lightning strikes. He claims that if he goes outside, the lightning will burn him on the outside and leave him "tender" on the inside. The joke fails to lighten the mood, making the group feel even colder.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to use humor to cope with the tension. He aims to deflect from the grim reality.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme weather and the threat of lightning strikes.
descriptions.relation: He is part of the group of survivors.
descriptions.outcome: The group's atmosphere becomes even more somber.

descriptions.title: Luyuzui
descriptions.scene: Luyuzui agrees with the man's warning against going outside. He explains the technical difficulty of using ropes from the roof because metal tools used to break glass could attract lightning. He reinforces the danger of the current weather.
descriptions.intent: Luyuzui wants to discourage anyone from attempting a dangerous roof mission. He aims to highlight the specific electrical risks of the storm.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of lightning and the use of conductive metal tools.
descriptions.relation: Luyuzui is providing expert technical warnings.
descriptions.outcome: The group understands the high risk of the proposed rescue/access method.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qici
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qici criticizes the group's lack of ingenuity, comparing them to ancient people who made holes in walls for light. She points out a potential entry point at room 3.202, which is adjacent to Jiang Yan's location. She directs their attention to a specific target.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qici wants to find an alternative way to access the power. She aims to point out a visible opportunity.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of finding a way to access the electricity without extreme risk.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qici is directing the attention of the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group's focus shifts to room 3.202.

descriptions.title: Liudahun
descriptions.scene: Liudahun follows Jiang Qici's gaze to room 3.202. He recalls that this room was used as payment for a construction project and belonged to the building's construction company. He begins to speculate on the current occupancy of the room.
descriptions.intent: Liudahun wants to identify the potential contents of room 3.202. He aims to determine if the room is a viable target.
descriptions.conflict: Uncertainty regarding whether anyone is currently living in the room.
descriptions.relation: Liudahun is processing information provided by Jiang Qici.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins investigating the history of the adjacent room.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the residents of the surrounding rooms. She remembers that 3.203 belongs to the He Chunmei family and that 3.204 is occupied by a young couple. She admits she has no interest in her neighbors and intends to stay in her home indefinitely.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to recall the layout of her social environment. She aims to assess the surroundings.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of knowledge about recent changes in the building.
descriptions.relation: She is an inhabitant of the building.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes the context of the neighboring residents.

descriptions.title: Property Manager
descriptions.scene: The property management staff arrives at the door and begins knocking loudly. They threaten to break the door down with a hammer if no one answers. The physical impact of the hammering causes dust to fall from the door frame.

location.name: In front of the door of room 3.201.

descriptions.intent: The manager wants to find someone inside the room. He aims to force an interaction.
descriptions.conflict: The residents are not responding to the knocks. The physical resistance of the locked door.
descriptions.relation: The manager is an external force acting upon the residents.
descriptions.outcome: The heavy knocking creates a disturbance in the hallway.

descriptions.title: He Chunmei
descriptions.scene: He Chunmei opens her door from room 3.203 to watch the commotion. She observes Liudahun and his group with suspicion. She initially mistakes their presence for a personal vendetta or an attempt at revenge against her.
descriptions.intent: He Chunmei wants to see what is happening in the hallway. She aims to understand the presence of the aggressive group.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, loud arrival of a group of people. Her fear that they have come for revenge.
descriptions.relation: She is a neighbor observing the main characters.
descriptions.outcome: She confronts the group, revealing her fear of their intentions.

descriptions.title: Lujiu
descriptions.scene: Lujiu approaches the electrical area to check the power. She hears a high-voltage scream and reacts alongside Chouguangfu. She observes Zhang Qiqi, Zhang Qimin, and Luda Dahun approaching with an aggressive group.
descriptions.intent: Lujiu wants to inspect the electricity and investigate the source of the scream. She seeks to understand the approaching threat.
descriptions.conflict: A high-voltage scream interrupts her work. The arrival of an aggressive group creates immediate tension.
descriptions.relation: Lujiu and Chouguante are allies; Lujiu views the newcomers as enemies seeking revenge.
descriptions.outcome: Lujiu identifies the approaching group as a threat.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei watches the group through a peephole, deciding to join Luda Dahun's team to gain resources and status. She decides to open the door to the apartment. She hopes to use this opportunity to curry favor with the powerful Luda Dahun.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to join the attacking team to gain power and resources. She seeks to prove her worth to Luda Dahun.
descriptions.conflict: She must decide whether to hide or participate in the upcoming confrontation.
descriptions.relation: Hechunmei views Luda Dahun as a source of power and wants to serve him.
descriptions.outcome: Hechunmei decides to open the door and join the aggressors.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei opens the door, even as her husband Chouguangfu tries to stop her. Luda Dahun ignores her and coldly tells her not to enter now that her husband is gone. Hechunmei is left confused and distressed by his words.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to participate in the action. She seeks clarification from Luda Dahun regarding his cold remark.
descriptions.conflict: Luda Dahun's coldness and refusal to acknowledge her. Chouguangfu tries to physically prevent her from opening the door.
descriptions.relation: Luda Dahun treats Hechunmei with cold indifference; Chouguangfu tries to protect her.
descriptions.outcome: Hechunmei is left in a state of shock and uncertainty.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: A man with a pot-shaped head and two property management employees force the door open. Hechunmei loses her footing and is pulled into the room. Chouguangfu watches from the entrance in shock.
descriptions.intent: The intruders want to force entry into the apartment. Hechunmei is caught in the physical movement of the crowd.
descriptions.conflict: The physical force of the intruders overcomes Hechunmei's resistance and Chouguangfu's attempt to stop the door from opening.
descriptions.state: Hechunmei is physically overwhelmed; Chouguangfu is shocked.
descriptions.relation: The intruders are acting aggressively against the residents.
descriptions.outcome: The door is forced open and Hechunmei is pulled inside.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi flirtatiously smiles at Chouguangfu, claiming the house belongs to Luda Dahun. Hechunmei, remembering Zhang Qiqi's past betrayal of Jiang Yu, becomes enraged. She strikes Zhang Qiqi hard across the face.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to confront Zhang Qiqi for her infidelity and betrayal. She seeks to physically lash out at her enemy.
descriptions.conflict: Zhang Qiqi's provocative and flirtatious behavior toward Hechunmei's husband.
descriptions.state: Hechunmei is filled with rage and resentment.
descriptions.relation: Hechunmei views Zhang Qiqi as a "shameless vixen" and a traitor.
descriptions.outcome: Hechunmei successfully slaps Zhang Qiqi.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi skillfully dodges the slap and laughs loudly. She mocks Hechunmei by calling the slap a compliment and insulting Hechunmei's age and lack of beauty. Hechunmei threatens to tear her mouth open.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to humiliate Hechunmei through verbal wit. She seeks to maintain her dominance through mockery.
descriptions.conflict: Verbal warfare and the physical attempt at a second strike by Hechunmei.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qiqi is mocking and arrogant; Hechunmei is furious.
descriptions.relation: The tension between the two women reaches a breaking point.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi successfully insults Hechunmei's dignity.

descriptions.title: Chouguangfu
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin and a property manager physically restrain Hechunmei. Chouguangfu, observing the malicious looks of the group, realizes something is deeply wrong. He turns to go to the kitchen to retrieve a kitchen knife.
descriptions.intent: Chouguangfu wants to defend his home. He seeks a weapon to protect himself and his wife.
descriptions.conflict: The physical restraint of Hechunmei and the realization of an imminent violent threat.
descriptions.state: Chouguangfu is becoming increasingly wary and serious.
descriptions.relation: The property managers are acting as enforcers for the aggressors.
descriptions.outcome: Chouguangfu moves toward the kitchen to arm himself.

descriptions.title: The Man with the Pot-shaped Head
descriptions.scene: The man with the short hair takes the initiative and strikes Chouguangfu in the head with a bloody hammer. Two children sitting on the sofa scream and run out of the room in terror. Chouguangfu falls into a pool of blood.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to eliminate the threat posed by Chouguangfu. The children want to escape the violence.
descriptions.conflict: A sudden, lethal physical attack on Chouguangfu. The sudden violence disrupts the children's safety.
descriptions.state: The man is cold and decisive; the children are terrified.
descriptions.relation: The man acts as an executioner against Chouguangfu.
descriptions.outcome: Chouguangfu is mortally wounded and falls into a pool of blood.

descriptions.title: Hechunmei
descriptions.scene: Hechunmei turns to see Chouguangfu dying in a pool of blood. Overcome with despair and rage, she screams at the attacker and charges at him with her bare hands. The man strikes her in the forehead with the hammer.
descriptions.intent: Hechunmei wants to fight back against the murderer. She seeks vengeance for her husband.
descriptions.conflict: Hechunmei is unarmed and facing a lethal attacker. The man uses the hammer to strike her.
descriptions.state: Hechunmei is in a state of desperate, suicidal rage.
descriptions.relation: Hechunmei becomes a direct combatant against the man.
descriptions.outcome: Hechunmanei is struck in the forehead and falls.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi watches Hechunmei fall and sneers sarcastically. She declares that Luda Dahun's era has arrived. The apartment entrance quickly turns into a scene of carnage with blood everywhere.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to witness the triumph of her side. She seeks to celebrate the new order.
descriptions.conflict: The total breakdown of order and the onset of mass violence.
descriptions.state: Zhang Qiqi is sadistic and triumphant.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi aligns herself with the victorious Luda Dahun.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends in a massacre of the four family members.

descriptions.title: The Aggressors
descriptions.scene: The group carries the four bodies out of the apartment and throws them out of the window. The hallway is covered in blood and the smell of death. Nearby residents watch in terror, too afraid of Luda Dahun to flee.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to dispose of the evidence/bodies. The residents want to avoid Luda Dahun's wrath.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme violence of the disposal vs. the fear of the neighbors.
descriptions.state: The group is ruthless; the residents are paralyzed by fear.
props: Bodies of the four family members
descriptions.relation: The residents are intimidated by Luda Dahun's group.
descriptions.outcome: The bodies are discarded, leaving the hallway a crime scene.

descriptions.title: Gao Dajuan
descriptions.scene: Gao Dajuan criticizes the man with the pot-shaped head for killing the children, suggesting they could have just moved them to another year. The man responds with contempt, arguing that quick violence is more efficient. Gao Dajuan is left unsettled by the man's lack of humanity.
descriptions.intent: Gao Dajuan wants to express moral disapproval of the killing. The man wants to justify his efficiency and lack of mercy.
descriptions.conflict: A moral debate between compassion/moderation and ruthless efficiency/the law of the jungle.
descriptions.state: Gao Dajuan is conflicted and disturbed; the man is cold and bloodthirsty.
descriptions.relation: Gao Dajuan is critical of the man's brutality.
descriptions.outcome: The man's chilling worldview leaves Gao Dajuan in silent contemplation of the new, violent reality.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Man
descriptions.scene: An unnamed man with red eyes confronts Gao Dajuan, accusing him of being too soft-hearted and criticizing his slow way of handling problems. He uses the metaphor of the law of the jungle to justify more aggressive actions. The man's eyes are bloodshot as he speaks with deep contempt.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to pressure Gao Dajuan into taking more violent or decisive action. He wants to prove that being soft-hearted is a weakness.
descriptions.conflict: Gao Dajuan's hesitation and soft-hearted nature clash with the man's aggressive philosophy.
descriptions.state: The man is angry and contemptuous; Gao Dallyuan is frowning and deeply stressed.
descriptions.relation: The man is acting as a critic/antagonist to Gao Dajuan
descriptions.outcome: Gao Dajuan remains silent, absorbing the verbal attack without responding.

descriptions.title: Gao Dajuan, Group of People
descriptions.scene: The group approaches apartment 3202, which has been broken into with a hammer. As the door creaks open, a foul, musty smell fills the air. They discover the interior is uninhabitable due to a leaking roof, peeling wallpaper, and moldy floors.

location.name: Apartment 3202
location.description: a dilapidated room with cracked walls, peeling wallpaper, and a strong smell of mold

descriptions.intent: The group wants to inspect the condition of the apartment. They are investigating the state of the property.
descriptions.conflict: The physical decay of the apartment and the stench create a repulsive environment.
descriptions.state: The group is shocked and overwhelmed by the sight of the destruction.
props: A hammer used to break the door
descriptions.relation: The group is observing the shared property
descriptions.outcome: They realize the apartment is impossible to live in.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Resident
descriptions.scene: A resident complains about the developer's heartlessness, noting that the building was given to the construction company as payment. They observe that while the top floor is safe, lower floors are experiencing sewage backflow. The resident expresses intense anger toward the developer.

location.name: Apartment building
location.description: specifically observing the plumbing and structural issues

descriptions.intent: The resident wants to vent their frustration regarding the poor construction quality. They want to highlight the injustice of the developer's actions.
descriptions.conflict: The poor construction quality and sewage backflow threaten the residents' living conditions.
descriptions.state: The resident is furious and resentful.
descriptions.relation: The resident is a victim of the developer's negligence
descriptions.outcome: The resident's complaint highlights the systemic corruption in the building's construction.

descriptions.title: Liudahu, Liuzhui
descriptions.scene: Liudahu interrupts the complaining to demand that everyone get to work. Liuzhui steps forward and gives specific instructions to create a small passage through a load-bearing wall. He instructs them to make the opening just large enough for one person to pass through.

location.name: Near a load-bearing wall in the apartment complex

descriptions.intent: Liudahu wants to stop the idle talk and focus on the task. Liuzhui wants to direct the demolition of the wall precisely.
descriptions.conflict: The group's distraction by complaining vs. the need to execute a strategic breach.
descriptions.state: Liudahu is authoritative; Liuzhui is focused and commanding.
descriptions.relation: Liudahu is the leader; Liuzhui is the strategist/instructor
descriptions.outcome: The group receives specific instructions for the demolition.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sudai and Sun Zhentao watch the scene through a peephole, clenching their fists. Sun Zhentao is visibly tense, with veins bulging on his arms, and is on the verge of attacking a man wearing a pot-shaped headpiece with a bone knife. Sudai physically intervenes to stop him from charging.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to attack the aggressor. Sudai wants to prevent a violent escalation and keep the peace.
descriptions.conflict: Sun Zhentao's violent impulse vs. Sudai's need for restraint.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is extremely aggressive and physically strained; Sudai is terrified and protective.
props: A bone knife held by Sun Zhentao
descriptions.relation: Sudai is acting as a protector/restraint for her husband, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: Sudai successfully prevents Sun Zhentao from attacking, and the group enters apartment 3.202.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sudai feels a chill down her spine as the group enters 3.202, realizing they are being robbed. She reflects on Liudahu's past actions, remembering how he organized sandbagging during a rainstorm. She now realizes his "responsibility" was actually a calculated plan to manipulate the situation.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to process the betrayal. She is trying to understand the true nature of Liudahu's motives.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that a trusted leader is actually a manipulator.
descriptions.state: Sudai is feeling a sense of dread and betrayal; Sun Zhentao is regretful.
descriptions.relation: Sudai views Liudahu as a deceptive "wolf"
descriptions.outcome: Sudai concludes that Liudahu's previous helpfulness was a long-term scheme.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao stamps his feet in regret, lamenting that the opposing party has become too powerful. Sudai becomes anxious and proposes that they abandon the house and live in the hallway of the 31st floor instead. Sun Zhentao refuses to flee, looking away from the peephole.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to find a safer way to live by abandoning the apartment. Sun Zhentao wants to stand his ground.
descriptions.conflict: The desire for safety vs. the refusal to retreat.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is regretful and determined; Sudary is anxious and fearful.
descriptions.relation: Husband and wife navigating a crisis
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao decides to stay and face the situation.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao reveals he saw Yiqin, who is not part of Liudahu's team. Sudai is stunned and asks if he is referring to the orphan boy who lives with his grandparents in room 01. Sun Zhentao confirms this, dismissing the boy's importance as just a second-year student.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to share new intelligence about a potential player. Sudai wants to identify the person being discussed.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between the boy's perceived status and his actual potential.
descriptions.state: Sudai is confused and stunned; Sun Zhentao is certain and dismissive.
descriptions.relation: Information exchange between spouses
descriptions.outcome: The identity of a potential new factor, Yiqin, is established.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao explains Yiqin's background: he is a student of national defense and a national wushu champion. He describes Yiqin's tragic past, living with elderly, sickly grandparents who moved to the village for medical treatment. Sun Zhentao warns Sudai not to underestimate him.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to warn Sudai about the hidden strength of Yiqin. He wants to provide context for why Yiqin might be involved.
descriptions.conflict: The perception of Yiqin as a mere student vs. his reality as a highly trained fighter.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is serious and instructional; Sudai is listening intently.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is educating/warning his wife
descriptions.outcome: The audience learns that Yiqin is a formidable combatant with a motive for revenge.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao theorizes that Yiqin is here to avenge his grandparents, who died from "blood mosquitoes." He explains his strategy: first, they must capture the leader. He believes if they can convince Yiqin to help destroy Liudahu, the rest of the crowd will follow.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to formulate a plan to defeat the opposing faction. He aims to use Yiqin as a catalyst for victory.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of facing a large, strong group of owners vs. the strategic plan to target the leader.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is analytical and strategic; Sudai is still skeptical and worried.
descriptions.relation: Strategic planning between partners
descriptions.outcome: A plan is proposed to target the leader and win over the owners.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: SCESS: Sun Zhentao acknowledges the danger of Gao Dajun, noting his extreme cruelty and history of killing. He identifies the "Brothers Tang" as the man with the pot-shaped hair and Gao Dajun. Sudai remains worried, but Sun Zhentao reaffirms his commitment to her.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to acknowledge the reality of the threat. He wants to reassure Sudai of his presence.
descriptions.conflict: The terrifying reputation of the enemy vs. the need for emotional stability.
descriptions.state: Sudai is visibly worried; Sun Zhentao is resolute and protective.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao reaffirms his role as her husband/protector
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with a moment of personal resolve amidst the looming threat of the "Brothers Tang."

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao reassures Sudai about his ability to handle Gao Daxun. He asserts his identity as her husband to provide comfort. He expresses confidence in facing the dangerous man.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to reassure his wife of his strength. He aims to demonstrate his capability to protect her from Gao Daxun. He seeks to maintain his role as a protector.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of Gao Daxun, a violent man known for killing without hesitation. The fear of the unknown danger posed by the Tang brothers.
descriptions.state: Confident yet serious. He is focused on providing security to his wife.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is the husband of Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao establishes his resolve to face the threat.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao expresses a wish for the girl from room 3200 to be present. He recalls her previous use of an eight-kilogram chainsaw. He notes that her electrified door makes her weaponry superior to cold weapons.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to strategize for potential combat. He hopes for reinforcements from the powerful girl in 3200. He evaluates the tactical advantage of electric-powered tools.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of sufficient backup for a potential confrontation. The physical disadvantage of using only cold weapons against electrified defenses.
descriptions.state: Analytical and calculating. He is thinking about tactical advantages.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is discussing tactical needs with his wife.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao identifies a potential ally and a superior weapon type.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai begins to ask a follow-up question but is interrupted by a loud musical ringtone. The sound originates from the end of the opposite corridor. The couple looks at each other in shock.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to continue the conversation and seek clarification. She is interrupted by an external stimulus. The couple reacts to the sudden noise.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected loud noise disrupts their private conversation. The sudden appearance of sound creates tension and shock.
descriptions.state: Confused and startled. Her face shows a cat-like, sharp expression of shock.
descriptions.relation: The couple shares a moment of mutual shock.
descriptions.outcome: The focus of the characters shifts from their conversation to the source of the noise.

descriptions.title: Property Owners
descriptions.scene: A group of property owners from the lower floors gathers outside, waiting to see if Jiang Yan is home. A group of people is also seen digging at the external wall of Jiang Yan's home with hammers and crowbars. Someone alerts Manager Liu that someone is inside room 3201.

location.name: Outside room 3201
location.description: near the external wall of the building

descriptions.intent: The owners want to confirm Jiang Yan's presence. They are actively attempting to breach or investigate the perimeter. One person aims to notify the manager of activity.
descriptions.conflict: The tension of an impending confrontation. The physical act of breaking into the wall creates a disturbance.
descriptions.state: Aggressive and expectant. The group is actively engaged in a confrontation.
descriptions.relation: The owners are acting as a collective group against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The presence of someone in room 3201 is reported to the manager.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: The group of residents rushes out of room 3202. Zhang Qiqi takes the lead, standing with hands on her hips and staring intensely at the door of 3201. She loudly demands that Jiang Yan come out and face her for the death of her son.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to confront Jiang Yan. She seeks vengeance for her deceased son. She intends to intimidate Jiang Yan into appearing.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the door. The deep-seated grudge and desire for revenge against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: Angry and confrontational. She is filled with rage and grief.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi leads the angry mob against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd begins to shout accusations and demands at the closed door.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: The crowd of residents shouts various insults and accusations at the door. They accuse Jiang Yan of letting "mosquitoes" in. Some express a desire for revenge for their parents. However, no one dares to step forward due to the fear of the 500V electric current.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to vent their anger and demand accountability. They aim to pressure Jiang Yan to come out. They are motivated by personal losses.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme danger of the 500V electric current prevents physical advancement. The fear of being electrocuted acts as a deterrent.
descriptions.state: Angry, vengeful, yet fearful. They are caught between rage and self-preservation.
descriptions.relation: The residents are a unified, albeit fearful, group.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd remains at a distance, unable to physically approach the door.

descriptions.title: Liu Dahun
descriptions.scene: Liu Dahun raises his hand and waves, causing the crowd to fall silent. He walks toward the door of 3201 and asks in a deep voice if Mrs. Jiang is home. He holds a steel crowbar firmly in his hand.
descriptions.intent: Liu Dahun wants to command the crowd to be quiet. He intends to initiate a direct dialogue with the occupant. He seeks to probe the door for a response.
descriptions.conflict: The tension of the silent confrontation. The physical threat posed by his weapon.
descriptions.state: Authoritative and serious. He is focused on the task of questioning.|Outlam: Liu Dahun successfully silences the crowd and approaches the door.
descriptions.relation: Liu Dahun acts as a leader/mediator for the group.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd falls silent as Liu Dahun approaches the door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The door to 3201 opens slightly, revealing only a two-palm width gap. The door is secured by three or four thick iron chains. A cold female voice speaks through a loudspeaker from behind the door. She warns the crowd to stay back or face the consequences of 500V electricity and a gun.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to warn the crowd to stay away. She intends to defend her perimeter using lethal threats. She seeks to prevent any physical breach.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the chains and the door. The threat of lethal force (electricity and a gun) against the crowd.
descriptions.state: Cold, detached, and threatening. She is prepared for combat.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is in a defensive, hostile position against the group.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is shocked and instinctively steps backward.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi clenches her teeth and defiantly calls Jiang Yan a coward. Jiang Yan responds with a contemptuous sneer, telling her she is not worthy of talking to him. Zhang Qiqi prepares to step forward with a knife, but is stopped by Zhang Qimin.

location.name: In front of the door of 3201

descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to confront Jiang Yan face-to-face. She intends to use her knife to intimidate or attack. She seeks to prove her courage.
descriptions.conflict: The verbal insults between the two women. The physical intervention by Zhang Qimin to prevent a fight.
descriptions.state: Defiant and enraged. She is also momentarily confused by Jiang Yan's contempt.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: Not specified;Jiang Yan=Not specified;Zhang Qimin=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is in direct verbal conflict with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi is prevented from advancing by Zhang Qimin.

descriptions.title: Property Owner (Man in Glasses)
descriptions.scene: A man in glasses approaches the group, asking for an explanation. He questions if Jiang Yan left the door unlocked. He points out that she is the only person in Building A who left the community for an official shelter. He asks her to tell the truth.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to seek accountability and an explanation. He aims to uncover if Jiang Yan's actions caused the security breach. He seeks the truth regarding her departure from the community.
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion surrounding Jiang Yan's motives and her departure from the community. The tension of the investigation.
descriptions.state: Meek and polite, yet probing. He appears cautious.
descriptions.relation: The man acts as a representative of the residents' inquiry.
descriptions.outcome: The man presents a formal inquiry to Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Residents
descriptions.scene: The residents chime in, saying that if she lies, God will strike her with lightning. They express that every evil has a culprit and every debt has a creditor. Some residents remain uncertain if Jiang Yan is the true culprit, as they view most of the group as honest people.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to pressure Jiang Yan through moral and religious intimidation. They seek to find the person responsible for the "blood mosquito" incident. They aim to uphold their sense of justice.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty regarding the true culprit. The internal conflict between their anger and their belief in the group's honesty.
descriptions.state: Superstitious and judgmental. They are caught in a state of collective suspicion.
descriptions.relation: The residents are acting as a jury against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd's suspicion is heightened, though some doubt the accusation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan's indifferent tone becomes more serious as she listens to the crowd. She asks if they truly want the truth. The crowd responds in unison, demanding it. The property managers signal to Liu Dahun with firm looks.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confront the crowd's demand for truth. She intends to reveal the reality of the situation. She seeks to end the interrogation.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure from the crowd's unified demand. The tension between the residents and the managers.
descriptions.state: Serious and impatient. She is no longer indifferent.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is facing a unified front of residents and managers.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd and managers prepare for her revelation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan explains that when they opened the door, no one was there. She reveals that the surveillance battery had long since died, making monitoring impossible. She mocks them, stating that if they cannot see it, others cannot either. She offers to provide something to a representative of the owners.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to debunk their claims of seeing her leave the door open. She intends to expose the failure of the surveillance system. She seeks to negotiate by offering a bribe or information to a representative.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of evidence due to the dead surveillance battery. The dispute over what was actually seen or not seen.
descriptions.state: Smug and mocking. She is confident in her technical explanation.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is negotiating with the group's representatives.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan challenges the group to send a representative to receive her offer.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan mocks the crowd by stating that the monitoring system is useless because the battery is dead and the key to monitoring is manual. She challenges the group of owners to send a representative if they want to see the proof. She remains confident in her ability to reveal the truth.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to provoke the owners into taking action. She aims to prove her claims by offering a demonstration. She seeks to expose the truth behind the incident.
descriptions.conflict: The owners are hesitant and afraid of the high-voltage door. Lyudahun distrusts her and suspects her evidence might be fake. The crowd is paralyzed by fear of the electrical danger.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is confrontational toward the owners.
descriptions.outcome: The owners remain stuck in a standoff, unable to move forward.

descriptions.title: Yi Qing
descriptions.scene: A tall, thin young man named Yi Qing steps out from the crowd to approach Jiang Yan's position. He is dressed in black and has a stoic, expressionless face with messy hair covering his eyes. He moves toward the area where the phone is located.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qing wants to retrieve the item from the house. He intends to act as the representative for the group. He seeks to bridge the gap between the owners and the evidence.
descriptions.conflict: He must navigate the tension of the crowd and the physical danger of the area. His physical frailty from malnutrition is visible.
descriptions.state: Emotionless and determined.|Outras: Yi Qing=Tall, thin, wearing black clothing, long messy hair covering eyes
descriptions.relation: He acts as a brave intermediary for the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: He successfully reaches the area to retrieve the phone.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao watches as Yi Qing retrieves a beige display/phone from the house. He observes the expensive 37-inch screen and the high value of the device. He begins to realize that his suspicions about the apartment 3.201 being framed are likely correct.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to verify the truth about the incident. He aims to confirm if the residents of 3.201 are victims. He seeks to analyze the situation of the management company.
descriptions.conflict: He is conflicted by the possibility that the management company might use violence to silence witnesses. He must decide whether to intervene.
descriptions.relation: He is the husband of Su Dai and an observer of the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: He concludes that the residents of 3.201 were likely framed.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai pushes her husband aside to peer through the peephole of the apartment. She expresses shock at the expensive nature of the phone, noting its 37-inch screen and high price. She worries about the safety of the device being handled so roughly.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to see the evidence for herself. She aims to verify the claims made by the neighbors. She expresses concern for the expensive property.
descriptions.conflict: She is filled with disbelief and anxiety regarding the situation. She fears the potential for damage to the expensive phone.
descriptions.relation: She is the wife of Sun Zhentao.
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the presence of the expensive device.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao prepares himself for a confrontation by gathering weapons and protective gear. He puts a bone cleaver into his waistband and takes a small fruit knife from a coffee table to put in his pocket. He puts on a large black jacket to cover his face.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to prepare for a physical confrontation or defense. He aims to protect his family and himself. He seeks to act as a hero for justice.
descriptions.conflict: He knows the people involved are ruthless and capable of killing. He must balance his desire for justice with the safety of his wife.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: Large black jacket, clothing with a waistband for a knife

descriptions.relation: He is acting as a protector for his wife.
descriptions.outcome: He is fully equipped and ready to leave the apartment.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao hugs his wife and kisses her forehead, promising her that he must go. He explains that he knows Xiao Ye and can persuade him. He instructs his wife to lock the door and prepare an escape plan using a climbing rope if anything happens to him.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to convince his wife of his necessity to act. He aims to provide her with an escape strategy. He seeks to ensure her safety even if he fails.
descriptions.conflict: Su Dai is terrified and tries to dissuade him from going. The danger of the situation is high and life-threatening.
descriptions.relation: He is being a protective, commanding husband.
descriptions.outcome: He establishes a survival plan for his wife.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao prepares to find his ally, Zhang Hao, in the neighboring community after the rain stops. He tells his wife to stay inside and monitor the situation. He is mentally preparing for a potential fight.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to find reinforcements. He aims to secure help from Zhang Hao. He seeks to resolve the conflict through organized effort.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and storm make movement difficult. He is facing an unknown and dangerous enemy.
descriptions.relation: He is planning a strategic move to find allies.
descriptions.outcome: He finalizes his plan to seek help.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai helps her husband put on a life jacket. She is visibly moved to tears and tells him to return safely. She struggles to express her deep love for him, feeling a lump in her throat.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to support her husband's decision. She aims to express her love and concern. She seeks to ensure his safe return.
descriptions.conflict: Her intense emotion prevents her from speaking her true feelings. She is caught between supporting him and fearing for his life.
descriptions.relation: She is a supportive but terrified wife.
descriptions.outcome: She remains in the apartment, waiting for his return.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentified takes an N95 mask from the shoe cabinet and puts it on. He opens the door with a creak and steps out into the heavy rain, thunder, and lightning. He leaves the safety of the apartment to face the storm.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to face the external threat. He aims to protect his family's interests. He seeks to implement his plan of action.
descriptions.conflict: The external environment is violent with heavy rain and lightning. He is stepping into a high-risk situation.
descriptions.relation: He is leaving his wife behind to face the danger.
descriptions.outcome: He exits the apartment into the storm.

descriptions.title: Unknown Resident
descriptions.scene: An unidentified person from apartment 3.204 quietly opens their door while no one is looking. They observe the scene from a distance. The phone has already been left in an open space by Yi Qing.
descriptions.intent: The resident wants to observe the unfolding events. They aim to see the evidence without being noticed. They seek to stay out of the immediate conflict.
descriptions.conflict: They must remain undetected by the crowd and the management.
descriptions.relation: They are a silent observer of the main conflict.
descriptions.outcome: They successfully observe the scene unnoticed.

descriptions.title: The Owners
descriptions.scene: The group of owners rushes toward the area where the phone has been left. They are warned by someone to stay back and not approach too closely because the truth is tied to the residents of 3.201. The crowd gathers around the evidence.
descriptions.intent: The owners want to inspect the evidence. They aim to see the phone for themselves. They seek to understand the truth of the situation.
descriptions.conflict: They are warned of the danger and the sensitivity of the situation. There is a tension between curiosity and the need for caution.
descriptions.relation: They are reacting to the evidence provided by Yi Qing.
descriptions.outcome: The owners congregate around the evidence, creating a tense atmosphere.

descriptions.title: Yejin
descriptions.scene: Yejin quietly opens the door while leaving his girlfriend's phone in an open area. The owners at the end of the queue immediately rush toward the device. Yejin maintains a calm exterior despite the sudden movement of the crowd.

location.name: Entrance area
location.description: a crowded space near a doorway

descriptions.intent: Yejin wants to monitor the situation without being detected. He aims to create a controlled environment for observation.
descriptions.conflict: The owners are rushing toward the phone, potentially disrupting the setup. The crowd's proximity threatens the secrecy of the surveillance.
descriptions.relation: Yejin is observing the owners.
descriptions.outcome: The owners approach the phone, but Yejin manages to maintain control of the space.

descriptions.title: Yejin
descriptions.scene: Yejin gestures for the crowd to step back and requests the installation of protective barriers. He follows the specific instructions previously given to him by Jiang Yan regarding the phone's placement. He avoids turning on the display immediately to prevent detection.
descriptions.intent: Yejin wants to establish a perimeter. He intends to ensure that the evidence can be viewed without interference or destruction.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is too close to the device. There is a risk that someone might destroy the evidence during the chaos.
descriptions.relation: Yejin is acting on Jiang Yan's prior advice.
descriptions.outcome: A perimeter is established to protect the recording process.

descriptions.title: Yejin
descriptions.scene: Yejin experiences a sudden, violent impulse to kill Jiang Yan with a knife to avenge his grandparents. However, he suppresses this murderous urge because Jiang Yan is positioned too discreetly for an immediate attack. He realizes he has no clear starting point for such an assault.
descriptions.intent: Yejin wants to seek vengeance for his grandparents. He struggles to balance his rage with the tactical reality of the situation.
descriptions.conflict: Internal conflict between his desire for revenge and the need for tactical restraint. Jiang Yan's hidden position prevents a direct attack.
descriptions.state: Intense rage suppressed by cold calculation.
descriptions.relation: Yejin feels deep animosity toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Yejin decides to restrain himself to maintain his plan.

descriptions.title: An Observer
descriptions.scene: An unnamed observer watches Jiang Yan's specialized combat equipment in shock. The observer finds it hard to believe that a well-trained person with such gear and a girl with clear eyes could orchestrate a blood mosquito attack on neighbors. The observer's intuition suggests such a malicious act is unlikely.
descriptions.intent: The observer wants to understand the nature of the threat. He seeks to evaluate the evidence presented by the opposing side.
descriptions.conflict: The shock of seeing advanced combat gear creates confusion. The observer's intuition conflicts with the possibility of a deliberate attack.
descriptions.relation: The observer is judging Jiang Yan's capabilities.
descriptions.outcome: The observer decides to wait and examine the evidence.

descriptions.title: Lyuda Hong, Zhang Qiqi, Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Lyuda Hong, Zhang Qiqi, and Zhang Qimin watch the display being taken out. They sense something is wrong and suspect that despite the high temperature disabling some equipment, the phone might have secretly recorded the events. They begin to whisper among themselves.
descriptions.intent: The characters want to uncover the truth of the incident. They are looking for hidden recordings.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of official surveillance due to high temperature makes finding proof difficult. They suspect secret recording is the only way.
descriptions.relation: They are part of the group monitoring the situation.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to gather and whisper in secret.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao, wearing a mask, quietly infiltrates the group of owners. He moves through the crowd unnoticed while others are distracted by their own thoughts. His presence is a stealthy addition to the gathering.
descriptions.intent: Sun Jintao wants to blend in with the owners. He aims to move undetected to participate in the unfolding events.
descriptions.conflict: He must avoid detection by the other group members while navigating the crowd.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jintao is infiltrating the group.
descriptions.outcome: He successfully enters the group of owners.

descriptions.title: Lyuda Hong
descriptions.scene: Lyuda Hong clenches his teeth and frowns while watching the crowd. He issues a secret command to an accomplice to rise and smash the display screen. He plans to use the larger number of owners to overwhelm the opposition.
descriptions.intent: Lyuda Hong wants to destroy the evidence. He aims to win the confrontation through sheer numbers.
descriptions.conflict: The opposing side has a strong presence. He must coordinate a strike without being caught too early.
descriptions.relation: Lyuda Hong is leading a conspiracy.
descriptions.outcome: A plan to destroy the screen is set in motion.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qimin
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qimin feels a sense of guilt regarding his role in the management committee. He reflects on how his position as chairman has lost its value and how he has become a mere lackey for Lyuda Hong. He worries about the consequences of his past actions involving private deals with outsiders.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to justify his current position. He struggles with the guilt of his complicity in the management's corruption.
descriptions.conflict: Internal guilt versus the need to maintain his status. The risk of the truth coming out threatens his entire plan for a base in Repals Bay.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qimin is a subordinate to Lyuda Hong.
descriptions.outcome: He remains trapped in his role as a follower.

descriptions.title: Guan Sanyang
descriptions.scene: SCESS: Guan Sanyang stands among the leaders, holding a weapon and looking eager to use it. He is characterized by having six toes on his feet and wearing bright flame-patterned sneakers. He is visibly sweating from the tension of the moment.
descriptions.intent: Guan Sanyang wants to participate in the physical confrontation. He is ready to use force.
descriptions.conflict: The high tension of the situation causes him to break into a cold sweat.

outfits.Guan Sanyang: Flame-patterned sneakers; he has a physical deformity of six toes on his feet.

descriptions.relation: He is part of the group prepared for conflict.
descriptions.outcome: He remains poised for combat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan monitors the entire conspiracy through the surveillance camera, noting every detail of the plot. She had anticipated the interference and had even rehearsed various scenarios and counter-moves in her mind. She remains calm, allowing the events to unfold as planned.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to capture the conspiracy on film. She aims to provide undeniable proof of the plot.
descriptions.conflict: The opposing side is actively trying to destroy evidence and interfere with the process.
descriptions.relation: She is the silent observer and investigator.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully captures the details of the conspiracy.

descriptions.title: Yejin
descriptions.scene: Yejin observes that the crowd has finally cleared the space as he requested. He proceeds to slowly turn on the display screen to reveal the recorded evidence. The tension reaches its peak as the screen comes to life.
descriptions.intent: Yejin wants to present the evidence to the crowd. He aims to conclude the period of observation and reveal the truth.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for immediate backlash or destruction of the screen as it is turned on.
descriptions.relation: He is the one presenting the findings to the group.
descriptions.outcome: The display is activated, revealing the recorded events.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan mentally rehearses a meeting scenario with the opposing side, anticipating various possible situations and counter-measures. She remains calm and does not rush her actions. She waits for the timing of the incoming projectiles to pass.

location.name: Room 3.204
location.description: an interior space where preparations are being made.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare for a confrontation. She intends to anticipate all possible enemy moves to ensure her safety.
descriptions.conflict: The looming threat of an incoming attack from the opposing group.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is preparing against the approaching group.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully maintains her composure and waits for the optimal moment.

descriptions.title: Yi Qing
descriptions.scene: Yi Qing observes that everyone has cleared the space as requested. He slowly turns on the display screen. The content on the screen has been precisely edited and timed by Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qing wants to execute the technical part of the plan. He aims to activate the visual distraction at the exact moment required.
descriptions.conflict: The tension of the approaching group threatens to disrupt the timing.
descriptions.state: Attentive and focused on the technical execution.
props: A display screen with pre-edited images and high-volume audio.
descriptions.relation: Yi Qing is working in coordination with Jiang Yan's plan.
descriptions.outcome: The screen is activated, setting the stage for the distraction.

descriptions.title: Guan Sanxiang
descriptions.scene: Guan Sanxiang prepares to open the door to the block. The screen displays images set to trigger exactly three seconds before his entry, with the volume set to maximum. The group watches the screen with bated breath.

location.name: The doorway/corridor leading to the block.

descriptions.intent: Guan Sanxiang intends to enter the area. The group's intent is to monitor the unfolding event.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden loud noise and visual distraction from the screen.
descriptions.relation: Guan Sanxiang is moving toward the group's position.
descriptions.outcome: The distraction begins to take effect as the group is momentarily distracted.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong and his group approach with weapons in hand. He does not notice the screen's content initially. He gives a quiet command to his brothers to move forward.

location.name: The corridor approaching the residential units.

descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to lead his team in an assault. He intends to take control of the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The unexpected presence of the residents and the distraction.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong is leading an attacking force against the residents.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins their advance.

descriptions.title: Guan Sanxiang
descriptions.scene: Guan Sanxiang rushes into the crowd. Simultaneously, Yi Qing notices the movement and quickly closes the display screen. Sun Zhentao leaps forward with a graceful, athletic movement.

location.name: The area near the entrance of the room.

descriptions.intent: Guan Sanxiang wants to charge the group. Yi Qing wants to hide the evidence of the distraction. Sun Zhentable wants to intercept.
descriptions.conflict: The physical collision between the charging Guan Sanxiang and the leaping Sun Zhentao.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao physically intercepts Guan Sanxiang.
descriptions.outcome: Guan Sanxiang falls face down due to the impact.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong recognizes Sun Zhentao and recalls his background as a former special forces soldier. He reveals his previous intention to recruit him but realizes he must now deal with him because of the current conflict. He decides that killing him is the only way to remove the threat.

location.name: The corridor near the residential units.

descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to neutralize the threat posed by Sun Zhentao. He intends to eliminate anyone standing in his way.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that Sun Zhentao is a highly skilled combatant who cannot be easily recruited.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong views Sun Zhentao as a dangerous adversary.
descriptions.outcome: Luda Hong prepares to attack.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: The group of owners notices the tension but feels confused and uncertain of how to act. Luda Hong prepares to order his men to capture Sun Zhentao and Yi Qing. Suddenly, he hears a creak as the door to room 3.2001 opens fully.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to arrest the targets. The owners want to understand the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a new player from the room.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong is facing the residents.
descriptions.outcome: The door opens, changing the focus of the confrontation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan steps out from room 3.2000, holding a pistol. She appears calm and composed, like an agent, contrasting with the aggressive crowd. The crowd is shocked and begins to panic, wondering if the weapon is real or a toy.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confront the group. She intends to use the weapon to establish dominance.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd's disbelief and the legality of the weapon.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is confronting Luda Hong's group.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is paralyzed by fear and confusion.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao rubs his eyes, doubting what he sees. He recognizes the specific model of the pistol from international military media, confirming that it is a real, high-quality firearm. He realizes the gravity of the situation.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to verify the reality of the threat. He intends to assess the danger level.
descriptions.conflict: The cognitive dissonance of seeing a real firearm in a restricted area.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is observing Jiang Yan's power.
descriptions.outcome: He confirms the weapon is real.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi mocks Jiang Yan, believing the gun is just a starter pistol. Driven by hatred and jealousy, she charges at Jiang Yan with a knife in her hand. She is wearing an outfit that looks out of place, like a time-traveler.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to attack Jiang Yan. She intends to prove her superiority and vent her rage.
descriptions.conflict: The physical attack against a person with a firearm.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi becomes an active aggressor against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a direct physical assault.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks at Zhang Qiqi with cold eyes and does not engage in conversation. She swings her hand and fires the pistol. The first bullet hits Zhang Qiqi directly in the right knee, causing intense pain and bleeding.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to stop the attack. She intends to use precise force to disable the attacker.
descriptions.conflict: The physical confrontation and the need to defend herself.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan attacks Zhang Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi's right knee is shattered.

descriptions.title: Zhang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Zhang Qiqi screams in agony as her bone breaks. Jiang Yan fires a second shot, hitting Zhang Qiqi's left knee. Zhang Qiqi collapses to her knees on the floor, with blood pooling around her.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Qiqi is driven by pure survival and pain response.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme physical trauma and the loss of mobility.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi is the victim of Jiang Yan's precision.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Qiqi is incapacitated and bleeding heavily on the floor.

descriptions.title: Jian Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jian Qiqi falls to her knees on the floor tiles. Her leg bone breaks at the knee with a loud crack, and blood begins to soak through her pants. She screams in intense agony.
descriptions.intent: Jian Qiqi wants to stabilize herself after the fall. She is struggling with sudden physical trauma. She is trying to endure the pain of a broken limb.
descriptions.conflict: A sudden physical injury causes extreme pain and loss of mobility. The bone has snapped, causing heavy bleeding.
descriptions.state: Agonized and physically broken. She is in a state of shock and intense suffering.

outfits.Jian Qiqi: Casual clothing, currently being soaked by blood from a leg wound.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jian Qiqi is incapacitated and bleeding heavily on the floor.

descriptions.title: Jian Qiqi, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Qiqi attempts to crawl toward Jian Yan while clutching the ground. Two bullets from a patronika strike her arms, creating new bloody holes. The sudden increase in pain nearly causes her to lose consciousness.
descriptions.intent: Jian Qiqi wants to reach Jian Yan for help or proximity. Jian Yan is observing the scene with a weapon.
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan fires shots that hit Jian Qiqi's arms. The physical pain is overwhelming and life-threatening.
descriptions.state: Jian Qiqi is in near-death agony. The onlookers are terrified by the precision of the shooting.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan is acting as an aggressor/enforcer against Jian Qiqi.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Qiqi is further wounded and the onlookers are paralyzed by fear.

descriptions.title: The Tenants, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: The tenants observe the precision of the shooting and feel terrified, viewing Jian Yan as a killing machine. Some tenants become so frightened they wet their pants. Sun Zhentao decides to take action to prevent further chaos.
descriptions.intent: The tenants want to flee the scene. Sun Zhentao wants to contain the situation to prevent endless trouble.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of Jian Yan's lethal accuracy prevents the tenants from moving. Sun Zhentao must decide whether to fight or flee.
descriptions.state: The tenants are terrified and physically trembling. Sun Zhentao is determined and resolute.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zobby is acting to isolate the group.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao closes the fire door to trap everyone in the room.

descriptions.title: Jian Qimin, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Qimin runs toward the injured Jian Qiqi to support her. A bullet hits the floor tile directly under Jian Qimin's feet, causing him to jump in terror. Jian Yan glares at him and commands him to go back.
descriptions.intent: Jian Qimin wants to help the wounded woman. Jian Yan wants to maintain control and prevent interference.
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan's gunfire interrupts Jian Qimin's attempt to help. Jian Yan's authoritative glare forces Jian Qimin to retreat.
descriptions.state: Jian Qimin is extremely frightened with trembling limbs. Jian Yan is angry and authoritative.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan asserts dominance over Jian Qimin.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Qimin retreats to a corner in fear.

descriptions.title: Luda Hun, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Luda Hun stands watching with a clenched iron bar, calculating a countermeasure. He notices Jian Yan's attention is diverted. He prepares to sneak up on Jian Yan with a small hammer.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hun wants to find a way to resist or strike back. He plans to use a stealthy approach to disarm or attack.
descriptions.conflict: Luda Hun must overcome his fear of the gun to execute his plan. He is waiting for a moment of distraction.
descriptions.state: Luda Hun is focused and calculating. He feels a sense of opportunity.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hun is planning a covert attack against Jian Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Luda Hun begins his stealthy approach.

descriptions.title: Yiqing, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Yiqing attempts to step forward to stop Luda Hun's plan. A shot rings out and a bullet hits Yiqing directly in the arm. Yiqing grabs his bleeding wrist as the hammer falls to the ground.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to prevent the escalation of violence. Jian Yan intends to shoot anyone moving toward him.
descriptions.conflict: Yiqing's intervention is met with immediate physical violence. The bullet pierces his arm.
descriptions.state: Yiqically is in sudden physical pain and shock. The group is silenced by the sudden shot.

outfits.Yiqing: A mask covering his face, short hair.

descriptions.relation: Jian Yan attacks Yiqing to enforce his command.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing is wounded and the group falls into a heavy silence.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan, The Tenants
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan stands still and looks coldly at the group. He declares that he does not care about being misunderstood as long as he can deal with the low-level landlords. He threatens to shoot anyone who moves or tries to leave.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to establish absolute authority and settle the dispute. He wants to force the tenants to disarm.
descriptions.conflict: The tenants want to escape the violence. Jian Yan uses lethal threats to prevent their movement.
descriptions.state: Jian Yan is cold, resolute, and menacing. The tenants are paralyzed by the threat of death.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan is threatening the entire group.
descriptions.outcome: The group is held hostage by the threat of immediate execution.

descriptions.title: Jian Qiqi, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Qiqi begins to cry and scream, apologizing to Jian Yan. She expresses intense physical pain, describing it as needles piercing her body. She begs Jian Yan to just shoot her to end the suffering.
descriptions.intent: Jian Qiqi wants the pain to end. She seeks an end to her agony through death or mercy.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical agony is so great that she has lost her mental composure. She is trapped in her own broken body.
descriptions.state: Jian Qiqi is hysterical, weeping, and losing her mind from pain. Jian Yan is cynical and unmoved.
descriptions.relation: Jian Qiqi is pleading with her tormentor/enforcer.
descriptions.outcome: Jian Qiqi's mental state deteriorates into madness.

descriptions.title: The Tenants, Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: The tenants begin to comply with Jian Yan's orders by throwing their weapons into a corner. Gao Juan and his group follow suit. Luda Hun throws his iron bar onto the floor to signal total surrender.
descriptions.intent: The tenants want to survive and avoid being shot. Luda Hun wants to cease resistance.
descriptions.conflict: The tenants must overcome their instinct to defend themselves to obey the threat.
descriptions.state: The tenants are submissive and desperate. Luda Hun is surrendering his weapon.
descriptions.relation: The tenants are submitting to Jian Yan's authority.
descriptions.outcome: All weapons are gathered in the corner.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, The Tenants
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao watches the others drop their weapons. He quickly moves to the corner to pick up the scattered weapons. He observes the group's surrender.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to collect the weapons. He is acting to manage the aftermath of the confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: He must navigate the room while the tension is still extremely high.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is observant and efficient.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is acting as a collector of the surrendered arms.
descriptions.outcome: The weapons are gathered in the corner by Sun Zhentao.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Djan Yan decides to stop resisting and throws the steel crowbar to the ground with a loud crash. This action serves as a signal for the others to drop their weapons. She effectively ends the immediate physical confrontation.

location.name: Room 3.201
location.description: a space filled with the smell of fish and blood-stained weapons.

descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to signal a cessation of hostilities. She aims to change the dynamic of the standoff.
descriptions.conflict: The tension of the ongoing armed standoff.
descriptions.relation: Djan Yan leads the group by example.
descriptions.outcome: The others follow her lead and drop their weapons.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao observes the group dropping their weapons and quickly moves to the corner of the room. He gathers the scattered weapons from the floor. He then carries the weapons toward the door of room 3.201.

location.name: Room 3.201
location.description: near the corner where weapons are scattered.

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to secure the weapons. He aims to control the means of escape and combat.
descriptions.conflict: The weapons are scattered and the situation is chaotic.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as a secondary enforcer.
descriptions.outcome: He successfully gathers the weapons and moves them to the door.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao confiscates the pistol from Djan Yan's hand. He also blocks the escape routes that the others intended to use. He stands near Djan Yan holding a bone-cutting knife.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to disarm Djan Yan and prevent anyone from fleeing. He aims to establish total control over the room.
descriptions.conflict: Djan Yan's immense strength previously made her a threat.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao asserts dominance over Djan Yan by taking her weapon.
descriptions.outcome: Djan Yan is disarmed, and the group's escape routes are cut off.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
