descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao intentionally stands near Djan Yan while maintaining a specific distance to avoid touching her safety line. He holds a bone-cutting knife. He observes the angry reactions of Luda Hong and the others.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to maintain a presence near the leader without causing direct friction. He aims to show his support while respecting her boundaries.
descriptions.conflict: Luda Hong and the others view Sun Zhentao with intense anger and resentment.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao maintains a professional distance from Djan Yan while being an object of hatred for Luda Hong.
descriptions.outcome: A tense silence falls over the room.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong suddenly drops to his knees with a loud thud, shocking the strong men present. He looks at his companions and frantically waves his hands, signaling them to kneel as well. The other men in the house hesitate but eventually follow his lead.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to force his group into a position of submission. He aims to initiate a strategic surrender.
descriptions.conflict: The other men are confused and hesitant to lose their dignity.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong takes command of his subordinates through a display of submission.
descriptions.outcome: The entire group of men is kneeling before Djan Yan.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong declares his loyalty to Djan Yan, stating he will lead his brothers to protect the 32nd floor. He offers his entire stock of food and water to her. He presents this sacrifice as a sign of sincere allegiance.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to secure a position of power under Djan Yan. He aims to use his resources to buy influence.
descriptions.conflict: His sudden submission is seen as spineless by observers like Zhang Qimin.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong attempts to form a subordinate alliance with Djan Yan.
descriptions.outcome: He successfully transfers control of his supplies to Djan Yan.

descriptions.title: Luda Hong
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong's true plan is revealed as a time-stalling tactic. He intends to use Djan Yan's lack of support to eventually seize her weapons and her people. He plans to replace her as the leader of the Repulse Bay area.
descriptions.intent: Luda Hong wants to manipulate the situation to become the new leader. He aims to exploit Djan Yan's isolation.
descriptions.conflict: Djan Yan is currently the commander, but she lacks a power base.
descriptions.relation: Luda Hong is secretly plotting against Djan Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The stage is set for a future power struggle.

descriptions.title: The Residents
descriptions.scene: The other owners, including Gao Juan, react with greed to the news of the food and water supplies. However, they feel suppressed anger because they suspect the management company has been hoarding official supplies. They remain silent due to fear of Djan Yan.
descriptions.intent: The residents want the food and water. They also want to protest the hoarding of supplies.
descriptions.conflict: They are too afraid of Djan Yan's authority to speak their minds.
descriptions.relation: The residents are intimidated by Dlam Yan's presence.
descriptions.outcome: The residents remain silent despite their internal turmoil.

descriptions.title: Djan Yan
descriptions.scene: Luda Hong asks Djan Yan for permission to speak or proceed. Djan Yan responds with cold and decisive words, telling him there is no need for further discussion. Sun Zhentao watches this interaction with growing admiration for her.
descriptions.intent: Djan Yan wants to shut down Luda Hong's attempt at negotiation. She aims to maintain her authority without engaging in his games.
descriptions.conflict: Luda Hong is trying to negotiate terms of service.
descriptions.relation: Djan Yan rejects Luda Hong's overtures, strengthening Sun Zhentao's respect for her.
descriptions.outcome: Luda Hong's attempt at dialogue is abruptly terminated.

descriptions.title: Yi Qing
descriptions.scene: Yi Qing asks Djan Yan for permission to show the surveillance video. Djan Yan nods her approval. The video begins to play, showing a man acting like a thief as he enters a room on the first floor.

location.name: Room 3.201
location.description: in front of a display screen.

descriptions.intent: Yi Qing wants to present evidence from the security footage. He aims to reveal a new development in the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The video shows a potential intruder or criminal activity.
descriptions.relation: Yi Qing follows Djan Yan's command.
descriptions.outcome: The video starts playing for the group.

descriptions.title: Guan Sangtang
descriptions.scene: On the video, Guan Sangtang leans down to grab a door pin. As he does, the camera captures a clear view of bright orange sneakers and a hand with six fingers. The residents recognize the six fingers immediately.
descriptions.intent: Guan Sangtang is simply performing a mechanical task. The camera's intent is to capture the identifying features.
descriptions.conflict: The appearance of the six-fingered hand creates instant recognition and tension.
descriptions.relation: The discovery of the six fingers connects the video to a known threat.
descriptions.outcome: The identity of the person in the video is partially revealed through a distinct physical trait.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang leans down to retrieve a pin to secure a door. He notices a photograph showing bright orange sneakers and a hand with six fingers. He realizes the six-fingered hand is a known identifier for certain individuals.

location.name: A corridor near a door
location.description: near a crime scene with blood

descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants to secure the door. He also intends to identify the perpetrator through the photograph.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of reaching the pin. The realization of a known criminal's presence.
props: a photograph showing orange sneakers and six fingers
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He identifies a specific physical trait of the killer.

descriptions.title: Property Owners
descriptions.scene: The property management team in Repals Bay observes the evidence of the crime. They recall the stability of their small leadership group and their long-term familiarity with one another. They witness blood-covered mosquitoes emerging from a door, triggering memories of the recent murders.
descriptions.intent: The owners want to process the evidence. They seek to understand the nature of the recent violence.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming evidence of a massacre. The psychological trauma of seeing the blood.
descriptions.relation: The owners are a cohesive group of long-term residents.
descriptions.outcome: The owners move from shock to intense rage.

descriptions.title: Gentleman in Glasses
descriptions.scene: A gentleman wearing glasses approaches Ms. Jiang. He expresses his fury and declares his intent to seek revenge. However, he remains cautious because Jiang is holding a gun.
descriptions.intent: The gentleman wants to warn Jiang about the group's plan for vengeance. He wants to express his anger regarding the theft and framing.
descriptions.conflict: He is afraid of Jiang's firearm. He is conflicted between his rage and his fear.
descriptions.relation: The gentleman is a resident; Jiang is an armed figure.
descriptions.outcome: He warns Jiang of the impending retaliation.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang erupts in rage, accusing Lu Dahun of being a two-faced beast and demanding justice for his son. The other owners join in the righteous indignation, wishing to tear the management team apart.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants to kill Lu Dahun and avenge his son. The owners want to attack the management.
descriptions.conflict: The management team is armed with guns and bullets. The owners are physically unable to move toward the armed guards.
descriptions.relation: Guan Shangyang views Lu Dahun as a murderer.
descriptions.outcome: The group remains stuck in a state of paralyzed fury.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang suddenly jumps up to take action. He begins shouting that the photograph is a fake created by AI. He argues that the high temperatures and failed cameras make such footage impossible.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants to discredit the photographic evidence. He wants to prove the footage is a fabrication.
descriptions.conflict: He is facing the reality of the video evidence. He is struggling against the perceived manipulation of truth.
descriptions.relation: Guan Shangyang is challenging the validity of the evidence presented by the management.
descriptions.outcome: His outburst emboldens the other owners.

descriptions.title: Property Owners
descriptions.scene: Seeing that Jiang does not fire her weapon, the property owners gain courage. They stand up and begin physically attacking the property management guards. A chaotic brawl breaks out between the residents and the security personnel.
descriptions.intent: The owners want to physically assault the guards. They want to retaliate for the theft and framing.
descriptions.conflict: The guards are fighting back with physical force. The scene descends into total chaos.
descriptions.relation: The owners and guards are in direct physical combat.
descriptions.outcome: A chaotic fight ensues.

descriptions.title: Jiang
descriptions.scene: Jiang remains silent and motionless during the brawl. She slowly approaches Jiangci, who is lying in a pool of blood holding a gun. The video ends, leaving only the raw enmity between the residents and the killers of their families.
descriptions.intent: Jiang wants to observe the aftermath of the video. She moves toward the fallen person.
descriptions.conflict: The deep-seated hatred between the victims' families and the killers.
descriptions.relation: Jiang is an observer/participant in the aftermath of the crime.
descriptions.outcome: The tension remains unresolved as the video concludes.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang attempts to rush forward to seize a bone-cutting knife from Sun Zhentao. Before he can reach the weapon, Ye Qing intercepts him and grabs him.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants to disarm Sun Zhentao. He wants to use the knife to fight.
descriptions.conflict: Ye Qing physically prevents him from reaching the knife.
descriptions.relation: Ye Qing acts as an obstacle to Guan Shangyang.
descriptions.outcome: Guan Shangyang is restrained.

descriptions.title: Ye Qing
descriptions.scene: Ye Qing pulls out a sharp, glowing dagger. He looks at Guan Shangyang with cold, ruthless eyes. He quickly and precisely throws the dagger at Guan Shangyang's chest.
descriptions.intent: Ye Qing wants to neutralize Guan Shangyang. He intends to strike a precise, debilitating blow.
descriptions.conflict: Guan Shangyang's physical resistance and rage.
descriptions.relation: Ye Qing is attacking Guan Shangyang.
descriptions.outcome: The dagger hits an acupuncture point on Guan Shangyang's chest.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang feels intense pain, numbness, and paralysis spreading through his body as the dagger hits. His muscles contract and his strength vanishes. Ye Qing grabs him by the collar and begins twisting the knife inside the wound.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang is struggling to survive the pain. Ye Qing intends to torture him.
descriptions.conflict: The physical agony of the knife being rotated in his flesh. The loss of bodily control.
props: The dagger embedded in his chest
descriptions.relation: Ye Qing is torturing Guan Shangyang.
descriptions.outcome: Guan Shangyang breaks under the pain and begins to confess.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Under the extreme torture, Guan Shangyang screams for mercy and begins to confess. He reveals that Lu Dahun ordered the operations and that they have been breaking into other buildings and framing owners to steal resources.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants the torture to stop. He wants to save his own life.
descriptions.conflict: The physical torture by Ye Qing. The weight of his own guilt.
descriptions.relation: Guan Shangyang is a prisoner/victim of Ye Qing's interrogation.
descriptions.outcome: He exposes the conspiracy involving Lu Dahun and Jiangci.

descriptions.title: Guan Shangyang
descriptions.scene: Guan Shangyang reveals that Jiangci proposed the idea of using others' weapons to commit murders to reduce the number of troublesome owners. He concludes by cursing Jiangci and Lu Dahun.
descriptions.intent: Guan Shangyang wants to finish his confession and vent his final rage. He wants to implicate the true masterminds.
descriptions.conflict: The ongoing physical pain and the realization of the betrayal.
descriptions.relation: Guan Shangyang identifies Jiangci and Lu Dahun as the true villains.
descriptions.outcome: The truth about the systematic murders and framing is revealed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi recalls the strategy of using others' weapons to kill to avoid troublesome owners. She acknowledges her role in the scheme. The memory of the past violence resurfaces.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qally wants to justify the survival tactics used by the group. She seeks to rationalize the use of deception.
descriptions.conflict: The moral weight of the "devil's" influence on her actions. The consequences of their past crimes are catching up.
descriptions.state: Reflective and burdened by past sins.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qiqi is a participant in the group's criminal activities.
descriptions.outcome: The realization of the inevitable execution of her people.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan hears Jiang Qiqi's name and experiences a physical tremor. Jiang Yan approaches the incapacitated Jiang Qiqi. Jiang Yan places a heavy foot on Jiang Qiqi's shoulder blade.

location.name: A room with a pool of blood

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confront or punish Jiang Qiqi. He seeks answers or retribution.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Qiqi is physically broken and unable to resist. The physical pressure of Jiang Yan's foot causes bone-breaking pain.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is vengeful and heavy-handed; Jiang Qiqi is in shock and excruciating pain.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the aggressor; Jiang Qiqi is the victim.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qiqi's bones break, and she begins to vomit blood.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi, in a desperate attempt to survive, reveals a secret about Jiang Yan's mother. She claims Song Deming killed her during a sea dispute over a will. She blames Song Deming for throwing the mother to sharks.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi wants to save her own life by providing information. She aims to shift the blame to Song Deming.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's intense rage vs. Jiang Qiqi's desperate lies. The truth is a heavy burden.
descriptions.state: Jiang Qiqi is trembling and weak; Jiang Yan is listening with intense focus.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qiqi is pleading; Jiang Yan is the judge.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is momentarily stunned by the revelation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan feels a surge of murderous rage upon hearing the secret. He struggles to control his impulse to strangle Jiang Qiqi. He experiences deep emotional pain and sheds tears.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to kill Jiang Qiqi in a fit of rage. He also wants to process his grief.
descriptions.conflict: His internal struggle to maintain control despite his overwhelming fury. The physical presence of the dying woman.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is mentally unstable, furious, and weeping.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the perpetrator of the impending violence; Jiang Qiqi is the victim.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan manages to restrain his immediate impulse to strangle her but remains emotionally broken.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a bone-cleaver knife to attack Jiang Qiqi. He slices her face and moves the blade into her body. He whispers a final, chilling revelation about the knife's origin.

location.name: The crime scene
location.description: near the wounded Jiang and Qiqi

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to execute Jiang Qiqi. He wants to ensure she suffers and knows the truth.
descriptions.conflict: The physical act of mutilation. The psychological horror of the revelation.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is cold and "devilish"; Jiang Qiqi is experiencing the sensation of being cut.
props: A bone-cleaver knife from Song Deming's villa
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the executioner; Jiang Qiqi is the victim.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qiqi's head is partially severed, and she loses consciousness.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi's consciousness fades as she feels herself being thrown from a window. She falls through the air amidst rain and wind. She experiences the sensation of her body breaking apart during the fall.

location.name: Mid-air
location.description: falling from a window into a body of water

descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi is unable to act, only experiencing the fall.
descriptions.conflict: Gravity and the impact of the fall. The physical destruction of her body.
descriptions.state: Jiang Qiqi is disoriented, dying, and feeling her body disintegrate.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She plunges into murky, polluted water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qiqi
descriptions.scene: Jiang Qiqi's body lands in murky water filled with debris and corpses. Leeches and mollusks begin to crawl over her wounds to suck her blood. Rodents begin to gnaw on her flesh and bones.

location.name: Murky
location.description: polluted water filled with waste and corpses

descriptions.intent: Jiang Qiqi's consciousness is driven by a primal urge to survive/reunite.
descriptions.conflict: The predatory creatures attacking her remains. The physical agony of being eaten alive.
descriptions.state: Jiang/Qiqi is in a state of death/near-death, experiencing extreme physical violation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Qiqi's spirit/consciousness resolves to reunite with her family in the underworld.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan closes the window in the hallway. He stands alone, taking deep breaths to steady himself. He wipes away his tears and prepares to return home.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to regain composure. He seeks to move past the traumatic event.
descriptions.conflict: The lingering trauma of the murder and the secret he learned.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is exhausted, grieving, and trying to be resolute.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan walks away toward his home.

descriptions.title: Jiang Qimin
descriptions.scene: The aftermath of the battle in the hallway is revealed. The group led by Liu Dahun has been decimated. Jiang Qimin is the sole survivor of the main group, though he is injured.

location.name: A hallway covered in blood and signs of battle

descriptions.intent: The characters were engaged in a fight for survival/dominance.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming strength of Sun Zhentao and E Qin against Liu Dahun's group.
descriptions.state: Jiang Qimin is injured and limping; the scene is chaotic and bloody.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Qimin is a survivor and former accomplice.
descriptions.outcome: Liu Dahun's group is destroyed, leaving Jiang Qimin as the lone, limping survivor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Cheng
descriptions.scene: The three strongest men in Huamiaoze have died, leaving Jiang Cheng as the sole survivor. He is a former accomplice of the wicked Liu Dahun and his gang. Despite his past, his character was considered decent, though he suffers from a limp.

location.name: Huamiaoze
location.description: a place marked by recent violent deaths

descriptions.intent: Jiang Cheng seeks to survive the aftermath of the massacre. He carries the weight of his past associations with criminals. He must navigate the new social order.
descriptions.conflict: He is the only survivor of a powerful group. His past connection to a criminal gang threatens his reputation. He is physically impaired by a limp.
descriptions.relation: Survivor of the fallen group
descriptions.outcome: He remains alive but is the lone remnant of a powerful faction.

descriptions.title: Gao Da Juan and Group
descriptions.scene: Gao Da Juan and his group are causing ongoing conflicts with remaining owners. They are witnessed committing brutal murders of the 2003 group and the Hechun Mei family. The atmosphere is filled with terror and bloodlust.

location.name: Residential area
location.description: near the site of recent murders

descriptions.intent: Gao Da Juan intends to exert dominance through violence. He seeks to eliminate rivals and expand his influence. His actions are driven by unchecked aggression.
descriptions.conflict: The remaining owners are terrified by his brutality. The lack of law and morality allows his violence to escalate. He faces the tension of a lawless society.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor towards the remaining owners
descriptions.outcome: The community is plunged into chaos and fear.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Amidst the sounds of violence, screams, and crying children, Jiang Yan decides to withdraw from the chaos. She moves through the chaotic crowd to reach her home. She enters her apartment and locks the door.

location.name: A chaotic street transitioning to a private apartment

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to escape the external violence. She seeks to secure her personal safety. She intends to isolate herself from the unfolding apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The external world is filled with uncontrollable violence and noise. The crowd is chaotic and dangerous. She must navigate through the unrest to reach safety.
descriptions.state: Determined to avoid interference, focused on self-preservation.
descriptions.relation: Observer and escapee from the chaos
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the safety of her home.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After entering her home, Jiang Yan activates the anti-intrusion security system to the maximum level. She collapses onto her sofa. The silence of her soundproofed home contrasts sharply with the external mayhem.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her home is impenetrable. She seeks to create a sanctuary from the outside world. She intends to rest after the tension.
descriptions.conflict: The external world is a source of extreme psychological pressure. The security system must be set to maximum to combat the threat. The silence highlights her isolation.
descriptions.state: Physically and emotionally exhausted, experiencing a release of tension.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves temporary isolation and physical rest.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: As the silence settles, Jiang Yan's body begins to shake uncontrollably due to the release of intense stress. She reflects on the fact that she has directly killed a person for the first time. She realizes this is not her last kill in this apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan struggles to process her recent trauma. She accepts the reality of her new life in the apocalypse. She prepares herself for future violence.
descriptions.conflict: Her body reacts physically to the trauma of murder. The realization of her loss of innocence creates internal turmoil. The environment is inherently lethal.
descriptions.state: Trembling, traumatable, yet becoming desensitized to violence.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She accepts her role as a survivor who will kill again.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the severe weather outside, noting the lightning, thunder, and heavy rain. She acknowledges that the apocalypse is only beginning. She decides to use her invincible space and vast supplies to her advantage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare for the ongoing apocalypse. She intends to utilize her unique resources. She seeks to maintain a position of advantage over others.
descriptions.conflict: The weather is violent and threatening. The apocalypse presents a continuous threat to survival. She must overcome the impulse to grieve and focus on utility.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She shifts from a state of grief to a state of readiness.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her special dimension/space at 2:00 PM. She observes her blood-stained body and her blood-soaked fingerless combat gloves. She notes that her black combat gear hides most of the blood.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan enters her space to clean herself. She intends to assess the damage to her gear. She seeks to maintain her hygiene despite the chaos.
descriptions.conflict: Her body and clothing are covered in blood from recent combat. The time has passed her usual mealtime, and she lacks appetite. The physical evidence of violence is everywhere.
descriptions.state: Tired, lacking appetite, physically bloodied.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Black combat uniform, black fingerless combat gloves, black mask.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to clean herself and her gear.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan heads to the bathroom in her "Apple Cabin" to prepare a bath. She starts the water in a heart-shaped jacuzzi. She then goes to the wardrobe to change out of her soiled clothes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to wash away the blood and filth. She intends to change into clean clothing. She seeks physical comfort through a warm bath.
descriptions.conflict: Her current clothing is covered in blood and flesh. The task of cleaning is necessary for her mental well-being. She must manage her supplies efficiently.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Black combat uniform covered in blood and flesh, black fingerless gloves, black mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The bath is prepared and she begins the cleaning process.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts the dirty clothes into the washing machine with specialized detergent for blood and sterilization. She then returns to the bathroom to enjoy the hot water.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to sanitize her gear. She intends to complete the cleaning process. She seeks to relax in the prepared jacuzzi.
descriptions.conflict: The clothes are heavily stained with blood and organic matter. She must use specific chemicals to ensure sterilization. The physical exhaustion requires a hot soak.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The clothes are being cleaned, and she prepares for her bath.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sits in the heart-shaped jacuzzi, noting the lack of rose petals in the water. She realizes her dried roses are not as good as fresh ones. She decides against a milk bath and considers a green tea bath instead.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enhance her bath experience. She intends to find a way to make the water more pleasant. She seeks to avoid scents that she currently finds unappealing.
descriptions.conflict: The water feels empty without fresh flowers. Her dried roses lack the necessary impact. She is repulsed by the idea of a milk bath due to her current state.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She contemplates different types of tea for her next bath.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates various tea-based baths, specifically rejecting milk baths and considering green tea options like West Lake Longjing and others. She evaluates the quality of the organic teas in her space.

location.name: Jiang Yan's private space
location.description: filled with high-quality organic teas and medicinal herbs

descriptions.intent: She wants to find the most suitable bath for her current needs. She evaluates the sensory properties of various tea types.
descriptions.conflict: She finds the scent of milk baths unappe and the tea baths too plain for the current weather.
props: medicinal herbs like ginseng and mugwort
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She rejects the milk and tea bath ideas in favor of a new concept.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the rainy and cold weather outside her space and decides that a red wine bath is the perfect solution. She reasons that the heat will open her pores and the wine's polyphenols will improve circulation.
descriptions.intent: She wants to find a bath that provides physiological and psychological benefits. She seeks to alleviate stress and fatigue.
descriptions.conflict: The external weather is damp and cold, which she must counteract.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She settles on the idea of a red wine bath.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan calculates the cost and logistics of using three bottles of expensive Cheval Blanc red wine from her inventory. She realizes the bath is extremely expensive but decides the cost is worth the benefit.
descriptions.intent: She wants to execute the red wine bath plan. She needs to manage her inventory and budget.
descriptions.conflict: The wine is very expensive, costing 24,000 yuan in total, and the time limit for soaking is short.
props: Three bottles of Cheval Blanc red wine
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to proceed with the expensive bath.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses an electric corkscrew to open the bottles and pours the wine into the bath. The water turns a light wine color, and the room fills with a fragrant white mist.
descriptions.intent: She wants to prepare the bath. She aims to transform the water into a therapeutic medium.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The bath is successfully prepared.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan washes the blood from her face and hands and enters the bath. She closes her eyes and allows the warm, powerful water to massage her body.

location.name: Bathtub
location.description: filled with wine-colored water and mist

descriptions.intent: She wants to clean herself and relax. She seeks to wash away the physical and mental remnants of recent violence.
descriptions.conflict: She is still carrying the physical traces of blood on her skin.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins the soaking process.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: After soaking, Jiang Yan feels her fatigue and depression vanishing under the influence of the bath and her special space. She experiences a sense of spiritual enrichment.
descriptions.intent: She wants to achieve mental and physical recovery.
descriptions.conflict: She was previously suffering from exhaustion and psychological pressure.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Her fatigue and depression disappear.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan exits the bath after twenty minutes, feeling sweaty. She takes a shower and returns to the living room wearing a white robe.
descriptions.intent: She wants to finish her bathing routine and return to her normal activities. She seeks to clean herself thoroughly.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.state: Physically refreshed but physically warm from the bath.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She sits on the sofa to rest.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: While sitting on the sofa, Jiang Yan feels a strange, small sensation in her palm, similar to the activation of her "Golden Finger" during her rebirth. She realizes something is moving under her skin.
descriptions.intent: She tries to identify the source of the sensation. She investigates the movement in her hand.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected and mysterious physical sensation interrupts her rest.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the sensation as something trying to escape her palm.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers the Piranha Plant, which became dormant after killing Sundemin and Jangkai. She reflects on her fear that her space's powers might disappear like the plant did.
descriptions.intent: She tries to recall the history of her abilities. She contemplates the stability of her "Golden Finger."
descriptions.conflict: The fear of losing her invincible space and the uncertainty of her powers.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She contemplates the possibility of the plant's reactivation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wonders if the blood on her hands from earlier triggered the reactivation of the Piranha Plant. She rubs her palm with her thumb to feel the movement.
descriptions.intent: She wants to test if the blood was the catalyst for the plant's awakening. She seeks to understand the mechanism of her power.
descriptions.conflict: She is unsure if the blood-based activation is a known method.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues to monitor the sensation in her hand.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao and Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Outside the room, Sun Jizhentao and Yiqing lead survivors to clean the battlefield on the 32nd floor. They are collecting bodies and body parts from the corridor.
descriptions.intent: They want to clear the battlefield of remains. They are performing the "cleaning" task.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of gruesome remains and body parts.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jiznetic and Yiqing are leading the survivors.
descriptions.outcome: The battlefield is being cleared of the dead.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Jizhentao and Yu Qing lead the surviving owners to clear the battlefield on the 32nd floor. They begin the grim task of collecting corpses and body parts from the corridor. The survivors distribute bloody weapons to everyone for self-defense.

location.name: 32nd floor corridor
location.description: a blood-stained hallway filled with remains of the recent battle.

descriptions.intent: Sun Jizhentao wants to clean the battlefield and secure the area. He aims to organize the survivors to manage the aftermath of the fight. He seeks to provide weapons for protection.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of corpses and body parts makes disposal difficult. The surrounding water level is rising, making it impossible to throw everything out the window.
descriptions.state: Determined but burdened by the grim reality of the task.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jizhentao is leading the survivors alongside Yu Qing.
descriptions.outcome: The survivors begin the process of clearing the corridor, but the task is overwhelming.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao
descriptions.scene: The survivors throw the bodies out of the windows into the water below. The water area around the building has become a mass of stagnant, rotting white corpses. The sight is increasingly repulsive and unmanageable.

location.name: 32nd floor
location.description: near the windows overlooking the rising water.

descriptions.intent: The survivors want to dispose of the remains to prevent further decay. They seek the easiest way to remove the biological hazard.
descriptions.conflict: The water below is already filled with bloated, rotting bodies. The rising water level prevents further easy disposal.
descriptions.state: Disturbed and physically repulsed by the sight of the rotting mass.
descriptions.relation: The group works together in a shared state of horror.
descriptions.outcome: The area becomes a graveyard of floating, decomposing flesh.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao
descriptions.scene: The residents of the lower floors, who have barricaded their corridors, feel a strong intuitive dread. They realize they cannot live in constant panic and nausea near the decaying remains. They vote unanimously to reject the idea of keeping the bodies near their living quarters.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to avoid the psychological trauma of the smell and sight of death. They aim to prevent the decay from affecting their living space.
descriptions.conflict: The 32nd floor is adjacent to Jianyan's living room, creating a logistical dilemma. There is a fear of retaliation if Jianyan is dissatisfied with the decision.
descriptions.state: Anxious and fearful of the physical and social consequences.
descriptions.relation: The residents are united in their fear of the corpses and the potential anger of Jianyan.
descriptions.outcome: A decision is reached to move the bodies, though the tension remains high.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizmentsao
descriptions.scene: The group decides to move the bodies to the 31st floor, specifically into He Chunmei's house. They plan to burn the remains once kerosene is found. They rely on the heavy rain and lack of light to prevent an accidental fire.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to temporarily store the bodies in a way that is manageable. They plan to incinerate them later using kerosene.
descriptions.conflict: The residents of the 31st floor object to the presence of the bodies. They are also traumatized by having witnessed the recent violence through door cracks.
descriptions.state: Stressed and pressured by the proximity of the dead.
descriptions.relation: The 31st floor residents are in direct conflict with the decision-makers.
descriptions.outcome: The bodies are moved to the 31st floor, creating tension among the neighbors.

descriptions.title: Yu Qing
descriptions.scene: Yu Qing recalls information from his previous torture of Guan Sangyang regarding kerosene supplies. He reveals that Luda Hong's group has several 1000ml barrels of kerosene on the 17th floor. This provides a potential solution for the burning plan.
descriptions.intent: Yu Qing wants to provide a way to execute the plan to burn the bodies. He aims to use the information gained from interrogation to aid the group.
descriptions.conflict: The group needs to find and retrieve the kerosene from a different floor.
descriptions.relation: Yu Qing acts as a source of vital information for the group.
descriptions.outcome: A plan for the eventual disposal of the bodies via fire is solidified.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Jizhentao goes to He Chunmei's house to find a dirty cotton mop. He extends it out the window to soak it in the rainwater. He begins wiping the dried bloodstains from the floor tiles and walls.
descriptions.intent: Sun Jizhentao wants to clean the bloodstains from the floor. He aims to reduce the visual horror of the "hell on earth" corridor.
descriptions.conflict: The bloodstains are dried and difficult to remove. There is no running water available to wash the floor.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and focused on the manual labor.
descriptions.relation: He is working alone in this specific task.
descriptions.outcome: The mop becomes heavily stained with blood, but the visual impact of the blood is slightly reduced.

descriptions.title: Yu Qing
descriptions.scene: Yu Qing follows Sun Jizhentao's lead by grabbing sheets from the master bedroom of He Chunmei's house. He uses the damp mop to wipe the remaining bloodstains. Despite the effort, the corridor still looks like a scene from hell.
descriptions.intent: Yu Qing wants to assist in the cleaning process. He aims to cover or wipe away the remaining traces of the battle.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer amount of blood and the lack of cleaning supplies make the task nearly impossible.
descriptions.relation: Yu Qing is working alongside Sun Jizhentao.
descriptions.outcome: The bloodstains are lessened, but the corridor remains visually traumatizing.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai, who had been hiding, emerges from her hiding place and enters the corridor. The intense smell of blood hits her, and she immediately covers her mouth to prevent vomiting. She sees her husband, Sun Jizhentional, working in the blood.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to check on her husband. She aims to overcome her physical revulsion to reach him.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming stench and sight of the blood cause her to gag and feel nauseated.
descriptions.relation: She is the wife of Sun Jizhentao and seeks to reunite with him.
descriptions.outcome: She manages to reach her husband despite her physical illness.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai and Sun Jizhentao embrace each other tightly in the middle of the corridor. They do not speak, simply holding each other in the aftermath of the violence. They begin eating dog food to satisfy their intense hunger.
descriptions.intent: They want to find comfort and physical connection after the trauma. They also need to satisfy their starvation.
descriptions.conflict: They are surrounded by death and extreme hunger.
descriptions.relation: They are a married couple seeking solace in each other.
descriptions.outcome: They find a moment of silent connection and temporary sustenance.

descriptions.title: Tianzilang
descriptions.scene: Tianzilang, a former investor, approaches the group with a look of uncertainty. He asks Sun Jizhentao what the next steps should be. The rest of the leaderless crowd looks to Sun Jizhentao with desperate hope.
descriptions.intent: Tianzilang wants direction for the group. He seeks leadership to resolve the current chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The group is leaderless and lacks a clear plan for the future.
descriptions.relation: Tianzilang acts as a representative of the confused survivors.
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of uncertainty, waiting for a decision.

descriptions.title: Sun Jizhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Jizhentao looks at his worried wife and decides that they should all return to their respective homes to find their families. He expresses a desire to abandon his role as a leader to focus on personal reunion.
descriptions.intent: Sun Jizhentao wants to retreat from the front lines and return to a domestic life. He aims to reunite with his wife and find peace.
descriptions.conflict: His previous role as a leader and the ongoing crisis pull him toward responsibility.
descriptions.relation: He is communicating his decision to his wife and the group.
descriptions.outcome: He proposes a retreat to their individual homes.

descriptions.title: Yu Qing
descriptions.scene: Yu Qing interrupts the moment of retreat with a cold, calculated suggestion. He proposes that they should use the current momentum to find and raid Luda Hong's supply warehouse. He warns the group to stay vigilant.
descriptions.intent: Yu Qing wants to seize the opportunity to secure more supplies. He aims to turn the current chaos into a strategic advantage.
descriptions.conflict: This plan requires a new, dangerous mission that contradicts the desire to hide.
descriptions.relation: Yu Qing challenges the idea of passive retreat with a proactive, aggressive plan.
descriptions.outcome: The group is left contemplating a new, high-stakes objective.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing delivers a warning about finding Liu Dahun's supply warehouse while advising the group to strike while the iron is hot. He observes the group with cold eyes and comments on his own quiet nature despite his deep knowledge. The group listens to his strategic assessment of the situation.

location.name: An unspecified location where the group is gathered
location.description: likely a safe zone or meeting point

descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to motivate the group to act immediately. He aims to prevent others from stealing the supplies later. He wants to utilize the current window of opportunity.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of others finding the warehouse first. The uncertainty of the apocalyptic environment.
descriptions.relation: Yiq

descriptions.title: Tian Zelian
descriptions.scene: Tian Zelian takes the initiative to organize the group by instructing Miss Jiang to clear a portion of the supplies and delegating the rest to Sun Zhentao. He uses his words to establish himself as the leader of the group. The others feel compelled to follow his lead due to his authoritative manner.

location.name: A communal area near the supplies

descriptions.intent: Tian Zelian wants to assert his leadership and organize the distribution of resources. He aims to create a structured plan for the group to follow.
descriptions.conflict: The group needs a clear direction to avoid chaos. The presence of a potential threat or power struggle is implied.
descriptions.relation: Tian Zelian establishes dominance over the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group accepts his leadership and begins the task of moving supplies.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: Several people stand up and begin moving Jiang's supplies to a separate area. They open boxes, recount the contents, and redistribute the items. The narrator and Mr. Xiao find materials to use for packing and shipping the goods.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to organize and redistribute the supplies efficiently. They aim to prepare the items for transport.
descriptions.conflict: The supplies are scattered and need careful counting and re-packing.
descriptions.relation: The group works together under the direction of the leaders.
descriptions.outcome: The supplies are successfully recounted and set aside for redistribution.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Sudai and Yiqing emerge from a small bedroom carrying large rolls of uncut wire, adhesive tape, and snake-skin bags for construction debris. They have been searching for additional useful materials in the empty apartment.

location.name: A small bedroom in an empty apartment

descriptions.intent: Sudai and Yiqing want to find more useful resources to aid in the transport of supplies. They are scavenging for construction-related materials.
descriptions.conflict: The apartment is empty of its owner, and they must search through piles of debris.
descriptions.relation: They act as independent scavengers within the larger group.
descriptions.outcome: They find essential items that will make transporting the supplies easier.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: The group discusses the distribution of supplies while others continue to search the rooms for more resources. The narrator notes the difficulty of transporting materials back to their floors due to the lack of electricity and the physical distance.

location.name: Various rooms in the apartment building
location.description: including a room with wires, drywall, and putty

descriptions.intent: The group wants to find as many supplies as possible. They aim to complete the collection process quickly.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of moving heavy or scattered items across multiple floors without electricity. The high temperature has also damaged the adhesive on the tape.
descriptions.relation: The group is working toward a common goal of resource accumulation.
descriptions.outcome: They identify the tools needed to bundle the supplies together.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: The members of the group receive their portions of the supplies. They pause to drink mineral water, being careful not to drink too much at once due to the scarcity of clean water.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to replenish their energy and hydration. They aim to manage their water reserves carefully.
descriptions.conflict: Severe water scarcity and the need to ration every drop.
descriptions.relation: A shared moment of survival and communal rationing.
descriptions.outcome: The supplies are successfully packed and ready for transport.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Tian Zelian
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao prepares to deliver Jiang's supplies, which are two to three times larger than the others. Tian Zelian, living on a higher floor, volunteers to help him carry them, though others suspect he is actually supervising to ensure no one steals the extra goods.

location.name: The hallway/stairwell area near the 17th floor

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to complete the delivery of the large supply load. Tian Zelian wants to assist while maintaining oversight of the resources.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of the supplies is much larger than usual. There is underlying distrust regarding the theft of extra supplies.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is burdened; Tian Zelian is watchful.
descriptions.relation: Tian Zelian acts as a supervisor/overseer to Sun Zhentao.
descriptions.outcome: The team begins the trek to move the supplies.

descriptions.title: Tian Zelian
descriptions.scene: As the team starts moving, Tian Zelian suddenly stops in his tracks. He reaches up to adjust his gold-rimmed glasses, realizing that one of the temples is broken from the recent chaos.
descriptions.intent: Tian Zelian wants to fix his glasses so he can see clearly. He is trying to understand what has blocked his path.
descriptions.conflict: His vision is obscured by broken eyewear. An unexpected physical obstacle blocks the path.

outfits.Tian Zelian: Gold-rimmed glasses with a broken temple.

descriptions.relation: He is leading the group.
descriptions.outcome: He stops the entire procession to address the broken glasses and the obstruction.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, The Group
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao approaches Tian Zelian and sighs as he sees that the fire door leading to the pedestrian staircase is completely blocked. A group of elderly people and children are sitting on the cold floor, blocking the way.

location.name: The area in front of the blocked fire door

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to proceed with the supply delivery. The group wants to pass through the door.
descriptions.conflict: A crowd of vulnerable people (the elderly and children) is physically obstructing the path. The door is closed.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is weary and resigned.
props: Food and water in the hands of the group members
descriptions.relation: The group encounters a new social conflict with the residents.
descriptions.outcome: The group is halted by the presence of the residents.

descriptions.title: The Residents, The Group
descriptions.scene: The group of elderly and children, ranging from ages 4 to 70, looks up as the people from apartment 1704 emerge with food and water. Their eyes narrow with suspicion before brightening with hope upon seeing the supplies.
descriptions.intent: The residents are waiting/surviving in the heat. The group wants to pass through.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the hungry/thirsty residents and the group carrying the resources.
descriptions.state: The residents are exhausted and hungry; the group is carrying the means of survival.
descriptions.relation: A moment of recognition and shifting emotion from suspicion to hope.
descriptions.outcome: The arrival of the supplies creates a moment of intense emotional connection and potential conflict over resources.

descriptions.title: Protagonist
descriptions.scene: The protagonist observes a group of people emerging from the year 1704 carrying food and water. He notices the fire door, which was previously open, is now tightly closed. He feels a sudden sense of dread upon seeing bloodstains on their bodies and weapons.
descriptions.intent: The protagonist wants to assess the safety of the approaching group. He seeks to understand if they are a threat to the group's survival.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of blood and weapons on the newcomers creates immediate tension. The closed fire door suggests a hidden danger behind the group.
descriptions.state: Anxious and physically recoiling due to the sight of violence.
descriptions.relation: The protagonist is wary of the newcomers.
descriptions.outcome: The protagonist realizes the group has likely been involved in a violent encounter.

descriptions.title: Protagonist
descriptions.scene: Liang observes the food and water clearly, noting that two children have already begun eating. The protagonist realizes that the group has become a target for others. He watches the elderly and children closely.

location.name: The corridor/stairwell area near the 17th floor

descriptions.intent: The protagonist wants to monitor the group's behavior. He attempts to process the sudden shift in the group's status from survivors to combatants.
descriptions.conflict: The group's hunger is driving them to eat despite the danger. The protagonist recognizes the vulnerability of their position.
descriptions.relation: The protagonist is observing the others with concern.
descriptions.outcome: The protagonist realizes the group is being hunted.

descriptions.title: Proteling
descriptions.scene: A heavy storm rages outside with lightning and thunder. The group decides to descend the stairs quietly to avoid attracting attention from other floor owners. They fear the chaos on the 32nd floor has alerted neighbors.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to move through the building without being detected. They aim to avoid confrontation with the owners of the 17th floor.
descriptions.conflict: The noise from the upper floors might have alerted nearby residents. The weather adds to the instability of the environment.
descriptions.relation: The group is working together in silence.
descriptions.outcome: They begin their descent, attempting to remain stealthy.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai steps forward politely toward the elderly group to ask them to clear the way. She uses a gentle tone to negotiate passage. Edjin watches her with eyes clouded by uncertainty.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to pass through the group without causing a fight. She aims to use politeness to avoid provoking the armed neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbors are armed and potentially dangerous. The tension between the two groups is palpable.

descriptions.title: Tian Zeliang
descriptions.scene: Tian Zeliang confronts the group of elders regarding their use of children as shields. He uses sarcasm to highlight the unfairness of their tactics. He accuses them of allowing children to perform cruel tricks to manipulate the adults.

location.name: A communal area
location.description: cold ground, near a metal fire door

descriptions.intent: To shame the elders for their unethical behavior. He wants them to stop using vulnerable groups for leverage. He seeks to defend the dignity of the adults.
descriptions.conflict: The elders are using children and the elderly as human shields. This prevents the adults from taking necessary action.
descriptions.state: Angry and sarcastic. He is deeply frustrated by the lack of morality.
descriptions.relation: Confrontational towards the elders
descriptions.outcome: He successfully points out the cruelty of their actions but fails to move them.

descriptions.title: Auntie Ye
descriptions.scene: Auntie Ye reacts aggressively to Tian Zeliang's accusations. She struggles to stand up due to numbness in her legs from sitting on the cold ground. Her movements are unsteady and she wobbles.
descriptions.intent: To defend her actions and challenge Tian Zeliang's words. She wants to assert her right to the supplies. She seeks to shift the blame back to the group.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical weakness and the accusation of being a thief. She is physically unstable due to poor circulation.
descriptions.state: Aggressive and defensive. She is physically frail and agitated.
descriptions.relation: Hostile towards Tian Zeliang
descriptions.outcome: She becomes physically unstable and visibly angry.

descriptions.title: Tian Zeliang
descriptions.scene: Tian Zeliang retorts to Auntie Ye by accusing her of being hypocritical. He points out that she is behaving poorly while blaming others for not providing paper. He insults her behavior directly.
descriptions.intent: To expose Auntie Ye's hypocrisy. He wants to call out her specific bad behaviors. He seeks to strip away her moral high ground.
descriptions.conflict: Auntie Ye's refusal to take responsibility for her actions. The verbal tension escalates.
descriptions.state: Insulting and blunt. He is no longer being gentle.
descriptions.relation: Escalating verbal conflict
descriptions.outcome: Auntie Ye is left choking on her words, her face turning red with rage.

descriptions.title: Sun Zintao
descriptions.scene: A loud metallic sound of someone hitting the fire door interrupts the argument. Sun Zintally attempts to redirect the conversation toward the distribution of supplies. He argues that the supplies were meant to be shared equally by the government.
descriptions.intent: To change the subject to a more manageable conflict. He wants to reclaim the supplies. He seeks to negotiate a fair distribution.
descriptions.conflict: The elders are hoarding supplies that were meant for everyone. The sudden noise creates a distraction.
descriptions.state: Trying to be a mediator. He is attempting to remain calm despite the chaos.

outfits.Sun Zintao: Not specified;Old Man=Not specified;Old Woman=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Negotiating with the elders
descriptions.outcome: He successfully shifts the topic to the supplies but the tension remains.

descriptions.title: Sun Zintao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zintao confronts the elders about hoarding the government-sent supplies. He demands to know why they are keeping the resources for themselves. He tries to use logic to persuade them to be fair.
descriptions.intent: To ensure the fair distribution of supplies. He wants the elders to release the hoard. He seeks to uphold the original government mandate.
descriptions.conflict: The elders have decided to keep the supplies for themselves. They are refusing to cooperate with the community.
descriptions.state: Determined and firm. He is losing his patience with their greed.

outfits.Sun Zintao: Not specified;Old Man=Not specified;Old Woman=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Accusatory towards the elders
descriptions.outcome: The elders remain unyielding in their greed.

descriptions.title: Sun Zintao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zintao realizes that negotiation is impossible because the other side wants to fight. He decides to take a forceful approach. He tells the elders to move out of the way or face his rudeness.
descriptions.intent: To clear the path to the supplies. He wants to bypass the blockade. He seeks to warn them of the consequences of staying.
descriptions.conflict: The elders are physically blocking the path. They are prepared to fight to keep the supplies.
descriptions.state: Resolute and stern. He is clenching his teeth in frustration.
descriptions.relation: Threatening the elders with force
descriptions.outcome: He issues a direct ultimatum to the group.

descriptions.title: Old Man Zhang
descriptions.scene: Old Man Zhang stands up slowly while leaning on his dragon-headed crutch. He threatens Sun Zintao, stating that they will not be intimidated. He declares that they are prepared to die to protect their loot.
descriptions.intent: To intimidate Sun Zintao. He wants to protect the supplies at all costs. He seeks to show that they have nothing to lose.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of death and physical confrontation. The elders are willing to use their lives as leverage.
descriptions.state: Defiant and unyielding. He is calm but dangerous.
descriptions.relation: Threatening Sun Zintao
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zintao is nearly overwhelmed by the old man's audacity.

descriptions.title: Tian Zeliang
descriptions.scene: Tian Zeliang reacts with shock to the old man's death threat. He almost jumps up in anger at the lack of respect shown to Sun Zintao. He observes that the elders show no emotion, having already calculated their profit.
descriptions.intent: To defend Sun Zintiously's dignity. He wants to protest the old man's disrespect. He seeks to understand the elders' cold calculation.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme lack of morality in the elders' behavior. The clash between respect and greed.
descriptions.state: Outraged and shocked. He is on the verge of physical action.
descriptions.relation: Opposing the old man's disrespect
descriptions.outcome: He realizes the elders are purely driven by self-interest.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing approaches Sun Zintao and whispers a plan into his ear. He has been quietly observing and discussing things with others in the back. He presents a grim perspective on the nature of the situation.
descriptions.intent: To provide a strategic alternative. He wants to change Sun Zintao's approach. He seeks to prepare him for a harder reality.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle of how to handle the unprincipled elders. The difficulty of the plan.
descriptions.state: Calm and calculating. He is focused on the long-term survival.
descriptions.relation: Advising Sun Zintao
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zintao listens with a confused and troubled expression.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing explains to Sun Zintao that kindness cannot feed the evil of human nature in the apocalypse. He compares the elders' actions to those of gangsters who use hostages. He argues that the elders are no different from criminals because they use their own families as shields.
descriptions.intent: To convince Sun Zintao to abandon his mercy. He wants to expose the true nature of the elders. He seeks to prepare Sun Zintao for a ruthless decision.
descriptions.conflict: The moral dilemma of being "good" versus being "effective." The comparison of neighbors to bandits.
descriptions.state: Cold, serious, and disillusioned. He is deeply scarred by past trauma.
descriptions.relation: Mentoring/Warning Sun Zintao
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zintao is left stunned by the weight of Yiqing's words.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing steps forward to face the crowd of elders. He adopts a cold tone and issues a final warning. He tells them he will count to three, and if they do not move, he will use force.
descriptions.intent: To clear the path through intimidation. He wants the elders to move voluntarily. He seeks to end the stalemate with a threat of violence.
descriptions.conflict: The physical blockade by the elders. The risk of a violent confrontation.
descriptions.state: Cold and menacing. He is prepared to act ruthlessly.
descriptions.relation: Threatening the elders
descriptions.outcome: He sets a countdown that forces a final confrontation.

descriptions.title: Yiqin
descriptions.scene: Yiqin ignores the emotional gaze of an individual and steps forward toward a group. He addresses the elderly man and woman with a cold tone, threatening to count to three if they do not clear the path. He asserts his bad temper and youth as a warning.

location.name: A corridor or public area near a fire door

descriptions.intent: Yiqin wants the elderly couple to move out of his way. He intends to intimidate them into compliance using a direct threat. He seeks to assert dominance over the group.
descriptions.conflict: The elderly couple refuses to move immediately, presenting an obstacle to his path. His aggressive attitude creates tension with the onlookers.
descriptions.relation: Yiqin is confrontational toward the elderly couple.
descriptions.outcome: The elderly couple is visibly frightened by his murderous aura but attempts to maintain a nonchalant facade.

descriptions.title: Yiqin
descriptions.scene: Yiqente makes a sudden hand gesture, signaling his group to advance. Before the elderly couple can react, the group physically grabs the elderly people by their collars and pulls them aside. The action happens instantly, bypassing any traditional martial ethics.

location.name: A corridor or public area near a fire door

descriptions.intent: Yiqin wants to clear the path physically. He intends to use his group to forcibly remove the obstacles. He aims to bypass the slow verbal negotiation.
descriptions.conflict: The elderly couple's presence blocks the path. The group's sudden physical intervention violates the expected social or martial etiquette.

outfits.Old Man: Not specified;Old Woman=Not specified;Group of Young People=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Yiqin leads his group to physically displace the elderly.
descriptions.outcome: The elderly couple is successfully moved out of the way through force.

descriptions.title: Yiqin
descriptions.scene: Yiqin turns toward a closed metal fire door and delivers a powerful kick to it. The impact is so strong that the sound of the iron door striking the narrator's head is heard through the door.

location.name: Near a closed metal fire door

descriptions.intent: Yiqin wants to vent his frustration or signal his presence. He intends to strike the door with maximum force. He seeks to demonstrate his physical power.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the fire door stands in his way. The narrator suffers a physical impact from the vibration/sound.
descriptions.relation: Yiqin acts aggressively toward the environment near the narrator.
descriptions.outcome: The door is struck heavily, causing a physical sensation of impact for the narrator.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan relaxes in a luxurious red wine bath while sitting on a sofa. She takes a moment to rest and contemplates her next moves. Suddenly, a long, continuous alarm signal begins to blare through the shelter.

location.name: A luxury room within a shelter
location.description: featuring a sofa and a bath area

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to rest and recover. She intends to find peace during the crisis. She seeks to plan her future actions.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected, loud, and persistent alarm interrupts her rest. The alarm signals an incoming emergency.
descriptions.state: Relaxed, then suddenly alert.|Outting: Jian Yan=A bathrobe, later changed into light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Her period of rest is interrupted by a high-priority emergency signal.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: SCENЕ: Jian Yan removes her bathrobe and changes into light athletic clothing. She prepares herself to leave the room to investigate the source of the alarm. She moves toward the exit of the shelter area.

location.name: Inside the shelter
location.description: moving from the bath area toward the living area

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to prepare for potential movement. She intends to dress appropriately for an emergency. She seeks to investigate the alarm.
descriptions.conflict: The alarm creates an urgent need to move. The transition from relaxation to readiness is forced by the siren.

outfits.Jian Yan: Initially in a bathrobe, then changes into light athletic clothing

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is ready to face the external environment.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan enters the living room and notices a significant drop in temperature. She observes that the air is much colder than when she first entered the shelter. She approaches a thermometer on the wall to check the readings.

location.name: The living room of the shelter

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to assess the environmental conditions. She intends to verify the temperature drop. She seeks to understand the severity of the weather change.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden drop in temperature threatens the stability of the shelter. The external environment is becoming increasingly hostile.
descriptions.state: Observant and concerned.|Outting: Jian Yan=Light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms that the outside temperature has dropped to 12 degrees Celsius while the inside is 20 degrees.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan analyzes the temperature difference and the insulation of her room. She realizes that the rapid cooling suggests an impending extreme cold wave following the rain. She recalls memories of disasters from her previous life, such as earthquakes and mutant insect invasions.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to predict future disasters. She intends to use her past knowledge to prepare. She seeks to evaluate the risk of the current weather pattern.
descriptions.conflict: The speed of the temperature drop indicates a massive, uncontrollable natural disaster. The memory of past horrors creates psychological pressure.
descriptions.state: Analytical and apprehensive.|Outting: Jian Yan=Light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the current disasters are more severe than those in her previous life.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan observes that heavy rain has already flooded the threshold of the house. She reflects on how most people fail to prepare for such crises due to a false sense of security. She notes that while some are prepared, very few are truly ready for the scale of this flood.

location.name: Near the entrance/threshold of the house

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to assess the flood level. She intends to reflect on human behavior during disasters. She seeks to understand the vulnerability of the population.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwaters threaten the structural integrity of the home. The lack of preparation in the general population creates a looming humanitarian crisis.
descriptions.state: Reflective and grim.|Outting: Jian Yan=Light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the extreme danger of the current flooding and the inadequacy of most people's preparations.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan contemplates the depletion of resources due to previous heatwaves and the current flooding. She realizes that the heavy rain and lightning have cut off all paths to finding new supplies. She understands that even boats are useless as the landscape has turned into an ocean.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to evaluate the availability of food and supplies. She intends to determine if scavenging is still possible. She seeks to understand the total isolation caused by the flood.
descriptions.conflict: The flood has submerged all potential supply locations. The extreme weather prevents any movement or navigation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes that all traditional methods of survival and scavenging are now impossible.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan moves toward the main bedroom to get a better view of the surroundings. She looks out toward the central garden and the RepLSB community buildings. She notices the water level is rising rapidly.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to monitor the rising water levels. She intends to observe the impact on the community. She seeks a vantage point to see the scale of the flood.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain is obstructing her vision. The rising water is a direct threat to the community buildings.
descriptions.state: Focused and determined.|Outting: Jian Yan=Light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She reaches a position where she can attempt to observe the external environment.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan uses a powerful telescope to look through the heavy rain. She observes that the water level has reached the twelfth floor of the opposite building. She sees dark, lifeless buildings and scattered figures moving upward or drifting in the water, some clearly dead.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to see past the rain. She intends to identify survivors or threats in the distance. She seeks to confirm the extent of the devastation.
descriptions.conflict: The torrential rain almost completely blocks her sight. The sight of death and chaos in the water is disturbing.
descriptions.state: Intense and observant.|Outting: Jian Yan=Light athletic clothing
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the catastrophic scale of the flood and the presence of both living and dead individuals in the water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the dark building opposite her from the twelfth floor. She notices scattered figures moving upward and some figures falling from windows. She concludes that some of these figures are alive while others are dead.

location.name: Building A
location.description: twelfth floor, overlooking a dark, lifeless building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the current state of the surrounding environment. She is monitoring the movement of people and the impact of the rain.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and the presence of dead bodies create a chaotic and dangerous environment. The uncertainty of life and death among the figures creates tension.
descriptions.relation: Observing strangers
descriptions.outcome: She gathers information about the ongoing survival struggle in the city.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts down her telescope and counts the time with her fingers. She calculates that the heavy rain will likely weaken when it reaches the sixteenth floor in about 2-3 days. She realizes this window of time is the only opportunity for survival.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to predict the weather patterns to plan her survival strategy. She is trying to determine the duration of the upcoming window of opportunity.
descriptions.conflict: The impending heavy rain and the rising water levels threaten to flood the city. The limited time for gathering supplies creates extreme pressure.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a timeline for the upcoming environmental catastrophe.

descriptions.title: Jiang and the environment
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the geographical vulnerability of Anmin, being a basin surrounded by mountains. She anticipates that in four days, heavy rains will cause mountain torrents to flood the city. She foresees a total apocalypse involving earthquakes, mutant insects, and extreme cold.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is mentally preparing for the sequence of disasters. She is analyzing the long-term risks of the changing climate.
descriptions.conflict: The geography of the city makes it a death trap for flooding and starvation. The subsequent arrival of cold and mutants poses an existential threat.
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the inevitability of the upcoming end-of-the-world scenario.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers her past life where she became food for the Sun Deming and Siasan families during the extreme cold. This memory causes her mood to darken significantly. She walks back to the living room and looks out the floor-to-ceiling window.

location.name: Living room of the shelter
location.description: looking out at the flooded city

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is processing traumatic memories while observing the current state of the city. She looks at the submerged shopping mall and the partially flooded high-rise apartments.
descriptions.conflict: Her traumatic past conflicts with her current survival efforts. The sight of the rising water serves as a reminder of the approaching danger.
descriptions.outcome: She is momentarily paralyzed by heavy memories.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: An alarm from the mobile energy storage cabinet interrupts Jiang Yan's dark thoughts. She approaches the cabinet located in the corner of the living room near a pillar. She turns off the main power switch.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to manage her power resources. She needs to address the alert from the energy storage system.
descriptions.conflict: The alarm interrupts her internal reflection and demands immediate action. The need to manage power is critical for her survival.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to interact with her spatial storage system.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns on the energy storage cabinet and mentally commands "Accept!" to place the cabinet into her spatial dimension. She then retrieves a fully charged battery to power her shelter's systems. She decides to wait for the monitoring and security systems to reboot before entering her space.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to transfer the energy cabinet into her space and ensure her shelter's security systems are functional. She aims to maintain the integrity of her defenses.
descriptions.conflict: The systems require a reboot period, meaning she cannot immediately retreat into her space. She must ensure the intrusion detection is working.
descriptions.outcome: The power is restored, and the monitoring systems begin to reboot.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the monitoring screens and sees several figures outside her door. She switches the monitor to single-pane mode to see them clearly. She observes a couple who appear exhausted and flushed.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the people outside her door. She is checking for potential threats or opportunities.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of strangers near her door creates a potential security risk. The unknown intentions of the people are a source of tension.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the individuals as a couple.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a tall young man in black standing alone near apartment 3202. He is the person who previously requested a phone for his girlfriend. He looks troubled, staring at the world outside the door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is analyzing the behavior and composition of the group outside. She is assessing whether they are a threat.
descriptions.conflict: The young man's presence and his solitary, brooding state create uncertainty. The group's proximity to her door is a direct confrontation with her privacy.
descriptions.relation: The young man is a known acquaintance from a previous interaction.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the group is not alone and is observing their state.

descriptions.title: Tian Ze Lian
descriptions.scene: Tian Ze Lian is unable to follow the group because his gold-rimmed glasses were broken by a stick during a breach on the 17th floor. Due to his extreme nearsightedness, he is forced to return home. The couple uses a loudspeaker with a dying battery to call out to Jiang Yan, offering supplies.
descriptions.intent: The couple wants to deliver supplies to Jiang Yan. Tian Ze Lian wants to navigate despite his visual impairment.
descriptions.conflict: Tian Ze Lian's broken glasses prevent him from moving with the group. The loudspeaker's low battery limits their ability to communicate.
descriptions.state: The couple is exhausted; Tian Ze Lian is visually impaired and struggling.
descriptions.relation: The couple is attempting to interact with Jiang Yan; Jiang Yan is observing them.
