descriptions.outcome: The couple successfully reaches her door to offer help, and Jiang Yan perceives them as non-threatening.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai and Sun Zhentao stand outside Jiang Yan's apartment door, shouting through a low-battery speaker to offer supplies. They announce their intention to bring food to Miss Jiang. The neighbors attempt to establish a connection despite the lack of previous interaction.

location.name: Hallway outside apartment 3.202
location.description: a corridor where voices echo through a speaker

descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to offer help and supplies to Jiang Yan. She aims to establish a friendly relationship with the neighbor. She wants to ensure Jiang Yan's well-being during the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The speaker has a low battery, making communication difficult. The characters are strangers with no prior social bond.
descriptions.state: Su Dai is proactive and friendly. Sun Zhentao is calm and composed.
descriptions.relation: Neighbors who have not previously interacted
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan hears them and decides to respond.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan performs an internal analysis of the neighbors' character based on their appearance and recent combat performance. She decides that having allies would be beneficial for her survival. She prepares to face the visitors.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to evaluate if the neighbors are a threat or an asset. She intends to decide whether to open the door. She seeks to maintain her security while considering social expansion.
descriptions.conflict: She must balance the need for security with the potential benefit of allies. Her internal caution conflicts with her strategic desire for help.
descriptions.state: Analytical and calculating. She is focused on survival.
descriptions.relation: Evaluating the neighbors
descriptions.outcome: She decides to open the door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan deactivates her high-voltage security system and puts on a mask. She approaches the door to meet the people outside. She remains cautious even as she prepares to interact.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to disable her defenses to allow entry. She intends to protect her identity using a mask. She aims to meet the neighbors safely.
descriptions.conflict: The security system is a barrier she must manually override. The mask serves as a barrier between her and the world.
descriptions.relation: Preparing to meet Su Dai and Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: She is ready to open the door.

descriptions.title: Su Dai, Sun Zhentao, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens the outer door, but the inner door remains locked. Su Dai reacts with joy upon seeing Jiang Yan. Sun Zhentao remains calm, while Ye Qing enters the leaking apartment 3.202.

location.name: The threshold of apartment 3.202
location.description: where the outer door is open but the inner door is closed

descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to greet Jiang Yan warmly. Sun Zhentao intends to enter the room. Ye Qing moves into the space.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the inner door prevents full access. The apartment itself is leaking, indicating environmental decay.
descriptions.state: Su Dai is excited. Sun Zhentable is calm. Ye Qing is surprised and cautious.
descriptions.relation: Su Dai is enthusiastic; Sun Zhentao is observant; Ye Qing is wary
descriptions.outcome: The group is now in close proximity at the doorway.

descriptions.title: Su Dai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Su Dai introduces herself, her husband Sun Zhentao, and their child Ye Qing, using poetic name meanings. She reveals her background from Suzhou and Qingshan Yuandai. Jiang Yan listens without expression.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to introduce her family and establish their identity. She aims to build rapport through detailed self-introduction. Jiang Yan intends to listen and process the information.
descriptions.conflict: The social tension of meeting strangers in a post-apocalyptic setting. The weight of their new identities.
descriptions.state: Su Dai is slightly nervous and eager. Jiang Yan is expressionless and polite.|Outrons: Jiang Yan knows their names and origins.

descriptions.title: Su Dai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Su Dai observes Jiang Yan's striking appearance, comparing her to a movie heroine. She feels an inexplicable surge of admiration and "love" for the beautiful, armed woman. She recognizes Jiang Yan from internet videos.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to connect with her idol. She intends to validate her recognition of Jiang Yan. She seeks to bridge the gap between a fan and a neighbor.
descriptions.conflict: The disparity between Jiang Yan's internet persona and her current, dangerous reality. The uncertainty of Jiang Yan's true identity.
descriptions.state: Su Dai is starstruck and emotionally moved. Jiang Yan remains stoic.
props: A pistol held by Jiang Yan
descriptions.relation: Su Dai becomes a fan/admirer of Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: Su Dai's internal affection for Jiang Yan grows.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Su Dai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao is shocked when Su Dai identifies the masked woman as the famous Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan nods, confirming her identity. Su Dai is momentarily stunned before trying to continue the conversation.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to verify the identity. Jiang Yan intends to confirm the truth. Su Dai wants to expand the conversation.
descriptions.conflict: The shock of realizing a celebrity is their neighbor. Sun Zhentao's attempt to interrupt the emotional outburst.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is bewildered. Su Dai is overwhelmed with joy. Jiang Yan is direct.
descriptions.relation: The tension of a revealed secret
descriptions.outcome: The identity of Jiang Yan is confirmed.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao interrupts Su Dai to state the purpose of their visit: bringing supplies. He is hungry and tired. Jiang Yan considers his request, noting she has excess supplies but wants to remain discreet.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to deliver supplies and finish the task. Jiang Yan wants to accept the supplies without revealing her true wealth. She intends to maintain her "no harm, no defense" philosophy.
descriptions.conflict: The struggle between the need for social interaction and the need for secrecy. The physical exhaustion of the visitors.
descriptions.state: Sun Zenta is tired and hungry. Jiang Yan is calculating.
descriptions.relation: A transactional interaction begins
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan does not refuse the supplies.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao helps move the supplies to the door, causing a cut on his hand to bleed. Jiang Yan notices the injury and asks if he has anti-inflammatory medicine. She observes the blood from his knife wound.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to complete the delivery. Jiang Yan wants to provide medical assistance. She intends to check his wound.
descriptions.conflict: The physical injury to Sun Zhentao. The sudden shift from a supply exchange to a medical concern.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is focused on the task. Jiang Yan is observant and helpful.
props: a knife that caused the wound
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan takes a caretaking role
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to retrieve medicine.

descriptions.title: Su Dai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Su Dai mentions she has expired amoxicillin from her previous life. Jiang Yan tells them to wait and retreats into her apartment. She closes both the outer and inner doors to access her medical supplies.

location.name: Inside apartment 3.202
location.description: moving from the door to the interior

descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to provide information about available medicine. Jiang Yan wants to retrieve specific medical items. She intends to secure her perimeter while she is away from the door.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of usable medicine from the neighbors. The need for Jiang Yan to move through her secure home alone.
descriptions.state: Su Dai is embarrassed about the expired medicine. Jiang Yan is efficient and focused.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is acting independently
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan enters her home to find supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves iodine, gauze, cotton swabs, and levofloxacin capsules from her storage. She uses her mental/spatial ability to access these items. She prepares to return to the door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find effective medication. She intends to treat Sun Zhentao's wound. She aims to be prepared for the medical task.
descriptions.conflict: The need to find the correct items quickly. The internal management of her supplies.
descriptions.outcome: She is ready to provide medical aid.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan tells Sun Jintao that something has expired, then closes the outer door and returns inside. She mentally retrieves a vial of iodine, gauze, cotton swabs, and levofloxacin capsules from her storage space. She prepares the medical supplies by opening the iodine, tearing the cotton, and extracting the capsules.

location.name: Jiang Yan's house
location.description: an indoor setting with an outer and inner door.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare a medical kit for the visitors. She intends to provide necessary first aid supplies without appearing too helpful.
descriptions.conflict: She must hide the true nature of her supplies to avoid suspicion.
descriptions.outcome: The medical kit is prepared and placed in a bag for delivery.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens the door and hands the bag of medicine to Sun Jintao. She lies, claiming she often gets injured and keeps these anti-inflammatory bandages at home as leftovers. She pretends the medicine is just excess from her own use to avoid being seen as overly charitable.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's house.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to give the medicine to Sun Jintao without revealing her true resources. She aims to maintain her habit of not providing unsolicited services.
descriptions.conflict: She cannot give the medicine openly without raising questions about her abundance.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is providing aid to Sun Jintao under a false pretext.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Jintao accepts the bag, and the exchange is completed.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao, Sudai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao reaches out to take the bag while Sudai looks at the medicine with surprise. Jiang Yan attempts to continue the conversation, but Sun Jintao secretly pulls Sudai's sleeve to stop her from talking further. Jiang Yan closes the door after the exchange.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's house.

descriptions.intent: Sun Jintao wants to end the interaction and move away. Sudai wants to continue socializing with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: Sun Jintao's desire to leave conflicts with Sudai's desire to chat.
descriptions.state: Sudai is surprised; Sun Jintao is decisive.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jintao exerts control over Sudai to prevent further interaction with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The interaction ends as Jiang Yan closes the door.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao, Yi Qin
descriptions.scene: Once the door is closed, Sun Jintao feels relieved and tells his wife, "Baby, let's go home." Yi Qin, who had stepped out to say goodbye, is stopped by Sun Jintao. Sun Jintao invites Yi Qin to come and live with them on their floor for protection.

location.name: The hallway outside Jiang Yan's house.

descriptions.intent: Sun Jintao wants to protect Yi Qin from potential threats on the floor. He aims to consolidate their group for safety.
descriptions.conflict: The surrounding environment is dangerous and unpredictable.
descriptions.state: Sun Jintario is relieved and protective.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jintao acts as a mentor/protector to Yi Qin.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Jintao proposes a living arrangement to Yi Qin.

descriptions.title: Yi Qin
descriptions.scene: Yi Qin pauses, showing a hint of gratitude in his cold eyes. He mentions that he has a tent on the 24th floor and is willing to live there to avoid flooding the 24th floor. He expresses his intention to stay in his own space to avoid being a burden.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qin wants to be self-sufficient and avoid causing trouble. He aims to minimize his impact on others.
descriptions.conflict: He is hesitant to accept help due to his current precarious situation.
descriptions.outcome: Yi Qin remains non-committal about moving in.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao insists that their families know each other well and that they should live together. Sudai adds that they have an empty nursery room prepared for him. She reveals that the room was decorated for a child she lost during a pregnancy complication.
descriptions.intent: Sun Jintao wants to persuade Yi Qin to move in. Sudai wants to offer a space and share her grief.
descriptions.conflict: The painful memory of the lost child creates a heavy atmosphere.
descriptions.state: Sudai is grieving and emotional; Sun Jintao is comforting.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jintao supports and comforts his wife Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: The offer of the nursery room is made, revealing a deep personal tragedy.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao reaches out and squeezes Sudai's hand to comfort her as she talks about the empty room. He then turns his attention back to Yi Qin, explaining the dangers of the current situation and the potential for resentment from neighbors. He argues that living together will make it easier to care for one another.
descriptions.intent: Sun Jintao wants to convince Yi Qin of the necessity of communal living. He aims to mitigate the risk of being targeted by others.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of neighbors forming a "team" to cause problems.
descriptions.state: Sun Jintao is serious and persuasive; Sudai is sorrowful.
descriptions.relation: Sun Jintao acts as a leader/persuader.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Jintao presents a logical argument for unity.

descriptions.title: Yi Qin
descriptions.scene: Yi Qin looks back at the closed door of apartment 3.201 and reflects for a moment. He finally agrees to the arrangement, saying he will trouble Sister Tao and Dai. Upon hearing this, Sun Jintao and Sudai feel a sudden sense of relief and joy.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qin decides to accept the invitation. He wants to find safety within the group.
descriptions.conflict: His internal deliberation regarding his independence versus safety.
descriptions.state: Yi Qin is thoughtful; Sun and Jintao are joyful.
descriptions.relation: Yi Qin joins the group's social circle.
descriptions.outcome: Yi Qin agrees to move in, relieving the tension for the couple.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her space, which is damp and cold, and decides not to turn on the air conditioner. She looks at the fresh green vegetables grown in her black soil and feels an appetite for the first time all day. She remembers that Old Bi Ji is preparing mutton and cabbage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to eat. She seeks nourishment after a day of fasting.
descriptions.conflict: The physical discomfort of the cold and damp environment.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to prepare a meal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares a hot pot with the fresh, crunchy vegetables from her inventory. She notes that the taste is extraordinary because they were just pulled from the earth. She contemplates the health benefits of eating "grounded" food.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy the fresh produce. She aims to benefit her body's magnetic field through nutrition.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to go outside to tend to more plants.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes a colorful plastic basin and puts on rubber boots. She descends to the ground to check on her plants. She observes that there are no insects in her space's plants, which brings her relief because she fears caterpillars and worms. She begins thinking about the fruit seedlings she has yet to plant.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to tend to her crops. She aims to expand her garden with fruit seedlings.
descriptions.conflict: Her intense fear of small insects like caterpillars and worms.
descriptions.outcome: She begins her gardening work while planning future plantings.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan contemplates the various insects, such as snakes, caterpillars, and worms, that inhabit her environment. She reflects on the potential danger of touching certain creatures.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to process her thoughts regarding the local fauna. She is evaluating the risks of the environment.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of potentially harmful insects and snakes poses a physical threat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She transitions from thinking about insects to thinking about her future crops.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan thinks about the fruit seedlings she has yet to plant. She recalls agricultural videos regarding the necessity of bee pollination for crops like apples, strawberries, and pumpkins.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to plan her future planting strategy. She seeks to understand the biological requirements for successful fruit production.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether her crops will bear fruit without bees creates internal doubt.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She considers the possibility of manual pollination using brushes.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan realizes that manual pollination with a brush would be an immense physical burden. She feels a profound lack of bees in her current situation.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to find an efficient way to pollinate her plants. She is evaluating the labor intensity of manual methods.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of bees makes the task of pollination much harder and more labor-intensive.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remembers the existence of a bee research institute in Anmin.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan recalls seeing a bee research institute and base on the outskirts of Anmin near a mountain slope. She wonders if the facility still exists after recent floods and landslides.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to verify if the bee base is still functional. She is searching for a potential source of bees.
descriptions.conflict: Recent natural disasters like floods and landslides might have destroyed the institute.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to focus on her immediate need for food instead.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan looks at the dirty green vegetables in her hand and decides that cooking is her priority because she hasn't eaten all day. She moves toward the kitchen.

location.name: Transitioning from the garden to the kitchen

descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to satisfy her hunger. She intends to clean her harvest and prepare a meal.
descriptions.conflict: Her hunger and the physical exhaustion of the day.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives at the kitchen to wash the vegetables.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan washes the freshly harvested cabbage and green seedlings in the kitchen. She then accesses her inventory to select ingredients.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to clean her produce and prepare a diverse meal. She seeks to utilize her stored supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The need to manage a large variety of ingredients.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a wide variety of meats, vegetables, and snacks available.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan reviews her inventory, which includes various meats like mutton, beef, and shrimp paste, as well as Lao snacks like quince cake. She notes the presence of a complete Shabu-shabu kit.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to plan a complex and delicious meal. She is selecting specific ingredients for a hot pot.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to prepare a traditional copper pot meal.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan prepares the copper pot using ice cubes, ginger, red dates, green onions, and red wine in mineral water. She sets it over a smokeless charcoal fire.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to create a high-quality broth base. She aims to preserve the original flavor of the ingredients.
descriptions.conflict: The challenge of creating a professional-grade broth base using simple methods.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The water begins to boil as she prepares the dipping sauces.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan prepares two types of dipping sauces. She makes a second, more complex sauce using spicy miso, fermented yogurt, sesame oil, peanuts, coriander, garlic, and balsamic vinegar.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to enhance the flavor of her meat. She seeks to create a sauce that maximizes the taste of the ingredients.
descriptions.conflict: The standard provided sauce with garlic flowers is not to her usual taste.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes the preparation of both sauces.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan finishes her meal and goes for a walk outside her house to admire her plants. Afterward, she returns to the audiovisual hall to continue her studies.
descriptions.intent: Dzyan Yan wants to enjoy the beauty of her garden and then resume her learning. She seeks relaxation and self-improvement.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes her meal and transitions to her educational goals.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finishes her meal and goes for a walk outside the Apple house to admire her planted flowers and plants. After her walk, she returns to the multi-functional audiovisual hall on the second floor to continue her training and study. She prepares herself for rest by closing the thick curtains.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enjoy her garden and then proceed with her scheduled training. She seeks a peaceful transition from activity to rest.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully completes her evening routine and prepares for sleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: At 10:00 PM, Jiang Yan lies down in her bed to sleep. She listens to quiet music and reads a book to unwind. She eventually falls into a deep sleep after having had a physically demanding morning and a red wine bath.

location.name: Jiang Yan's bedroom
location.description: a cozy room with thick curtains and bright artificial sunlight

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to relax and fall asleep. She seeks comfort through music and reading.
descriptions.conflict: A sense of loneliness and the feeling that something is missing due to being alone at home.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She falls into a deep sleep.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: In the middle of the night, a rustling sound occurs in the room. A small, hand-sized leaf with a zigzag contour begins to peek out from under the blanket. The leaf moves slowly and cautiously.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to explore the surroundings without waking the sleeping human. It seeks to investigate the room.
descriptions.conflict: The need to remain undetected by the sleeping Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: The Piranha is a hidden entity in Jiangly Yan's room.
descriptions.outcome: The leaf successfully emerges from the blanket.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The leaf extends a thin vine and another leaf from under the blanket. A fist-sized creature with a mouth full of sharp teeth, the Piranha, emerges fully. It looks around the room and observes the sleeping Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to survey the environment. It observes the sleeping human.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of waking Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: The Piranha is observing Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha is fully awake and active.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha uses its vine to pull the blanket back up to cover Jiang Yan's exposed back. After ensuring she is covered, the Piranha notices the bright light in the room. It then looks toward the gap in the bedroom door.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to help the sleeping human by covering her. It then intends to escape the room.
descriptions.conflict: The closed door and the need to slip through a narrow gap.
descriptions.state: Helpful toward Jiang Yan, then determined.
descriptions.relation: The Piranha acts protectively toward Jiangly Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha transforms into a piece of paper to slip through the door gap.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha enters the bright, spacious living room and feels a surge of excitement. Its leaves dance, and it licks its sharp teeth with a red tongue. It begins sniffing the air to locate something.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to find food. It seeks a scent in the air.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of locating a specific target in a large room.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The Piona locates a specific direction of interest.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha follows the scent and moves on tiptoes toward the carved Nanmu cabinets in the corner of the living room. It stops and looks back at the bedroom to ensure Jiang Yan has not woken up.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to reach the cabinets without being caught. It seeks to check the safety of its path.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of being discovered by Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha reaches the cabinet and prepares to open it.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha uses a leaf to nudge the drawer handle. Since Jiang Yan does not lock her valuables, the drawer opens easily. The Piranha begins pulling out various jewelry boxes one by one.

location.name: In front of the Nanmu cabinet

descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to access the jewelry. It seeks to find something to eat.
descriptions.conflict: The physical effort of pulling out multiple heavy boxes.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Multiple jewelry boxes are pulled out of the cabinet.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha sees gold necklaces and jade bracelets and becomes excited. It swallows a 100-gram gold ingot and proceeds to eat gold bracelets, earrings, jade rings, pearl necklaces, and diamond earrings. It eats until it is full.

location.name: In front of the open cabinet

descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to eat the precious metals and gems. It seeks to satisfy its hunger.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer amount of items to consume.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha consumes a large amount of treasure.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: After eating, the Piranha burps and begins tidying up. It uses its leaves to cover the jewelry boxes and places them back by the cabinet door. It then closes the cabinet door.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to hide the evidence of its theft. It seeks to restore the room to its original state.
descriptions.conflict: The need to be quick and neat before being caught.
descriptions.state: Satiated and slightly intoxicated from food.|Outabilities: None
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The cabinet is closed and the theft is hidden.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: The Piranha slips back into the bedroom. Instead of going to the bed, it lies down on the white wool blanket next to the bed. It curls its vines and leaves around itself and falls asleep.
descriptions.intent: The Piranha wants to rest. It seeks a comfortable place to sleep.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha falls into a deep sleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: At 8:00 AM, the automatic curtains open, letting sunlight into the room. Jiang Yan wakes up, rubs her eyes, and looks out the window. She is shocked to see a strange, shadow-like stream in the soil.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to start her day. She seeks to understand the strange sight in her garden.
descriptions.conflict: The confusion caused by the unexpected visual anomaly.
descriptions.state: Sleepy, then suddenly shocked and alarmed.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan jumps out of bed to investigate.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan rushes to the window to check the garden. As she moves, she accidentally steps on something soft with her right foot. She realizes she has stepped on a vine belonging to the Piranha, which looks up at her with bared teeth.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to investigate the shadow in the garden. She seeks to identify the object under her foot.
descriptions.conflict: The physical accident of stepping on the creature.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan has accidentally harmed/disturbed the Piranha.
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha reacts with a pained, bared-teeth expression.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up in a state of agitation and jumps out of bed to investigate a strange sound. She walks through her space and accidentally steps on something soft under her foot.

location.name: Jiang Yan's bedroom/living area
location.description: a space containing a bed and vines

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the source of the strange noise. She seeks to investigate the disturbance in her quiet environment.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected physical sensation under her foot interrupts her movement. A sudden noise startles her.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is alone but encounters a living entity.
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a small, transformed piranha plant under her foot.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks down and realizes the creature is her own piranha plant, which has shrunk in size but gained a terrifying appearance. The plant displays bared teeth and looks at her.

location.name: Near the vines
location.description: a floor area where plants grow

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the transformation of her plant. She tries to process the visual change of the creature.
descriptions.conflict: The plant's new, frightening appearance causes her to recoil in shock. The plant's behavior is unexpected.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the owner of the plant.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the plant has changed significantly and is now much smaller.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The piranha plant's leaves transform into legs and it begins to run around, crying out "Mama" and claiming to be hungry. Jiang Yan is confused by the plant's sudden ability to speak and its demand for food.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to determine if she is experiencing hallucinations. She tries to communicate with the creature.
descriptions.conflict: The plant's sudden speech and infantile behavior create mental confusion. The plant's hunger creates a new demand.
descriptions.relation: The plant begins addressing Jiang Yan as "Mama".
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan accepts the reality of the plant's speech but struggles with its new identity.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the absurdity of being a "mother" to a plant while being single and childless. She decides to indulge the plant's needs despite its ugly appearance.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to decide how to treat the creature. She decides to treat it as a "golden finger" advantage.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal conflict regarding her single status and the absurdity of the situation. The plant's hunger persists.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan adopts a nurturing, albeit reluctant, role.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to feed the plant.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks the piranha plant what it wants to eat, fearing it might want to eat her. The plant points a leaf toward the living room, indicating a pile of jewelry boxes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a suitable food source for the plant. She seeks to avoid being eaten.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of cannibalism. The plant's strange preference for inanimate objects.
descriptions.relation: The plant directs Jiang Yan's actions.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan discovers the plant wants to eat precious metals.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks at the pile of gold and silver left by her mother and realizes the plant has eaten the empty jewelry boxes. She feels her blood pressure rising as she realizes the value of what was consumed.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify if the plant ate the contents of the boxes. She seeks to assess the loss.
descriptions.conflict: The loss of millions of dollars worth of inheritance. The sudden realization of the plant's destructive appetite.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the victim of the plant's eating.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the plant has consumed a massive amount of wealth.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to stop worrying about the loss and instead provides the plant with gold bars from her inventory. She pulls out a stack of 100-gram pure gold bars.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to satisfy the plant's hunger to prevent further loss. She decides to use her "golden finger" power.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle between grief for her lost wealth and the need to manage the creature. The cost of the food.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan acts as a provider.
descriptions.outcome: The plant begins eating the gold bars.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The piranha plant eats the gold bars like Snickers bars, causing Jiang Yan to watch in stunned silence. As it eats, the plant begins to emit golden light that floats toward a stream.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the effect of the gold on the plant. She watches the transformation.
descriptions.conflict: The bizarre sight of a plant eating metal. The unexpected magical phenomenon occurring.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is an observer of the plant's magic.
descriptions.outcome: A magical light phenomenon begins to manifest.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan runs to the edge of her plantation to follow the floating golden lights. She discovers a new, shimmering spring and a stream appearing at the boundary of her territory.

location.name: Boundary between Black Soil plantation and White Zone

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find the source of the golden lights. She seeks to explore the new development in her space.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a new, mysterious geographical feature. The uncertainty of the new environment.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan discovers a new part of her world.
descriptions.outcome: She finds a legendary-looking spiritual spring.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the jade-like spring and tries to touch it, but her hand only passes through air and mist. She realizes the spring and stream are currently illusory and semi-transparent.

location.name: Near the jade spring and stream

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to touch and confirm the reality of the spring. She seeks to interact with the new discovery.
descriptions.conflict: The physical impossibility of touching the spring as it is intangible. The ephemeral nature of the discovery.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is interacting with the environment.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the spring is currently an illusion or a phantom.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches forward to touch the spiritual source and stream, but her hand only meets air and a ghostly sensation. She realizes the voices she heard were real, but the source itself is currently illusory and manifesting. She feels confused by the lack of physical substance.

location.name: The spiritual space
location.description: near a manifesting stream and spiritual source

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify the physical existence of the spiritual source. She seeks to touch the source to confirm its reality. She wants to understand the nature of the voices she heard.
descriptions.conflict: The spiritual source is currently illusory and lacks physical density. Her hand passes through the mass like a ghost. This prevents her from physically interacting with the stream.
descriptions.state: Confused and puzzled. She is experiencing a sense of disorientation due to the illusory nature of the stream.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the voices were real but finds the source is currently intangible.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Piranha
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices the Piranha chewing on a gold ingot and pointing a leaf toward the upper right corner of the stream. She follows the direction indicated by the creature. She praises the Piranha's keen observation skills.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see what the Piranha is pointing at. She wants to acknowledge the Piranha's intelligence. She seeks to bond with the creature.
descriptions.conflict: The Piranha is preoccupied with eating a gold ingot. The direction of the discovery is initially hidden from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: Surprised and impressed. Her eyes light up with excitement upon seeing the discovery.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan treats the Piranha with maternal affection.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan discovers something significant in the corner of the stream and praises the Piranha.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Piranha
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to officially name the Piranha "Huabao" because she loves the name and wants to reward its observant behavior. She reaches out to gently touch the Piranha's head. The Piranha reacts with extreme happiness, its two small leaves swaying excitedly.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to bestow a permanent nickname on the Piranha. She wants to express affection. She aims to reward the creature's good behavior.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.state: Affectionate and happy. The Piranha is extremely satisfied and joyful.
descriptions.relation: The bond between Jiang Yan and the Piranly strengthens through the naming.
descriptions.outcome: The Piranha is officially named Huabao, and the emotional bond is solidified.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A light golden progress bar appears above the stream, showing a constantly changing percentage like 0.92%, 0.93%, and 0.94%. Golden light particles slowly gather in the empty space to fill the indicator. The speed of the changing numbers indicates the rate of progress.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan observes the progress bar to understand the state of the space. She seeks to monitor the manifestation of the stream.
descriptions.conflict: The progress is incredibly slow, moving only by fractions of a percent. The space is still largely empty and incomplete.
descriptions.state: Observant and focused. She is analyzing the mechanics of the space's evolution.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the space is undergoing a slow, automated upgrade process.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Piranha
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan touches the Piranha and a status screen appears before her eyes. The screen displays the Piranha's power level, number of vines, and active skills like "Devour." She reads the details regarding its ability to transform vines into different elements and its monthly feeding capacity.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the Piranha's current capabilities. She seeks to learn the mechanics of the "Devour" skill. She wants to know how the space upgrades.
descriptions.conflict: The information is dense and requires careful reading. She discovers the limitations of the current level.
descriptions.state: Analytical and enlightened. She experiences a moment of realization regarding the "golden finger" of the P/ranha.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is studying the Piranha as a tool/companion.
descriptions.outcome: She gains detailed knowledge about the Piranha's stats and the requirements for space upgrading.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes that the space upgrades by consuming gold and silver jewelry. She concludes that the stream and source will fully manifest once the progress bar reaches 100%. She recognizes that she needs to gather more precious metals to drive this process.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to upgrade her space. She seeks to plan her resource gathering. She aims to unlock the full potential of the spiritual source.
descriptions.conflict: She lacks the necessary amount of gold and silver to reach 100%. The process requires a massive amount of wealth.
descriptions.state: Inspired and determined. She feels like a "genius" for uncovering the secret of the space.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She formulates a plan to collect more jewelry and precious metals.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her inventory to see her remaining gold ingots. She calculates the amount of jewelry already consumed by the Piranha and realizes the long road ahead. She worries that the progress might slow down significantly as it approaches the final percentage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess her current resources. She seeks to estimate the time required for the upgrade. She wants to prepare for the difficulty of the final stages.
descriptions.conflict: The remaining gold is insufficient for the task. There is a fear that the "loading speed" might drop at the end.
descriptions.state: Apprehensive and discouraged. Her "hot heart" is met with the "cold water" of reality.|Outting: Not mentioned.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the task is much larger and more difficult than she initially thought.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the benefits of the legendary spiritual source, which can heal everything, against the harsh reality of the Apocalypse. She decides that the struggle is worth it because the source will ensure a better life in the future. She resolves to push through the difficulty.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to justify the effort of upgrading the space. She seeks motivation to continue. She aims to secure her survival in the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The harsh environment of the apocalypse threatens her future. The difficulty of the upgrade is a major deterrent.
descriptions.state: Resolute and moved. She is driven by the vision of a healing, prosperous future.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She commits herself to the long-term goal of upgrading the space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Piranha
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan picks up the Piranha and asks Huabao how many gold ingots it eats in one meal. She is afraid that the Piranha might eat all the food at once and leave nothing for later. The Piranha responds that it is a "big eater" with no limit to its appetite.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to manage the Piranha's consumption. She seeks to ensure a sustainable food supply. She wants to avoid a sudden depletion of resources.
descriptions.conflict: The Piranha's infinite appetite threatens Jiang Yan's resource management. There is a direct contradiction between her need for conservation and the creature's hunger.
descriptions.state: Anxious and worried. The Piranha is boastful and gluttonous.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan acts as a provider/mother; the Piranha acts as a dependent/consumer.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes that the Piranha's hunger makes her task even more difficult.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Piranha
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan expresses her concern that if the Piranha eats everything now, there will be nothing left for the future. She worries about the long-term consequences of such consumption. The Piranha mentions the "green-leaf sea snail" to the confused Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prevent future starvation. She seeks to find a way to regulate the feeding. She wants to understand the Piranha's new topic of conversation.
descriptions.conflict: The Piranha's lack of foresight regarding food reserves. The introduction of a new, unknown element (the snail) confuses her.
descriptions.state: Distressed and puzzled. She is stuck in a loop of worry.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with Jiang Yan in a state of confusion regarding the Piranha's mention of the snail.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan criticizes the piranha for eating too much at once, warning it about future hunger. The piranha attempts to communicate through physical contact rather than speech.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to teach the piranha about moderation and long-term survival. She aims to prevent the creature from overeating in a single sitting.
descriptions.conflict: The piranha's instinctual behavior of eating greedily contradicts Jiang Yan's logic of sustainability.
descriptions.relation: Mother-like figure to the piranha
descriptions.outcome: The piranha responds physically instead of verbally.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A leaf from the piranha wraps around Jiang Yan's finger, triggering a sudden influx of biological knowledge into her mind. She learns that the green-leaf sea snail is a real species that can photosynthesize.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan seeks to understand the new biological information being transmitted to her. She wants to comprehend the nature of the piranha's unique biology.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, unbidden intrusion of foreign knowledge into her consciousness.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is receiving information from the piranha
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan gains scientific knowledge about photosynthesis and the sea snail.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan questions the piranha about its ability to photosynthesize. The piranha clarifies that while it cannot photosynthesize, its mother does not need to worry about its food supply.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify if the piranha shares the plant-like traits of the snail. She seeks reassurance regarding the creature's maintenance.
descriptions.conflict: The piranha's response provides a partial answer but leaves the logistics of feeding unaddressed.
descriptions.relation: Interrogative relationship
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes the piranha's food needs are manageable but faces a different problem.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects bitterly on her financial situation, realizing her true concern is finding gold and silver jewelry. She notes that the heavy rain and flooding have prevented her from shopping for free.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find valuable jewelry to collect. She contemplates the impact of the flood on her ability to scavenge.
descriptions.conflict: The continuous heavy rain has submerged the city, making her usual "zero-yuan" shopping method impossible.
descriptions.state: Bitter and preoccupied.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: Solitary reflection
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the need to find submerged jewelry stores.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls the structural layout of jewelry stores, noting they are usually located in prime positions on the first floors of shopping malls. She realizes that because the flood has reached the 15th floor, these stores are now at least 45 meters underwater.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the depth of the target locations. She aims to calculate the difficulty of reaching the jewelry.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme depth of the flooded stores exceeds standard snorkeling limits.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She determines the target stores are deep underwater.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan evaluates her diving capabilities, noting her professional diver certification and access to high-quality equipment. She remembers her experience conducting live broadcasts of underwater cave explorations.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confirm if she has the physical skills and tools necessary for the mission. She seeks to reassure herself of her competence.
descriptions.conflict: The depth of the stores (45m) is deeper than standard snorkeling (3-5m) and near the limit of standard diving (40m).
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes she has the necessary skills and gear to attempt the dive.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the difficulty of navigating the vast ocean without GPS to find specific shopping centers. She notes that while some office buildings remain above water, finding the specific submerged stores is a massive challenge.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to locate the submerged jewelry stores in the vast underwater expanse. She seeks a navigation strategy.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of GPS and the sheer scale of the flooded city make finding specific targets like a "needle in a haystack."
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the primary obstacle as precise positioning.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her study within the Apple Hut and notices a large world map made of white pine on the wall. This sight triggers a sudden realization and a new plan for her mission.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan seeks a way to map out the locations of the stores. She wants to use the map as a basis for a coordinate system.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of finding stores without a guide.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She develops a plan to use latitude and longitude coordinates relative to landmarks like Repulse Bay.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the logistics of locating jewelry stores using coordinates and landmarks. She realizes she can use her pre-loaded offline maps and a compass/theodolite to mark precise locations on a paper map. She decides to focus on private sectors rather than high-security central bank vaults.

location.name: An indoor room
location.description: likely a shelter, containing a computer and supplies.

descriptions.intent: She wants to devise a plan to find submerged gold and silver. She aims to use precise latitude and longitude data to map out targets. She seeks a way to navigate without GPS using Repulse Bay as a landmark.
descriptions.conflict: The central bank vaults are too heavily guarded and mechanically complex. The risk of encountering government officials or complex security systems is too high.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to target private jewelry stores instead of government vaults.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan summons a paper map of Anming City from her inventory. She begins the intensive process of manually marking the locations of jewelry stores on the map. She becomes so absorbed in the task that she neglects her personal hygiene.
descriptions.intent: She wants to create a precise treasure map. She aims to transfer digital data onto a physical medium for easier use. She intends to track every store location manually.
descriptions.conflict: She is so preoccupied with the task that she forgets to wash or brush her teeth.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She begins a two-day period of intense, singular focus.

descriptions.title: Huabao
descriptions.scene: Over the course of two days, Huabao consumes all the gold bars stored in Jiang Yan's inventory. Meanwhile, the progress bar of the "stream" reaches 6.3%. Jiang Yan completes the manual mapping of 3,168 jewelry stores across 46 different locations.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to eat the gold bars. Jiang Yan wants to finish the complex mapping project. She aims to categorize the 46 locations by region, brand, and density.
descriptions.conflict: The progress of the stream is painfully slow. The sheer volume of data (3,100+ stores) is overwhelming.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is exhausted but motivated; Huabao is satiated.
descriptions.relation: Huabao is a dependent/companion to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The treasure map is completed and categorized by priority levels.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan emerges from her room after two days, looking disheveled with dark circles under her eyes. She gathers Huabao and warns him about revealing his true form in public. She reflects on the need to avoid drawing attention from authorities or malicious forces.

location.name: A corridor or room within a building.

descriptions.intent: She wants to maintain a low profile to avoid conflict with the authorities. She aims to protect Huabao from being discovered. She seeks to avoid the "evil forces" that might dissect them.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of being discovered by the government or powerful entities. The risk of public scrutiny in Repulse Bay.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan acts as a protector/guardian to Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: Huabao agrees to remain hidden in her palm.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the rising floodwaters through binoculars. She notes that the water has reached the 14th floor and predicts it will submerge the 15th floor soon. She realizes she will soon have to exit through a window on the 16th floor.
descriptions.intent: She wants to monitor the environmental changes. She aims to plan her next movement for food supplies. She intends to check the surroundings before the water rises further.
descriptions.conflict: The rising water level threatens her current position and limits her exit routes. The need for food supplies is pressing.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to descend to check the environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the crowded and chaotic corridors of the 20th and 31st floors. She sees people fighting over food and families cooking in the hallways. The atmosphere is dirty, noisy, and filled with smoke on the 20th floor.
descriptions.intent: She is scouting the path for her descent. She wants to assess the safety and congestion of the lower floors. She aims to navigate through the chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The corridors are overcrowded, dirty, and prone to violence. The presence of smoke and noise creates a hostile environment.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to move through the crowd.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts on a mask and moves through the 31st floor toward the 32nd floor. She finds the 32nd floor corridor empty and quiet, with the doors to houses 32 and Hechun open. The dim light from the hallway is disorienting to her eyes.
descriptions.intent: She wants to navigate to the stairwell. She aims to move stealthily through the building. She seeks to reach her destination without being noticed.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden change in light and the darkness of the corridor affect her vision. The silence is a stark contrast to the previous chaos.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She reaches the fire door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan pushes open a closed fire door on the staircase and encounters Yiqing. Yiqing is climbing up from the 31st floor, carrying two heavy white plastic buckets. Jiang Yan notices the bulging veins on Yiqing's arms and his unkempt, long hair.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to pass through the stairwell. Yiqing is clearly engaged in heavy labor. Jiang Yan observes his physical state.
descriptions.conflict: Yiqing's heavy load makes his movement difficult. The physical strain on Yiqing is evident.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is observant; Yiqing is physically strained.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan encounters Yiqing as a stranger/acquaintance.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan observes Yiqing's struggle as he ascends.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan pushes open a closed fire door and spots Yiqing ascending from the 31st floor. He observes Yiqing carrying two heavy white plastic buckets that cause veins to bulge in his arms. He notices Yiqing's long hair and a red-and-white striped sports headband.

location.name: Stairwell
location.description: near the 31st floor, a transition point between floors with a fire door.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to continue his descent. He is observing his surroundings and the person he encounters.
descriptions.conflict: The physical weight of the buckets Yiqing carries creates a visual obstacle. The unexpected encounter interrupts his movement.
descriptions.state: Observant and curious. He is analyzing Ynetic's appearance and the contents of the buckets.

outfits.Jiang Yan: unspecified clothing;Yiqing=long hair, a black sports headband with red and white stripes.

descriptions.relation: Acquaintances/known to each other.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan stops his descent to observe Yiqing.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing stops at the corner of the stairs upon seeing Jiang Yan. He stares with indifferent, dark eyes that momentarily glint. He hesitates to speak as his Adam's apple moves.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to acknowledge Jiang Yan. He is processing the sudden presence of someone he knows.
descriptions.conflict: The social awkwardness of the encounter and the physical exertion of carrying heavy buckets. He is unsure how to initiate conversation.
descriptions.state: Indifferent yet momentarily expressive. He is physically strained from the weight.

outfits.Yiqing: black sports headband with red and white stripes, long hair covering part of his forehead.

props: Two white plastic buckets containing gasoline.
descriptions.relation: Acquaintances; Jiang Yan recognizes him but realizes Yiqing might not know he moved here.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing breaks the silence by asking if Jiang Yan wants to descend.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan nods in response to Yiqing's question and prepares to step down. Suddenly, he hears heavy footsteps and labored breathing coming from below him.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to proceed with his descent. He is responding to Yili's prompt.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected sound from below interrupts his planned movement. The arrival of a third person changes the dynamic.
descriptions.state: Compliant and focused. He is ready to move until interrupted.

outfits.Jiang Yan: unspecified clothing;Yiqing=black sports headband with red and white stripes.

descriptions.relation: Interacting with Yiqing.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is halted by the appearance of Sudai.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai appears at the corner of the stairs, breathing heavily and looking flushed. She is carrying a large white porcelain flower pot filled with soil. She spots Jiang Yan and her eyes light up with a smile.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to approach Jiang Yan. She is carrying heavy gardening supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The physical burden of the heavy porcelain pot and the heat/exertion causing her face to turn red. She is navigating the stairs while burdened.
descriptions.state: Energetic and happy to see Jiang Yan. She is physically exhausted.

outfits.Sudai: a waterproof apron with a pattern of small wrinkled chrysanthemums.

descriptions.relation: Friends/acquaintances; she shows immediate affection/joy upon seeing him.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai reaches the platform and stands next to Yiqing.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai places the heavy flower pot on the platform and stands with her hands on her hips to catch her breath. She wipes sweat from her forehead and addresses Jiang Yan about the conditions downstairs.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to warn Jiang Yan about the environment below. She is recovering from her climb.
descriptions.conflict: The unpleasant smell and scene downstairs are difficult to endure. She is physically struggling to breathe.
descriptions.state: Exhausted but communicative. She is focused on warning Jiang Yan.
descriptions.relation: Friendly interaction.
descriptions.outcome: She informs Jiang Yan that the situation downstairs is indescribable.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan smiles evasively when Sudai mentions the unpleasant scene downstairs. He reflects on the grim reality of the 32nd floor, noting the dried bloodstains and the metallic fishy smell in the corridor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain a polite social distance. He is contemplating the decay of the building.
descriptions.conflict: The horrific environment of the 32nd floor (blood and smell) contrasts with his polite demeanor. The physical decay of the building is a constant threat.
descriptions.state: Evasive and reflective. He is internally processing the grim surroundings.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He remains silent about the horrors of the 32nd floor.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai leans down to pick up the heavy flower pot from the ground. She stops Jiang Yan from descending further, claiming they have a new discovery that is too important to miss.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to prevent Jiang Yan from going down. She wants to share new information.
descriptions.conflict: The timing of her discovery conflicts with Jiang Yan's original plan to descend. She must lift the heavy pot again.
descriptions.state: Determined and urgent. She is focused on the "new discovery."
descriptions.relation: Directing Jiang Yan's actions.
descriptions.outcome: She halts Jiang Yan's descent.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stares blankly at Sudai, confused by the mention of a new discovery. He decides not to descend and instead moves to open the fire door for her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the new discovery. He decides to facilitate Sudai's movement.
descriptions.conflict: Confusion regarding the new information. The physical task of opening the door for others.
descriptions.state: Bewildered and then helpful. He is reacting to the sudden change in plans.
descriptions.relation: Responding to Sudai's lead.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan opens the door, and Yiqing joins them.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai pushes the fire door open and looks into the corridor. She lowers her voice to share sensitive information about the water levels. She reveals that Xiauee found that the water level rise has slowed over the last two days.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to share the news about the water level. She wants to communicate the news discreetly.
descriptions.conflict: The need for secrecy/lowering her voice. The weight of the information regarding the flood.
descriptions.state: Serious and secretive. She is focused on the survival implications.|Outary: Sudai reveals that heavy rain might weaken in the next two days.
descriptions.relation: Sharing vital information with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The group learns about the slowing water levels.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai contemplates inviting Jiang Yan to her home to talk properly, but she hesitates due to the mess in her house and the lack of alternative housing. She remembers Sun Zhentao's warning about maintaining psychological boundaries.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to invite Jiang Yan home but decides against it. She wants to maintain social propriety.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle between her desire for closeness and the need to respect "psychological safe distance." The physical mess in her home prevents the meeting.
descriptions.state: Hesitant and self-conscious. She is navigating complex social boundaries.
descriptions.relation: Reflecting on her relationship with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: She chooses not to cross the social boundary.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai reflects on the psychological concept of personal boundaries and the physical distance required for safety. She contemplates the intimacy zones of 20 to 50 cm and the discomfort caused by strangers entering this space. She recalls her husband's warning to respect Jiang Yan's personal space due to her unusual admiration for him.
descriptions.intent: To analyze the social dynamics and boundaries of those around her. She wants to understand the psychological distance between people.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between physical closeness and the feeling of threat or discomfort.
descriptions.relation: Su Dai is thinking about her relationship with Jiang Yan and her husband's advice.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a mental framework for the social interactions about to occur.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes that Su Dai is speaking to her and looks at Yiqing who is standing nearby. Su Dai notices Jiang Yan's attention and encourages Yiqing to join the conversation with his "sister" Yan. Yiqing responds by picking up a barrel of gasoline.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to engage with her companions. Su Dai wants to facilitate a conversation between Yiqing and Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden realization of presence and the physical presence of a heavy object.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is curious; Su Dai is proactive; Yiqing is focused on his task.
descriptions.relation: Su Dai acts as a mediator between Yiqing and Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing joins the group physically but remains internally preoccupied.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing decides to reveal a piece of information regarding a recent discovery but chooses to frame it as a thank-you. He thanks Jiang Yan for helping him identify the true perpetrator of the crime involving his grandparents. He mentions the "bloody mosquitoes" attack from two days ago.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to express gratitude while masking his true new discovery. He wants to acknowledge Jiang Yan's help in solving a crime.
descriptions.conflict: He struggles with the impulse to share his new discovery versus the desire to remain composed.
descriptions.state: Grateful but restrained and somewhat secretive.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing shows appreciation toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: He successfully delivers a message of thanks without revealing his secret.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai listens to Yiqing's mention of the crime and reflects on his character. She notes that Yiqing is a child who values justice and love because of his upbringing by his grandparents. She contemplates the tragic background of his parents who died due to gangsters.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to understand the motivations and the complex personality of Yiqing. She seeks to empathize with his loss.
descriptions.conflict: The internal conflict of recognizing the contradiction in his personality.
descriptions.relation: Su Dai observes Yiqing's emotional depth.
descriptions.outcome: She forms a deeper understanding of Yiqing's psychological makeup.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan listens to Su Dai's explanation of Yiqing's background without showing much emotion. She dismisses the gravity of the situation by calling it a "small effort." She then asks Yiqing to express his condolences.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to downplay the difficulty of her previous actions. She wants to prompt Yiqable to show respect for the deceased.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between the heavy subject matter and her nonchalant attitude.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan maintains a professional or detached distance from the tragedy.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing is momentarily stunned by her reaction.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing is momentarily stunned by Jiang Yan's reaction and then asks her to share her recent discovery. Su Dai interrupts the moment by rubbing her aching hands, reminding them of her physical discomfort. Yiqing then presents his scientific observation regarding the water levels.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to transition the conversation to his new discovery. Su Dai wants to acknowledge her physical pain.
descriptions.conflict: The interruption of the emotional moment by physical discomfort.
descriptions.relation: The group is transitioning from personal tragedy to survival logistics.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing begins to present his data about the flood.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing explains that while water levels rose after the heavy rain, the rate of increase has slowed over the last two days. He concludes that the rainfall is decreasing and will likely turn into light rain or stop within a week. Jiang Yan listens intently to this meteorological prediction.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to communicate the changing weather patterns. He aims to provide a window of opportunity for survival.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the weather patterns.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing acts as an informant to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: A potential window for action is identified.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes that the slowing water levels mean they can finally go out to search for supplies. She recognizes this as their primary chance to survive the upcoming catastrophe. She feels a sense of strategic opportunity.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to plan a scavenging mission. She aims to secure resources before the next disaster hits.
descriptions.conflict: The high stakes of the mission and the danger of the environment.
descriptions.relation: She is processing information to make a survival decision.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a period of opportunity.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the sky and notes that while it looks clearer, the rainfall seems consistent with previous days. She observes Yiqing's ability to analyze the crisis and finds his perspective interesting. She begins to question the feasibility of his plan.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to test the logic of the plan. She seeks to understand the risks of leaving the shelter.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between the visual appearance of the sky and the actual rainfall data.
descriptions.relation: She is evaluating Yiqing's competence and foresight.
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to challenge the safety of the proposed plan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks Yiqing how they can possibly go out to find supplies when the water is still so deep. She expresses doubt about the possibility of navigating the floodwaters. Yiqing prepares to respond to her skepticism.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to point out the practical impossibility of the mission. She seeks a solution to the physical barrier of the water.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the deep floodwaters.
descriptions.relation: She challenges Yiqing's optimism.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing prepares to explain the concept of secondary disasters.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing explains that extreme disasters often trigger secondary or even larger catastrophes. He warns that when the rain stops and the sun appears, the receding waters will reveal a landscape filled with the corpses of humans and animals. He emphasizes the danger of the aftermath.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to warn about the hidden dangers of the post-flood period. He aims to provide a complete picture of the environmental threat.
descriptions.conflict: The hidden threat of biological decay and secondary disasters.
descriptions.relation: He acts as a realist/prophet of the coming decay.
descriptions.outcome: He presents a grim reality of the upcoming environmental shift.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the environmental catastrophe caused by extreme heat, drought, and heavy rains. She contemplates the biological threat of viruses spreading from decomposing bodies in the floodwaters. She decides that survival depends on self-reliance rather than waiting for limited government resources.

location.name: An unspecified indoor area
location.description: likely a residential building, during a period of heavy rain and flooding.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare for the upcoming biological and physical disasters. She aims to establish a mindset of self-sufficiency. She intends to prioritize immediate survival over waiting for official rescue.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme weather and the threat of disease from decaying organic matter. The limited capacity of government officials to provide timely aid.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a plan to be prepared for the worst-scale disasters.

descriptions.title: Yiqin, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Yiqin informs the group that Tao and Dai possess kayaks for potential use. Sudai expresses gratitude to Jiang Yan, crediting her for the information or situation. Jiang Yan reveals she learned to dive by watching Yiqin's underwater cave exploration videos.

location.name: An indoor gathering space
location.description: likely a common area or apartment.

descriptions.intent: Yiqin wants to share survival resources. Sudai wants to acknowledge Jiang Yan's influence. Jiang Yan wants to explain her diving skills.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of navigating the flooded environment.
descriptions.state: Yiqin is informative; Sudai is excited and grateful; Jiang Yan is slightly confused.
descriptions.relation: Yiqin and Sudai are interacting with Jiang Yan; Sudai views Jiang Yan as a source of inspiration.
descriptions.outcome: The group identifies kayaks as a potential means of transport.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan describes her limited diving capabilities, noting she can only reach depths of 3-4 meters. She mentions her husband's military background and his superior diving skills. She recalls how outdoor camping became a popular hobby following a previous public health incident.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to clarify the limits of her physical abilities. She intends to provide context for her current equipment.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical limitation to shallow depths.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The group understands the limitations of Jiang Yan's diving expertise.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan mentions her purchase of a wetsuit, life jacket, and kayak. Sudai laughs and then tentatively asks if Jiang Yan would be willing to join them on a supply run once the rain stops. Sudai hopes Jiang Yan's superior professional diving gear will aid their mission.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to recruit Jiang Yan for a dangerous supply mission. She aims to leverage Jiang Yan's potential professional equipment. Jiang Yan is being approached for a collaborative effort.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of the mission and the potential for Jiang Yan to refuse.
descriptions.state: Sudai is cautious and hopeful; Jiang Yan is being observed.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is attempting to persuade Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The invitation is presented but not yet accepted.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai contemplates the strength of a four-person team compared to acting alone. She worries that Jiang Yan might refuse the invitation due to the difficulty of the task. Jiang Yan listens to the proposal with a calm and polite smile.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to form a cohesive team to increase survival chances. She wants to avoid a direct confrontation that might lead to rejection. Jiang Yan wants to maintain her composure.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of rejection and the difficulty of the upcoming supply run.
descriptions.state: Sudai is anxious and calculating; Jiang Yan is calm and polite.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is trying to manipulate the social situation to get a "yes" from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan remains non-committal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Sudai, Yiqin
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan politely declines the invitation, stating it is not convenient. She thanks them for the information but announces her intention to go downstairs immediately because it is late. Sudai's excitement turns to sadness, while Yiqin remains stoic.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to end the conversation and proceed with her own plans. Sudai wants to keep the group together. Yiqin wants to maintain his composure.
descriptions.conflict: The disagreement between the desire to cooperate and the need for individual movement.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is firm; Sudai is disappointed; Yiqin is unreadable.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan creates a social distance by declining the offer.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan prepares to leave the group.

descriptions.title: Sun Zentao, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zentao emerges from apartment 324 and warns Jiang Yan to be careful. He notes that the situation downstairs has been difficult for the last two days. He suggests that Xiao'e accompany her, but Jiang Yan insists on going alone.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zentao wants to ensure Jiang Yan's safety. He wants to provide a companion for her. Jiang Yan wants to maintain her independence and handle the task herself.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of the current environment versus Jiang Yan's desire for solitude.
descriptions.state: Sun Zentao is concerned and protective; Jiang Yan is determined and polite.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zentao acts as a protective figure/neighbor.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to descend the stairs alone.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Yiqin, Sudai, Sun Zentao
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan waves goodbye to the group and turns to descend.
