Yiqin secretly considers using a gun for protection and wishes Jiang Yan would join them to use her weapon against bad actors. Sudai feels embarrassed by her indirect approach. Sun Zentao comforts Sudai, suggesting they can simply deliver supplies to Jiang Yan later.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to leave. Yiqin wants the benefit of Jiang Yan's weaponry. Sudai wants to find a way to help Jiang Yan without being intrusive. Sun Zentao wants to soothe his wife's anxiety.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the group's need for a leader/protector and Jiang Yan's refusal to join.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is departing; Yiqin is calculating; Sudai is embarrassed; Sun Zentao is loving and pragmatic.
descriptions.relation: The group is parting ways; Sun Zentao and Sudai are a couple.
descriptions.outcome: The group accepts the separation, and Jiang Yan begins her descent.

descriptions.title: Yiqin
descriptions.scene: Yiqin watches Jiang Yan disappear through the fire door. He then bends down to pick up a gasoline canister and returns to the house.
descriptions.intent: Yiqin wants to retrieve necessary supplies. He intends to return to the safety of the indoors.
descriptions.conflict: The physical task of handling heavy/necessary items.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Yiqin successfully returns to the building.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: As Jiang Yan descends the stairs to the 31st floor, she is hit by a nauseating, sour smell. The odor is a fermented mixture of human excrement, urine, and rotting food. The stench is overwhelming and makes her feel physically ill.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is simply moving through the building.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming and revolting sensory assault of the stench.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan encounters the grim reality of the decaying environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan descends the stairs from the 31st floor and encounters a nauseating, fermented stench of excrement and rotting food. She realizes residents are using the stairwell as a latrine due to the scarcity of waste disposal materials. The smell is overwhelming and acidic.

location.name: Stairwell
location.description: 31st floor, a dark and foul-smelling concrete stairwell

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to descend the stairs to a lower floor. She aims to navigate the building despite the physical discomfort caused by the odor.
descriptions.conflict: The intense, nauseating smell of human waste and rot makes her feel ill. The lack of available plastic bags or paper for waste disposal has turned the stairs into a dump.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues her descent despite the stench.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes a mask from her backpack and puts it on to block the smell. She then retrieves a flashlight to illuminate the pitch-scale darkness of the stairwell.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to protect herself from the foul air. She needs to see her path in the darkness.
descriptions.conflict: The stairwell is completely dark, making it impossible to see her own fingers. The air is toxic with the smell of decay.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is now equipped to navigate the dark, smelly environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan descends further, carefully navigating around colorful "time bombs" (waste deposits) left by residents. She moves much slower than usual to avoid contact with these hazards.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the 16th floor safely. She aims to avoid touching any of the waste deposits.
descriptions.conflict: The density of waste deposits increases as she descends. She must move slowly to avoid contamination.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully avoids the waste and reaches the 16th floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the 16th floor and opens the fire door to find the corridor empty of people. The hallway is filled with household trash and walls blackened by fireworks.

location.name: 16th floor corridor
location.description: filled with trash and blackened walls

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the corridor for inhabitants. She is looking for signs of life or danger.
descriptions.conflict: The corridor is desolate and messy, suggesting people have fled or moved.
descriptions.state: Surprised by the emptiness.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the residents have likely moved upward due to rising floodwaters.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices an open door at apartment 1604 and spots a ten-year-old boy leaning against an open window. The boy is extending his hand into the rain, seemingly unaware of his surroundings.

location.name: 16th floor corridor
location.description: near apartment 1604 and an open window

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the boy. She is curious about his presence and safety.
descriptions.conflict: The boy is in a vulnerable position near an open window during a storm. The environment is dangerous due to potential lightning or landslides.

outfits.Boy: Dirty, greasy hair and greasy clothes.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan observes the boy as a stranger.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to approach him.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns off her flashlight and coughs lightly to announce her presence to the boy. The boy hears the noise, frowns, and then turns away with an empty expression.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to approach the boy without startling him too aggressively. She wants to initiate contact.
descriptions.conflict: The boy's reaction is indifferent and cold, creating a social barrier.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan attempts to interact with the boy.
descriptions.outcome: The boy acknowledges her but remains emotionally detached.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the boy and asks him what he is doing. The boy turns back to stare at her with impatience.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to know the boy's purpose for being there. She seeks information about his activity.
descriptions.conflict: The boy responds with impatience and a piercing stare, making the interaction tense.
descriptions.relation: The interaction becomes more direct and confrontational.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan moves closer to the window to see what he is doing.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks out the window and discovers the boy is using a homemade fishing line with a red ball to catch something in the floodwater. She notices the walls are covered in thick, moving black mollusks.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the boy's activity. She investigates the contents of the water.
descriptions.conflict: She discovers a horrifying biological presence on the walls.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the "mollusks" are actually giant, mutated blood-sucking leeches.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes the black mollusks are actually leeches that have grown to the size of adult humans. She feels intense terror as she contemplates the danger of these creatures.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid contact with the leeches. She tries to process the scale of the mutation.
descriptions.conflict: The leeches are massive, highly mobile, and predatory. Her fear of such creatures is profound.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She experiences a moment of extreme psychological distress.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls her fear of worms and snakes and realizes the danger of the leeches if they encounter her. She thinks about her upcoming departure from the area after the rain stops.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to survive the encounter. She plans her escape from the area.
descriptions.conflict: The leeches are everywhere on the building walls. Her flight path might intersect with them.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins searching her memory for a solution.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan searches her memory for any way to deal with the giant leeches. She recalls a past experience in a Chinese city where she saw leeches on rice fields and considers her options for travel.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to combat or avoid the leeches. She seeks a way to travel safely, either by air or water.
descriptions.conflict: The current environment makes flying too risky due to visibility/attraction, and water travel is dangerous due to the leeches.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins to recall specific knowledge about leech behavior to formulate a plan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls a live show where a woman traveled to a remote Chinese city to film landscapes and harvest rice flower fish. She remembers the presence of many leeches on the rice fields that crawled onto villagers' legs. This memory establishes her prior knowledge of leeches.

location.name: Memory of a remote Chinese city
location.description: rice fields with water and vegetation

descriptions.intent: To recall past experiences to understand the current threat.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of the invasive and parasitic nature of leeway.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a baseline of knowledge regarding leeches.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan searches her mobile phone to research the properties of leeches. She discovers that they can be used as medicine due to hirudin, which helps lower blood lipids and regulate blood pressure. She learns about their extreme resilience to high temperatures and their ability to reanimate upon contact with water.
descriptions.intent: To find scientific information about the leeches' biology and medicinal uses.
descriptions.conflict: The terrifying nature of the leeches' ability to survive extreme conditions.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She gains information about the leeches' mutation potential and survival capabilities.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes that the recent heavy rain might contain radioactive substances due to the mutation of organisms. She begins to worry about whether humans who are exposed to or drink this rainwater might also undergo mutations. She decides to prioritize finding a way to eliminate the leeches.
descriptions.intent: To determine a strategy for dealing with the leches.
descriptions.conflict: The fear of radioactive mutation in humans.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She shifts her focus from scientific curiosity to practical survival.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan considers using flamethrowers she previously purchased in a foreign country. She decides against using them immediately because they are too conspicuous and she prefers not to use weapons unless absolutely necessary. She contemplates the alternative of manually removing leeches from her kayak.
descriptions.intent: To decide on a weapon or method to combat the leeches.
descriptions.conflict: The dilemma between using loud/obvious weapons versus the physical danger of manual removal.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to hold back on using the flamethrowers for now.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the size of a pass-through window in the corridor, calculating its dimensions based on floor tiles. She plans to use a fire axe to break the aluminum alloy frame to release her rubber boat diagonally. She realizes she must cut cleanly to avoid damaging the boat's hull.

location.name: Corridor
location.description: near a window and floor tiles

descriptions.intent: To plan an escape route and a way to deploy her boat.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of breaking the window without damaging her equipment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She develops a tactical plan for the boat's deployment.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged Woman
descriptions.scene: A loud bang occurs as the door to apartment 1604 is forced open by a heavy object. A middle-aged woman with a pale, yellowish face emerges from the apartment, pushing a heavy suitcase filled with transparent glue. She stops when she sees Jiang Yan standing by the door.
descriptions.intent: The woman is moving her supplies out of the apartment.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, violent entrance and the confrontation with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: The woman is physically burdened; Jiang Yan is surprised.
descriptions.relation: The woman is suspicious of Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: A tense confrontation begins.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman confronts Jiang Yan with suspicion, asking why she is there while glancing behind Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan responds calmly, questioning why she cannot be there. The woman attempts to return to her apartment but stops when she notices a small boy by the corridor window.

location.name: Hallway
location.description: near the door of 1604 and the corridor window

descriptions.intent: The woman wants to avoid interaction and return to her home.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the woman and Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: The woman is wary and defensive; Jiangly is calm.
descriptions.relation: The woman is hostile toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The woman's attention is diverted by the boy's presence.

descriptions.title: Little Boy
descriptions.scene: The little boy, Jiang Xiaohu, secretly hides a handmade fishing rod as he watches from the window. His mother notices him and begins to scold him loudly for standing in the rain with rolled-up sleeves. She reprimands him for the danger of lightning and his lack of common sense.
descriptions.intent: The boy is trying to fish/play without being caught.
descriptions.conflict: The mother's intense verbal reprimand and the physical danger of the storm.
descriptions.state: The boy is being sneaky; the woman is angry and distressed.
descriptions.relation: Mother is scolding her son.
descriptions.outcome: The boy is caught in the act.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman continues to yell at the boy, accusing him of using the bathroom excuse to go to the corridor. She expresses deep depression and helplessness through her loud, angry outbursts. Jiang Yan feels the physical impact of the woman's screaming on her eardrums.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to discipline the boy and vent her frustration.
descriptions.conflict: The woman's emotional breakdown and the noise level.
descriptions.state: The woman is highly agitated and depressed; Jiang Yan is overwhelmed by the noise.
descriptions.relation: The woman is venting at the boy and Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is physically distressed by the noise.

descriptions.title: Little Boy
descriptions.scene: The boy, Jiang Xiaohu, looks guilty and frightened, claiming he did nothing wrong. He remains motionless by the window, where his back and collar are already soaked from the dampness. He watches his mother's escalating anger.
descriptions.intent: The boy wants to defend himself against the accusations.
descriptions.conflict: The boy's guilt versus his mother's overwhelming rage.
descriptions.state: The boy is fearful and confused.

outfits.Little Boy: wet clothing at the collar and back

descriptions.relation: The boy is the target of the mother's anger.
descriptions.outcome: The boy is unable to escape the confrontation.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman reaches a breaking point, crying as she tells the boy to go home. She complains about the burden of caring for two fathers, one of whom is disabled, and expresses her exhaustion with the boy's disobedience. The boy's face contorts in confusion and his hand clenches.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to end the confrontation and express her life's hardships.
descriptions.conflict: The woman's internal struggle with her domestic life and the boy's behavior.
descriptions.state: The woman is weeping and enraged; the boy is confused and distressed.
descriptions.relation: The woman is expressing deep resentment toward her family situation.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with the boy in a state of emotional turmoil.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman expresses her deep frustration and resentment toward her life through angry curses and tears. She stands near her son, visibly agitated and emotionally unstable. Her anger is directed at her son's disobedience.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to vent her internal distress and reprimand her son.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal misery and resentment toward her life.
descriptions.relation: Mother to Jang Xiaohu
descriptions.outcome: She becomes increasingly aggressive toward her son.

descriptions.title: Jang Xiaohu
descriptions.scene: Jang Xiaohu watches his mother with a confused and tense expression. He grips his hand near the window tightly before relaxing slightly. He attempts to plead with his mother to let him go first.

location.name: Near a window in the house

descriptions.intent: Jang Xiaohu wants to avoid conflict and asks his mother to let him pass first.
descriptions.conflict: His mother's intense anger and scrutiny.
props: A hidden object in his hand
descriptions.relation: Son to the woman
descriptions.outcome: The woman notices his suspicious behavior.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman approaches Jang Xiaohu with three large strides, looking as if she is aboutging to attack him. She demands to know what he is hiding in his hand. She reaches out to seize him.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to uncover what her son is hiding.
descriptions.conflict: Jang Xiaohu's refusal to reveal the object.
descriptions.relation: Confrontational
descriptions.outcome: Jang Xiaohu becomes more nervous.

descriptions.title: Jang Xiaohu
descriptions.scene: Jang Xiaohu shrinks back and presses himself against the wall to protect his secret. He cries out, begging her not to break his fishing rod again. He explains he was only trying to help the family by catching fish.
descriptions.intent: Jang Xiaohu wants to protect his fishing rod and justify his actions.
descriptions.conflict: His mother's anger and her history of breaking his things.
descriptions.relation: Defiant yet pleading
descriptions.outcome: The woman becomes enraged by his excuses.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman loses her temper, complaining about the domestic chores like sewing bedsheets. She reaches a breaking point of madness and strikes Jang Xiaohu hard across the cheek. She then forcibly grabs his right arm.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to punish her son and end his disobedience.
descriptions.conflict: The boy's perceived laziness and the burden of housework.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor to victim
descriptions.outcome: Jang Xiaohu is slapped and his arm is forcibly exposed.

descriptions.title: Jang Xiaohu
descriptions.scene: As the woman pulls his arm away, a large, dark, mutated leech is revealed attached to his wrist. The leech is massive, covering half of his arm, and is writhing. Jang Xiaohu is too afraid of his mother's wrath to even look at it.
descriptions.intent: Jang Xiaohu wants to avoid his mother's anger.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a dangerous, mutated parasite.
descriptions.relation: Victim of the parasite
descriptions.outcome: The presence of the leech is revealed to the woman.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters through a fire door and stops dead in her tracks upon seeing the leech. She recognizes that this is not a normal leech, but a mutated version. She observes the physical weight and impact of the creature on the boy's arm.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a mutated biological threat.
descriptions.relation: Observer to the scene
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the danger of the mutation.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman screams in horror upon seeing the leech. She strikes Jang Xiaohu on the head and face again. She begins to cry and yell about how her children are driving her to an early grave.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to vent her hysteria and express her despair.
descriptions.conflict: The horror of the leech and her overwhelming life stress.
descriptions.relation: Aggressive and panicked
descriptions.outcome: The situation escalates into physical violence and chaos.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stands frozen, reflecting on her own childhood and how her parents' harsh parenting methods shaped her. She realizes that her current parenting style is a continuation of that cycle. She observes the woman's cruelty.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is internally processing her past and present.
descriptions.conflict: The realization of generational trauma and harsh upbringing.
descriptions.relation: Distant observer
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to intervene.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman's eyes narrow as she focuses on the leech. Driven by reflex, she reaches out to grab the leech to remove it from the boy's arm. She begins to pull the creature away.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to remove the leech from her son.
descriptions.conflict: The leech is firmly attached to the boy's skin.
descriptions.state: Reflexive and determined.|Outlam: The woman pulls the leech, causing injury.

descriptions.title: Jang Xiaohu
descriptions.scene: As the woman pulls, a piece of Jang Xiaohu's skin is torn from his wrist. Blood begins to spurt from the wound like needle punctures. The leech remains firmly attached, stimulated by the fresh blood.
descriptions.intent: Jang Xiaohu is a passive victim of the physical trauma.
descriptions.conflict: The physical tearing of flesh and the leech's grip.
descriptions.relation: Victim
descriptions.outcome: The wound becomes more severe.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers a traditional method used by farmers to remove leeches by slapping them to break the suction. She quickly instructs the woman to clap or hit the leech hard. She warns that the mutation might have changed the leech's biology.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to save the boy from the leech and the injury.
descriptions.conflict: Uncertainty if the old method will work on a mutated creature.
descriptions.relation: Advisor to the woman
descriptions.outcome: The woman attempts the suggested method.

descriptions.title: Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman, overwhelmed and confused, strikes the leech with immense force. The impact is so violent it resembles hitting a cow. The leech finally loses its grip and falls to the ground.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to force the leech off the boy.
descriptions.conflict: The leech's powerful mutated suction.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor to the leech
descriptions.outcome: The leech falls to the ground, successfully detached.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged Woman
descriptions.scene: The woman strikes the mutated leech with great force to dislodge it from Zhang Xiaohu. The impact is so powerful it causes the leech to detach and fall to the ground with a click. The physical trauma to the wound makes Zhang Xiaohu's initial injury even more painful.
descriptions.intent: The woman wants to remove the leech from Zhang Xiaohu's body. She uses physical force to break the leech's suction.
descriptions.conflict: The leech has mutated, making traditional removal methods uncertain. The physical strike causes additional pain to the victim.
descriptions.state: The woman is shocked and overwhelmed. Zhang Xiaohu is in intense physical pain.
descriptions.relation: The woman is acting as a protector/attacker for Zhang Xiasu
descriptions.outcome: The leech falls to the ground, but the injury is worsened.

descriptions.title: Zhang Xiaohu
descriptions.scene: The leech, sensing blood, crawls toward Zhang Xiaohu's wound. Terrified, Zhang Xiaohu throws his handmade fishing rod away and begins to run toward his home with trembling legs. The woman follows him, threatening him with a stick.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Xiaohu wants to escape the leech and reach safety. He seeks to flee the immediate threat.
descriptions.conflict: The leech is pursuing him due to the scent of blood. His physical fear makes him unable to stand firmly.
descriptions.state: Zhang Xiahu is trembling and terrified. The woman is angry and threatening.
descriptions.relation: The woman is threatening Zhang Xiaohu with physical punishment.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Xiahu flees toward his home.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Inside the house, the woman's screams and angry curses are heard from a room. Jiang Yan observes the leech writhing in the corridor and recalls that alcohol might kill it. She doubts if the mutation has rendered alcohol ineffective.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to kill the mutated leech. She is searching for a solution to the biological threat.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether alcohol works on mutated organisms creates internal doubt.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is frowning and contemplative.|Outments:
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to attempt using alcohol.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a 500ml glass bottle of alcohol from her backpack. She suppresses her fear and approaches the writhing leech in the corridor. The door to apartment 1604 creaks open wider.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to apply the alcohol to the leech. She intends to neutralize the threat.
descriptions.conflict: She must overcome her internal fear of the creature.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is fearful but determined.
descriptions.outcome: She approaches the leech.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: A man with disheveled, greasy hair and an unkempt beard limps out of apartment 1604, leaning on a stick. His legs are wrapped in scraps of cloth taken from old clothing, and fresh blood is visible on the bandages. He points at the leech and accuses Jiang Yan of seeing the blood at the door.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to confront Jiang Yan regarding the blood. He seeks to assert dominance or deflect attention.
descriptions.conflict: He is physically injured and limping. He confronts Jiang Yan aggressively.
descriptions.state: The man is angry and aggressive. Jiang Yan is observant.
descriptions.relation: The man is hostile toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The man prepares to attack the leech.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man stabs the leech with his stick, causing a stream of light red fluid to spurt out. Jiang Yan instinctively recoils as the leech begins to writhe in pain. The man remains unfazed by the creature's reaction.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to kill or subdue the leech. He uses his stick as a weapon.
descriptions.conflict: The leech reacts violently to the pain, causing Jiang Yan to flinch.
descriptions.state: The man is calm and undeterred. Jiang Yan is shocked and recoils.
descriptions.relation: The man is acting aggressively near Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The leech is wounded and spraying fluid.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man takes a crumpled plastic bag from his pocket and begins to trap the leech inside. He crouches down, using the stick to manipulate the creature, and ties the bag's neck tightly with both hands. He then throws the bag into the house with a loud thud.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to capture the leech in the bag. He intends to move the threat inside.
descriptions.conflict: The leech is difficult to contain due to its writhing.
descriptions.state: The man is focused and physically strained.
descriptions.outcome: The leech is successfully trapped and thrown into the house.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man uses his crutches to move toward a window and leans his head out to look. He turns back to Jiang Yan and issues a chilling threat, warning her that his son lost half an arm to these leeches. He tells her that if she speaks of this, he will ensure she suffers.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to intimidate Jiang Yan into silence. He uses the threat of violence to protect his secret.
descriptions.conflict: He threatens her life and well-being if she reveals the truth.
descriptions.state: The man is cold and menacing. Jiang Yan is stoic and refuses to argue.
descriptions.relation: The man is threatening Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to ignore him and walk upstairs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the man's plan to eat the mutated leeches for protein during the famine. She realizes that while strange, the high protein content makes it a logical, albeit desperate, survival tactic. She decides that if he handles the leeches, it will reduce her own troubles.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid further conflict. She seeks to find a way to navigate the building safely.
descriptions.conflict: The moral or physical repulsion of eating leeches vs. the necessity of survival.
descriptions.state: Jiangly is becoming more relaxed and pragmatic.
descriptions.outcome: She feels more relaxed about the situation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her surroundings to ensure she is alone. She pulls out a flashlight to illuminate the dark corridor and begins her ascent. As she reaches the 19th floor, she hears loud, unmistakable sexual noises coming from behind a fire door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her destination without being seen. She uses light to navigate the darkness.
descriptions.conflict: The loud, disruptive noises from the fire door interrupt her path.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is cautious and focused.
descriptions.outcome: She encounters a new disturbance.

descriptions.title: Group of Men
descriptions.scene: A group of young men are gathered near the fire door, making loud, boisterous comments about the sexual acts occurring behind the door. They are celebrating the "excitement" of the situation. Jiang Yan recognizes them as potentially being different from the usual residents of Building A.
descriptions.intent: The men want to enjoy and mock the situation. They are looking for entertainment.
descriptions.conflict: Their loud presence and behavior create a confrontation with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: The men are rowdy and disrespectful. Jiang Yan is frowning and wary.
descriptions.relation: The men are being disruptive to Jiang Yan's path.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan attempts to speed up her pace to avoid them.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars (New Character)
descriptions.scene: A tall, muscular man with facial scars bursts through the fire door, reaching for his belt as if heading to a restroom. He spots Jiang Yan and immediately mocks her, accusing her of spying behind the door. He begins to make lewd comments about her body.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to harass and intimidate Jiang Yan. He seeks to exert sexualized dominance through verbal abuse.
descriptions.conflict: He confronts her directly and uses predatory language.
descriptions.state: The man is predatory and aggressive. Jiang Yan is the target of his gaze.
descriptions.relation: The man is aggressively targeting Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The man stares at her with an indecent expression, leaving her in a state of confrontation.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man with scars finishes speaking and looks down at Jiang Yan with an obscene expression. He comments on her physical features, specifically her eyes, eyebrows, and waist. He makes an indecorous gesture toward her with his long-nailed hand.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to objectify and intimidate Jiang Yan through lewd comments. He seeks to assert dominance by commenting on her body.
descriptions.conflict: His vulgar behavior and predatory gaze create a hostile atmosphere.
descriptions.state: The man is excited and obscene; Jiang Yan is unusually calm.
descriptions.relation: The man is predatory toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The man successfully insults Jiang Yan's dignity but fails to provoke her usual violent reaction.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the man's behavior but chooses not to attack him with a knife as she normally would. She decides to maintain her composure because she does not know his identity or background. She remains silent and continues her movement.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to remain calm and patient to avoid unnecessary conflict with an unknown person. She seeks to gather information through observation.
descriptions.conflict: Her instinct is to retaliate, but her survival instinct dictates caution.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing her adversary.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan successfully suppresses her impulse to use violence.

descriptions.title: Men in Uniform
descriptions.scene: A group of men dressed like the man with scars open a fire door. They attempt to speak to Jiang Yan, but they are silenced by a foul odor emanating from the corridor. They stand there, unable to proceed with their speech.

location.name: A corridor near a fire door

descriptions.intent: The men want to communicate something to Jiang Yan. They enter the space to confront or interact with her.
descriptions.conflict: A strong, unpleasant stench from the corridor prevents them from speaking.
descriptions.state: Hesitant and physically repulsed by the smell.

outfits.Men in Uniform: Clothing similar to the man with scars

descriptions.relation: They are subordinates or associates of the man with scars.
descriptions.outcome: The men are silenced by the environmental condition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks coldly at the group of men. She puts her hands back into her bags and continues walking up the stairs. She identifies these men as the likely perpetrators of the break-in at Building A.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to continue her ascent without engaging the group. She seeks to identify the intruders.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of the intruders blocks her path and forces her to evaluate them.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan views them as suspects.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan continues her movement upward.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices the golden-red faded logo of "Golden Shield Security" on the chest of one man's black work uniform. She recalls that Du Ziten introduced this company to her previously when viewing the Bay Palms property.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the organization the men belong to. She uses her memory to connect the logo to a known entity.
descriptions.conflict: The dim lighting makes identification difficult.
descriptions.state: Observant and reflective.|Outters: Man=Black work uniform with a golden-red faded "Golden Shield Security" logo;Jiang Yan=Not specified
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is analyzing the enemy's affiliation.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan identifies the group as Golden Shield Security.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls the reputation of Golden Shield Security in Anming City. She notes that the company handles both legal and illegal business, ranging from government institutions to nightclubs. She realizes the varying quality of their staff.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the threat level of the security company. She seeks to understand the nature of the people she is facing.
descriptions.conflict: The complexity of the company's dual nature makes the men's motives hard to predict.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan forms a hypothesis about the intruders' identity.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan concludes that the intruders in Building A were likely members of the Golden Shield security group. She suspects the leader might be a property manager or a security official. She notes the organized nature of the recent intrusion.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deduce the hierarchy and organization of the intruders. She seeks to understand the scale of the operation.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of recent movement from the group makes their current presence strange.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan identifies the intruders as a professional group.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the quietness of the lower floors and realizes the residents are hiding in their rooms due to the lack of water and electricity. She understands that people are afraid to leave their supplies vulnerable.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the current social climate of the building. She seeks to evaluate the level of danger in the hallways.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of information and the isolation of the residents create uncertainty.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan understands the vulnerability of the residents.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man with scars becomes insulted because Jiang Yan ignores his direct address. He shouts at her, calling her deaf, and loses his sense of pride.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to force Jiang Yan to acknowledge him. He seeks to regain his lost dignity through aggression.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's intentional silence and lack of response.
descriptions.relation: The man is confronting Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The man's frustration leads to an escalation of tension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stops and turns around to face the man. She delivers a cold insult, telling him that there is plenty of incense on the ground but it cannot stop him. She maintains a chilling demeanor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to provoke or unsettle the man with a sharp retort. She seeks to assert her psychological dominance.
descriptions.conflict: The man's verbal aggression.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is confronting the man.
descriptions.outcome: The man's reaction shifts from anger to a threat of violence.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The men behind the man with scars react to Jiang Yan's words with suppressed laughter. However, they notice the man with scars hiding his hands behind his back, suggesting a hidden weapon.
descriptions.intent: The men are reacting to the verbal exchange. They are observing the leader's physical movements.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the desire to laugh and the fear of the leader's reaction.
descriptions.relation: The subordinates are watching the leader.
descriptions.outcome: The group's posture reveals they are prepared for a fight.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man with scars pulls a sharp, shining dagger from his waist. He prepares to use it against Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan remains motionless, intentionally keeping her hand in her pocket to prepare her own weapon.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to threaten or attack Jiang Yan with the knife. Jiang Yan wants to prepare her pistol from her "space" without being seen.
descriptions.conflict: The man's sudden physical threat and the need for Jiang Yan to hide her counter-move.
props: shining dagger; Jiang Yan's hidden pistol
descriptions.relation: The man is initiating a physical attack; Jiang Yan is preparing a defense.
descriptions.outcome: A high-stakes standoff is established as the man draws his weapon.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man with scars reaches for his waist and pulls out a sharp, cold-shining dagger. He prepares to advance toward Jian Yan.

location.name: Stairwell/Corridor
location.description: an area with stairs and access to various floors

descriptions.intent: The man wants to threaten Jian Yan with his weapon. He intends to use the dagger to intimidate or harm her.
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan is standing in his path. He must overcome her presence to reach her.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic
descriptions.outcome: The man prepares to move forward with the weapon.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan intentionally places her hand in her pocket to prepare for a tactical maneuver. She uses the pocket as cover to hide the process of retrieving a weapon from her spatial storage.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to retrieve her pistol without alerting the attackers. She seeks to create a seamless transition from a passive pose to a combat stance.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of pulling an object from "space" without looking suspicious. She must avoid drawing attention to her supernatural ability.
descriptions.relation: Defensive
descriptions.outcome: She successfully positions her hand to draw the weapon.

descriptions.title: The Group of Attackers
descriptions.scene: The young men behind the scarred man reveal their weapons, including powerful internet-bought rifles with serrated projectiles. They prepare to surround Jian Yan.
descriptions.intent: The group intends to overpower Jian Yan using superior firepower. They aim to use their heavy weaponry to suppress her.
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan's potential retaliation. The group faces the risk of her having a hidden advantage.
descriptions.relation: Hostile
descriptions.outcome: The group forms a threatening perimeter.

descriptions.title: Man with Scars
descriptions.scene: The man with scars takes a large, menacing step toward Jian Yan with a sinister smile. He reaches his hand toward her neck while holding the dagger.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to physically overpower Jian Yan and use the dagger against her throat. He aims to complete the assassination or capture.
descriptions.conflict: Jian Yan's sudden reaction. He is moving into her personal space.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor
descriptions.outcome: He brings the knife close to her neck.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan pulls the pistol from her pocket with lightning speed and points it directly at the man's head. She engages the safety with her thumb and places her finger on the trigger.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to neutralize the threat immediately. She aims to use lethal force to stop the man's advance.
descriptions.conflict: The man is physically very close to her. She must act before he can strike.
descriptions.relation: Counter-attacker
descriptions.outcome: The man is held at gunpoint.

descriptions.title: The Group of Attackers
descriptions.scene: The men holding the rifles are stunned by the sight of the black muzzle of the gun. Their fear begins to diminish as they realize the situation has changed.
descriptions.intent: The men are reacting to the sudden shift in power. They are assessing whether to continue the attack or retreat.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a real firearm. They are caught between their original plan and the new threat.
descriptions.state: Stunned and transitioning from fear to observation.|Out

descriptions.title: Scared Boy
descriptions.scene: The scarred boy feels overwhelming fear and contemplates surrendering by raising a white flag. He nervously asks Miss Jiang for permission to leave, fearing Jiang Yan's pistol might accidentally discharge. He places his hands on his head in a submissive gesture.
descriptions.intent: The boy wants to ensure his safety and avoid an accidental shooting. He seeks permission to depart the confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: He is terrified of the weapon held by Jiang Yan. The tension of the standoff creates intense psychological pressure.
descriptions.relation: The boy is subordinate and fearful of Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The boy remains in a state of high tension, waiting for a response.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the group of men and decides that while she could ignore them, she must neutralize their threat by disarming them. She looks at the rifles held by the men and issues an ultimatum. She commands that while the people may leave, all weapons must be surrendered.

location.name: A corridor filled with a foul odor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to disarm the group to prevent future violence. She aims to "break the claws" of these bad people.
descriptions.conflict: The men are armed with rifles and represent a potential threat. She must balance her desire to leave with the need to ensure they are no longer dangerous.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is in a position of authority over the men.
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a condition for their departure: the surrender of all weapons.

descriptions.title: The Men
descriptions.scene: The men begin to plead with Jiang Yan, using hunger and religious oaths to beg for the rifles. They claim they need the rifles for fishing and swear by God that they will never use them for evil. They promise that if they break this oath, God will strike them with lightning.
descriptions.intent: The men want to keep their rifles for survival and food. They attempt to manipulate Jiangly Yan's mercy through begging and religious threats.
descriptions.conflict: They are facing the loss of their primary tools for fishing and survival. They must convince Jiang Yan to let them keep the weapons.
descriptions.relation: The men are pleading with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The men create a chaotic atmosphere of begging and confusion.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan evaluates the value of the rifles, noting they are not worth much money but are highly effective weapons for long-range combat. She dismisses the idea of being a "good person" and asserts that bad habits cannot be changed. She suddenly points her pistol directly at the scarred man's forehead.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assert dominance and demonstrate that she is not easily swayed by pleas. She intends to intimidate the leader.
descriptions.conflict: The men's pleas attempt to soften her resolve. She chooses violence/intimidation to maintain control.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is threatening the scarred man.
descriptions.outcome: The scarred man is physically threatened by the gun at his forehead.

descriptions.title: The Scared Boy
descriptions.scene: The scarred man, unable to see the tension behind him, waves his hands downward and shouts angrily. He commands the others to drop their rifles. The boy, feeling the pressure, reluctantly places his rifle on the ground.
descriptions.intent: The man with scars wants to de-escalating the immediate threat to his group. The boy wants to comply to avoid being shot.
descriptions.conflict: The man's anger clashes with the need to surrender weapons. The boy struggles with the reluctance of losing his weapon.
descriptions.relation: The man with scars is commanding the boy.
descriptions.outcome: The boy drops his rifle on the ground.

descriptions.title: The Reinforcements
descriptions.scene: A group of people, including Sun Zhentao, Yi Qing, and Suda, suddenly appear, having rushed down from the twentieth floor. Jiang Yan is momentarily surprised by their sudden arrival. The group descends despite the distance and the noise levels.

location.name: The lower level of the building

descriptions.intent: The group has descended to intervene or assist in the situation. Jiang Yan's vigilance momentarily wavers due to their unexpected presence.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of new characters disrupts the existing standoff. The physical distance they traveled suggests an intense pursuit or reaction.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is surprised; the newcomers are focused.

outfits.Sun Zentao: No specific clothing mentioned; Yi Qing=No specific clothing mentioned; Suda=No specific clothing mentioned.

descriptions.relation: The newcomers join the existing confrontation.
descriptions.outcome: The dynamic of the standoff changes with the arrival of the third party.

descriptions.title: The Reinforcements
descriptions.scene: The newcomers arrive heavily armed with brutal weapons. Sun Zhentao carries a bright bone cleaver, Yi Qing carries a bloody hammer, and Suda holds a long, explosion-proof steel fork. Suda aggressively presses the fork against the scarred man's neck.
descriptions.intent: The newcomers intend to intimidate and physically restrain the men. Suda specifically aims to threaten the leader.
descriptions.conflict: The newcomers are using aggressive, violent tools to confront the men. The scarred man is caught off guard by the sudden physical threat.
descriptions.state: Aggressive and intense.|Outlam: Sun Zentao=No specific clothing mentioned; Yi Qing=No specific clothing mentioned; Suda=No specific clothing mentioned.
descriptions.relation: The newcomers are attacking/threatening the men.
descriptions.outcome: The scarred man is physically pinned by Suda's fork.

descriptions.title: Yi Qing and Sun Zentao
descriptions.scene: Yi Qing moves toward the group of men to collect the surrendered rifles. Sun Zentao follows him, keeping a watchful eye on the surroundings. Yi Qing successfully gathers a total of six rifles from the area.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qing wants to disarm the opponents by collecting the weapons. Sun Zentaao wants to provide cover and monitor for threats.
descriptions.conflict: They must move through the tension of the standoff to reach the weapons. They are operating in a high-stakes environment.

outfits.Yi Qing: No specific clothing mentioned; Sun Zentao=No specific clothing mentioned.

descriptions.relation: They are working together as a team.
descriptions.outcome: The weapons are successfully collected.

descriptions.title: The Scared Boy
descriptions.scene: The scarred man, feeling completely humiliated and helpless under the pressure of the steel fork, reaches his breaking point. Jiang Yan gives the command "Roll" (or "Retreat/Move"). The man takes a large step back and jumps from the third floor toward the fire door.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to escape the immediate physical threat and humiliation. He seeks to flee the scene.
descriptions.conflict: He is trapped between the gun and the steel fork. He must perform a dangerous physical maneuver to escape.
descriptions.relation: The man is fleeing from Jiang Yan and Suda.
descriptions.outcome: The man jumps toward the fire door to escape.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: The remaining men quickly reach out to help the man stabilize his step as he retreats. They then hurriedly and nervously close the fire door behind them. Simultaneously, the people on the upper and lower floors finish eating and slam their own fire doors shut with a loud noise.
descriptions.intent: The men want to secure their escape and prevent pursuit. Sun Zentao is observing the aftermath of the chaos.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden movement and noise create a chaotic, loud environment. They are trying to seal themselves off from the confrontation.
descriptions.relation: The men are acting in coordination to escape.
descriptions.outcome: The fire door is closed, separating the groups.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan and Sun Zentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zentao looks up at Jiang Yan and suggests they ascend to a higher level to discuss the situation properly. Jiang Yan complies by putting her pistol on safety and stowing it in her backpack. She uses a flashlight to illuminate the dark, foul-smelling stairs as they begin their ascent.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zentao wants to move to a more private/secure location to talk. Jiang Yan wants to secure her weapon and navigate the darkness.
descriptions.conflict: The stairs are dark and unpleasant, making movement difficult. They must navigate the environment while maintaining alertness.
descriptions.state: Calm but weary.|Outments: Jiang Yan=No specific clothing mentioned; Sun Zentao=No specific clothing mentioned.
descriptions.relation: They are moving together as allies.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to ascend the stairs in silence.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts her pistol on safety and places it inside her backpack. She prepares to move upward through the dark structure.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her weapon and continue her ascent. She intends to navigate the stairs despite the unpleasant odor.
descriptions.conflict: The stairs are dark and have a foul smell. The environment is physically unpleasant.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The weapon is secured, and she prepares to climb.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a flashlight to illuminate the dark staircase as she climbs upward. She moves silently through the dark, smelly corridor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see her path to avoid obstacles. She aims to reach the upper floor.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness and the stench of the staircase hinder her progress.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the thirty-second floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Sudai, Sun Zhentao, Yi Qing
descriptions.scene: Upon reaching the thirty-second floor, Jiang Yan pushes open the fire door. Several people, including Sudai, Sun Zhentao, and Yi Qing, remove their masks. The smell is overwhelming to Jiang Yan due to her heightened senses.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to breathe fresh air after being masked. Jiang Yan wants to endure the sensory overload.
descriptions.conflict: The intense, unpleasant smell attacks Jiang Yan's heightened sense of smell. The group is dealing with the aftermath of a situation.
descriptions.state: Sudai is eager to breathe; Jiang Yan is physically overwhelmed by the scent.

outfits.Jiang Yan: No mask; Sudai=Removing mask; Sun Zhentao=Removing mask; Yi Qing=Removing mask

descriptions.relation: The group is reunited at the floor.
descriptions.outcome: The masks are removed, exposing the group to the foul air.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sudai takes deep breaths of the foul air. Sun Zhentao smiles at his wife and teases her about her insistence on descending despite the warnings.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to breathe the air. Sun Zhentao wants to interact playfully with his wife.
descriptions.conflict: The air is extremely unpleasant and "smoky."
descriptions.state: Sudai is eager; Sun Zhentao is amused.
descriptions.relation: Husband and wife, playful interaction.
descriptions.outcome: A moment of domestic levity amidst the grim surroundings.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai looks at Jiang Yan and strikes an explosion-proof steel fork against the ground. She declares that everyone is responsible for saving Jiang Yan and claims her own bravery.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to assert her responsibility and bravery. She aims to motivate the group.
descriptions.conflict: The weight of responsibility for Jiang Yan's safety.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is acting as a protector/comrade.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai makes a public declaration of duty.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan laughs loudly at Sudai's dramatic words and expression. She feels a rare moment of genuine happiness, unlike her previous life in a basement.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to express her amusement. She seeks a moment of emotional release.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her previous traumatic life in a basement.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan experiences a moment of true happiness.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jiang Yan, Yi Qing, Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sudai compliments Jiang Yan's beauty when she smiles, making Jiang Yan feel embarrassed. Yi Qing and Sun Zhentao are present but cannot see her full face clearly because her phone battery is dead.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to compliment Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan wants to hide her embarrassment.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's inability to show her full face due to the dead phone battery.
descriptions.state: Sudai is admiring; Jiang Yan is embarrassed.
descriptions.relation: The group is becoming closer than they were days ago.
descriptions.outcome: A moment of intimacy and connection is established.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan covers her mouth while laughing and announces her intention to go home. She reflects on her suppressed urge to kill a man with a scar earlier.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to end the gathering and go home. She intends to tend to her child and clean herself.
descriptions.conflict: The lingering impulse to kill the man with the scar. The physical discomfort of being sweaty and smelly.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She announces her departure.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao observes Sudai's devotion and reflects on how Jiang Yan has helped improve Sudai's depressive state following the loss of their child. He feels deep gratitude toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to acknowledge the positive impact Jiang Yan has had on his wife's mental health.
descriptions.conflict: The past trauma of their child's death and Sudai's depression.
descriptions.relation: Husband observing his wife's recovery.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao's gratitude toward Jiang Yan is solidified.

descriptions.title: Yi Qing, Jiang Yan, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Yi Qing approaches Jiang Yan and offers her a pile of collected guns. Sudai playfully slaps Yi Qing's arm for making a "false maneuver."
descriptions.intent: Yi Qing wants to give the weapons to Jiang Yan. Sudai wants to tease Yi Qing.
descriptions.conflict: The awkwardness of the gift-giving.
descriptions.state: Yi Qing is helpful; Sudai is playful.
descriptions.relation: Yi Qing is acting as a supporter; Sudai is teasing him.
descriptions.outcome: The weapons are presented to Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Yi Qing, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao jokes about calling Yi Qing "sister" to avoid calling him "old." Yi Qing is visibly flustered by Jiang Yan's youthful appearance. The group laughs together, creating a warm atmosphere.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to joke around. Yi Qing wants to maintain composure.
descriptions.conflict: Yi Qing's internal reaction to Jiang Yan's beauty.
descriptions.relation: The group's bond is strengthened through humor.
descriptions.outcome: The tension of the "end of the world" is momentarily forgotten.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Yi Qing
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes two books from Yi Qing's hands. She tells him she will only take a small amount and leave the rest for him. Sudai expresses concern about Jiang Yan taking the trophies.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to take only what she needs. Yi Qing wants to provide the books. Sudai wants to protect Jiang Yan's loot.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai's worry about Jiang Yan's collection. Jiang Yan's lack of storage space.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm; Sudai is worried.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is being considerate of the group's resources.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan takes the books, leaving the rest of the weapons behind.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan offers to take only two handfuls of the loot and leave the rest for Sudai. She smiles, explaining that her spatial storage is already crowded with specialized fishing gear.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to be fair and not take everything for herself. She aims to minimize conflict by sharing the spoils.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai is worried about the ethics of taking such a large trophy.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is being generous toward Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to take only a symbolic amount to avoid appearing greedy.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai attempts to persuade Jiang Yan not to take the loot, arguing it is a hard-earned trophy. She expresses deep concern regarding the distribution of the items.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to protect Jiang Yan from the burden of taking too much. She wants to maintain a sense of justice.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai's moral hesitation clashes with Jiang Yan's practical decision.
descriptions.relation: Sudai acts as a moral compass for Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai fails to stop Jiang Yan from taking the two handfuls.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao interrupts Sudai, advising her to show respect to Jiang Yan's decision rather than trying to command her. He shifts the focus to the importance of following Jiang Yan's lead.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to maintain peace and respect the hierarchy established by Jiang Yan. He wants to prevent further argument.
descriptions.conflict: Sun Zhentao must mediate between Sudai's protest and Jiang Yan's action.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as a mediator between the two women.
descriptions.outcome: The argument settles, and the group accepts the loot distribution.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao looks warily at the fire door before turning to Jiang Yan to deliver a warning. He reveals that the people they recently encountered are not part of their community but are actually a gang.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to warn Jiang Yan about the true nature of the newcomers. He aims to increase her situational awareness.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden realization of a threat from a criminal gang.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao provides critical intelligence to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan learns that the group they met is a criminal gang.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan pretends to be surprised by the news of the gang's identity. She reflects on her recent discovery that the term "gang" applies to those involved in criminal activities.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to mask her true level of knowledge. She is processing the new information about the local criminal element.
descriptions.conflict: The internal realization of the danger posed by the gang.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan acknowledges the definition of a gang.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao explains how the gang infiltrated the settlement during a recent rainstorm. He describes how they used the chaos and the deaths of others to hide in empty houses and eventually seize control of the lower floors.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to provide a full history of the gang's rise to power. He aims to explain the current political landscape of the building.
descriptions.conflict: The gang's expansion and the loss of control over the lower levels.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is the informant.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan understands how the gang established its presence.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao identifies the gang as an outsourced property management team from Golden Shield Security Company, led by a man named Malun Biao. He reveals that Malun Biao has a criminal record and was previously a police detainee.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to identify the specific leader and the organization behind the takeover. He aims to strip away the anonymity of the enemy.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that the enemy is a structured, professional organization.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zencao provides specific names and backgrounds.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan learns the identity and background of the gang leader.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the morality of violence in the apocalypse, noting that most people have blood on their hands. She decides that the distinction between a murderer and someone acting in self-defense is minimal in the current era.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rationalize the violence of the new world. She aims to find peace with the necessity of combat.
descriptions.conflict: The moral weight of survival and the reality of bloodshed.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan accepts the grim reality of the post-apocalyptic world.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks for clarification on what it means for the gang to "control" the lower floors. She seeks to understand the extent of their authority and their methods of enforcement.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the mechanics of the gang's occupation. She aims to assess the level of threat to the upper floors.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of how the gang maintains order and extracts resources.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan probes Sun Zontao for more details.
descriptions.outcome: The conversation moves toward the gang's specific extortion tactics.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao describes the gang's daily routine of sleeping and playing cards during the day, only to emerge at 8:00 PM to collect goods. He explains that failure to provide goods results in brutal physical violence.

location.name: The lower floors of the building

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to illustrate the terror the gang imposes on the residents. He aims to show the severity of their rule.
descriptions.conflict: The residents' struggle against physical abuse and extortion.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao describes the suffering of the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan learns about the systematic extortion occurring in the building.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao explains that the gang is not interested in useless items like old stocks or electronic funds, but rather in tangible goods like gold, silver, or food. He notes that most food has rotted due to high temperatures.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to clarify what the gang considers valuable. He aims to explain why the residents are being targeted for specific resources.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of usable resources and the loss of traditional currency.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan understands the economic shift toward physical commodities.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao reveals that Malun Biao has forbidden his men from interacting with the residents of the 32nd floor. He suggests the gang is staying away because they fear Jiang Yan's firearm.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to explain the current state of non-aggression between the floors. He aims to highlight the deterrent power of Jiang Yan's weapon.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the gang's expansion and their fear of armed resistance.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao identifies Jiang Yan's weapon as a key factor in their peace.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes her presence and weaponry have influenced the gang's current behavior.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao admits he did not warn Jiang Yan earlier because he thought the gang would stay in their territory. He notes that the gang's influence is spreading layer by layer through the building.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to justify his previous silence. He aims to warn her that the situation is still evolving and potentially dangerous.
descriptions.conflict: The creeping expansion of the gang's control.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao admits his oversight.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is left with the knowledge that the threat is growing.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes that while they have been isolated on the upper floors, the gang is likely aware of their specific location and even knows about the missing items in Hatchunmei's house. She recognizes the vulnerability of their position.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the level of surveillance the gang has on them. She aims to understand how much the enemy knows about their resources.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that they are being watched and targeted.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan understands that their privacy and security are compromised.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao reflects on the recent movements of people from the lower floors and the theft of supplies from the Hatchunmei house. He contemplates the growing organization of the hostile group that used elderly and children as shields. He notes the disparity between their neighbors and these murderous thugs.

location.name: Upper floors
location.description: an area isolated from the lower levels

descriptions.intent: To analyze the current social threat and the strength of the opposing group.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of organized, violent criminals who are more dangerous than mere neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Observing the surrounding community.
descriptions.outcome: He realizes the true danger posed by the organized group.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai questions Yiqing about the sudden fear displayed by a man who broke Tian Zeliang's glasses with a stick. She cannot understand why the person became so terrified. Yiqing explains that human nature is prone to intimidation by pure evil.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to understand the psychological shift in the group.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, inexplicable terror caused by the violent group.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is questioning Yiqing's insight.
descriptions.outcome: Yiqing provides a psychological explanation regarding the fear of evil.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai expresses concern about whether the residents of the 32nd floor will attempt to move in or if they should lock their doors. She shows visible doubt and anxiety about the security of their home.
descriptions.intent: To determine if immediate defensive measures like locking doors are necessary.
descriptions.conflict: The potential threat of encroaching neighbors or invaders.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She considers the necessity of locking the door.

descriptions.title: Xiaowe
descriptions.scene: Xiaowe suggests that locking the door might be unnecessary if the rain stops in two days, as it would hinder the movement of both families. She prioritizes the convenience of entering and exiting the home.
descriptions.intent: To avoid the inconvenience of a locked door during the transition period.
descriptions.conflict: The need for security versus the need for easy access for both families.
descriptions.relation: Advising Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: The decision is made to keep the door unlocked for now.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao observes Jiang Yan's calm demeanor and realizes she has been scouting the 15th and 16th floors. He proposes that they should descend together once the rain stops to increase their safety. He also suggests that he and Yiqing can act as extra security by tapping on window frames.
descriptions.intent: To propose a coordinated plan for scouting and security.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the upcoming descent and the need for extra protection.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is testing Jiang Yan's reaction and proposing a partnership.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan agrees to the plan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan informs the group about the discovery of a mutated leech. After sharing this information, she picks up her rifle and prepares to return to her home.
descriptions.intent: To report a new biological threat and conclude the meeting.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a new, mutated threat in the environment.
descriptions.state: Decisive and focused.|Outting: Jiang Yan=Practical survival gear, carrying a rifle
descriptions.relation: Informing the group.
descriptions.outcome: She leaves the group to return to her apartment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her home and activates the intrusion detection system, setting it to 500V. She then realizes the vulnerability of leaving the system deactivated during long absences.
descriptions.intent: To secure her home and manage the security system.
descriptions.conflict: The risk of intruders like Malung Biao's gang entering while the system is off.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a flaw in her security routine.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates whether to leave her Piranha plant at home to guard the house. She decides against it to avoid exposing the plant's existence, opting instead to secure heavy, immovable items like walls and fireplaces.
descriptions.intent: To find a way to protect her belongings without revealing her secret weapon.
descriptions.conflict: The need for home security versus the need for secrecy regarding the plant.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to focus on securing immovable assets.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the thermometer and notices the outdoor temperature has dropped to 8 degrees. She realizes this will make the water colder and complicate future supply runs, requiring swimming rings.
descriptions.intent: To monitor environmental changes that affect survival.
descriptions.conflict: The dropping temperature making future resource gathering more difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the increasing difficulty of the environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan performs a final check of the house's roof for leaks before exiting. As she steps out, she feels a warm sensation from her palm and realizes Huabao is ready to emerge.
descriptions.intent: To ensure the house is intact and to summon her companion.
descriptions.conflict: The physical need to check for leaks and the management of her companion.
descriptions.relation: Interacting with her plant companion.
descriptions.outcome: She calls Huabary out.

descriptions.title: Huabao
descriptions.scene: The Piranha plant emerges from Jiang Yan's palm, growing until its vines are as tall as Jiang Yan. The plant expresses dissatisfaction and a desire to attack the person who bullied Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to protect Jiang Yan by attacking her enemies.
descriptions.conflict: The plant's predatory instinct and anger toward Jiang Yan's tormentors.

outfits.Huabao: Green vines, small black eyes, scarlet tongue, fangs

descriptions.relation: Huabao acts as a loyal protector to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The plant is ready for combat.

descriptions.title: Piran
descriptions.scene: The piranha plant grows rapidly until its vines reach the same height as Jiang Yan. The creature rolls its black eyes and complains to Jiang Yan about not being allowed to eat a man who was bullying her.

location.name: Jiang Yan's room
location.description: near fertile black soil and growing vines

descriptions.intent: The piranha wants to express its frustration and desire to hunt.
descriptions.conflict: The piranha is restricted by Jiang Yan's rules regarding its use.

outfits.Piran: A plant-like creature with black eyes, an agile red tongue, and vine leaves that can cross like human arms.

descriptions.relation: Piran views Jiang Yan as "mother" but is rebellious.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan acknowledges the piranha's power but insists on saving it for emergencies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the piranha's unique ability to absorb knowledge instantly by touching books or computers. She recalls how the creature consumed all her offline encyclopedias, books, and even digital media like movies and anime at incredible speeds.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan observes the progress of the piranha's learning process.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer speed of the piranha's consumption is overwhelming.
descriptions.state: Amazed and slightly uncertain about the creature's memory capacity.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan acts as a mentor/provider for the piranha.
descriptions.outcome: The piranha has successfully absorbed a vast amount of information.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up at 6:30 AM and immediately checks the external water level. She observes that the water has risen above the 15th floor and is approaching the 16th floor despite the light rain.

location.name: Apartment building
location.description: looking out towards the flooded streets

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the flood situation to plan her departure.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwaters threaten the stability of the environment.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai finishes speaking to Jiang Yan about the impracticality of carrying olives in a way that might cause them to get stuck. She purses her lips and smiles at the absurdity of the situation. The conversation highlights the logistical difficulties of their current survival situation.

location.name: An unspecified room
location.description: likely an apartment, containing survival supplies.

descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to express her thoughts on the current logistical reality. She aims to acknowledge the logic behind Jiang Yan's method despite the apocalyptic context.
descriptions.conflict: The apocalyptic situation makes even small logistical decisions feel heavy and significant.
descriptions.relation: Peers/Companions
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan acknowledges Sudai's point about the end of the world.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan agrees that while the method is extreme, hygiene is less important than utility during the apocalypse. She decides to provide light for the group. Before she can finish her sentence, Yi Qing takes her rubber boat.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to provide light for the descent. She intends to prioritize utility over cleanliness.
descriptions.conflict: Yi Qing preemptively takes the boat, interrupting Jiang Yan's plan.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan and Yi Qing are part of the same group.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is forced to retrieve a flashlight from her backpack.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares to leave the house, wearing a mask and a backpack to hide the fact that she is scavenging supplies. She reflects on the necessity of not leaving the house empty-handed during these times.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to scavenge for supplies without drawing attention to her loot. She aims to be efficient in her foraging.
descriptions.conflict: The need to hide her actions from others in the building.

outfits.Jiang Yan: wearing a mask and a large backpack.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan and Sudai are interacting during preparation.
