descriptions.intent: Song Tian wants to ensure the safety of the team during entry. He intends to secure the area for looting supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The possibility of a broken window or recent intruders poses a threat.
descriptions.state: Cautious and professional.|Outlam: Song Tian=Fully equipped with tactical gear; Others=Fully equipped
descriptions.relation: Song Tian is the leader of the group.
descriptions.outcome: Song Tian prepares his weapons and decides to enter.

descriptions.title: Song Tian
descriptions.scene: Song Tian removes his submachine gun and places it into a tactical waterproof bag. He then removes a small sharp dagger from his leg. He declares his intention to find supplies left by previous tenants.
descriptions.intent: Song Tian wants to prepare his gear for underwater/flooded entry. He aims to maximize the loot from the building.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance mobility with readiness for combat.

outfits.Song Tian: Tactical gear, waterproof bag, dagger on leg

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Song Tian is ready to move into the building.

descriptions.title: Young Man
descriptions.scene: The young man with the child-like face hands a swimming ring to Qi Men and another man. He suggests they should not leave empty-handed because there are likely supplies to be found. He mocks the idea of the area being empty.
descriptions.intent: The young man wants to ensure the mission is profitable. He wants to distribute equipment to the team.
descriptions.conflict: The tension between the desire for profit and the fear of danger.

outfits.Young Man: Short hair; Qi Men=Short hair; Man with mole=Short hair

descriptions.relation: The young man interacts with his teammates.
descriptions.outcome: The swimming ring is passed to the team members.

descriptions.title: Man with mole
descriptions.scene: The man with a mole on his eyebrow smirks at Song Tian. He accuses Song Tian of being a professional criminal and tells him not to make a scene. He questions how someone could have swum here without a boat.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to challenge Song Tian's authority and point out the absurdity of the situation. He seeks to highlight the difficulty of the environment.
descriptions.conflict: A disagreement regarding the legitimacy of the mission and the possibility of intruders.
descriptions.relation: The man with the mole is confrontational toward Song Tian.
descriptions.outcome: Song Tian ignores the provocation.

descriptions.title: Song Tian
descriptions.scene: Song Tian jumps into the water with a splash, ignoring the man's comments. He tells the others to stay back while he checks for danger first. He asserts his authority as the leader assigned from above.
descriptions.intent: Song Tian wants to scout the area personally to ensure it is safe for the rest of the team. He wants to maintain discipline.
descriptions.conflict: The man with the mole's mockery and the physical difficulty of navigating the water.
descriptions.relation: Song Tian asserts dominance over the man with the mole.
descriptions.outcome: Song Tian enters the water to lead the way.

descriptions.title: Man with mole
descriptions.scene: The man with the mole watches Song Tian struggle through the water and laughs quietly. He mocks Song Tian's attempt to act as a hero in a place that isn't a battlefield. He finds the situation ridiculous.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to express his contempt for Song Tian's leadership style. He seeks to undermine the seriousness of the scouting mission.
descriptions.conflict: The man's cynicism versus Song Tian's perceived heroism.
descriptions.relation: The man with the mole is mocking Song Tian.
descriptions.outcome: The man continues to observe with derision.

descriptions.title: Song Tian
descriptions.scene: Song Tian reminds the group that they are on a mission and that other teams have been robbed before. He explains that they are using thermal weapons because of previous attacks. He warns the team to keep their mouths shut to avoid attracting attention.
descriptions.intent: Song Tian wants to enforce secrecy and discipline. He wants to prevent further ambushes by other groups.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of other criminal groups who have been robbing supply teams.
descriptions.relation: Song Tian is commanding the team.
descriptions.outcome: Song Tian puts on his life jacket and jumps into the water to complete the mission.

descriptions.title: Qi Menan
descriptions.scene: Qi Menan warns the others to remain silent regarding Sun Tian's commands. She emphasizes that opposing Sun Tian is equivalent to opposing the higher authorities. After delivering this warning, she puts on a life jacket and jumps into the water.

location.name: An outdoor area near water
location.description: likely a flooded urban zone near an office area.

descriptions.intent: Qi Menan wants to enforce discipline and prevent rebellion against the current leadership. She aims to ensure the group follows the orders of Sun Tian to avoid trouble with superiors.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for dissent or disobedience against the established command structure.

outfits.Qi Menan: A life jacket worn over her clothing.

descriptions.relation: Qi Menan acts as a disciplinarian to the group.
descriptions.outcome: Qi Menan leaves the group by jumping into the water to begin her task.

descriptions.title: Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Lu Junxin reacts to Qi Menan's words with frustration and cynicism. He mutters to himself about how life before the apocalypse was just as much about hard work and being controlled by others. He laments that they are merely "idiots" who do not understand the true nature of their situation.

location.name: An outdoor area near water
location.description: near the edge of a flooded office zone.

descriptions.intent: Lu Jun and his companion are processing the reality of their survival. Lu Junxin wants to vent his existential frustration regarding their lack of agency.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle with the loss of autonomy and the repetitive nature of their labor despite the apocalypse.

outfits.Lu Junxin: Waterproof pants that are visibly wet.

descriptions.relation: Lu Junxin is reflecting on his shared social status with his companions.
descriptions.outcome: Lu Junxin remains in a state of agitated contemplation.

descriptions.title: Jiaozhi, Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Jiaozhi notices that Lu Junxin's waterproof pants are soaked. Lu Junxin becomes angry and accuses Jiaozhi of being evasive about why he didn't handle certain tasks earlier. He points to his own heavy sweating as a reason for his discomfort.
descriptions.intent: Jiaozhi attempts to point out a practical issue with Lu Junxin's gear. Lu Junxin wants to defend himself against any perceived criticism of his work ethic.
descriptions.conflict: A verbal disagreement regarding the cause of Lu Junxin's wet clothing and his recent activities.
descriptions.state: Jiaozhi is shocked; Lu Junxin is angry and defensive.
descriptions.relation: The two characters are arguing in a tense, familiar manner.
descriptions.outcome: The tension between the two men increases.

descriptions.title: Jiaozhi, Qi Menan
descriptions.scene: Jiaozlar changes the subject to avoid further conflict with Lu Junxin. He asks Qi Menan if they should expand the breach to bring the assault boat inside. Qi Menan looks at the water grate and advises against it, noting the water level is too low for a kayak to avoid running aground.

location.name: The edge of a water breach in an office zone.

descriptions.intent: Jiaozhi wants to find a way to maneuver the boat into a safer position. Qi Menan wants to prevent the boat from getting stuck on the bottom.
descriptions.conflict: The physical limitation of the water depth preventing the use of the boat in the breach.
descriptions.state: Jiaozhi is focused on logistics; Qi Menan is cautious and observant.
descriptions.relation: Jiaozhi treats Qi Menan as a senior or leader ("Sister Qi").
descriptions.outcome: They decide to park the boat at the edge instead of entering the breach.

descriptions.title: Qi Menan, Jiaozhi, Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Qi Menan instructs them to find an anchor point and park at the edge. She mentions that Sun Tian has found a private dental clinic upstream and they are searching there first. She tells them they can approach once the boat is parked.

location.name: The edge of the flooded office zone.

descriptions.intent: Qi Menan wants to direct the team toward the specific search target. Jiaozhi wants to follow the instructions to secure the vessel.
descriptions.conflict: The need to coordinate the movement of the boat with the search mission.
descriptions.state: Qi Menan is directing; Jiaozhi is compliant.
descriptions.relation: Qi Menan is providing tactical instructions to the subordinates.
descriptions.outcome: The plan to search the dental clinic is established.

descriptions.title: Jiaozhi, Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Jiaozhi grabs a nylon rope and calls for Lu Junxin's help to secure the boat. He complains about the physical labor of searching for supplies as assigned by their superiors. Lu Junxin begins to rant about the waste of their university educations.

location.name: At the edge of the water

descriptions.intent: Jiaozhi wants to complete the physical task of mooring the boat. Lu Junxin wants to vent his resentment about their current low-status labor.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between their high level of education and their current menial survival tasks.
descriptions.state: Jiaozhi is hardworking; Lu Junxin is wildly rambling and bitter.
descriptions.relation: They are working together as teammates/partners.
descriptions.outcome: Lu Junxin joins Jiaozhi to assist with the boat.

descriptions.title: Lu Junxin, Jiaozhi
descriptions.scene: Lu Junxin continues his rant about how they are wasting their talents. Jiaozhi tries to lighten the mood with a joke about Lu Junxin's IQ. Lu Junxin counters by discussing the heavy losses in manpower and materials during the recent catastrophes.
descriptions.intent: Lu Junxin wants to express his philosophical grievance. Jiaozhi wants to deflect the tension with humor.
descriptions.conflict: The clash between Lu Junxin's serious existential dread and Jiaozhi's attempt at levity.
descriptions.state: Lu Junxin is intensely serious and agitated; Jiaozhi is attempting to be lighthearted.
descriptions.relation: Jiaozhi is attempting to manage Lu Junxin's volatile mood.
descriptions.outcome: The conversation shifts toward the grim reality of the post-apocalyptic world.

descriptions.title: Jiaozhi, Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Jiaozhi argues that even with a high education, they will starve without official support. He points out that they are now essentially soldiers. Lu Junxin becomes enraged, accusing Jiaozable of being a "hairless boy" and telling him not to preach to him.
descriptions.intent: Jiaozhi wants to emphasize the necessity of following the official structure for survival. Lu Junxin wants to shut down Jiaozhi's lecturing.
descriptions.conflict: A direct verbal confrontation and a clash of ideologies regarding survival and authority.
descriptions.state: Jiaozhi is impatient and loud; Lu Junxin is furious.
descriptions.relation: The relationship shifts from camaraderie to open hostility.
descriptions.outcome: The argument reaches a breaking point.

descriptions.title: Jiaozhi, Lu Junxin
descriptions.scene: Jiaozhi tells Lu Junxin to take his complaints to the superiors instead of using them as a "trash can" for negative energy. Jiaozhi grabs a large coil of rescue rope, puts it over his arm, and jumps into the water. Lu Junxin watches him, then grabs a lifebuoy and jumps into the water after him.
descriptions.intent: Jiaozhi wants to end the argument by physically removing himself from the situation. Lu Junxin wants to follow his partner despite his anger.
descriptions.conflict: The interpersonal friction between the two men.
descriptions.state: Jiaozhi is impatient and decisive; Lu Junxin is angry and resentful.
props: A large coil of rescue rope
descriptions.relation: The characters are momentarily separated by their physical actions.
descriptions.outcome: Both men enter the water, leaving the area quiet.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the quietness and realizes the officials are likely setting up a temporary base. She notes the internal management seems disorganized but decides not to focus on it. She moves toward the innermost part of the office zone to find a place to rest.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a secure and quiet place to rest. She also wants to avoid unnecessary social interactions or explanations.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for being confronted by others or having to explain her presence.
descriptions.relation: She is an outsider observing the environment.
descriptions.outcome: She continues her movement deeper into the office area.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates whether to approach the official base to gather information. She decides against it because she fears having to explain why she is there, especially since she broke a window to enter. She decides it is better to just rest alone.

location.name: The inner part of the office zone.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid the social burden of explaining her presence to others. She aims to prioritize rest over information gathering.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle between her curiosity about the base and her desire for privacy/avoidance of conflict.
descriptions.state: Reluctant to socialize and focused on self-preservation.
descriptions.relation: She is avoiding the people mentioned in the previous scenes.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan proceeds deeper into the building to find a place to sleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to avoid explaining her presence at the nearby supply locations to others. She chooses to prioritize rest and continues walking deeper into the facility. She reflects on her solitude and her fear of confrontation.
descriptions.intent: She wants to avoid social interaction and find a place to rest. She aims to move deeper into the building without being noticed.
descriptions.conflict: Her desire for privacy conflicts with the potential need to explain her presence to others.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She continues her movement into the interior of the building.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches an assault boat and turns off her flashlight to remain undetected. She observes the dim light of the early evening, around 6 or 7 PM. She approaches the CEO's office but finds the door locked.

location.name: Near an assault boat
location.description: dim evening light, outside the CEO's office.

descriptions.intent: She wants to enter the office to use it as a base for the night. She aims to avoid detection by others.
descriptions.conflict: The office door is locked, preventing her immediate entry.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finds herself unable to enter the office through the main door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan attempts to turn the door handle but fails to open it. She notices a secretary's workstation nearby with a blue ID card hanging. She decides not to force the door because she suspects someone might be downstairs.
descriptions.intent: She wants to find an alternative way to enter the office. She aims to avoid making noise that might alert people downstairs.
descriptions.conflict: The locked door and the presence of potential people nearby.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a potential way to find keys at the secretary's desk.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the clean workstation containing a computer, a calculator, and two blue document baskets. She searches through the baskets for keys but finds nothing. She then notices a three-door dresser nearby.

location.name: Secretary's workstation
location.description: clean desk with computer and baskets.

descriptions.intent: She wants to find keys to the office. She aims to search the immediate area for useful items.
descriptions.conflict: The document baskets do not contain the keys she needs.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to check the dresser.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a screwdriver to pry open the lock of the low-quality dresser. The lock clicks open easily, revealing a bundle of large and small keys and a house key labeled "CEO".
descriptions.intent: She wants to access the contents of the dresser. She aims to find the CEO's keys.
descriptions.conflict: The drawer is locked.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully obtains the CEO's keys.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan closes the drawer and enters the CEO's office, locking the door behind her. She begins to inspect the 30m² room, noting the large wooden desk, leather chair, and a landscape painting. She observes the floor-to-ceiling windows and the tea table.

location.name: CEO's office
location.description: 30m² room, wooden desk, leather chair, tea table, large windows.

descriptions.intent: She wants to secure her new base. She aims to survey the room for safety and resources.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully secures the room and begins her inspection.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan continues her inspection, noting the view of the docked assault boats and the presence of an antique shelf. She observes the dead plants in porcelain pots and the dry leaves on the carpet. She notices the room's amenities like a refrigerator and air conditioner.

location.name: Inside the CEO's office
location.description: near the window and antique shelf.

descriptions.intent: She wants to assess the condition of the room. She aims to identify available supplies and the state of the environment.
descriptions.conflict: The environment is neglected, with dead plants and dry leaves.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes her visual assessment of the room's contents.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A loud announcement plays over a loudspeaker outside the door, announcing the creation of a temporary base at Anming. The voice calls for citizens to prepare for official ships. Jiang Yan listens, surprised by the sudden noise.
descriptions.intent: She wants to understand the announcement. She aims to monitor the situation outside.
descriptions.conflict: The loud noise disrupts her silence.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She becomes aware of the changing situation outside.

descriptions.title: Song Tian
descriptions.scene: Song Tian and Chaojie approach the office, with Song Tian identifying that a girl is inside based on broken tracks. He notes the girl's small footprints and questions why she only took expired medicine instead of food. Chaojie questions how he knows it is a girl.
descriptions.intent: Song Tian wants to locate the girl. He aims to deduce her identity and motives.
descriptions.conflict: The girl is hiding, and her motives are mysterious.
descriptions.state: Song Tian is observant; Chaojie is skeptical.
descriptions.relation: Song Tian and Chaojie are investigating Jiang Yan's presence.
descriptions.outcome: They narrow down the girl's location to the specific room.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes her wet footprints are likely visible on the dry, dusty floor. She deduces that since she has no need for food, she must have an abundant supply. She realizes her tracks are easy to trace due to the humidity and low temperature.
descriptions.intent: She wants to analyze her own vulnerability. She aims to understand how she was detected.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical tracks (wet footprints) betray her location.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes her location is compromised and concludes she must appear wealthy in supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stands in the office, holding a fire axe with a loudspeaker hanging from her chest. She observes the area while the announcement continues to play. She remains alert as she processes the realization that her tracks are visible.
descriptions.intent: She wants to maintain her composure. She aims to prepare for the approaching individuals.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching investigators and her compromised position.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not mentioned, but wearing a loudspeaker on her chest.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares herself for the upcoming encounter.

descriptions.title: Cimnen
descriptions.scene: Cimnen observes a woman holding a fire axe and a loudspeaker, analyzing her behavior. He notices her eyes are scanning the surroundings despite her talkative nature. The loudspeaker on her chest begins broadcasting news about the base.

location.name: An unspecified area near the base construction site

descriptions.intent: Cimnen wants to analyze the woman's true intentions and assess the situation. He seeks to understand if she is a threat or an ally.
descriptions.conflict: The woman's outward talkativeness contrasts with her vigilant, predatory eyes.
descriptions.relation: Cimnen is observing the woman.
descriptions.outcome: Cimnen gains a clearer understanding of the woman's alertness.

descriptions.title: Sunyan, Jiaoziyi
descriptions.scene: Sunyan and Jiaoziyi discuss the scarcity of food in Anmin and the corruption of leaders. Sunyan suggests that some people are still greedy despite the famine. Sunyan winks at the others to encourage them to keep talking loudly to spread information.
descriptions.intent: Sunyan wants to use the conversation as a cover for his movement. He aims to maintain the persona of a material search group member.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of food and the corruption of leaders create social tension.
descriptions.state: Sunyan is calm and calculating; Jiaoziyi is surprised by the truth of the food shortage.
descriptions.relation: Sunyan and Jiaoziyi are teammates.
descriptions.outcome: The group continues their public-facing conversation while preparing for a covert action.

descriptions.title: Sunyan
descriptions.scene: Sunyan points toward the closed door of the CEO's office. He begins to approach the door with a very light, stealthy step. He holds a submachine gun ready for use.

location.name: In front of the CEO's office door

descriptions.intent: Sunyan wants to infiltrate the office without being detected. He intends to check the room for survivors or threats.
descriptions.conflict: The closed door acts as a physical barrier to his objective.

descriptions.title: Jaoji
descriptions.scene: Jaoji spots a wooden cabinet and believes Sunqian can see through the trap. She moves quickly toward the cabinet to investigate. She expresses admiration for Sunqian's perception.

location.name: An indoor area with tatami mats on the floor and a large wooden cabinet.

descriptions.intent: Jaoji wants to find anyone hiding in the room. She aims to use the cabinet as a potential hiding spot or discovery point.
descriptions.conflict: There is a hidden trap or presence in the room that they are trying to detect.
descriptions.relation: Jaoji views Sunqian as a capable partner.
descriptions.outcome: Jaoji approaches the cabinet while Sunqian checks the shower area.

descriptions.title: Cimennong
descriptions.scene: Cimennong checks the shower area but finds it empty. He realizes the only remaining place to hide someone would be the cabinet. He prepares to investigate the closet.

location.name: A room with a shower area and a closet door.

descriptions.intent: Cimennong wants to ensure no one is hiding in the shower. He seeks to clear the area of potential threats.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of where a person might be hiding.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Cimennong finds the shower empty.

descriptions.title: Jaoji
descriptions.scene: Jaoji approaches the closet door while gripping a crowbar tightly. Sunqian points his lamp and pistol at her as she moves. Jaoji opens the closet door quickly.

location.name: In front of a closet door.

descriptions.intent: Jao/ji wants to open the closet to see what is inside. She intends to confront whatever is hidden.
descriptions.conflict: Sunqian's weapons are pointed at her, creating tension.
descriptions.relation: Sunqian is wary of Jaoji's sudden movement.
descriptions.outcome: Jaoji opens the door and is met with a strong smell of cologne.

descriptions.title: Jaoji, Sunqian, Cimennong
descriptions.scene: The three characters look inside the closet and discover a row of neatly arranged suits. They see black silk bunny girl costumes and various small toys. They find a box of unsealed capes and a small box containing stacks of hundred-dollar bills and 10,000 yuan.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to see if anyone is hiding among the items. They are inspecting the contents of the closet.
descriptions.conflict: The discovery of strange, personal items suggests a human presence.
descriptions.relation: The group is working together to investigate.
descriptions.outcome: They realize the General Manager has been using the room for personal entertainment.

descriptions.title: Jaoji
descriptions.scene: Jaoji picks up a fluffy rabbit tail and smirks, concluding the manager is just playing around. She realizes the girl they were looking for has vanished. She decides to focus on gathering materials.
descriptions.intent: Jaoji wants to make sense of the disappearance. She decides to pivot from searching for people to collecting supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The mystery of the girl's disappearance remains unsolved.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jaoji decides to collect the clothes, condoms, and money.

descriptions.title: Cimennong
descriptions.scene: Cimennong briefly considers if the person is a ghost but quickly dismisses the thought. He instructs the group to collect whatever evidence or supplies they can find. He focuses on the task of gathering items.
descriptions.intent: Cimennong wants to prioritize gathering materials. He aims to ignore the supernatural possibility to focus on the mission.
descriptions.conflict: The psychological distraction of the mysterious disappearance.
descriptions.relation: Cimennong takes a leadership role in directing the collection.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins packing items into a waterproof bag.

descriptions.title: Jaoji
descriptions.scene: Jaoji pulls a large waterproof bag from her backpack. She begins packing the clothes, condoms, and money into it. She emphasizes that their main goal is to find anti-inflammatory drugs in the clinic.
descriptions.intent: Jaoji wants to secure the gathered supplies. She aims to remind the group of their primary objective: the clinic.
descriptions.conflict: The distraction of the loot versus the importance of the medicine.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The supplies are being packed for transport.

descriptions.title: Sunqian
descriptions.scene: Sunqian exits the secret room to inspect the ventilation shaft. He suspects someone might be hiding there. He then turns back to ask Cimennong about the disappearance of Lü Junxing.

location.name: Near the ventilation shaft and the secret room.

descriptions.intent: Sunqian wants to check the ventilation for hidden people. He also wants to confirm the status of Lü Junxing.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden disappearance of a teammate.
descriptions.relation: Sunqian is questioning Cimennong's observations.
descriptions.outcome: Sunqian realizes Lü Junxing is missing.

descriptions.title: Jaoji, Sunqian, Cimennong
descriptions.scene: Jaoji, Sunqian, and Cimennong discuss Lü Junxing's whereabouts. Jaoji explains that Lü Junxing claimed to have a stomach ache and stayed behind. Jaoji admits she was distracted by strange tracks.
descriptions.intent: The characters want to figure out where Lü Junting went. They are retracing their steps.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of Lü Junxing's location and the presence of mutated leeches.
descriptions.relation: The group is trying to piece together the timeline.
descriptions.outcome: They realize they have lost track of Lü Junxing.

descriptions.title: Sunqian
descriptions.scene: Sunqian feels a sense of dread and exits the secret room with a pistol. He stops in front of a large floor-to-ceiling window. He notices waves in the water where the landing craft was parked.

location.name: In front of a large floor-to-ceiling window overlooking the water.

descriptions.intent: Sunqian wants to survey the exterior area. He is looking for signs of movement or danger.
descriptions.conflict: The disturbed water suggests something has happened to the boat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Sunqian observes the disturbed water and prepares to defend the area.

descriptions.title: Sunqian
descriptions.scene: Sunqian raises his machine gun and aims it at the landing craft's exit. He focuses intensely through the scope. He ignores the small creature, a Piranha, watching from the window.
descriptions.intent: Sunqian wants to guard the landing craft exit. He aims to intercept any approaching threats.
descriptions.conflict: An unknown entity is approaching via the water.
descriptions.state: Highly focused and ready for combat.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Sunqian is in a combat-ready position.

descriptions.title: Jaoji, Cimennong
descriptions.scene: Jaoji and Cimennong emerge from the secret room carrying waterproof bags. They are momentarily stunned by the sight of the Piranha and the situation at the window. Jaoji realizes that Lü Junxing's behavior was a clue.
descriptions.intent: They want to continue their mission of collecting supplies. Jaoji wants to connect Lü Junxing's past questions about the boat to his current disappearance.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden realization of the danger to their transport.
descriptions.relation: Jaoji is processing the connection between Lü Junxing and the boat.
descriptions.outcome: Jaoji realizes they cannot afford to lose the landing craft.

descriptions.title: Jaoji, Cimennong
descriptions.scene: Jaoji tries to stop Cimennong from running off. She tells him that Sunqian is present and can handle any immediate threats. She wants Cimennong to stay focused on the current situation.
descriptions.intent: Jaoji wants to prevent Cimennong from making a reckless move. She aims to keep the group together.
descriptions.conflict: Cimennong's impulse to chase or flee.
descriptions.relation: Jaoji is restraining Cimennong's actions.
descriptions.outcome: Cimennong is held back by Jaoji's logic.

descriptions.title: Lü Junxing
descriptions.scene: A red landing craft with black stripes bursts through a breach in the water. Lü Junxing is on the water, holding the motor with one hand. He looks up at the window and gives a middle finger gesture to the group.
descriptions.intent: Lü Junxing wants to show his contempt for the group. He is operating the landing craft.
descriptions.conflict: His provocative gesture incites anger in the group.
descriptions.relation: Lü Junxing is acting defiantly toward Jaoji, Sunqian, and Cimennong.
descriptions.outcome: His gesture triggers a violent reaction from Sunqian.

descriptions.title: Sunqian, Lü Junxing
descriptions.scene: Sunqian reacts to the middle finger by pulling the trigger of his machine gun. The large window shatters from the gunfire. A bullet flies toward Lü Junxing. Lü Junxing's body jerks from the impact and he slides toward the cabin.

location.name: At the window and on the water.

descriptions.intent: Sunqian wants to neutralize the perceived threat/provocation. He aims to shoot the person making the gesture.
descriptions.conflict: The direct confrontation between the shooter and the provocateur.
descriptions.state: Angry and aggressive; Lü Junxing is shocked and injured.
descriptions.relation: Sunqian attacks Lü Junxing.
descriptions.outcome: Lü Junxing is hit by the bullet and falls into the cabin.

descriptions.title: Song Qian
descriptions.scene: Song Qian turns around and pulls the trigger of his pistol. The bullet shatters a floor-to-ceiling window. A second bullet follows, whistling through the air toward Lü Junshin.

location.name: A room with a large floor-to-ceiling window
location.description: likely part of a structure near a landing craft.

descriptions.intent: Song Qian intends to shoot at the approaching threat. He aims to neutralize the target through precise marksmanship.
descriptions.conflict: The physical presence of Lü Junshin approaching the window. The tension of the immediate firefight.
descriptions.state: Focused and lethal. He is acting with professional precision.

outfits.Song Qian: Not explicitly described, but wearing functional gear suitable for a sniper.

descriptions.relation: Song Qian is an adversary to Lü Jun/an ally to Zhao Dzi.
descriptions.outcome: The window is destroyed and Lü Junshin is physically impacted by the force/sound of the shots.

descriptions.title: Lü Junshin
descriptions.scene: Lü Junshin's body tenses up from the impact of the shots. He shakes twice and slides sideways into the side of the cabin.

location.name: The area adjacent to the cabin

descriptions.intent: Lü Junshin is reacting to the sudden physical trauma of the bullets/impact. He is attempting to stabilize himself.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden kinetic force of the bullets hitting his vicinity. The loss of physical balance.
descriptions.state: Shocked and physically jolted. His body is reacting reflexively to the attack.
descriptions.relation: Victim of the shooting.
descriptions.outcome: He slides into the cabin area, temporarily removed from the immediate line of fire.

descriptions.title: Qimen, Zhao Dzi, Song Qian
descriptions.scene: The fast assault craft begins to spin in place due to the chaos. Qimen and Zhao Dzi are momentarily stunned by the incredible accuracy of Song Qian's long-distance shot. Zhao Dzi praises Song Qian as the number one sniper in Anmin.
descriptions.intent: The characters are reacting to the sudden change in the battlefield. Zhao Dzi wants to acknowledge the skill shown.
descriptions.conflict: The disorientation caused by the spinning craft and the shock of the precision shot.
descriptions.state: Stunned and awestruck. Song Qian is indifferent to the praise.

outfits.Qimen: Not described; Zhao Dzi=Not described; Song Qian=Not described.

descriptions.relation: Zhao Dzi expresses admiration for Song Qian.
descriptions.outcome: The group realizes the high level of skill possessed by Song Qian.

descriptions.title: Song Qian, Qimen, Zhao Dzi
descriptions.scene: Song Qian ignores the compliment from Zhao Dzi. He quickly leads the way, moving with the other two toward their objective. The house returns to a state of quiet.

location.name: Moving away from the window toward the landing craft.

descriptions.intent: Song Qian wants to proceed with the mission. He intends to move toward the assault craft.
descriptions.conflict: The need to move quickly despite the recent violence.
descriptions.state: Determined and focused. He is ignoring social interaction to prioritize movement.

outfits.Song Qian: Not described; Qimen=Not described; Zhao Dzi=Not described.

descriptions.relation: Song Qian is leading the group.
descriptions.outcome: The trio departs the immediate area, leaving the house in silence.

descriptions.title: Piranha
descriptions.scene: Piranha climbs onto the door frame using several clicks/movements. He waits until he is certain that the three men have descended. He then sends a message to Jiang Yan stating that they are leaving.

location.name: The door frame of the house.

descriptions.intent: Piranha wants to monitor the departure of the men. He intends to inform Jiang Yan of their movement.
descriptions.conflict: The need to remain hidden and observe the others without being seen.
descriptions.state: Alert and observant. He is acting as a lookout.
descriptions.relation: Piranha is acting as a messenger for the group.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan receives the notification of the departure.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan receives the message and exits the room to retrieve Piranha. She looks out the window and sees Song Qian and the others swimming toward the assault craft. She realizes they are not returning to the house.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to collect Piranha. She intends to assess the situation outside.
descriptions.conflict: The realization that the group has abandoned the house. The uncertainty of their next move.
descriptions.state: Observant and calculating. She is processing the tactical change.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the recipient of Piranha's report.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to return to space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to return to space because the situation has changed. She observes the contrast between the gloomy, cold exterior and the sunny, warm interior. She prepares to conduct an experiment with Huabao.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to test the limitations of her spatial ability. She intends to use Huabao as a tool for observation.
descriptions.conflict: The inherent danger of her spatial ability's limitations (fixed exit points and lack of visibility).
descriptions.state: Experimental and thoughtful. She is contemplating future risks.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the user/controller of Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: She initiates a scientific test of her spatial mechanics.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the two main problems with her spatial dimension: fixed entry/exit points and the inability to see outside. She realizes she needs a way to monitor the external environment. She concludes that Huabao is the perfect "eyeliner" or monitor.

location.name: Within her internal spatial dimension/the house.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to solve the visibility problem. She intends to use Huabao as a remote sensor.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of accidentally emerging into an enemy ambush. The physical limitation of 10 meters for Huabao.
descriptions.state: Analytical and cautious. She is evaluating her survival capabilities.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is testing the utility of Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: She confirms her hypothesis regarding the 10-meter range and the spatial mechanics.

descriptions.title: Piranha, Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Piranha approaches Jiang Yan and reports everything he saw outside. He asks for validation of his performance. Jiang Yan smiles brightly and gives him a thumbs up, praising him.

location.name: Near the door of the hut.

descriptions.intent: Piranha wants recognition for his successful mission. Jiang Yan wants to encourage him.
descriptions.conflict: None; the tension has subsided into a moment of domesticity.
descriptions.state: Piranha is proud and seeking approval. Jiang Yan is affectionate and happy.
descriptions.relation: Piranha is the subordinate/child figure; Jiang Yan is the maternal figure.
descriptions.outcome: Piranha feels successful and Jiang Yan provides positive reinforcement.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan removes her diving suit and washes herself. She applies essential oils, puts on a shower cap, and dons a white bathrobe. She prepares for a therapeutic bath in a jacuzzi and a face mask.

location.name: A bathroom/personal area within the hut.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to recover from the physical exhaustion of 6-7 hours of work. She intends to relax and maintain her appearance.
descriptions.conflict: The physical fatigue from her recent labor.
descriptions.state: Exhausted but seeking self-care. She is focused on recovery.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A white bathrobe, a shower cap, and a face mask.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares for a period of rest and nutrition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan thinks about her upcoming meal, specifically craving coconut chicken stew with rice. As she moves toward the door of the hut, she is suddenly tripped or restrained by Piranha's vines.

location.name: Moving toward the door of the apple hut.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to go and eat her planned meal. She intends to move toward the door.
descriptions.conflict: Piranha's vines physically obstruct her movement. The sudden interruption of her plan.
descriptions.state: Hungry and anticipatory, then suddenly interrupted.
descriptions.relation: Piranha physically intercepts Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan's movement is halted by Piranha's action.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan experiences a sudden hunger pang while thinking about coconut chicken and rice. As she prepares to move, she is suddenly ensnared by the vines of the Piranha plant.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to satisfy her hunger and move toward the door. She is interrupted by the physical restraint of the plant.
descriptions.conflict: The Piranha vines physically entangle her, preventing her movement.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A loose robe with rolled-up sleeves.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is being restrained by the plant.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is stuck in place by the vines.

descriptions.title: Hua Bao
descriptions.scene: Hua Bao points a leaf at a square safe near the hut door and expresses his hunger. He licks his fanged teeth while looking at the safe.
descriptions.intent: Hua Bao wants to eat and directs his mother's attention to the safe. He is displaying his predatory hunger.
descriptions.conflict: The child's hunger is a distraction and a demand.

outfits.Hua Bao: A small creature with green leaves and fangs.

descriptions.relation: Hua Bao is acting playfully/greedily toward his mother.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes the safe contains the diamond egg.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan laughs at Hua Bao's cute expression and decides to check the progress of her spatial upgrades. She summons a pile of safes from her inventory to the area near the hut.

location.name: Open space near the Apple Hut salon

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the progress of the cosmic stream and spiritual spring. She decides to use the safes for this purpose.
descriptions.conflict: She must overcome her own hunger and fatigue to perform the task.
descriptions.state: Amused, determined, and focused.|Outlam: A large pile of various safes appears in the open space.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is interacting with her child and her spatial inventory.
descriptions.outcome: The area is now filled with safes ready for opening.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares her tools by rolling up her sleeves and putting on professional sunglasses and earplugs. She also retrieves an electric chainsaw for the task.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare herself for the noisy and messy task of cutting open safes. She intends to work efficiently.
descriptions.conflict: The task involves sparks and noise that could affect her space.
descriptions.state: Prepared and slightly lazy regarding changing clothes.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A robe with rolled-up sleeves, professional sunglasses, and earplugs.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is preparing to work alongside the Piranha.
descriptions.outcome: She is fully equipped to begin the demolition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan instructs Hua Bao to help and identifies the rear of the safe as the most vulnerable point. She notes that the supplies inside are intended for Hua Bao's food.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to cut the safe at its weakest point to access the contents. She intends to feed the Piranha.
descriptions.conflict: The safe is a hard barrier that needs precise cutting.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is directing the Piranha and the child.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the target area for the cut.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses her mental powers to rotate a heavy safe so the rear panel faces her. She begins cutting with the chainsaw, causing bright sparks to fly.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to position the safe for easier access. She aims to cut through the metal without damaging her space.
descriptions.conflict: The cutting process creates dangerous sparks and noise.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is managing the physical environment.
descriptions.outcome: Sparks fly, and she uses a fireproof blanket to protect her surroundings.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan successfully cuts through the first safe only to find a smaller metal safe inside. She realizes she is dealing with a "Matryoshka" style nesting of safes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the diamond egg. She is surprised by the nested structure.
descriptions.conflict: The discovery of a second safe creates a new layer of difficulty.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan and the Piranha are both surprised by the discovery.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to continue cutting through the next layer.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan continues cutting through multiple layers of safes, noting that the steel gets thinner as she goes deeper. She eventually reaches a blue Tiffany-style jewelry box.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to penetrate the fifth layer of safes. She is driven by the goal of finding the treasure.
descriptions.conflict: The repetitive task of cutting through five layers of metal.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is focused on the mechanical task.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the innermost jewelry box.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens the blue box to reveal a sparkling, pigeon-egg-sized pink diamond. The sunlight hits the diamond, momentarily blinding her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to inspect the contents of the final box. She seeks the beauty and value of the diamond.
descriptions.conflict: The intense brightness of the diamond causes temporary blindness.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is admiring the treasure.
descriptions.outcome: The diamond is revealed in all its perfection.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan gives a small leaf to Hua Bao to eat. As the child chews, the cosmic stream progress bar jumps from 6.3% to 7.5%.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reward Hua Bao. She also observes the progress of her spatial upgrade.
descriptions.conflict: The slow progress of the cosmic stream requires high-value items.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is nurturing the child while monitoring her progress.
descriptions.outcome: The upgrade progress increases significantly.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan continues her systematic destruction of the remaining safes. She uncovers a massive hoard of gold bars, gold necklaces, and other precious metals.

location.name: Near the pile of opened safes

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to exhaust the inventory of safes to maximize the spatial upgrade. She aims to collect all available wealth.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of the task is immense.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is working through the pile of loot.
descriptions.outcome: A massive amount of gold and jewelry is revealed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a chainsaw to break open a heavy, sealed box. After opening it, she discards a pile of new towels used for the chainsaw. She proceeds to open all the jewelry safes she has been searching throughout the day.

location.name: Unspecified
location.description: a workspace containing safes and loot

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to access the contents of the safes. She aims to uncover the hidden treasures within the locked containers.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy boxes and safes are sealed and require physical force to open.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The safes are opened, revealing a massive hoard of gold and gems.

descriptions.title: Huabao
descriptions.scene: Huabally discovers the contents of the opened safes, which include tens of thousands of gold bars, gold necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and jade ornaments. He also finds vast amounts of silver jewelry and pearls. His eyes widen in shock and greed.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to consume the treasures. He views the jewelry as food.
descriptions.conflict: The sheer volume of treasure is overwhelming.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Huabao begins eating the jewelry as if it were food.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the broken safes made of high-quality steel plates. Instead of discarding them, she uses her powers to move the broken steel plates back into her inventory.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to preserve the valuable materials. She aims to collect the broken steel for later use.
descriptions.conflict: The steel plates are heavy and broken.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The steel plates are stored in her inventory.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the progress bar above the stream, which causes her exhausted body to instantly regain energy and strength. She drinks a bottle of pineapple-flavored Pals Gudong and another bottle of Red Bull. She puts on sunglasses and earplugs before picking up the chainsaw to continue working.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to replenish her stamina. She aims to continue the heavy labor of breaking safes.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically exhausted from the day's work.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She regains the strength necessary to continue her task.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses the chainsaw to open a stack of safes purchased for zero yuan from a famous watch shop. The safes contain hundreds of luxury watches, including Patek Philippe, Vacheron Constantin, Rolex, Cartier, Panerai, and IWC, many encrusted with diamonds.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to break into the luxury watch safes. She aims to add the high-value watches to her collection.
descriptions.conflict: The safes are made of high-quality materials.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The luxury watches are revealed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan performs a rough calculation of the total market value of the gold, silver, and luxury watches, finding it amounts to tens of billions. She notices that her heart rate accelerates, not from the beauty of the items, but from the whistling progress indicator above the stream.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the total wealth. She observes the impact of the progress bar on her physical state.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming value of the items is secondary to the mechanical progress of the stream.
descriptions.state: Excited and stimulated by the progress bar.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the immense scale of the wealth accumulated.

descriptions.title: Huabao
descriptions.scene: Huabao views the pile of expensive goods as mere "A-products" processed in a workshop. He finds that because they are piled on the ground, they have lost their luster. He prepares to use a packaging box to store them so he can eat them later.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to store the loot for future consumption. He aims to organize the items into a portable container.
descriptions.conflict: The items are currently disorganized on the ground.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The loot is prepared for storage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan feels physically exhausted and lacks the strength to clean up the mess. She notes that while she can move objects with her mind, the vibration of the chainsaw against the steel plates makes her hand go numb. She decides to leave the pile of jewelry and watches outside and goes to the bathroom.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and relieve her physical fatigue. She aims to stop working for the night.
descriptions.conflict: The physical vibration of the tools causes numbness and exhaustion.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She abandons the cleanup to seek rest.

descriptions.title: Huabao
descriptions.scene: Huabao experiences tooth pain from eating the jewelry. He decides to stop his eating plan temporarily. He uses his mental powers to move the pile of jewelry boxes to a second bedroom near Jiang Yan's room, arranging them neatly. He settles onto a white wool blanket near Jiang Yan's bed.
descriptions.intent: Huabary wants to organize the loot and find a place to rest. He aims to move the boxes to a safe, organized location.
descriptions.conflict: His teeth ache from the hard jewelry.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The jewelry boxes are neatly stacked in the second bedroom.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: At dawn, Jiang Yan wakes up, washes, and eats breakfast. She puts on a warm wetsuit and leaves her building. Upon returning to the previous location, she sees a large open-top tourist boat parked below, filled with waterproof bags containing goods.

location.name: Jiang Yan's residence and the docking area

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to start her day and inspect the incoming cargo. She aims to check the status of the transported goods.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers the boat is heavily loaded with supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes items descending from the top of the building via pulleys and ropes, while empty bags and straps are sent back up. She uses a telescope to inspect the boat's bow, where several people are managing the cargo under the guard of two armed soldiers.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the logistics of the cargo transfer. She aims to ensure the security and efficiency of the operation.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of armed soldiers suggests a high-security, potentially dangerous environment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the ongoing, organized movement of goods and the presence of security.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a telescope to observe the ship's bow and the surrounding area. She notices the crew responsible for cargo and two armed soldiers guarding the area. She searches for the presence of Cimenan and Songqian.

location.name: Ship bow
location.description: looking out through a telescope towards the cargo area and the ship's nose

descriptions.intent: To locate specific individuals and assess the security situation. She wants to see if Cimenan and Songqian are visible.
descriptions.conflict: The soldiers are armed with live ammunition, creating a high-security environment. Cimenan and Songqian are not immediately visible.
descriptions.relation: Observing the crew and soldiers
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the presence of cargo workers and guards but fails to see her targets.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the geography of Anming and the logistics of the cargo transport. She realizes the difficulty of transporting goods via small vessels in this inland city. She contemplates the scale of the work Songqian and others performed overnight.

location.name: Ship
location.description: observing the inland landscape of Anming

descriptions.intent: To understand the logistical challenges of the current mission. She wants to evaluate the difficulty of moving the large amount of goods.
descriptions.conflict: The inland location limits the use of large ships, forcing reliance on small, inefficient vessels. The sheer volume of goods requires immense labor.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the immense effort Songqian's team exerted to pack the goods.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes Songqian, Cimenan, and two others appearing through her telescope. She notes their extreme exhaustion compared to their energetic state the previous day. She observes Songqian managing the ship's controls.

location.name: Ship
location.description: viewing the approaching boat through a telescope

descriptions.intent: To monitor the arrival of the supply team. She wants to check their condition and arrival status.
descriptions.conflict: The team is visibly exhausted from working all night. The arrival is slow due to the cautious navigation of the boat.
descriptions.relation: Observing the weary team
descriptions.outcome: She confirms their arrival and notes their physical depletion.

descriptions.title: Cimenan
descriptions.scene: Cimenan sits in the boat without removing her life jacket. She leans against the edge of the boat and falls asleep while holding the life ring with one hand and supporting her head with the other. Zhao Zei also lies down nearby, holding a rope.

location.name: A small boat moving on the water

descriptions.intent: To rest after a night of intense labor. They want to sleep during the transit.
descriptions.conflict: The approach is dangerous, forcing the boat to move slowly. The physical exhaustion is overwhelming.

outfits.Cimenan: wearing a life jacket;Zhao Zei=Not mentioned

descriptions.relation: Traveling together as a team
descriptions.outcome: The characters fall into a deep sleep during the journey.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sits on a sofa in the manager's room, noticing a pile of dust. She notices that the door to the manager's office is open. She observes the damaged air conditioning vent in the corridor.
descriptions.intent: To relax after the observation. She wants to settle into her space.
descriptions.conflict: The room is dusty and the air conditioning vent is broken. The open door suggests recent activity.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She notices signs of recent movement in the room.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices a missing tissue box from the tea table. She discovers a hidden compartment under the tea table. She finds valuable items including Banjiang, Icelandic tea, jasmine tea, and aged tangerine peel.
descriptions.intent: To investigate the disappearance of the tissue box. She wants to see if anything else was taken or hidden.
descriptions.conflict: The discovery is accidental. She must decide whether to take the items.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to collect all the valuable supplies and store them in her spatial dimension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the darkening, grey sky and the heavy clouds signaling rain. She realizes the importance of acting quickly due to the limited "window of opportunity" in her life. She decides to descend to the 13th floor immediately.
descriptions.intent: To avoid the impending rain. She wants to execute her plan before the weather turns.
descriptions.conflict: The weather is deteriorating rapidly. Time is running out.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins moving quickly to implement her next phase.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan descends to the 13th floor and retrieves a rubber boat from her spatial storage. She enters the water and begins rowing the boat toward the edge of the building's perimeter.

location.name: 13th floor and the water near the building edge

descriptions.intent: To begin her looting/collection mission. She wants to reach the jewelry stores.
descriptions.conflict: She must navigate the boat through the water to reach her targets.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully launches the boat and begins her route.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan navigates the boat toward jewelry stores located outside the city center and within the fourth ring road. She plans a route that involves traveling between different districts and returning to the boat after each collection.
descriptions.intent: To visit and collect from various jewelry stores. She wants to maximize her collection efficiency.
descriptions.conflict: The distance in the outer ring is much larger than the inner ring. The logistics of returning to the boat after every stop is difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She establishes a systematic plan for the day's mission.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan encounters other people on rubber boats who are also searching for supplies. She observes that everyone remains in a state of high vigilance and refuses to share information, even when approached with smiles.
descriptions.intent: To navigate her route without interference. She wants to avoid conflict with other scavengers.
descriptions.conflict: Other scavengers are competing for the same resources. There is a lack of trust and a high level of suspicion among all parties.
descriptions.relation: Competitive and distrustful interaction with other scavengers
descriptions.outcome: She maintains her privacy and continues her mission without revealing her true intentions or findings.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan travels through the city, encountering waves of people in rubber boats searching for supplies. She maintains a state of high vigilance, observing that others are equally secretive and untrusting. She avoids direct interaction to protect her resources.

location.name: City streets and waterways
location.description: flooded environment with various rubber boats passing by

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to scavenge supplies without being detected or robbed. She seeks to navigate the crowds while maintaining her secrecy. She aims to complete her looting mission efficiently.
descriptions.conflict: Other survivors are also scavenging and are highly suspicious. There is a mutual atmosphere of distrust and secrecy among the people in boats.
descriptions.state: Vigilant and cautious. She is focused on survival and protecting her hidden loot.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not specified, likely practical survival clothing.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan views others as potential threats or competitors.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully navigates the crowds without revealing her true inventory.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the end of her looting route around 6:00 or 7:00 PM. She checks off over 90% of the jewelry stores listed on her handmade map. She also discovers a group of garden shops in an alley behind the tourist street.

location.name: An alleyway behind a tourist trading street

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to finish her search of the jewelry stores. She aims to maximize the amount of loot collected before nightfall. She seeks to find any remaining valuable items in the vicinity.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exhaustion of searching through most of the city. The limited time remaining in the day.
descriptions.state: Accomplished but tired. She is nearing the end of her planned route.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes the majority of her planned looting.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan inspects the garden shops and finds that the seedlings have rotted due to heat and rain. However, she finds a large pile of undamaged plastic, metal, and PVC children's fences in various colors. She decides to move all the fences into her spatial dimension.

location.name: A group of garden shops in a city alleyway

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to salvage useful items from the shops. She aims to collect the undamaged fences. She intends to store them in her space to prevent loss.
descriptions.conflict: The high temperatures and heavy rains have destroyed the organic plants. The difficulty of physically moving large items.
descriptions.state: Decisive and efficient. She is focused on gathering durable goods.|Outpon: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully transfers the fences into her space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides not to search the remaining 10% of jewelry stores located in the suburbs. She observes that rain has started to drizzle since 5:00 PM. She decides to stay within the city limits to avoid the worsening weather.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid being caught in a heavy rainstorm. She aims to find a safe place to rest for the night. She decides to abandon the suburban search to prioritize safety.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching rain and the uncertainty of its intensity. The physical lack of strength to continue searching.
descriptions.state: Cautious and weary. She is prioritizing safety over further looting.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She abandons the suburban search and seeks shelter.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at an unfinished 15-story office building belonging to an electric company. The building is located on the outskirts near a bee base and a large, submerged power station. She climbs into the building through a window on the 13th floor.

location.name: An unfinished 15-story office building on the outskirts of the city

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a secure place to rest. She aims to enter the building safely. She seeks a high vantage point or a secluded spot.
descriptions.conflict: The building is unfinished and potentially unstable. The difficulty of climbing into a 13th-floor window.
descriptions.state: Determined. She is focused on finding a hiding spot.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters the building via the 13th floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: While squatting by the window, Jiang Yan directs a storm boat into her spatial dimension. As she prepares to move inside, she notices dark shadows moving under the water below. She initially fears they are mutated leeches.

location.name: The edge of a window on the 13th floor of an unfinished building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to store her boat in her space. She aims to investigate the strange movement in the water. She seeks to identify the potential threat.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of unknown moving shadows in the water. The fear of mutated creatures.
descriptions.state: Alarmed and chilled. She feels a sense of dread.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the shadows as something else.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes the dark shadows are actually a school of large fish swimming upstream. She feels a surge of joy because she hasn't seen normal living creatures since the heatwave began. She observes that the fish are about the length of her arm and lack strange mutations like extra teeth.

location.name: The 13th floor window overlooking the submerged power station area

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confirm if the fish are mutated or normal. She aims to observe the fish closely. She seeks to find a source of food.
descriptions.conflict: The distance of the fish makes it difficult to see fine details. The uncertainty regarding whether they are mutated.
descriptions.state: Joyful and excited. She is relieved to see life.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a potential food source.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates how to catch the fish, noting she has many types of fishing rods in her space. She realizes her fishing skills are poor and she lacks the proximity to use a net. She decides to use a more complex method involving a fishing cage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to catch the fish. She aims to find a method suitable for her skill level. She seeks to bridge the distance between her and the fish.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of professional fishing skills. The distance between the window and the fish.
descriptions.state: Thoughtful and calculating. She is planning her next move.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use a fishing cage and bait.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a large fishing cage, a plastic basin, and cornmeal from her space. She mixes the cornmeal with water to create small balls. She prepares the bait to be slightly larger than the cage mesh.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to create effective bait. She aims to prepare the fishing cage for use. She seeks to attract the fish to the cage.
descriptions.conflict: The need to make the bait the correct size and consistency. The difficulty of preparing bait while perched at a window.
descriptions.state: Focused and industrious. She is executing a plan.|Outpon: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The bait is prepared and ready for the cage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan lowers the fishing cage from the window edge. She pulls out a small bench to sit on and secures the rope with her feet. She sprinkles dry cornmeal on the top of the cage to further attract the fish.

location.name: The window ledge of the 13th floor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deploy the fishing cage into the water. She aims to create a stable fishing position. She seeks to maximize the scent of the bait.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of sitting on a ledge and managing ropes with her feet. The precision required to lower the cage.
descriptions.state: Concentrated. She is performing a delicate task.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The fishing setup is deployed and active.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan waits for the fish to respond to the bait. After about ten minutes, some fish sense the cornmeal and swim toward the cage. An adventurous fish enters the cage and begins eating the cornmeal dough.

location.name: The window ledge of the 13th floor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to catch the fish. She aims to wait patiently for the fish to arrive. She seeks to see the result of her baiting strategy.
descriptions.conflict: The long period of waiting. The uncertainty of whether the fish will approach.
descriptions.state: Patient and expectant. She is watching closely.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The first fish is successfully caught in the cage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the hungry fish and notes the high quality of the water near the power station. She reflects on the possibility that the fish might be mutated due to their large size despite the lack of visible deformities. She concludes that the lack of food in this area likely drives their hunger.

location.name: The window ledge of the 13th floor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the state of the fish and the environment. She aims to understand the potential risks of mutation. She seeks to evaluate the quality of the water.
descriptions.conflict: The possibility of hidden mutations in the fish. The scarcity of food in the area.
descriptions.state: Analytical and observant. She is contemplating the ecological state.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes her observation of the new ecosystem.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the environment and reflects on the scarcity of food compared to urban areas. She notes the superior water quality and hypothesizes that the massive size of the fish is due to genetic variations. She contemplates the scientific impossibility of the rapid mutations seen in mosquitoes, leeches, and fish.

location.name: A remote area
location.description: characterized by water sources and a lack of urban food supplies.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the biological anomalies of the environment. She seeks to find a logical explanation for the rapid mutations. She focuses her attention on the water quality.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of scientific explanation for the mutations. The biological impossibility of the rapid evolutionary changes.
descriptions.state: Contemplative and analytical. She is preoccupied with scientific mysteries.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to stop overthinking the mutations and focuses on the immediate task of fishing.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The first fish eats successfully in the trap, followed by several others until the cage is nearly full with seven or eight fish. Jiang Yan grips the rope tightly with her legs while standing. She suddenly pulls the fishing cage upward with immense strength.

location.name: Near the water
location.description: where the fishing cage is submerged.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to harvest the fish from the trap. She aims to pull the heavy cage to the surface. She intends to secure the catch.
descriptions.conflict: The weight and resistance of the full fishing cage. The physical effort required to lift the trap.
descriptions.state: Determined and physically exerted. She acts with sudden, intense energy.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The fishing cage is successfully pulled out of the water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan drags the fishing cage onto the ground where the fish are thrashing wildly with open mouths. She examines them closely and identifies them as a thinner variety of tilapia. She notes their unusual ability to survive in cold water temperatures.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the species of the caught fish. She seeks to understand their biological resilience. She examines their physical characteristics.
descriptions.conflict: The fish are jumping and snapping wildly. The confusion regarding their survival in 3-4 degree water.
descriptions.state: Observant and slightly skeptical. She is puzzled by the fish's adaptation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the fish as mutated tilapia.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to move the fish into her personal space to protect them. She plans to wait until a stream forms in her space after Huabao consumes all the gold and silver jewelry. She recognizes the need for a water ecosystem in her space.

location.name: The outdoor fishing site and the threshold of her personal space.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to preserve the fish. She aims to create a functional ecosystem in her space. She plans to use the future stream for the fish.
descriptions.conflict: The current lack of a permanent stream in her space. The necessity of moving live creatures without killing them.
descriptions.state: Strategic and forward-thinking. She is focused on long-term resource management.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to transfer the fish into her space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The fish all press against the cage, allowing Jiang Yan to transfer them to her space without individual handling. She realizes the space is now directly linked to the fishing cage. She feels a moment of shock at this new connection.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to transfer the fish efficiently. She reacts to the sudden change in her spatial mechanics. She attempts to process the new link between the cage and the space.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, unexpected intelligence of the space. The shock of the new functional connection.
descriptions.state: Overwhelably shocked and stunned. She is momentarily disoriented by the change.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The fish are successfully transferred to the space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The space automatically sorts the materials and places the live fish into an unused pool near her apple house. Jiang Yan observes that the fish are swimming happily in the undisinfected pool. She realizes the space's intelligence will likely automate future water features.

location.name: Inside the personal space
location.description: specifically near the apple house and the pool.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the fish's arrival. She observes the automated sorting process. She contemplates the future of her space's infrastructure.
descriptions.conflict: The space's tendency to automatically categorize and move items. The lack of disinfection in the pool.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and resigned. She sighs at the inevitability of the space's automation.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The fish are settled in the pool, and Jiang Yan accepts the space's autonomy.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan leaves her space and returns to the water to continue fishing. She catches various species including carp, crucian carp, loach, river shrimp, and two small turtles. She notices that all the creatures are much larger than normal.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to expand her collection of aquatic life. She aims to catch as many normal animals as possible. She seeks to capitalize on the abundance.
descriptions.conflict: The increasing darkness of the environment. The physical difficulty of catching diverse species.
descriptions.state: Increasingly happy and excited. She finds joy in the abundance of life.|Outting: She successfully populates her space with a variety of large aquatic creatures.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: As darkness falls, Jiang Yan stops fishing and gathers her belongings. She moves to the upper floor of her building to find shelter from the increasing wind and rain. She sets up a tent in a protected area, remembering her failed attempt to sleep outside the previous night.

location.name: An upper floor of a building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a dry place to sleep. She aims to protect herself from the storm. She seeks to avoid the discomfort she experienced the night before.
descriptions.conflict: The worsening weather conditions, including wind and heavy rain. The memory of previous discomfort.
descriptions.state: Tired but cautious. She is focused on survival and comfort.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully secures a sheltered spot for the night.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up the next morning to find heavy rain falling. She experiences a bad premonition about the upcoming weather and decides she must return to the bee base before noon. She quickly retrieves a box of instant noodles from her storage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid the worst of the storm. She aims to reach the bee base before midday. She intends to eat a quick meal before departing.
