descriptions.conflict: The heavy, continuous rain. The pressure of the approaching deadline (noon).
descriptions.state: Anxious and hurried. She feels a sense of foreboding.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to leave for the bee base.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up to heavy rain and experiences a bad premonition about the weather. She decides she must return to the bee base before noon. She retrieves a box of instant noodles from her storage.

location.name: Jiang Yan's living quarters
location.description: a room where she stays during the rainy day

descriptions.intent: She wants to prepare for her trip and avoid the upcoming heavy rain. She aims to reach the bee base before midday. She seeks to secure her supplies.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain creates a sense of forebasting and urgency. The weather threatens her travel plans.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not specified, but she is in her sleeping attire.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares her meal and begins her morning routine.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan boils water using a portable stove and prepares her instant noodles. She skips washing her face and simply scratches her hair with her hands. She reflects on the need to remain inconspicuous when returning to the Tianshuiwan community.
descriptions.intent: She wants to eat a warm meal to combat the cold and dampness. She intends to maintain a low profile to avoid attracting attention. She plans her return to the community.
descriptions.conflict: The damp and cold environment makes her feel physically uncomfortable. She must balance her need for hygiene with the need for secrecy.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Not specified, but she is disheveled as she has not washed.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finishes her meal, which warms her body.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan packs her camping gear, including her tent, waterproof mat, sleeping bag, and thermos. She finishes her beef-flavored noodles and feels the warmth spreading through her body.
descriptions.intent: She wants to organize her belongings for the journey. She aims to complete her meal to regain energy. She seeks to prepare for the wet conditions.
descriptions.conflict: The external environment is wet and cold, necessitating efficient packing.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The gear is packed and she is ready to move.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan changes into a diving suit and descends to the thirteenth floor. She goes back inside to retrieve Huabao, noting that the progress bar for his culinary upgrades has reached 32%.

location.name: 13th floor of a building
location.description: transitioning from living quarters to a functional area

descriptions.intent: She wants to prepare for her excursion. She intends to bring Huabao along. She monitors the progress of the upgrade.
descriptions.conflict: The progress of the upgrade is dependent on Huabao's actions. She must manage her time to depart before the rain worsens.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the caretaker/mother figure to Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: Huabability is brought along for the journey.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes Huabao's progress and realizes the rate of improvement will slow down as easier items are exhausted. Huabao looks at her expectantly, asking where they are going today.

location.name: Inside the building
location.description: near the area where Huabao operates

descriptions.intent: She contemplates the future of the upgrade process. She intends to respond to Huabao's question. She seeks to plan the day's route.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of finding valuable items will increase over time. Huabao's curiosity demands an answer.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan acts as a guide for Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: The plan for the day is about to be revealed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices two turtles sunbathing by the window and watches as Huabao interacts with them by pushing one into the water and flipping the other with a leaf. She then pulls out a treasure map to show the destination.

location.name: Near a window overlooking a pool/basin area

descriptions.intent: She wants to show Huabao the destination. She intends to use the map to navigate. She observes Huabao's playful behavior.
descriptions.conflict: Huabao is distracted by the turtles. The need to communicate the plan requires a physical map.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is directing Huabao's attention to the map.
descriptions.outcome: Huabao receives the information about the destination.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan points to the Anming Bee Base on the map. Huabao memorizes the location and asks about the Seed Bank located near the mountainside. Jiang Yan realizes she can add the Seed Bank to her itinerary.
descriptions.intent: She wants to navigate to the bee base. She intends to inform Huabao of the destination. She seeks to expand her mission to include the Seed Bank.
descriptions.conflict: Huabao's curiosity introduces a new, unplanned destination. The complexity of the route increases.
descriptions.state: Excited and impressed by Huabao's intelligence.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is teaching/guiding Huabao.
descriptions.outcome: The mission is expanded to include the Seed Bank.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the importance of seeds for survival and recalls the global Seed Vault in the Arctic. She compares the Anming Seed Bank to the high-security global vault and decides to investigate it.
descriptions.intent: She wants to assess the value of the Seed Bank. She intends to verify its contents. She seeks to find resources for survival.
descriptions.conflict: The Anming Seed Bank is much less secure than the global vault. There is a risk that the site might be empty or destroyed.
descriptions.state: Determined and reflective.|Outability: Jiang Yan=Diving suit.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She commits to visiting the Seed Bank.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves an assault shuttle, a compass, and a theodolite from her spatial storage. She starts the engine and begins her rapid transit toward the bee base.

location.name: Moving toward the Anming Bee Base via shuttle

descriptions.intent: She wants to travel to the bee base. She intends to use specialized tools for navigation. She seeks to reach the destination quickly.
descriptions.conflict: The urgency of the weather and the need to reach the site before it becomes inaccessible.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins the journey toward the target location.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at the bee base and finds it largely destroyed by landslides and mudslides. Only one partially standing two-story house remains amidst the debris. She fears she might leave empty-handed.

location.name: The Anming Bee Base
location.description: a devastated area of houses on a mountainside

descriptions.intent: She wants to inspect the base for resources. She intends to find the Seed Bank. She seeks to see if anything survived the disaster.
descriptions.conflict: The physical destruction of the base by natural disasters. The possibility of finding nothing.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to enter the remaining building despite the damage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finds the building's windows washed away and the door blocked by a pile of strange branches. She retrieves a helmet from her storage, puts it on, and prepares to climb through a window.

location.name: The entrance of the damaged
location.description: single house at the bee base

descriptions.intent: She wants to enter the blocked building. She intends to bypass the obstructed door. She seeks to protect herself with a helmet.
descriptions.conflict: The door is impassable due to debris. The building is structurally compromised and open to the elements.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters the building through a window.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches a blocked door that is obstructed by a pile of strangely shaped branches. She realizes she cannot enter through the main entrance. She decides to move her landing craft and retrieve a helmet from her space dimension. She climbs through the only available window next to the door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to enter the building despite the blockage. She seeks a way to bypass the debris to explore the interior.
descriptions.conflict: The door is completely blocked by a mass of branches, making entry impossible.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully enters the building through a window.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters a room that is flooded up to her waist. The water contains floating branches, dead mice, and dead bees. She uses a walking stick to probe the bottom of the water as she moves. She searches for a way to ascend.

location.name: Flooded room
location.description: waist-deep water with debris and dead animals

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to navigate the flooded room safely. She aims to find a way to reach the upper level.
descriptions.conflict: The water is murky and filled with debris and carcasses, making movement difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She finds a ladder in the corner leading upwards.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan climbs a wet and slippery ladder that lacks handrails. She moves very slowly to avoid falling. After several minutes of careful climbing, she reaches the upper level.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the upper floor of the building. She aims to avoid slipping on the dangerous stairs.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of handrails and the slippery surface of the ladder pose a physical danger.
descriptions.state: Focused and careful.|Outters: Jiang Yan=None mentioned
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the top of the ladder.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns on a powerful searchlight, illuminating the entire room like daylight. She discovers seven or eight large iron cabinets with glass doors. She notices a thermostat label on the equipment.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to inspect the contents of the room. She seeks to understand the state of the equipment.
descriptions.conflict: The room was previously dark and the power might be out.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the room as a bee base and notices the dead bees.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan realizes the bees are dead due to high temperatures and power failure. She contemplates the status of the backup generator. She worries that the generator room might be flooded or damaged.

location.name: Bee base
location.description: interior of the iron cabinets area

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the viability of the bee base. She seeks to determine if the backup power is still functional.
descriptions.conflict: Potential flooding and electrical damage threaten the backup power source.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to leave the room but then has a new idea.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers her knowledge of space agriculture and the use of incubators for hatching. She thinks about the variety of eggs she has in her storage, including chicken, duck, goose, quail, pigeon, and ostrich. She decides to use the existing incubators to hatch these eggs.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to create a self-sustaining ecosystem. She aims to use the abandoned equipment to hatch her stored eggs.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of pollinating bees in the immediate area.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to test her agricultural skills by hatching eggs in space.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a spare battery from her space dimension. She finds the power plugs for the incubators and tests them one by one. She discovers that only three out of the eight incubators are working.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see which incubators are functional. She aims to prepare the equipment for hatching eggs.
descriptions.conflict: Most of the incubators are non-functional due to power or mechanical issues.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the working units and clears away the dead bees.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan cleans the dead bees from the room and moves them to a separate area. She prepares to use the working incubators for her eggs during rainy days. She returns to her assault craft as the rain intensifies.

location.name: Bee base
location.description: then moving to the assault craft

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to tidy the area and finalize her plan. She aims to return to her vehicle to escape the worsening weather.
descriptions.conflict: The increasing intensity of the rain.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She retreats to her craft to head toward the Seed Resource Bank.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan navigates her assault craft toward the Seed Resource Bank under the guidance of Hua Bao. She stops the Zodiac near a flagged official ship. She observes a massive landslide blocking the entrance to the Seed Resource Bank.

location.name: Path toward the Seed Resource Bank
location.description: near a flagged ship and a landslide

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the Seed Resource Bank. She seeks to observe the situation at the site.
descriptions.conflict: A massive landslide has blocked the entrance to the destination.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is working with Hua Bao (AI/Navigator)
descriptions.outcome: She witnesses the scale of the disaster at the bank.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches a group of people in black rubber boots manually clearing mud and debris with picks and crowbars. She notes the inefficiency of manual labor without excavators. She decides to turn her craft around and puts on a raincoat from her space dimension.

location.name: Near the landslide at the Seed Resource and Resource Bank

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid the manual labor scene. She aims to proceed to Repals Bay.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy manual labor and the scale of the debris.
descriptions.state: Indifferent to the workers' struggle but focused on her goal.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She turns her craft toward Repals Bay.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan drives her assault craft toward Repals Bay. She transforms her craft into a rubber boat. She retrieves a large black backpack from her space dimension, which is bulging with instant noodles, ham, and other supplies.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach Repals Bay. She aims to prepare her supplies for the journey.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of navigating the terrain/water.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She arrives near Repals Bay.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stops her rubber boat one kilometer from Repals Bay as the rain becomes heavier and visibility drops. She uses a telescope to observe the 16th floor of a building. She sees people with buckets and rice bags, all soaked and cold.

location.name: One kilometer from Repals and Repals Bay

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the situation at the settlement. She seeks to observe the impact of the flood on the residents.
descriptions.conflict: Heavy rain and extremely low visibility.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She observes the suffering of the local people.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes two young boys, aged 11 and 12, with thin, cold faces marked by red spots. She sees people in the water using lifebuoys and tires, some with bare torsos. She notices groups of people working together in the water to catch something.

location.name: Near the flooded settlement of Repals Bay

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the extent of the flood's impact. She aims to witness the survival efforts of the locals.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cold, the floodwater, and the physical hardship of the people.

outfits.Jiang Yan: None mentioned; Local people=Bare torsos, wet clothes

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the severity of the disaster affecting the entire community.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes various groups of people fishing in the water using U-shaped formations and makeshift nets. She notices the groups are using sheets and mosquito nets sewn together to catch fish. She realizes the high density of fish in the area despite the poor water quality.

location.name: Near a cluster of buildings
location.description: a body of water filled with debris and cold, murky water

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the fishing methods and assess the local resources. She seeks to understand the abundance of food available in this environment.
descriptions.conflict: The water is cold and filled with trash, making the environment harsh.
props: Fishing nets made of sheets and mosquito nets
descriptions.relation: Observer of the local community
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan identifies a significant source of protein in the form of large fish.

descriptions.title: A member of the U-shaped team
descriptions.scene: A hand appears from the water, making a clenched fist gesture to signal a command. A member of the U-shaped team shouts for the group to close the net. The team members move closer together to tighten the net using floral-patterned sheets with holes.
descriptions.intent: The team member wants to secure the net to prevent fish from escaping. He aims to coordinate the group's movement.
descriptions.conflict: The fish are attempting to escape through the gaps in the net.
descriptions.relation: Leader/Coordinator of the group
descriptions.outcome: The team successfully tightens the net under the water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the rain begin to fall heavily. She contemplates turning back to the safety of the thirty-second floor. She observes that despite the increasing intensity of the rain, the fishermen show no intention of leaving.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to decide whether to continue her journey or retreat to her building. She evaluates the risks of the worsening weather.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain threatens her progress and comfort.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to continue her path forward.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares herself for the journey by retrieving a sleeve arrow from her spatial storage. She ties the arrow to her arm for quick access. She then takes up an oar and continues paddling her boat forward.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her personal defense is ready. She intends to continue navigating the water.
descriptions.conflict: The need for self-defense in an uncertain environment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is now armed and continues her movement.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the fishing groups more closely. She observes that the fish in this area are larger and thicker than the ones she previously encountered at the power station. She identifies the species as being similar to carp and white amur due to the presence of two barbels on their mouths.

location.name: Near the fishing groups in the water

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the species and quality of the fish. She seeks to compare this new resource to her previous findings.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a high-quality, large-scale food source.

descriptions.title: A man fishing alone
descriptions.scene: A man fishing alone catches a large, writhing water snake. He instructs his son to take the snake to his wife, who is waiting by a window. The man wipes rain from his face after spotting Jiang Yan passing by.

location.name: Near a building window and the water's edge

descriptions.intent: The man wants to deliver the catch to his wife. He also acknowledges Jiang Yan's presence.
descriptions.conflict: The rain is pouring down on him.
descriptions.relation: Father and son; Man and wife
descriptions.outcome: The snake is sent to the wife.

descriptions.title: A man with curly hair
descriptions.scene: A man with curly hair approaches Jiang Yan's boat and asks to rent her rubber boat. He offers 1,000 yuan in cash for a one-hour rental. Other nearby fishermen join the conversation, mocking the idea of using cash.
descriptions.intent: The curly-haired man wants to rent the boat for convenience. He attempts to initiate a social interaction/transaction.
descriptions.conflict: The other fishermen believe money is now useless and criticize the man's logic.
descriptions.relation: The man is attempting to interact with Jiangly Yan; others are criticizing him.
descriptions.outcome: The interaction leads to a verbal dispute among the group.

descriptions.title: Lao Zhan
descriptions.scene: Lao Zhan responds to the criticism from the curly-haired man with a smirk. He retorts by suggesting that the curly-haired man should stay home and wait for the official announcement instead of trying to steal fish. He mocks the man's motivation for being out in the cold.
descriptions.intent: Lao Zhan wants to defend his position and mock the other man's audacity. He aims to shut down the argument.
descriptions.conflict: A verbal disagreement regarding the value of money and the necessity of fishing.
descriptions.relation: Adversarial/Mocking
descriptions.outcome: Lao Zhan asserts his dominance in the argument.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan ignores the surrounding argument and the offers to rent her boat. She maintains a neutral expression and continues paddling her boat forward. She realizes that many people in the area are strangers to her from different buildings.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid the social conflict and the transaction. She intends to continue her mission without distraction.
descriptions.conflict: The loud, distracting argument of the fishermen.
descriptions.relation: Avoiding interaction with the group
descriptions.outcome: She successfully moves past the group without engaging.

descriptions.title: The fishing group
descriptions.scene: The fishermen continue their work despite the freezing water and the heavy rain. Some men show physical signs of extreme cold, such as blue skin and white lips. The group waits for an official boat that is scheduled to arrive the next day.

location.name: In the cold water and near the buildings

descriptions.intent: The fishermen want to catch as much fish as possible before the official boat arrives. They are driven by the need for food.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cold and physical exhaustion are straining their bodies.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: They continue fishing despite their deteriorating physical condition.

descriptions.title: Lao Zhang
descriptions.scene: Lao Zhang attempts to persuade Jiang Yan to rent her rubber boat for a short period of time. He offers to increase the price to a higher amount or split the time into thirty minutes. He tries to use a friendly, bargaining tone to convince her.

location.name: A riverbank or dock area
location.description: near the water where boats are present.

descriptions.intent: Lao Zhang wants to rent Jiang Yan's rubber boat for fishing. He aims to negotiate a price that she cannot refuse.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan refuses his initial offer and remains uninterested in his negotiation.
descriptions.state: Lao Zhang is persistent and slightly playful; Jiang Yan is calm and indifferent.

outfits.Lao Zhang: unspecified casual clothing suitable for fishing; Jiang Yan=unspecified clothing.

descriptions.relation: Lao Zhang is a persistent negotiator; Jiang Yan is a dismissive stranger.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan flatly refuses the offer, leaving Lao Zhang embarrassed.

descriptions.title: Lao Zhang
descriptions.scene: Lao Zhang continues his negotiation by offering double the deposit to ensure the boat is not damaged. He uses a mocking tone, suggesting she is being stingy like a little girl. He questions why she would risk her boat for a stranger.

location.name: Near the rubber boat on the water.

descriptions.intent: Lao Zhang wants to overcome her resistance by offering financial security. He tries to use social pressure to make her feel stingy.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan remains unmoved by the offer of a double deposit.
descriptions.state: Lao Zhang is being cheeky and pushy; Jiang Yan is maintaining her patience.

outfits.Lao Zhang: unspecified clothing; Jiang Yan=unspecified clothing; Zhang Dalei=unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: Lao Zhang is pressuring Jiang Yan; Zhang Dalely is observing.
descriptions.outcome: The negotiation reaches a stalemate.

descriptions.title: Zhang Dalei
descriptions.scene: Zhang Dalei reacts with shock and indignation to Lao Zhang's persistence and Jiang Yan's coldness. He chokes on his words, calling Jiang Yan heartless for being so cruel to a man pleading before his son. He expresses disbelief at her lack of empathy.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Dalei wants to criticize Jiang Yan's perceived lack of compassion. He seeks to shame her for her refusal.
descriptions.conflict: Zhang Dalei's moral judgment clashes with Jiang Yan's actual indifference.
descriptions.state: Zhang Dalei is shocked and indignant; Jiang Yan is cold and unimpressed.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Dalei is accusing Jiang Yan; Jiang Yan is judging him back.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan retaliates by questioning his morality and demanding half his fish.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns the accusation back on Zhang Dalei, asking why he is so "soft-hearted" and demanding he give her half of his catch. She challenges his use of strong words and his hypocrisy.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to silence Zhang Dalei's criticism. She aims to expose his hypocrisy regarding his "strong words."
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's verbal attack provokes anger in Zhang Dalei.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is cold and sharp; Zhang Dalei is becoming angry.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is aggressively confronting Zhang Dalei.
descriptions.outcome: Zhang Dalei becomes enraged by the young girl's audacity.

descriptions.title: A Man
descriptions.scene: An unnamed man rallies a group of fishermen, suggesting they should take the boat by force since she won't lend it. He argues that since she is "unjust," they have no reason to be fair. He ignores the presence of the official ship.

location.name: A gathering of fishermen near the water.

descriptions.intent: The man wants to incite the group to rob Jiang Yan's boat. He aims to justify theft as a response to her perceived unkindness.
descriptions.conflict: The man's plan to rob the boat conflicts with the presence of the official ship and the law.
descriptions.state: The man is angry and malicious; Jiang Yan is being watched.
descriptions.relation: The man is leading a group against Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to surround Jiang Yan's boat.

descriptions.title: A Man
descriptions.scene: A man nearby warns the group that the official ship has arrived and that robbery is now much more dangerous. He notes that the presence of the ship has restored a sense of morality and fear of the law among the people.

location.name: Near the official ship and the fishing group.

descriptions.intent: The man wants to warn the group about the legal consequences of theft. He points out that the official ship acts as a deterrent.
descriptions.conflict: The desire to steal conflicts with the fear of official punishment.
descriptions.state: The man is fearful and cautious; Jiang Yan is being observed.
descriptions.relation: The man is acting as a voice of caution.
descriptions.outcome: The group hesitates due to the presence of authority.

descriptions.title: A Man
descriptions.scene: The man continues to argue that the group should take advantage of Jiang Yan's apparent isolation. He claims she is alone and has no protector, making her an easy target. He suggests that if they are caught, the food they steal would be worth the risk.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to convince the others that there is no risk in attacking Jiang Yan. He aims to exploit her perceived vulnerability.
descriptions.conflict: The man's greed conflicts with the group's fear of the law.
descriptions.state: The man is predatory and calculating; Jiang Yan is being targeted.
descriptions.relation: The man is manipulating the group's greed.
descriptions.outcome: Some members of the group begin to surround the boat with greed in their eyes.

descriptions.title: A Perceptive Man
descriptions.scene: A perceptive man in the crowd realizes that Jiang Yan is likely much more dangerous than she looks. He observes that a young girl could only navigate the river alone if she possessed significant skill or "hidden claws." He concludes that she is someone not to be trifled with.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to assess the true danger of Jiang Yan. He seeks to understand if she is a victim or a threat.
descriptions.conflict: His realization conflicts with the greed of the other men.
descriptions.state: The man is observant and wary; Jiang Yan is indifferent.
descriptions.relation: The man is analyzing Jiang Yan's true nature.
descriptions.outcome: The man recognizes Jiang Yan as a potential threat.

descriptions.title: Two Swimmers
descriptions.scene: Two fast swimmers move toward Jiang Yan's boat and grab the edges of the rubber boat. They smile maliciously, intending to seize the vessel. Jiang Yan turns to them and coldly commands them to let go.

location.name: The water
location.description: adjacent to Jiang Yan's rubber boat.

descriptions.intent: The swimmers want to take control of the boat. Jiang Yan wants them to release her boat.
descriptions.conflict: The physical intrusion of the swimmers conflicts with Jiang Yan's command.
descriptions.state: The swimmers are predatory and smiling; Jiang Yan is cold and authoritative.
descriptions.relation: The swimmers are attacking Jiang Yan; Jiang Yan is resisting.
descriptions.outcome: The swimmers refuse to let go and maintain their grip.

descriptions.title: Two Swimmers
descriptions.scene: The tension breaks as a sword is suddenly unsheathed. A scream pierces the air, and blood begins to spray into the rain. The red blood mixes with the raindrops falling into the water.

location.name: The water near the rubber boat.

descriptions.intent: An unknown force or person acts to strike the swimmers. The scene depicts a sudden violent outburst.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden violence interrupts the confrontation.
descriptions.state: The atmosphere is violent and chaotic; the swimmers are likely in pain.
descriptions.relation: An unseen attacker strikes the swimmers.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends in a bloody, violent confrontation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan and an unnamed person stand by a rubber boat, staring at each other with intense, glittering eyes. Jiang Yan coldly commands the person to let go of the boat. The tension between them is palpable as they smile mockingly at one another.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants the person to release her boat. She seeks to assert control over her movement. She wants to end the standoff.
descriptions.conflict: The unnamed person is holding onto the boat. There is a psychological standoff between the two.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses, a heavy raincoat.

descriptions.relation: Hostile and tense
descriptions.outcome: The person is told to let go, but the tension remains high before the sudden violence.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Person
descriptions.scene: A sword is suddenly unsheathed and a scream erupts. Blood, mixed with raindrops, falls into the water. The person is struck by the blade.
descriptions.intent: The person is caught in a sudden violent act. They are reacting to the sudden appearance of a weapon.
descriptions.conflict: A sudden physical attack occurs. The person is wounded by a sword.
descriptions.relation: Victim of an attack
descriptions.outcome: The person is wounded, and blood spills into the water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan aims an arrow at another man standing nearby. The man, terrified, quickly pulls his hand away. The surrounding crowd, which was about to surround Jiang Yan, freezes in fear.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to intimidate the surrounding crowd. She uses the arrow to prevent them from closing in on her. She seeks to maintain her path.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is attempting to surround her. The man's presence poses a potential threat.
descriptions.state: Focused, lethal, and indifferent.|Outting: Jiang Yan=windproof and waterproof glasses, a heavy raincoat.
descriptions.relation: Aggressor and intimidated bystander
descriptions.outcome: The man retreats, and the crowd stops their advance.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Having finished her tactical distraction, Jiang Yan ignores the crowd. She uses the water channel to swim quickly toward the window of the sixteenth floor of a building.

location.name: Water channel
location.description: moving toward Building A, 16th floor window

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach the safety of the building. She seeks to avoid further interaction with the crowd. She aims to ascend the building.
descriptions.conflict: The physical effort of swimming through the water. The presence of the crowd in her path.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses, a heavy raincoat.

descriptions.relation: Moving away from the crowd
descriptions.outcome: She successfully reaches the window of the sixteenth floor.

descriptions.title: Old Zhao
descriptions.scene: From Building A, a man near Old Zhao points out Jiang Yan to his companion. The second man from Building A looks at Old Zhao with confusion before looking at Jiang Yan. Realizing the significance, the second man instinctively retreats.
descriptions.intent: Old Zhao wants to identify Jiang Yan. Man 2 wants to distance himself from the potential danger. Man 1 wants to observe the situation.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden appearance of a known/notorious figure. The fear of the unknown.
descriptions.state: Old Zhao is observant; Man 2 is fearful and confused.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses, a heavy raincoat.

descriptions.relation: Observers of Jiang Yan
descriptions.outcome: The man retreats in fear after recognizing the situation.

descriptions.title: Crowd
descriptions.scene: The crowd observes Jiang Yan's reputation, noting her role in exposing the truth about the blood mosquitoes and defeating the Luda Hun gang. Some people feel admiration, while others harbor suspicion regarding her sniper skills and her connection to her wealthy, missing mother.
descriptions.intent: The crowd is processing information and rumors. They are debating her identity and legitimacy. They are speculating on her background.
descriptions.conflict: Conflicting rumors and lack of verified information. The tension between admiration and suspicion.
descriptions.relation: Distant observers
descriptions.outcome: The crowd remains divided in their opinion of her.

descriptions.title: Crowd
descriptions.scene: A group of people gathered at the window of the 16th floor of Building A watches the rubber boat approach. They witness the aftermath of the sword attack. Some people move aside to clear the path for the boat.
descriptions.intent: The crowd wants to witness the event like a show. Some want to clear the way for the boat. They are observing the physical feat.
descriptions.conflict: The physical blockage of the corridor by the crowd. The shock of seeing a real-life violent scene.
descriptions.relation: Spectators
descriptions.outcome: The path is cleared for the boat to reach the wall.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan presses the heavy rubber boat against the wall. She places her hands on the windowsill and climbs up with ease. She then pulls a fixed rope to haul the heavy boat up to the floor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to bring her boat into the building. She seeks to complete the ascent. She aims to secure her equipment.
descriptions.conflict: The weight and size of the rubber boat. The physical difficulty of the climb.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses, a heavy raincoat.

descriptions.relation: Performing a solo feat
descriptions.outcome: She successfully pulls the boat up to the 16th floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan removes her raincoat and places it into a white plastic bag. She hoists the rubber boat onto her shoulders and begins walking toward the fire door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to organize her gear. She seeks to move toward her destination. She aims to keep her equipment dry and manageable.
descriptions.conflict: The physical burden of the heavy boat on her shoulders.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses; she removes her raincoat.

descriptions.relation: Moving through the building
descriptions.outcome: She heads toward the fire door.

descriptions.title: Crowd
descriptions.scene: People behind Jiang Yan watch her depart, making comments about her arrogant demeanor. One person mentions a secret regarding the arrival of an official ship. Jiang Yan ignores the gossip.
descriptions.intent: The people want to gossip and judge her. Jiang Yan wants to ignore the distractions. She seeks to continue her journey.
descriptions.conflict: The social pressure and noise of the onlookers. The distraction of the news.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is indifferent; the crowd is judgmental and gossiping.
descriptions.relation: Observers vs. Subject
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan continues her ascent without engaging.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan climbs the stairwell, noting the traces of people's presence on the stairs. She reaches the corner of the 17th floor, wipes water from her face, and puts on a mask and a flashlight.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to clean herself. She seeks to prepare for the dark. She aims to continue her ascent safely.
descriptions.conflict: The physical discomfort of being wet. The darkness of the stairwell.

outfits.Jiang Yan: windproof and waterproof glasses, a mask.

descriptions.relation: Solitary traveler
descriptions.outcome: She prepares herself for the next stage of her journey.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the 30th floor and hears a heated argument coming from above. She overhears a person threatening another person named Yiqing Songzin-tiao, warning them that official authorities will intervene if they do not share supplies.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is passing through. The threatener wants to force Yiqing to open the door. The threatener seeks to use the threat of officials to gain supplies.
descriptions.conflict: A dispute over food and supplies. The tension between neighbors. The threat of legal/official intervention.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is an eavesdropper; the threatener is aggressive.
descriptions.relation: Eavesdropper to the conflict
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan encounters a new conflict involving the distribution of resources.

descriptions.title: Unknown
descriptions.scene: An unidentified person climbs the stairs and reaches the thirtieth floor. They hear a fierce argument occurring above them. The voice threatens Yiqing and Sun Zhentao with official intervention if they do not open the door.

location.name: Stairwell
location.description: approaching the thirtieth floor of a building

descriptions.intent: The speaker wants to intimidate the occupants into opening the door. They aim to leverage the threat of authorities to gain access.
descriptions.conflict: The occupants are refusing to open the door. The speaker uses the threat of legal consequences to pressure them.
descriptions.relation: Antagonistic towards Yiqing and Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: The tension escalates as the speaker demands supplies.

descriptions.title: Unknown
descriptions.scene: The speaker accuses Yiqing and Sun Zhentao of hoarding supplies and possessing illegal weapons. They demand half of the found supplies or the use of a rubber boat. They threaten to raid the apartment if their demands are not met.
descriptions.intent: The speaker wants to extort resources from the occupants. They aim to force a redistribution of food and equipment.
descriptions.conflict: The occupants possess much-needed resources that the crowd lacks. The speaker uses blackmail regarding illegal weapons to force compliance.
descriptions.relation: The speaker is attempting to bully the occupants.
descriptions.outcome: The speaker threatens an immediate robbery if the terms are not met.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing responds to the threats by pointing out the numerical disadvantage of the crowd. He notes that there are only three people defending the position and no one possesses a pistol. He advises the crowd to seek better relations instead of conflict.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to de-escalate the immediate physical threat. He aims to highlight the futility of an attack.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is large and armed with sticks and guns. Yiqing must manage the threat of a mob.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing is confronting the crowd's leader.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd remains unmoved by his logic.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan follows the path of the others and stops to observe the scene. She looks up and sees a dense crowd of people dancing with rifles and sticks around the stairs. The crowd is holding lifebuoys and debris from other buildings.

location.name: Stairwell leading to the thirty-second floor

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the situation and the size of the threat. She observes the surrounding environment.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a large, armed, and unstable mob.

descriptions.title: Danjia
descriptions.scene: As blood drips onto their hands, the group subconsciously relaxes. Due to an unstable center of gravity on the stairs, Danjia's body falls forward by inertia. His head is crushed, and he strikes the stairs with wide eyes and a tilted mouth, dying instantly.

location.name: Staircase
location.description: a dark and unstable area with steps

descriptions.intent: The character unintentionally falls due to physical instability.
descriptions.conflict: The physical instability of the character's position leads to a fatal accident.
descriptions.state: The character is in a state of sudden death.
descriptions.outcome: Danjia dies instantly after hitting the stairs.

descriptions.title: Joe Cao
descriptions.scene: Joe Cao confronts the group, accusing them of killing in broad daylight. He warns them that official authorities will arrive tomorrow to witness their actions. The group responds with reluctance, stating they are too lazy to argue and challenging anyone to ascend to the thirty-second floor.

location.name: Staircase
location.description: near the site of the death

descriptions.intent: Joe Cao wants to threaten the group with legal consequences. He wants to provoke them into a confrontation.
descriptions.conflict: The group refuses to engage in his threats and challenges his authority.
descriptions.state: Joe Cao is confrontational and accusatory.
descriptions.relation: Joe Cao is in conflict with the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group remains defiant and challenges them to come up.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao stands up and declares that if they come alone, they will kill one, but if they come in a crowd, they will kill many. Sudai stands behind him, waving a hammer in her hand. Yiqing looks at the crowd and coldly demands them to leave.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to issue a death threat to anyone approaching. Sudai wants to show her readiness for combat. Yiqing wants to force the crowd to disperse.
descriptions.conflict: The group's presence is met with violent threats and a demand to exit.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is aggressive. Sudai is ready for combat. Yiqing is cold and authoritative.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao and Sudai are allies; Yiqing is an antagonist to the group.
descriptions.outcome: Some people are too shocked by Yiqing's gaze to argue.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Group
descriptions.scene: A member of the group feels depressed and attempts to leave but is stopped by others. They argue that they must stay to prevent the group from disposing of Danjia's body. They decide to wait for the official ship to arrive. One person expresses fear of being killed in the hallway and sits on the stairs.
descriptions.intent: One person wants to leave the scene. The others want to guard the body. One person wants to avoid confrontation by sitting down.
descriptions.conflict: The internal conflict between the desire to flee and the duty to guard the body.
descriptions.state: The group is depressed, anxious, and fearful.|Outability:
descriptions.relation: The group is united in their decision to stay.
descriptions.outcome: The group settles into a state of waiting on the stairs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan, standing on the thirtieth floor, looks upward until her neck aches. She decides to put away her flashlight and takes a rubber boat to begin her ascent. As she moves, the sound of her footsteps is heard from below.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to move toward the group. She intends to bring her supplies upward.
descriptions.conflict: The physical strain of looking up and the effort of carrying the boat.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is focused and determined.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan begins her ascent toward the group.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: The people on the stairs notice someone approaching with a boat. They initially feel a surge of excitement and stand up impatiently. However, their excitement vanishes when they realize the person carrying the boat is Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to see what is coming. They hope for something positive. They react to Jiang Yan's identity.
descriptions.conflict: The disappointment of the group when they recognize Jiang Yan.
descriptions.state: The group shifts from excitement to disappointment.
descriptions.relation: The group recognizes Jiang Yan but does not know her personally.
descriptions.outcome: The group's enthusiasm disappears upon seeing Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The group instinctively parts to create a narrow path for Jiang Yan to pass. Jiang Yan stops at the corner and refuses to climb further, noting how narrow the path is. She warns that anyone stabbing her in the back would turn her into a hedgehog, speaking coldly.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to pass through the group. She wants to assert her dominance and warn them against betrayal.
descriptions.conflict: The physical tightness of the corridor and the potential for betrayal by the crowd.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is cold and calm.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan treats the group with coldness; the group yields to her.
descriptions.outcome: The group presses themselves against the walls to let her through.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stops and places the rubber boat on the ground to take off her backpack. She suggests that everyone should return because it is almost time to go fishing. The group watches her nervously as she unzips her bag, fearing she might pull out a gun.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to suggest a change of plan. She wants to prepare her gear.
descriptions.conflict: The group's fear that she is arming herself.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm; the group is panicked.
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of high tension.

descriptions.title: The Group
descriptions.scene: A person in the crowd suggests they should just leave the body alone and move away. The crowd begins to move their feet and shuffle through the corridor. Yiqing follows the others, reaching down to help Jiang Yan pick up the rubber boat.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to avoid the corpse and the tension. Yiqing wants to assist Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: The awkwardness of dealing with the dead body and the dark environment.
descriptions.state: The group is restless and moving; Yiqing is helpful.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing assists Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The group begins to disperse/move downward.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai approaches Jiang Yan and grabs her arm, crying with joy because she hasn't seen her in two days. Jiang Yan responds with a slight, almost smiling expression. Sun Zhentao approaches and suggests they all go home to talk instead of staying in the hallway.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to express her happiness at seeing Jiang Yan. Sun Zhentao wants to move the conversation to a more comfortable location.
descriptions.conflict: The emotional weight of the reunion vs. the discomfort of the current location.
descriptions.state: Sudai is emotional and joyful. Jiang Yan is subtly amused. Sun Zhentao is pragmatic.
descriptions.relation: Sudai and Sun Zhentao are close to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: They decide to head toward Sudai's home.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai leads Jiang Yan toward their home, mentioning he has something for her. He enthusiastically explains that they received supplies from an official ship, including instant noodles and ham. He also mentions they bought an alcohol stove for her to use.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to share the good news and provide supplies to Jiang Yan. He wants to care for her well-being.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of resources in their environment.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is acting as a provider/caregiver.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan accepts the invitation to go home.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai enthusiastically explains to Jiang Yan that they bought a new stove so she can have something hot to drink. She mentions she will handle other unpleasant matters when the time comes. She assumes Jiang Yan lacks supplies because she only carries a backpack.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to comfort Jiang Yan and reassure her regarding future hardships. She aims to provide warmth and stability.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of supplies and the presence of unpleasant upcoming challenges.
descriptions.relation: Supportive and protective toward Jiang and Yan
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan listens to Sudai's plan for the stove and future management.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing carries Jiang Yan's rubber boat to the door of her house. He places the boat on the ground and approaches the group of three.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's house

descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to assist Jiang Yan by moving her heavy equipment to a safer location. He seeks to join the group.
descriptions.conflict: The physical task of moving the boat.
descriptions.relation: Helpful acquaintance
descriptions.outcome: The boat is successfully placed by the door.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai suggests that Jiang Yan should take her rubber boat and backpack back inside the house. She proposes that the three of them wait outside to avoid intruding. The group agrees to wait.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to maintain social decorum and avoid being an imposition inside the house. She aims to keep the group together outside.
descriptions.conflict: The desire to be polite versus the need for shelter.
descriptions.relation: Respectful companions
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan agrees to go inside and retrieve her items.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan turns around and brings the rubber boat and backpack back into her house. When she emerges, she is carrying a red plastic bag.

location.name: Inside and then outside Jiang Yan's house

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her belongings inside her home. She intends to show the group what she found.
descriptions.conflict: The physical movement of items.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan returns to the group with a new discovery.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan hands the red plastic bag to Sudai. Sudai opens it and discovers cabbage, pumpkin, and melon seeds inside. Sudai expresses great surprise and joy at the find.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to share her find with her friends. Sudai wants to see what is in the bag.
descriptions.conflict: The unexpected nature of the valuable seeds.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm; Sudai is bewildered and then delighted.
descriptions.relation: Sharing a moment of discovery
descriptions.outcome: The group realizes they have gained valuable agricultural resources.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: SCENЕ: Jiang Yan explains that she found the seeds in an electronics company building she visited. She specifies there are exactly two packets of cabbage and pumpkin seeds to be shared. She notes that finding extra supplies is difficult due to her limited backpack space.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to explain the origin of the seeds. She intends to ensure a fair distribution of the seeds.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of finding supplies in the current environment.
descriptions.relation: Transparent and cooperative
descriptions.outcome: The plan to share the seeds is established.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai observes that the seeds might have low germination rates due to high temperatures. She notes that while growth will be slow due to lack of sun and low temperature, the cabbage is still viable. She continues carrying a flower pot from downstairs.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to assess the viability of the new seeds. She aims to continue her gardening work.
descriptions.conflict: Environmental factors like low temperature and lack of sunlight.
descriptions.relation: Shared interest in gardening
descriptions.outcome: A realization that they must wait for slow growth.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao opens the side door and smiles, commenting on the great mutual understanding between Jiang Yan and Sudai. Jiang Yan looks at them in confusion. Sudai pulls Jiang Yan toward the house, jokingly mentioning the house is a mess.

location.name: Near the side door of the house

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to acknowledge their bond. Sudai wants to lead Jiang Yan inside to avoid further scrutiny.
descriptions.conflict: The slight awkwardness of the interaction.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is smiling; Jiang Yan is confused; Sudai is playful.
descriptions.relation: Friendly and teasing
descriptions.outcome: The group moves toward the house.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the house and notices the dark, rainy atmosphere through the large windows. She observes that the living room is filled with various supplies, food, and clothing. She notices some packaging is wet, suggesting they were salvaged from water.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to survey the state of the supplies. She seeks to understand the condition of the salvaged goods.
descriptions.conflict: The damaged and wet state of the supplies.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang and Yan realizes the group has had a successful harvest/salvage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices many flower pots and hydroponic containers made from water bottles near the window. She sees green sprouts in the pots and green garlic and onions in the bottles. She remembers Sudai's mother-in-law brought these seeds to prepare for future isolation.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to inspect the indoor garden. She seeks to connect the current situation to past preparations.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of past hardships versus current survival.
descriptions.outcome: Recognition of the importance of the prepared seeds.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai tells Jiang Yan that the seeds from her mother-in-law might be enough for a long time. She pulls Jiang Yan to sit on a sofa in the corner. She explains the purpose of the indoor garden was for self-sufficiency during periods like the pandemic.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to reassure Jiang Yan about their long-term food security. She aims to make Jiang Yan comfortable.
descriptions.conflict: The need for self-sufficiency in a crisis.
descriptions.relation: Caring and guiding
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan sits down to rest.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao pulls a bottle of mineral water from the supplies and hands it to Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan accepts it with thanks. She notes that water is scarce and the rainwater outside is bitter.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to provide hydration to Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan wants to accept the gesture but remains cautious of the water quality.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of clean drinking water.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is helpful; Jiang Yan is grateful but wary.
descriptions.relation: Providing care
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan receives the water but does not drink it immediately.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan mentions that people are fishing below and asks why Sudai didn't join. She explains that others are using guns to catch fish but the water is too deep and crowded near the community. She notes that families are working together and rotating shifts in the cold water.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to discuss the local fishing situation. She seeks to understand why the group hasn't participated.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of deep, cold water and the overcrowding of the fishing area.
descriptions.relation: Conversational
descriptions.outcome: Information about the communal fishing effort is shared.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiangly Yan asks if an official ship is coming tomorrow to collect people. Sudai nods in confirmation. Jiang Yan expresses hesitation and unease, sensing that the people involved are not relaxed.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confirm the schedule for the official ship. She seeks to understand the underlying tension in the community.
descriptions.conflict: The underlying tension and lack of peace among the people.
descriptions.relation: Seeking information
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends on a note of uncertainty and tension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks Sudai if an official ship is arriving tomorrow to collect people. He observes the unusual atmosphere of the village.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to confirm the arrival of the official transport. He seeks to understand why the community is not relaxing despite the upcoming arrival.
descriptions.conflict: The tension in the village is palpable and unexplained. People are working intensely instead of resting.
descriptions.relation: Peers/Companions
descriptions.outcome: Sudai confirms the ship is coming tomorrow.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai explains the chaotic activity in the village, noting that people are busy fishing and gathering supplies. She hints that there is more to the situation than Jiang Yan realizes.

location.name: The village
location.description: near the docks or supply areas

descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to convey the gravity of the situation. She intends to show that the current behavior of the villagers is driven by underlying necessity.
descriptions.conflict: The villagers' frantic behavior contradicts the expected peace of a pre-departure day.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is acting as an informant to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan becomes puzzled by the specific details of the upcoming selection.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai details the specific criteria for the official ship's selection, including age ranges for men and women and specific professional skills. She mentions the importance of water quality and physical fitness.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to inform Jiang Yan about the selection process. She aims to highlight that the officials are targeting a specific demographic.
descriptions.conflict: The selection process is discriminatory, focusing only on the most useful labor and reproductive potential.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is educating Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes the selection is a way to filter the population.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai describes the current state of the Anming Twin Towers, noting they are housing the overflow of people from other places. She explains that officials can accept individuals if they go to the base alone.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to illustrate the scale of the migration and the density of the current population. She explains the logistics of the official base.
descriptions.conflict: Space is limited, causing people to crowd into the village buildings.
descriptions.relation: Sharing logistical information.
descriptions.outcome: The scope of the population movement is established.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai expresses her belief that the selection process is designed to harvest the most productive workforce and women of childbearing age. She notes that while later groups will come, the intent is clear.

location.name: Looking out a dark window in the village

descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to expose the predatory nature of the official selection. She aims to reveal the underlying logic of the "demographic dividend."
descriptions.conflict: The officials are essentially weeding out the "unproductive" members of society.
descriptions.relation: Sharing a shared realization of systemic exploitation.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan understands the grim reality of the selection.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the change in official priorities, noting that pre-apocalypse relief focused on the weak, while the current regime focuses on the strong. He observes the influx of people to the base.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the shift in social values. He contemplates the survival strategies of the officials.
descriptions.conflict: The fundamental ethics of humanitarian aid have been replaced by a focus on utility and power.
descriptions.relation: Internalizing the social shift.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang-Yan recognizes the self-serving nature of the officials.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks Sudai if she intends to join the official group tomorrow, noting that she, Sun Zhentao, and Ye Qing all meet the age and skill requirements. He notes Sun Zhentao's military potential.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to know Sudai's plan. He suggests that they are prime candidates for the official transport.
descriptions.conflict: The decision to leave involves leaving behind their current autonomy.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is testing Sudai's intentions.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai surprises him with her refusal.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai flatly refuses to go with the official ship. She smiles wryly at Jiang Yan's surprise, signaling her commitment to staying independent.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to assert her independence. She intends to reject the controlled life offered by the officials.
descriptions.conflict: Her refusal contradicts the logical choice of seeking safety with the officials.
descriptions.relation: A moment of tension and revelation.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is left surprised by her decision.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai describes the chaos of the supply runs, observing waves of officials searching for resources. She notes that the base currently resembles a temporary shelter rather than a stable administration.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to describe the instability of the current power structure. She aims to show that the "official" side is also struggling.
descriptions.conflict: The internal management of the base is chaotic and disorganized.
descriptions.relation: Providing a ground-level view of the chaos.
descriptions.outcome: The vulnerability of the official base is revealed.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai reveals that the chaos is a result of those in power fighting for influence and profit. She notes that the workers at the base are the ones actually performing the difficult tasks.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to expose the class struggle within the new order. She intends to show that the "upper" class is exploiting the "lower" class's labor.
descriptions.conflict: The struggle for power at the top creates immense pressure and hardship for the workers below.
descriptions.relation: Sharing a deeper political insight.
descriptions.outcome: The true nature of the base's economy is clarified.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai admits to Jiang Yan that her information comes from Sun Zhentao's private investigations. She keeps some details to herself to avoid revealing too much.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to explain the source of her knowledge without compromising her secrets. She aims to maintain a level of strategic ambiguity.
descriptions.conflict: She possesses information that she cannot fully disclose.
descriptions.relation: A shift in the level of trust and transparency.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan learns the information is intelligence-based.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the necessity of staying informed about the changing world. He concludes that while the apocalypse brings constant change, survival depends on adapting to these shifts.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a way to survive the upcoming disasters. He aims to reconcile the need for information with the need for autonomy.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of staying informed while avoiding the control of the officials.
descriptions.relation: Reaching a shared philosophical conclusion.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan accepts the necessity of monitoring the world's changes.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the socio-political reality of the disaster, noting that officials possess superior resources and technology. She reflects on the inequality of future scientific advancements. She decides that her priority is maintaining her right to information.

location.name: Repals Bay
location.description: an area facing a natural catastrophe

descriptions.intent: To process the reality of the disaster and the inequality of power. She seeks to maintain her autonomy and right to know.
descriptions.conflict: The disparity between the ruling class and ordinary people. The uncertainty of scientific solutions.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan accepts her role as an ordinary person who must stay informed.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai observes Jiang Yan's deep contemplation and asks if she intends to go out tomorrow. Jiang Yan shakes her head and firmly declines the idea of leaving.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to know Jiang Yan's plans for the next day. Jiang Yan wants to stay in her safe, self-sufficient space.
descriptions.conflict: The decision of whether to face the outside world or remain in isolation.
descriptions.state: Sudai is curious and observant; Jiang Yan is resolute.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is a companion/observer to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan decides to stay home to work on her base and live comfortably.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai warns Jiang Yan that a group of people reported her possession of a gun to the authorities. He asks if she plans to hide the weapon or keep it visible tomorrow.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to warn her of the danger regarding the weapon. Jiang Yan wants to dismiss the concern.
descriptions.conflict: The legal and social danger of possessing a firearm in a volatile environment.
descriptions.state: Sudai is anxious and worried; Jiang Yan is nonchalant.
descriptions.relation: Sudai acts as a protective advisor.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan dismisses the need to hide it, focusing instead on protecting Sudai from the authorities.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan explains that she is not afraid of the authorities because she has already disposed of the gun in space. She notes that even if they search the bay, they will find nothing.
descriptions.intent: To reassure Sudai that the evidence is gone. She wants to prove the impossibility of finding the weapon.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of authorities searching for the weapon.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan establishes her confidence in her method of disposal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the possibility of combat or retreating into her private space if the authorities arrive. She observes the worsening weather outside.

location.name: Jiang Yan's home
location.description: near a window overlooking a stormy landscape

descriptions.intent: To prepare for potential confrontation or retreat. She intends to use her space as a sanctuary.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching storm and the potential arrival of official ships.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan remains unbothered by the approaching storm or potential conflict.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai watches Jiang Yan's calm expression and feels his own anxiety dissipate. Outside, the rain and wind intensify, threatening the structural integrity of the balcony.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to find peace in Jiang Yan's lack of fear. He observes the environmental destruction.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme weather conditions and the wind hitting the glass.
descriptions.state: Sudai transitions from anxious to relieved; Jiang Yan is steady.
descriptions.outcome: The tension between the characters eases despite the rising storm.

descriptions.title: Ye Qin
descriptions.scene: Ye Qin enters the room with bloodstains on his hands, appearing to have just disposed of Junday's body. He wipes his hands with a piece of cloth and hands a key to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Ye Qin wants to provide the key and inform her of the security measures. Jiang Yan receives the key.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of blood and the recent violent act of disposing of a body.
descriptions.state: Ye Qin is weary/functional; Jiang Yan is receptive.
descriptions.relation: Ye Qin enters as a participant in the shared survival effort.
descriptions.outcome: Ye Qin delivers the key to Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Ye Qin
descriptions.scene: Ye Qin explains that he and Brother Tao have locked the fire door on the 32nd floor for safety. He instructs Jiang Yan to notify them if she needs to exit.
descriptions.intent: Ye Qin wants to ensure security and establish a protocol for movement. Jiang Yan accepts the responsibility.
descriptions.conflict: The need for security against people with bad intentions.
descriptions.state: Ye Qin is serious and cautious; Jiang Yan is compliant.
descriptions.relation: Ye Qin acts as a protector/security coordinator.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan takes the key and agrees to the plan.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao, while sorting supplies, warns Jiang Yan to be careful when going out because the residents of the other four buildings live in worse conditions. He notes the risk of "hidden arrows" or betrayal.

location.name: A supply area in Repals Bay

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to warn her of the social instability and potential for ambush. Jiang Yan acknowledges the danger.
descriptions.conflict: The social tension and the threat of betrayal from desperate neighbors.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is cautious; Jiang Yan is observant and nodding in agreement.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as a cautious observer of the community.

descriptions.title: Narrator/Context
descriptions.scene: The text describes the layout of the five buildings in Repals Bay, noting the disparity in height and capacity. It details the looming threat of rising water levels forcing residents into overcrowded spaces.
descriptions.intent: To illustrate the structural and social collapse of the area. The focus is on the impending overcrowding.
descriptions.conflict: The rising water levels and the lack of space in the remaining habitable floors.
descriptions.outcome: The scene establishes the high stakes of the environmental disaster.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the rising floodwaters and the structural vulnerability of the residential buildings. She calculates that if water reaches the 16th floor, the population density in the remaining floors will become unsustainable. She recognizes Building A as the most vital strategic location but notes the threat posed by the Malunbiao group.

location.name: An unspecified room
location.description: likely within a high-rise building, overlooking the flooded urban landscape

descriptions.intent: To assess the survival probability of the current living situation. She wants to determine if staying in the current building is viable. She seeks to understand the long and short-term risks of the rising water.
descriptions.conflict: The rising water levels threaten to displace residents into overcrowded spaces. The Malunbiao group presents a direct security threat to the 32nd floor.
descriptions.state: Analytical and cautious. She is focused on the logistical nightmare of the impending flood.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that Building A is the last bastion of safety, but its occupation by rivals makes it a "time bomb."

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan asks Sudai about the recent behavior of the Malunbiao group. She seeks information regarding whether they have become more aggressive or erratic in the last few days.

location.name: A shared living or meeting space

descriptions.intent: To gather intelligence on potential local threats. She wants to know if the rival group is planning any attacks. She seeks to gauge the current level of peace in the area.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the Malunbiao group's intentions creates tension. There is a history of conflict between them and the 32nd floor residents.
descriptions.state: Inquisitive and vigilant. She is testing the waters regarding the current social climate.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan and Sudai are close friends but maintain a level of strategic caution.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai reveals that the group has been busy looting rubber boats and supplies rather than acting aggressively.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai yawns, revealing her exhaustion, while Ye Qing and Sun Zhentao appear physically drained. The group shows signs of extreme fatigue from days of continuous scavenging.

location.name: A shared living or meeting space

descriptions.intent: The characters are attempting to maintain their strength. They are managing the physical toll of survival.
descriptions.conflict: Extreme fatigue and the lack of sleep are hindering their ability to function. The scarcity of resources forces them into dangerous scavenging missions.
descriptions.state: Exhausted and physically depleted. They are experiencing a high level of survival crisis.
descriptions.relation: The three characters are part of a survival group working together.
descriptions.outcome: It becomes evident that the group has been working day and night to secure supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Realizing the conversation is concluding, Jiang Yan prepares to leave and return to her own home. She stands up to end the meeting.

location.name: A shared living or meeting space

descriptions.intent: To conclude the meeting and return to her private quarters. She wants to resume her personal preparations.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance social obligations with the necessity of individual survival.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She prepares to depart, but is stopped by Sudai.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai stops Jiang Yan and presents a large shopping bag filled with various scavenged supplies. She offers these items to Jiang Yan to assist in her survival.

location.name: A shared living or meeting space

descriptions.intent: To share much-needed resources with her friend. She wants to ensure Jiang Yan has enough food and supplies. She aims to strengthen their mutual survival bond.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of resources makes giving away items a significant sacrifice. There is an underlying tension regarding the balance of debt and help.
descriptions.state: Generous and helpful. She is acting out of genuine care for her friend.|Outables: None
props: bags of fried rice and noodles
descriptions.relation: Sudai acts as a provider; Jiang Yan is the recipient.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan receives a significant amount of food and supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan feels a sense of embarrassment and guilt upon receiving the large amount of food. She contemplates the ethics of accepting so much when she is not in lack herself.
descriptions.intent: To manage her social debt. She wants to avoid appearing overly dependent or "strange" by taking too much. She seeks to maintain her independence.
descriptions.conflict: The internal struggle between the desire to accept help and the need to maintain social standing and avoid being beholdable.
descriptions.state: Embarrassed and conflicted. She feels the weight of the generosity.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She accepts the supplies but resolves to balance the scales later.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan informs Sudai that she also found supplies during her recent outing. She promises to bring them to Sudai when she goes out again to repay the kindness.
descriptions.intent: To establish a reciprocal relationship. She wants to ensure she is not just a taker. She intends to use her resources to support Sudai's group.
