descriptions.conflict: The necessity of maintaining a "balance of power" and resources in a survival situation. She must ensure her help is seen as a strategic partnership.
descriptions.state: Determined and pragmatic. She is thinking about long-term cooperation.
descriptions.relation: The relationship shifts from simple friendship toward a strategic, resource-based alliance.
descriptions.outcome: A mutual agreement of resource exchange is established.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the nature of survival and the necessity of the "invisible" exchange of resources. She realizes that her ability to provide protection with a gun is a resource in itself.
descriptions.intent: To internalize the logic of the new world. She wants to accept the reality that cooperation requires mutual benefit. She aims to use her strength to secure her position.
descriptions.conflict: The harsh reality that survival depends on the strategic use of power and resources rather than just altruism.
descriptions.state: Philosophically resigned and pragmatic. She understands the cold logic of the current era.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She accepts the necessity of the exchange and stops resisting the help.

descriptions.title: Ye Qing
descriptions.scene: Ye Qing brings additional items, including instant noodles, sausages, and water, to assist in the transfer of supplies. The group works together to move the heavy items.

location.name: Moving from the meeting area toward room 3204

descriptions.intent: To complete the logistics of the supply transfer. They want to move the alcohol, stove, and food to Jiang Yan's room.
descriptions.conflict: The physical labor of moving supplies in a crisis environment.
descriptions.state: Focused on the task at hand.
descriptions.relation: Ye Qing acts as a helper in the physical movement of goods.
descriptions.outcome: The supplies are successfully transported to Jiang Yan's room.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her room, number 3204, and begins placing the supplies inside. As she settles in, she feels a sense of security and relief.
descriptions.intent: To secure her new resources. She wants to organize her supplies for the coming crisis. She seeks the psychological comfort of being "home."
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming presence of the supplies and the looming threat of the flood.
descriptions.state: Relieved and a sense of "solidity." The tension from the meeting dissipates.
props: The various food items and supplies
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She achieves a moment of peace and realizes she has already prepared her space by storing movable items in her spatial dimension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes her poor living room and realizes she has stored all movable materials within the room's space. She contemplates the inadequacy of her current living situation compared to more luxurious settings. She reflects on the necessity of preparing for the rising waters.

location.name: A poor living room with four walls

descriptions.intent: To assess her current living resources and prepare for environmental changes.
descriptions.conflict: The poverty and lack of comfort in her current home.
descriptions.outcome: She decides she needs to renovate her living space for better warmth and survival.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the heavy rain outside and remembers the water levels from her past life. She concludes that staying outdoors might be safer to monitor the external environment. She weighs the pros and cons of staying in the space versus the outside world.

location.name: Inside a room
location.description: looking out through a window at heavy rain.

descriptions.intent: To decide on the best survival strategy regarding the rising floodwaters.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the rising water and the danger of the flood.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to stay inside but seeks to improve the internal environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang and Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to light a fire in the fireplace to increase the Yang energy and warmth in the room. She compares her empty, cold house to the crowded, warmer atmosphere of Sudai. She believes the fire will bring vitality to the damp space.

location.name: A cold
location.description: empty living room with a fireplace.

descriptions.intent: To create warmth and vitality through fire.
descriptions.conflict: The emptiness and coldness of the house.
descriptions.outcome: She formulates a plan to rearrange her furniture to optimize heat.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan moves her bed into the living room to be closer to the heat. She also moves a dining set and a lounge chair near the fireplace. She relocates the sofa and TV stand into the bedroom to reduce the area needing to be heated.

location.name: Living room and bedroom of the apartment.

descriptions.intent: To consolidate the living area around the heat source.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of moving heavy furniture alone.
descriptions.outcome: The living room is reorganized into a smaller, more efficient heating zone.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finishes organizing the living room and lights the fireplace around 4 or 5 PM. She observes that the rain has lightened and the wind has died down, though the sky is darkening with thick clouds.
descriptions.intent: To complete the domestic setup and monitor the weather.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching darkness and heavy storm clouds.
descriptions.outcome: The room is warm, but the external weather remains threatening.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks out the window and sees people returning in boats through the water. She notices people using lifebuoys, supplies on foam boards, and modified rubber boats. She observes the heavy supplies being transported.

location.name: Window overlooking the water and the village.

descriptions.intent: To observe the movement of people and supplies in the flood.
descriptions.conflict: The chaotic and dangerous nature of the flood rescue.
descriptions.outcome: She witnesses the scale of the ongoing flood crisis.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares to close the curtains but is startled by large, egg-sized and fist-sized hailstones falling from the sky. She watches as the hail strikes the window frame. She holds her breath in shock at the intensity of the hail.

location.name: By the window of the apartment.

descriptions.intent: To close the curtains and protect the room.
descriptions.conflict: Sudden, violent hail falling from the sky.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the extreme danger of the weather.

descriptions.title: People in the boat
descriptions.scene: A middle-aged couple and their six-year-old daughter arrive in a red rubber boat near Building A. They are heavily equipped with raincoats and covered supplies. The hail begins to strike the boat with the force of bullets.

location.name: A red rubber boat in the water near Building A.

descriptions.intent: To navigate the boat toward safety/the building.
descriptions.conflict: Violent hail striking the boat and the threat of drowning.
descriptions.outcome: The boat is damaged by the hail and water begins to leak in.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged woman
descriptions.scene: The woman quickly drops her oar to pull her daughter under her body for protection. She uses invisible items to create a shield over her husband and child. The hail strikes her arms, causing her to drop the shields in pain.
descriptions.intent: To protect her family from the falling hail.
descriptions.conflict: The physical pain of the hail and the loss of protection.
descriptions.outcome: The shields fall, leaving the family vulnerable to direct hits.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged man
descriptions.scene: The man, bleeding from the forehead, struggles to keep rowing despite the pain. He panics and screams for help, calling out to Jiang Yan and Lu Fen at the 16th-floor window. He realizes that stopping means death.

location.name: The leaking rubber boat in the water.

descriptions.intent: To reach the building and seek rescue.
descriptions.conflict: Severe injury and the overwhelming force of the hail.
descriptions.outcome: His cries for help are heard by the residents in the building.

descriptions.title: Middle-aged woman
descriptions.scene: The woman is struck by large hailstones and collapses onto her daughter, her face covered in blood. Blood drips from her neck into the boat. She uses her final moments to shield her child with her body.
descriptions.intent: To use her body as a final shield for her daughter.
descriptions.conflict: Fatal injuries from the hail.
descriptions.outcome: The mother dies while protecting her child.

descriptions.title: Residents of the building
descriptions.scene: The man continues to plead for help while the residents of the building watch from the corridor. Some residents look on silently, while others show regret. The residents, many of whom are experienced fishermen, observe the tragedy.

location.name: The corridor of the 16th floor and the building entrance.

descriptions.intent: To observe the unfolding tragedy.
descriptions.conflict: The helplessness of the residents against the hail.
descriptions.outcome: The tragedy of the family is witnessed by the community.

descriptions.title: Man in Rubber Boat
descriptions.scene: The man in the rubber boat cries and pleads with the people in the corridor for help. He begs Danczy and Lufenl to assist him and his daughter. The crowd watches him with varying expressions of silence and regret.

location.name: Corridor entrance
location.description: a hallway where people are gathered during a storm

descriptions.intent: The man wants to secure help for his family. He is desperate to save his daughter from the sinking boat. He seeks compassion from the neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: The people in the corridor are hesitant to act. Some are silent and others are merely regretful, but no one moves to help.
descriptions.relation: The man is a neighbor pleading with the residents
descriptions.outcome: The man's pleas are initially met with no reaction from the crowd.

descriptions.title: Man in Rubber Boat
descriptions.scene: The man drifts toward the window on his sinking rubber boat. He observes the small shelters and the lower density of hail near the window. He prepares to move his daughter.

location.name: Sinking rubber boat
location.description: near a window during a heavy hail storm

descriptions.intent: The man wants to find a safer spot for his daughter. He intends to use the window area as a temporary refuge.
descriptions.conflict: His body is severely injured, preventing him from using his hands effectively. The boat is actively sinking.
descriptions.outcome: He reaches the window but struggles to maneuver his daughter.

descriptions.title: Man in Rubber Boat
descriptions.scene: The man attempts to open his wife's body to reach his daughter. He struggles to lift the child toward the window because of his physical injuries. He cannot find the strength to grip the window edge.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to bring his daughter to safety. He tries to use the window as a handhold.
descriptions.conflict: His injuries prevent him from using his hands. He lacks the physical strength to complete the movement.
descriptions.outcome: He fails to secure himself or the child effectively.

descriptions.title: Man in Rubber Boat
descriptions.scene: The man offers his entire food supply and his rubber boat to the people in the corridor in exchange for help. He promises to share his resources halfway. He begs them to save his daughter.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to bribe the neighbors with supplies. He aims to trade his assets for the lives of his family.
descriptions.conflict: The people in the corridor remain unresponsive to his offers. His desperation increases as his head is bloodied.
descriptions.relation: The man is negotiating with the neighbors
descriptions.outcome: The neighbors still do not react to his desperate bargaining.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: A man with a triangular face, shivering from the cold, emerges from the corridor. He wraps his head in wet clothing and approaches the window. The man in the boat sees him as a savior.
descriptions.intent: The man with the triangular face moves toward the man in the boat. The man in the boat wants to receive help.
descriptions.conflict: The man is freezing and the environment is harsh.
descriptions.state: The man in the boat is hopeful; the man with the triangular face is cold and hesitant.

outfits.Man with Triangular Face: wet clothing wrapped around his head;Man in Rubber Boat=none

descriptions.relation: The man in the boat views the man with the triangular face as a rescuer.
descriptions.outcome: The man with the triangular face approaches the window.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the triangular face demands the house key in exchange for help. The man in the boat hesitates for a second as he notices the boat sinking faster. He eventually retrieves the key from his pants pocket.
characters: Man with Triangular and triangular face
descriptions.intent: The man with the triangular face wants the house key. The man in the boat wants to finalize the deal to save his daughter.
descriptions.conflict: The man in the boat is hesitant to give up his home's security. The boat is sinking rapidly.
descriptions.state: The man in the boat is trembling and anxious; the man with the triangular face is impatient.
descriptions.relation: A transactional tension exists between the two.
descriptions.outcome: The man in the boat hands the key to the man with the triangular face.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the triangular face grabs the key with a fierce look in his eyes. The man in the boat feels a sense of dread. The man in the boat lifts his daughter toward the window to complete the rescue.
descriptions.intent: The man in the boat wants to finish the rescue of his daughter. The man with the triangular face takes the key.
descriptions.conflict: The man in the boat senses a bad omen from the man's eyes.
descriptions.state: The man in the boat is fearful; the man with the triangular face is aggressive.
descriptions.relation: The relationship shifts from rescuer/rescued to predator/prey.
descriptions.outcome: The man in the boat successfully lifts the daughter toward the window.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the triangular face pulls out a bright fruit knife and stabs the man in the rubber boat in the heart. He mocks the man's previous pleas for help. The man in the boat manages to stab the attacker in return.
descriptions.intent: The man with the triangular face wants to kill the man. The man in the boat wants to defend himself.
descriptions.conflict: A violent physical confrontation occurs.
descriptions.state: The man with the triangular face is vengeful and sinister; the man in the boat is in shock.
descriptions.relation: The man with the triangular face becomes an assailant.
descriptions.outcome: The man in the boat is stabbed in the heart but manages to strike back.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the triangular face slashes the man's throat. The man's grip fails, and his daughter falls into the water with a splash. The man's body follows into the water, and the water turns red with blood.
descriptions.intent: The man with the/triangular face intends to finish the killing. The man in the boat loses control of his daughter.
descriptions.conflict: The man's physical strength fails due to the throat wound. The daughter is dropped.
descriptions.state: The man with the triangular face is murderous; the man in the boat is dying.
descriptions.relation: The man with the triangular face is the executioner.
descriptions.outcome: The man, his wife, and his daughter all end up in the water, and the water is stained red.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: A neighbor confronts the man with the triangular face about killing the man. The man with the triangular face justifies the killing by stating the girl would not survive alone. He threatens the crowd to keep the incident a secret.
descriptions.intent: The neighbor wants an explanation for the violence. The man with the triangular face wants to silence the witnesses.
descriptions.conflict: The neighbor is horrified by the death of the child. The man with the triangular face uses threats to maintain control.
descriptions.state: The neighbor is fearful; the man with the triangular face is furious and threatening.
descriptions.relation: The man with the triangular face is now a threat to the entire group.
descriptions.outcome: The man with the triangular face threatens the group and prepares to leave.

descriptions.title: Man with Triangular Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the triangular face jumps out of the window and throws the woman's body into the water. Three bodies are now visible in the water below. He announces that the official ship will arrive tomorrow.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to dispose of the body and issue a final command. He wants to ensure no one speaks of the event.
descriptions.conflict: He must manage the aftermath of the violence.
descriptions.outcome: The man leaves the scene, leaving three bodies in the water.

descriptions.title: People in the Corridor
descriptions.scene: Some supplies from the rubber boat have fallen into the water, while others are in bags. The people in the corridor realize the boat is sinking. They grab fishing tools and rush to help save the remaining supplies.

location.name: Corridor and the area near the water

descriptions.intent: The people want to save the remaining supplies from the sinking boat. They aim to prevent further loss.
descriptions.conflict: The boat is actively sinking and supplies are slipping away.
descriptions.relation: The people move from passive observers to active participants.
descriptions.outcome: The people begin the process of salvaging the supplies.

characters: Man with Triangular and triangular face

descriptions.title: Lufenlei
descriptions.scene: Lufenlei struggles to secure supplies in woven bags tied to a rubber boat. He calls out to others to stop standing idle and help him prevent the boat from sinking. People from the corridor rush to assist him with fishing tools.

location.name: Water near a building
location.description: flooded area with a rubber boat

descriptions.intent: Lufenlei wants to save the rubber boat and the supplies from sinking. He needs immediate physical assistance from the bystanders. He aims to secure the floating assets before they are lost.
descriptions.conflict: The rubber boat is unstable and prone to sinking. The supplies are loosely tied and at risk of drifting away. The suddenness of the situation creates chaos.
descriptions.relation: Lufenlei is commanding the others to assist him.
descriptions.outcome: The people from the corridor begin to help save the boat and supplies.

descriptions.title: Lufenlei
descriptions.scene: Lufenlei swims toward a floating male corpse in the water. He reaches the body and removes a gold watch from the man's wrist. He then climbs back through a window, his lips appearing purple from the cold.
descriptions.intent: Lufenlei wants to scavenge valuable items from the deceased. He seeks to retrieve the gold watch before leaving the water. He intends to escape the freezing water to find safety.
descriptions.conflict: The water is freezing, causing physical distress like purple lips. The presence of corpses indicates a high mortality rate from the hail.
descriptions.relation: Lufenlei is scavenging from a dead person.
descriptions.outcome: Lufenlei successfully retrieves the watch and exits the water.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the remaining hail stones, which are the size of eggs, resting on her windowsill. She reflects on her past life where Song Demin and Zhang Qiqi imprisoned her in a basement. She contemplates the limited information she had about the world during that time.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process her memories and understand her current situation. She is reflecting on the gap between her past knowledge and current reality. She seeks clarity regarding the progression of the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: Her past trauma and isolation limit her understanding of the world. She feels a sense of unearriness about the current state of things.
descriptions.state: Deep in thought, contemplative, and uneasy.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is reflecting on her former captors.
descriptions.outcome: She remains stuck in a state of deep, uncertain thought.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The sky darkens significantly as a new rainstorm begins. Thunder rumbles loudly, and bright blue and purple lightning flashes across the sky. Jiang Yan observes the worsening weather from her position.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is observing the environmental changes. She is monitoring the severity of the storm. She is assessing the immediate threat of the weather.
descriptions.conflict: The weather is becoming increasingly violent and dark. The storm poses a continuous threat to the environment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The storm intensifies with lightning and thunder.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan returns to the living room and closes the heavy curtains to block the view. She turns on the lights to illuminate the room. She checks the thermometer and notes the outdoor temperature is 3 degrees Celsius while the indoor temperature is nearly 20 degrees.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her living space from the storm. She seeks to monitor the temperature difference between inside and outside. She aims to maintain a controlled environment.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme cold outside threatens the warmth of the indoors. The darkness of the storm necessitates artificial light.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The indoor environment is stabilized and monitored.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan walks to the fireplace to add more wood to the fire. After tending to the fire, she turns her attention to the surveillance camera, which she has not checked for a long time.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain the heat in her home. She intends to check the status of other people via the security cameras. She seeks information about the surrounding area.
descriptions.conflict: The need to maintain warmth competes with her curiosity about the outside world. The lack of recent monitoring creates a gap in her knowledge.
descriptions.state: Purposeful and curious.|Outlar: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins to monitor the building's inhabitants.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the 31st floor on the surveillance screen. She sees people sleeping on the floor, some staring blankly at the ceiling, and a group cooking near the corridor entrance. She notices a rare moment of harmony among the survivors.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the condition of the survivors on the 31st floor. She is looking for signs of stability or chaos. She seeks to understand the social atmosphere of the group.
descriptions.conflict: The survivors are in a state of shock and exhaustion. The survival of the group depends on their ability to remain harmonious.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing the group from a distance.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a temporary state of peace among the residents.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a group of people cooking what looks like fried noodles, similar to how Su Dai cooks. She notices a pile of broken table boards nearby and realizes that the ability to eat hot food will soon become impossible.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to evaluate the food supplies and cooking methods of the group. She is analyzing the long-term sustainability of their current situation. She recognizes the impending loss of heat for food preparation.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of resources and the difficulty of maintaining heat. The broken furniture indicates a lack of proper supplies.
descriptions.state: Perceptive and concerned.|Outlar: Jiang Yan=Not specified.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the gravity of the approaching food crisis.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the corridor area through the camera, noting the half-open window and broken glass from the hail. She sees thick smoke billowing in the corridor, causing people to cough and some to struggle for breath. She notes the ground is covered in water.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is assessing the air quality and physical safety of the corridor. She wants to understand the impact of the recent hail and rain. She is evaluating the health of the people in the hallway.
descriptions.conflict: The smoke is causing respiratory distress and potential choking. The broken glass and flooding create physical hazards. The cold weather is making people vulnerable to illness.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the high risk of illness and suffocation among the survivors.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks at the 20th floor on the monitor and sees a chaotic scene with trash everywhere. A crowd of people is gathered angrily in front of room 2002, unaware that their current space will soon be flooded. Two women are fighting violently, tearing at each other's hair and clothes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the level of conflict on lower floors. She is observing the breakdown of social order. She seeks to understand the level of desperation in the building.
descriptions.conflict: Intense physical violence between the women. The angry crowd is in a state of confusion and aggression. The impending flood is an unseen threat to the people fighting.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is witnessing the conflict between the women.
descriptions.outcome: She observes the total breakdown of peace on the 20th floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sees a crying child with a yellowish face near the fighting women and scattered instant noodles. She observes people eating dry noodles by crushing the packets and adding dry seasoning because they lack hot water. She realizes this current chaos is nothing compared to her past life.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the tragedy she is witnessing. She is comparing the current apocalypse to her previous traumatic experiences. She seeks to find a sense of perspective.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme poverty and desperation of the survivors. The child's suffering and the lack of basic necessities like hot water. The psychological weight of her memories.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She feels a deep sense of sadness and realizes she cannot continue watching the group she cannot find.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to stop watching the monitor because she cannot find Malun Biao's group. She feels a sudden urge to leave her current location but realizes she is trapped by the rising water and the heavy rain. She returns to the fireplace to warm her hands.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find her missing group. She intends to escape her current confinement. She seeks physical comfort from the warmth of the fire.
descriptions.conflict: The floodwater and rain prevent her from leaving. The lack of her specific group leaves her feeling isolated. The physical coldness drives her back to the fire.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She settles by the fire to rest and combat hunger.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sits by the fire and feels a sudden sharp pain in her stomach and a tingling sensation along her meridians. She realizes her menstrual cycle is starting, as she has suffered from dysmenorrhea for many years. She remembers using traditional Chinese medicine in the past.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to manage her physical pain. She is identifying the cause of her sudden discomfort. She seeks to recall effective treatments from her past.
descriptions.conflict: The onset of intense menstrual pain. The physical discomfort is interrupting her rest. The lack of immediate access to her usual medicine.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She recognizes the onset of her chronic medical condition.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan attempts to stand up to eat but is suddenly struck by stomach cramps and a tingling sensation along her meridians. She realizes her menstrual cycle has returned, a condition known as dysmenorrhea that she has suffered from for years. She reflects on how her past use of Chinese medicine and doctors failed to cure her, and how her rebirth and space-time transformation have only managed to shorten the duration of the pain.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to eat but must first deal with the sudden physical pain. She seeks to understand the recurrence of her chronic condition.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden onset of menstrual pain and the physical discomfort of meridians tingling.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the cause of her pain as her period.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her personal space dimension to check on the progress of the stream. She observes that the stream's progress has reached 66% and notes the increased clarity of the emerald-green plants and crystal pebbles. She feels a sense of concern regarding the lack of synchronization between her and Wang Linquan's update rhythms.

location.name: The Space Dimension
location.description: a realm containing a clear stream with emerald plants and pebbles

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to monitor the development of her space. She seeks to assess the progress of the stream.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of synchronization with Wang Linquan's progress.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the stream is becoming clearer but remains worried about the timing of updates.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Huabau
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan notices that Huabau is lying on his side, likely busy preparing food. She decides not to disturb him and heads to the kitchen to tend to her own needs.

location.name: The Kitchen
location.description: a functional area within the living quarters

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to alleviate her menstrual pain. She decides to prepare medicinal tea and a patch.
descriptions.conflict: None
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan and Huabau are living together; no direct interaction occurs.
descriptions.outcome: She moves to the kitchen to begin her self-care routine.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: In the kitchen, Jiang Yan brews hawthorn tea and drinks it before applying a warm palace patch to her abdomen. She then prepares a simple recipe of an egg stuffed with brown sugar and wine to help her feel better. After finishing her meal, she goes to bed early.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to soothe her physical pain through traditional remedies and food. She aims to rest early.
descriptions.conflict: The physical pain of dysmenorrhea.
descriptions.state: Focused on self-care and seeking comfort.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully manages her pain and falls asleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The next day, Jiang Yan wakes up naturally without an alarm. Because of her menstrual pain, she does not prepare much food. Instead, she focuses on her routine tasks involving firearms, yacht operations, and selecting incubation eggs for the thermal machine.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to continue her daily maintenance and incubation tasks. She aims to manage her workload despite her physical state.
descriptions.conflict: The lingering effects of her menstrual cycle limiting her productivity.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She completes her routine tasks and begins planning future gardening.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates starting a balcony garden, inspired by Sudai's vegetable growing. She decides to repurpose large empty foam seafood and fruit boxes by drilling ventilation holes to use as makeshift flower pots. After finalizing this plan, she falls asleep.

location.name: The balcony and indoor living area

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to grow vegetables on her balcony to be prepared for harsh conditions. She seeks to repurpose waste materials.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of specialized seedling pots and the harsh outdoor environment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She creates a plan for gardening and falls back into sleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A loud, sudden noise abruptly wakes Jiang Yan from her sleep. She realizes the sound was loud enough to penetrate her well-soundproofed room, indicating significant movement outside.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the source of the disturbance. She seeks to understand if she is in danger.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected and loud external noise.
descriptions.state: Startled and alert.|Outments: Jiang Yan=Not specified
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She becomes alert and turns to her surveillance monitor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks her surveillance screen and sees that the previously locked fire door on the 32nd floor is now open. A large, middle-aged man with a face resembling a Chinese character and heavy wrinkles enters the floor. He looks around vigilantly and then closes the fire door to prevent others from entering.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to enter the floor and secure the area. Jiang Yan wants to observe the intruder.
descriptions.conflict: An intruder has breached the security of the 32nd floor.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is shocked and observant; the man is vigilant and suspicious.

outfits.Unidentified Man: Not specified, described as having a wrinkled, Shar-Pei-like face.

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing the man as an intruder.
descriptions.outcome: The man successfully enters and restricts access to the floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the man's movements and suspects he has accomplices. She decides to remain calm and continue watching the screen. She notes that while there is a thunderstorm outside, the noise might have alerted others who are now lurking in the dark corridor.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to gather more information without being detected. She aims to assess the threat level.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of a potential threat and unknown accomplices.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She remains in hiding to observe the situation further.

descriptions.title: Unidentified Man
descriptions.scene: The man with the wrinkled face moves stealthily toward room 3203, bending his waist to stay low. He approaches the door of a room that has been vacant since the He Chunmei family disappeared.
descriptions.intent: The man wants to approach room 3203 undetected. He is searching or investigating the area.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness of the corridor and the need for stealth.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He reaches the door of the vacant room.

descriptions.title: Unknown Man
descriptions.scene: A man exits an empty room on the 32nd floor after checking the hallway. He glances left and right before waving toward the fire door. This action signals the end of his inspection.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a corridor near a room that was recently emptied of all belongings.

descriptions.intent: The man wants to ensure the hallway is clear. He performs a routine check of his surroundings. He signals his movement toward the exit.
descriptions.conflict: None mentioned.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The man exits the room and prepares to move.

descriptions.title: Man, Two Women, Little Girl
descriptions.scene: A group of four people enters the hallway carrying heavy supplies. A young girl holds duck and swan lifebuoys and a heavy school bag. The adults carry large bags tied with bedsheets and various items.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a corridor filled with abandoned furniture and supplies.

descriptions.intent: The group intends to move their belongings into a room. They are transporting essential supplies and personal items. The girl is simply following her family.
descriptions.conflict: The weight of the supplies and the fatigue of the group.
descriptions.state: The girl is confused and tired; the adults are exhausted and physically strained.

outfits.Little Girl: School bag filled with various items; Man=Not specified; Woman 1=Short uneven hair
outfits.carrying a large bag tied with sheets; W: Short uneven hair, carrying a large bag tied with sheets.

descriptions.relation: Family unit
descriptions.outcome: The group reaches the vicinity of room 323.

descriptions.title: Four Adults
descriptions.scene: Four adults quickly check room 323 and then exit the room after only a few seconds. They move through the hallway with purpose.
descriptions.intent: They are checking the availability or status of room 323. They want to see if the room is usable.
descriptions.conflict: The brevity of their stay suggests a quick, perhaps failed, attempt to occupy the space.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: They exit the room almost immediately.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan watches the group from a distance, realizing they are moving the remaining supplies. She observes that their presence does not threaten her personal interests.
descriptions.intent: She wants to monitor the movement of people on her floor. She aims to assess if these newcomers pose a threat to her.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for conflict with new residents.
descriptions.relation: Observer of the newcomers
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that as long as they are not a direct threat, she does not care about them.

descriptions.title: Four Adults
descriptions.scene: At 4:00 AM, the four people return to the fire door carrying a large pile of belongings. They are visibly exhausted and panting from the physical exertion. They head toward room 3203.
descriptions.intent: They are returning to move more supplies into room 3203. They are completing the relocation process.
descriptions.conflict: Physical exhaustion and heavy loads.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: They approach room 3203.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao, Ye Qing, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao and Ye Qing exit room 3204, followed by Sudai who carries a laboratory spirit lamp. A draft in the hallway causes the flame to flicker, prompting Sudai to block the wind with her hand.
descriptions.intent: They are exiting their room for the night or a routine task. Sudai wants to protect the flame from the wind.
descriptions.conflict: The wind in the hallway threatens to extinguish the spirit lamp.

outfits.Sudai: Not specified; Sun Jintao=Not specified; Yechin=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Companions
descriptions.outcome: The flame is stabilized, but the group encounters the newcomers.

descriptions.title: Man with Chinese Face, Fat Man, Thin Young Man
descriptions.scene: The group of four newcomers stops when they encounter Sun Jintao's group. The thin young man looks at the man with a Chinese face but remains silent. The man with the square face signals his companions to enter their room first.
descriptions.intent: The newcomers want to enter their room. The leader wants to manage the interaction with the existing residents.
descriptions.conflict: An awkward social confrontation between two groups in a narrow hallway.
descriptions.state: The thin man is hesitant; the leader is composed.

outfits.Man with Chinese Face: Not specified; Fat Man=Not specified; Thin Young Man=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Strangers meeting in a hallway
descriptions.outcome: The leader allows his group to enter first.

descriptions.title: Man with Chinese Face
descriptions.scene: The man with the Chinese face approaches Sun Jintao and apologizes for the late-night disturbance. He then explains that he broke a chain found among his supplies and promises to fix it. He places the supplies in the hands of his group members.
descriptions.intent: He wants to apologize for the noise. He wants to explain the broken chain to avoid suspicion or conflict.
descriptions.conflict: The broken chain and the intrusion of the night.
descriptions.relation: Apologizing to Sun Jintao
descriptions.outcome: He provides an explanation for the broken item.

descriptions.title: The Three Adults (Group)
descriptions.scene: The remaining three members of the group drop their supplies on the ground instead of entering. They stare at Sun Jintao and his group with narrowed, suspicious eyes. Jiang Yan notices that one woman is visibly pregnant and the other is crying.
descriptions.intent: They are reacting to the tension of the encounter. They are struggling to maintain their composure.
descriptions.conflict: Internal distress and external tension with the other group.
descriptions.state: The pregnant woman is extremely thin and weak; the other woman is crying and exhausted; the man is suspicious.
descriptions.relation: Hostile or suspicious tension
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of standoff.

descriptions.title: Sun Jintao
descriptions.scene: Sun Jintao ignores the apology and asks the newcomers who they are. He observes them in the dim light, noting that they do not seem like a threat to the floor's hierarchy. He realizes they are not the original residents of the building's core.
descriptions.intent: He wants to identify the newcomers. He wants to assess if they are a threat to his group's security.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of who these people are.

outfits.Sun Jintao: Not specified; Ye Qing=Not specified; Sudai=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Interrogating the newcomers
descriptions.outcome: He concludes they are likely temporary tenants or refugees from other buildings.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei recounts the recent flooding events and the arrival of his family at the building. He explains that the water level was approaching the seventeenth floor, forcing his wife to pack their belongings. He describes the difficulty of navigating the dark hallways during the storm.

location.name: Room 3.203
location.description: a dark apartment in the Repl Bay building, partially flooded environment

descriptions.intent: To explain the necessity of their sudden move. He wants to justify their presence and the state of their belongings.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwaters and the darkness of the building. The lack of light makes it impossible to verify the current water level.

outfits.Zhou Wei: Casual clothing suitable for moving, slightly disheveled from the flood.

descriptions.relation: Narrating to Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: He establishes the context of their displacement.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei identifies Sun Zhentao and acknowledges the reputation of the residents in room 3.201. He introduces himself as Zhou Wei, also known as Fat Zhou, and introduces his wife Wang Jin, his fellow countryman Wang Zi, and Wang Zi's wife Wenli. He emphasizes that they are honest migrant workers.
descriptions.intent: To introduce his family and establish trust. He wants to prove they are not a threat to the existing residents.
descriptions.conflict: The silence of the residents opposite him creates tension. He fears being perceived as an intruder.
descriptions.state: Friendly, attempting to be charismatic and transparent.

outfits.Zhou Wei: Casual clothing, looking thinner than usual due to recent hardships.

descriptions.relation: Attempting to build a rapport with Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: He successfully identifies himself and his group.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda confronts the newcomers about the broken lock on the door. She questions why they did not simply knock instead of forcing entry. Her sudden voice breaks the silence of the night.
descriptions.intent: To challenge the newcomers' method of entry. She wants to hold them accountable for the broken lock.
descriptions.conflict: The physical damage to the door and the perceived rudeness of the newcomers.
descriptions.relation: Confronting Zhou Wei
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Wei becomes embarrassed by her observation.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei reacts to Suda's accusation with embarrassment. He explains that they moved quietly late at night to avoid attracting attention from others. He apologizes for the impulsive action of breaking the lock.
descriptions.intent: To apologize and explain their motives. He wants to mitigate the tension caused by the broken lock.
descriptions.conflict: The social awkwardness of being caught breaking into a room. The fear of being rejected by the neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Defending his actions to Suda
descriptions.outcome: He provides a justification for their behavior.

descriptions.title: Wang Zi
descriptions.scene: Wang Zi reveals that his wife, Wang Jin, is one month pregnant. He expresses his desire to avoid the crowded hallways to ensure her safety and comfort. He apologizes for waking Sun Zhentao.
descriptions.intent: To appeal to the empathy of the neighbors. He wants to justify their need for a stable space due to the pregnancy.
descriptions.conflict: The physical hardship of the pregnant wife in the flood conditions. The potential for conflict with neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Appealing to Sun Zhentable's compassion
descriptions.outcome: Suda reacts emotionally to the news of the pregnancy.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda looks at Wang Jin's abdomen but quickly averts her gaze. She tightens her lips and lowers her head, avoiding eye contact with Suda.
descriptions.intent: To process the information about the pregnancy. She wants to avoid an awkward or overly personal interaction.
descriptions.conflict: The internal tension of seeing the physical reality of the pregnancy.
descriptions.relation: Observing Wang Jin
descriptions.outcome: The interaction becomes heavy with unspoken tension.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing notices a police hammer in Zhou Wei's hand. He questions the origin of such a tool, noting its unusual presence during a move.
descriptions.intent: To investigate the presence of a potentially dangerous item. He wants to understand why they have a breaching tool.
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion surrounding the possession of a police hammer.
descriptions.relation: Questioning Zhou Wei
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Wei explains the origin of the hammer.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei explains that he found the hammer while scavenging for supplies during the last two days. He claims he kept it for self-defense purposes.
descriptions.intent: To justify the possession of the hammer. He wants to frame it as a defensive necessity rather than an offensive tool.
descriptions.conflict: The suspicion that the hammer might be used for aggression.
descriptions.relation: Defending himself against Yiqing's suspicion
descriptions.outcome: He provides a logical explanation for the item.

descriptions.title: Wang Zi
descriptions.scene: Wang Zi attempts to smooth over the tension by inviting the neighbors to a hot pot dinner once they are settled. He mentions they found ingredients and sundries during their scavenging.
descriptions.intent: To offer a peace offering. He wants to turn the awkward encounter into a social opportunity to build community.
descriptions.conflict: The current bad atmosphere and the recent intrusion.
descriptions.relation: Offering hospitality to Sun Zhentao
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao declines the invitation.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao politely declines the invitation to the hot pot dinner. He cites the heavy rain and the difficulty of leaving the house for supplies as reasons to stay put. He instructs them to lock the door and sleep.
descriptions.intent: To end the conversation and maintain boundaries. He wants to avoid unnecessary movement during the storm.
descriptions.conflict: The social pressure to accept the invitation versus the practical danger of the storm.
descriptions.state: Polite but firm.|Outments: Sun Zhentao=Casual clothing
descriptions.relation: Setting boundaries with the newcomers
descriptions.outcome: He terminates the interaction and retreats into his room.

descriptions.title: Wang Zi
descriptions.scene: Wang Zhentao, Yiqing, and Suda return to their room and close the door loudly. Wang Zi expresses relief that the encounter is over. He remarks on the lack of chaos on the 32nd floor compared to legends and notes the peacefulness of another resident.
descriptions.intent: To vent his relief after the stressful encounter. He wants to process the recent social tension.
descriptions.conflict: The lingering anxiety from the encounter with the newcomers.
descriptions.relation: Reflecting on the encounter with Zhou Wei
descriptions.outcome: He concludes the scene with an observation about the building's atmosphere.

descriptions.title: Wang Jin
descriptions.scene: Wang Jin enters room 3.204 and closes the door with a loud thud. He expresses relief and begins boasting about the safety of the 32nd floor. He compares the current situation to a dead pig to emphasize the silence in the room.

location.name: Room 3.2
location.description: Corridor, 32nd floor apartment, a room with a heavy door

descriptions.intent: Wang Jin wants to share his relief and dismiss the dangers of the 32nd floor. He aims to convince Zhou Wei that they have passed a major test.
descriptions.conflict: The lingering fear of the legendary dangers of the 32nd floor. The uncertainty of the environment.
descriptions.relation: Wang Jin is being overly casual while Zhou Wei is cautious.
descriptions.outcome: Wang Jin successfully expresses his relief but faces scrutiny from his companion.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei stares intensely at Wang Jin and scolds him in a low, huskily whispered voice. He warns Wang Jin to be careful because walls have ears. He casts a fearful glance back at the door of room 3.204.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Wei wants to warn Wang Jin about the dangers of being overheard. He aims to maintain secrecy and security.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of surveillance or eavesdropping by others in the building. The psychological tension of being watched.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Wei acts as a cautious mentor/warning figure to the reckless Wang Jin.
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Wei successfully instills a sense of caution, though Wang Jin remains skeptical.

descriptions.title: Wang Jin
descriptions.scene: Wang Jin dismisses Zhou Wei's fears by pointing out the loud rain outside. He suggests that any bugs or microphones would be useless due to the noise. He identifies room 3.201 as the place where people are being monitored.
descriptions.intent: Wang Jin wants to debunk the idea of surveillance. He aims to prove that the rain provides natural cover.
descriptions.conflict: The disagreement between Wang Jin's logic and Zhou Wei's paranoia. The possibility of hidden surveillance.
descriptions.relation: Wang Jin challenges Zhou Wei's paranoia.
descriptions.outcome: The argument concludes without a resolution, leaving the tension unresolved.

descriptions.title: Zhou Wei
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei insists on maintaining silence because electricity might have run out. He emphasizes the importance of being careful despite the passage of time. He advises Wang Jin to keep his mouth shut.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Wei wants to ensure the group's safety through silence. He aims to prevent attracting unwanted attention.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of electricity and the unknown status of the building's security. The risk of being discovered.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Wei maintains a dominant, cautionary stance.
descriptions.outcome: The group remains in a state of high alert.

descriptions.title: Group Members
descriptions.scene: A chain lock is found and the fire door is locked again. A group of people quickly load their supplies and enter rooms 3.203 and 3.204. The movement is hurried and efficient.
descriptions.intent: The group wants to secure their supplies and retreat to their safe rooms. They aim to finish the task before being interrupted.
descriptions.conflict: The need for speed and the physical effort of moving supplies. The external environment is unstable.
descriptions.relation: The group acts in coordination.
descriptions.outcome: The rooms are secured and the group is settled inside.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao closes the door but pauses to look through the peephole for a moment. He observes the corridor before entering his own room. Meanwhile, Suda places a spirit stove on a coffee table and sits with Yiqing.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to ensure no one is following them. Suda wants to prepare food and rest.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of who is in the hallway. The physical exhaustion of the group.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is observant and cautious; Suda and Yiqing are waiting.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: Not specified; Suda=Not specified; Yiqing=Not specified

descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is the protector/scout for the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group is safely inside, but the tension remains.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao enters the room after seeing Zhou Wei and the others lock the fire door. Yiqing asks him for his opinion on the newcomers. The three of them are awake despite their previous deep sleep due to the cold corridor.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to gauge the threat level of the other residents. Sun Zhentao wants to analyze the character of the newcomers.
descriptions.conflict: The ambiguity of the newcomers' intentions. The physical discomfort from the cold.

outfits.Sun Zontao: Not specified; Yiqing=Not specified; Suda=Not specified

descriptions.relation: The group discusses the newcomers' behavior.
descriptions.outcome: They conclude the newcomers are neither clearly good nor bad.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao expresses doubt about the newcomers, noting they are neither good nor bad people. He observes that their behavior was too modest and they didn't ask many questions. He notes that even if they feared the 32nd floor, they wouldn't act this way.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to evaluate the potential threat of the other residents. He aims to understand their motives.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of information about the newcomers' true nature. The difficulty of reading people in an apocalypse.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: Not specified; Yiqing=Not specified; Suda=Not specified

descriptions.relation: The group shares a collective suspicion.
descriptions.outcome: They remain wary of the people in room 3.23.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda discusses the situation regarding Wen Wanli, noting her pregnancy is a complication in the current apocalypse. She observes that Wen Wanli's expression is strange. Sun Zhentao praises Suda's improved analytical skills.
descriptions.intent: Suda wants to analyze the social dynamics of the building. She aims to share her observations with her husband.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of maintaining a pregnancy during an apocalypse. The unpredictable behavior of neighbors.
descriptions.relation: Suda and Sun Zhentao share a supportive, domestic bond.
descriptions.outcome: Sun Zhentao acknowledges Suda's growth in perception.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda flirtatiously smiles at her husband, claiming she learned her skills from him and Xiao Ya. She points out that if he were truly afraid, he wouldn't have broken the door lock in the middle of the night.
descriptions.intent: Suda wants to lighten the mood and tease her husband. She aims to deflect the tension with humor.
descriptions.conflict: The underlying stress of their survival situation. The memory of the recent stressful event.
descriptions.relation: Suda is being affectionate toward Sun Zhentao.
descriptions.outcome: The tension is momentarily eased through banter.

descriptions.title: Yiqing
descriptions.scene: Yiqing finishes speaking and stands up after eating a handful of dog food. He walks to the floor-to-ceiling window and looks out into the darkness, but sees nothing.
descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to check the surroundings for any visible threats. He aims to see if anything is happening outside.
descriptions.conflict: The extreme darkness and the heavy rain obscuring vision. The lack of visibility.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing is acting independently to scout.
descriptions.outcome: He finds nothing, leaving the external situation unknown.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao looks out the window and notes that the rain is getting louder. He predicts that the official ship will likely not arrive tomorrow. He expresses concern that rising water levels will reduce living space.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to assess the long-term survival prospects. He aims to prepare for the possibility of being trapped.
descriptions.conflict: The rising water levels and the failure of official rescue. The shrinking habitable environment.
descriptions.relation: He is contemplating the group's future.
descriptions.outcome: He realizes the situation is becoming increasingly dire.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda sighs and mentions that the loud knocking from earlier might have woken Jiang Yan. She expresses fear that if the rain continues, people from lower floors will crowd the 32nd floor. She worries about the loss of privacy and safety.
descriptions.intent: Suda wants to voice her anxieties about the encroaching crowd. She aims to prepare for a potential influx of neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: The potential for overcrowding and conflict with other residents. The loss of a "clean" or safe floor.
descriptions.relation: She is sharing her fears with the group.
descriptions.outcome: The group acknowledges the growing threat of displacement.

descriptions.title: Suda
descriptions.scene: Suda suggests to her husband that they should invite Jiang Yan over tomorrow to discuss the situation and eat some fish. Sun Zhentao agrees to the plan. The group discusses various countermeasures before retreating to their respective rooms.
descriptions.intent: Suda wants to build an alliance or at least communicate with Jiang Yan. She aims to use food as a way to facilitate discussion.
descriptions.conflict: The need for organized resistance or cooperation. The uncertainty of how others will react.
descriptions.relation: Suda takes a leadership role in social planning.
descriptions.outcome: A plan is made to meet with Jiang Yan the next day.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: In room 3.201, Jiang Yan listens to Zhou Wei's report. She stops looking at the surveillance camera because she is too tired. She experiences intense abdominal pain and uses a hand warmer to try and find relief.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and manage her physical pain. She aims to fall asleep despite the discomfort.
descriptions.conflict: Severe abdominal pain and the physical toll of the situation. The exhaustion from the recent events.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is receiving information from Zhou Wei.
descriptions.outcome: She manages to fall asleep, temporarily finding relief from the pain.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The next day, Jiang Yan is woken up by loud music playing from the central garden. She is shocked because she hasn't heard such loud music in a long time due to the power outage and high temperatures. She wonders if it is a dream.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the source of the sudden noise. She aims to determine if she is awake or dreaming.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, jarring disruption of her sleep. The confusion caused by the unexpected sound in a silent era.
descriptions.relation: She is reacting to an external environmental change.
descriptions.outcome: She is left in a state of disbelief regarding the sudden change in her environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wakes up in her bed to the sound of loud music coming from the water in the central garden. She initially believes she is dreaming due to the recent period of high temperatures and power outages. She remains in bed for a few seconds, listening intently to confirm her reality.

location.name: Jiang Yan's bedroom
location.description: a quiet room with excellent soundproofing, currently dark and cold.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to verify if the loud music is real or a dream. She seeks to understand the source of the disturbance in her quiet environment.
descriptions.conflict: The loud, piercing music disrupts her sleep and challenges her perception of reality.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the music is real and decides to sit up.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sits up in bed and realizes it is the second day of her menstrual cycle. She feels physical discomfort in her abdomen, which is being managed by palace warmers and hand warmers. She looks out the window and observes the dark, rainy evening and the extinguished fireplace.

location.name: Jiang Yan's bedroom
location.description: dim lighting, cold atmosphere due to the extinguished fire.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess her physical state and the current environment. She observes the weather and the temperature in her room.
descriptions.conflict: Physical menstrual pain and the dropping temperature in the room.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to move to the main bedroom to get a better view.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts on a thick coat and moves from her bed to the main bedroom. She approaches the heavy curtains to look out at the central garden of the village. She opens the curtains to investigate the source of the noise.

location.name: Main bedroom
location.description: featuring large windows with thick, heavy curtains.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see what is happening in the garden. She seeks to identify the source of the loud music.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness and the heavy curtains obstruct her view.
descriptions.state: Initially sleepy, then suddenly wide-eyed with surprise.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She discovers a large white cruise ship in the garden.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a large, white, official cruise ship docked in the water of the central garden. The ship flies several official flags and has arrived despite the heavy wind and rain. She is surprised by its arrival, as it exceeded her expectations.

location.name: Main bedroom overlooking the central garden and the flooded area.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the ship's details. She seeks to understand the nature of this unexpected arrival.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and wind make clear observation difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the ship as an official vessel.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan examines the three-story excursion cruise liner, noting the landmarks of Anming city on its hull. She observes that the top deck is an open-air observation platform, though it is currently covered by a rain curtain. She realizes that despite the rain, some people are standing on the top deck.

location.name: Main bedroom
location.description: looking out towards the water where the ship is docked.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to inspect the ship's structure and the people on it. She seeks to see through the rain.
descriptions.conflict: The distance and the rain curtain prevent a clear view of the upper deck.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use a telescope to see more clearly.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiangly Yan uses a telescope retrieved from her "Cosmos" space to look at the ship's deck. Through the lens, she sees four tall warriors in ponchos standing at the corners of the deck. She also sees several people in capes and boots holding large dark blue umbrellas, accompanied by armed soldiers.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see the specific details of the people on the ship. She seeks to identify the organization of the crew.
descriptions.conflict: The distance of the ship requires specialized equipment.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She identifies a structured, organized presence on the ship.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan focuses the telescope on a woman in the center of the deck. The woman is approximately 50 years old, has short hair, and is holding a loudspeaker. Her hair is wet and matted from the rain, and her face shows signs of fatigue and wrinkles, yet she maintains a calm and upright posture.

location.name: The center of the cruise ship's deck.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the leader on the ship. She seeks to observe the woman's demeanor.
descriptions.conflict: The woman's face is weathered and tired.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is intensely observing; the Woman is calm and steady.

outfits.Woman with short hair: wet hair under a rain hat, capes, and boots.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan recognizes the woman''s authoritative presence.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the water level in the building opposite her, noting it has dropped below the 17th floor. She realizes the ship's height is significant, reaching the level of the 20th floor. She notices that people in the opposite buildings are also crowded at their windows, watching the ship.

location.name: Main bedroom
location.description: looking across at the flooded urban landscape.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to gauge the scale of the flooding and the ship's position. She seeks to see the reaction of the community.
descriptions.conflict: The massive scale of the flood and the height of the ship.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She understands the magnitude of the event and the shared tension.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the desperate crowd in the surrounding buildings, many of whom are struggling with the aftermath of heavy hail and rain. People are watching the official ship with a mix of hope and helplessness, as they cannot reach the ship due to the distance and the armed soldiers.

location.name: The flooded city area and the surrounding buildings.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the social atmosphere. She seeks to witness the desperation of the villagers.
descriptions.conflict: The presence of armed soldiers prevents people from attempting to reach the ship.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the intense desire of the people to board the ship.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The loud music on the ship suddenly stops, replaced by a heavy silence in the rain. Suddenly, the silence is broken by screams and applause from the people in the buildings. Some people begin to sing the national anthem with tears in their eyes, releasing their suppressed emotions.

location.name: The flooded city and the ship.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan witnesses the emotional release of the crowd. She observes the shift from tension to catharsis.
descriptions.conflict: The intense emotional pressure of the disaster.
descriptions.state: Witnessing a moment of intense collective emotion.|Outlam: The atmosphere shifts from despair to a burst of patriotic fervor.

descriptions.title: Woman with short hair
descriptions.scene: The woman with the short hair holds the loudspeaker and tests the sound. She looks sternly at the buildings, intentionally allowing a moment of silence for the people to release their emotions. After thirty seconds, she prepares to speak to the villagers.

location.name: The deck of the cruise ship.

descriptions.intent: The woman wants to command the attention of the crowd. She seeks to provide a moment for emotional release before delivering important news.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance the crowd's emotional outburst with the urgency of her message.
descriptions.relation: The woman asserts authority over the crowd.
descriptions.outcome: She begins her address to the "brothers and sisters" of the village.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei begins speaking to the crowd despite the preciousness of time, intending to allow everyone to release their pent-up emotions. She decides to address the group immediately to manage the tension. She prepares herself to deliver a heavy message.

location.name: Community central garden
location.description: an area filled with a large, agitated crowd under heavy rain.

descriptions.intent: The hero wants to provide emotional release for the people. She aims to address the crowd's internal turmoil. She seeks to stabilize the atmosphere before making official announcements.
descriptions.conflict: Time is running out and the situation is critical. The crowd is currently loud, screaming, and singing excitedly. The heavy rain creates a difficult environment for communication.
descriptions.state: Determined and empathetic. She is focused on the emotional needs of the villagers.

outfits.Jian Xiumei: Not explicitly described, but she is dressed as a representative of the Anming temporary base staff.

descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is a leader figure to the villagers.
descriptions.outcome: The woman prepares to use a loudspeaker to command attention.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei picks up a loudspeaker and shouts to the villagers, asking for silence and attention. She repeats her plea for silence to ensure her one-time announcement is heard. Her voice is loud enough to pierce through the noise.

location.name: Community central garden
location.description: amidst a noisy and excited crowd under heavy rain.

descriptions.intent: The hero wants to capture the crowd's attention. She intends to stop the singing and shouting. She needs everyone to listen to the vital information.
descriptions.conflict: The crowd is loud, screaming, and singing. People are distracted by their own excitement. The rain is falling heavily.
descriptions.state: Authoritative and urgent. She is commanding the crowd to focus.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is asserting authority over the crowd.
descriptions.outcome: The volume of the crowd gradually decreases as people begin to listen.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: The crowd falls into silence as Jian Xiumei introduces herself as a representative of the Anming temporary base. She explains her responsibility regarding the collection and embarkation of people in the area. She references the instructions provided by comrades the previous day.

location.name: Community central garden
location.description: now quiet under the heavy rain.

descriptions.intent: The hero wants to establish her identity and authority. She intends to clarify her specific role in the evacuation. She aims to remind people of the existing protocols.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain continues to fall. The atmosphere is still tense from the previous chaos.
descriptions.state: Professional and formal. She is acting in an official capacity.|Outlam: Jian Xiumei successfully establishes her role to the silent crowd.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is acting as an official representative to the villagers.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is now listening to her official announcement.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei informs the crowd that the government has activated emergency response mechanisms due to high temperatures. She explains that the Anming base is in intensive preparation for natural disasters. She notes that the base is primarily for accommodation.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to inform the people about the government's actions. She intends to explain the state of the Anming base. She aims to provide transparency regarding the base's capabilities.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of heavy rains and natural disasters is ongoing. The logistical situation is difficult.
descriptions.state: Informative and serious. She is conveying critical news.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is providing vital information to the villagers.
descriptions.outcome: The villagers receive updates on the emergency response status.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei explains the limitations regarding ships and transportation. She reveals that the initial waves of people being moved are primarily young and middle-aged workers with healthy limbs. She specifies that those with skills in construction, fishing, and agriculture are prioritized.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to manage expectations regarding who can leave first. She intends to explain the selection criteria. She aims to ensure the most useful personnel are moved to support base preparation.
descriptions.conflict: There is a severe shortage of ships and transport capacity. The need for labor at the base creates a selection conflict.
descriptions.state: Pragmatic and transparent. She is delivering difficult news about selection priority.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is setting the rules for the evacuation.
descriptions.outcome: The criteria for the first waves of embarkation are clearly defined.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei announces the schedule for the next two transport waves at 12:00 and 18:00. She instructs those who cannot board now to wait patiently at the 18th-floor windows of their buildings. She demands that people bring identification and be honest about their skills.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to organize the remaining crowd. She intends to provide a clear plan for the next steps. She aims to prevent fraud regarding skill declarations.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of the remaining people. The risk of people lying about their skills to get on the ship.
descriptions.state: Organized and stern. She is issuing direct instructions and warnings.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei is directing the movement of the people.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd receives specific instructions on where to wait and what to bring.

descriptions.title: Jian Xiumei
descriptions.scene: Jian Xiumei delivers a powerful closing speech, stating that the government will never abandon its people. She encourages unity and expresses belief that humanity can overcome any disaster. Her words act as a beacon of hope for the despairing crowd.
descriptions.intent: The hero wants to restore hope to the people. She intends to inspire unity and resilience. She aims to prevent total despair during the catastrophe.
descriptions.conflict: The people are in a state of despair and facing a catastrophe. The heavy rain and disaster threaten their survival.
descriptions.state: Passionate and powerful. She is acting as a motivational leader.
descriptions.relation: Jian Xiumei becomes a source of inspiration for the villagers.
descriptions.outcome: The crowd is moved to tears and bursts into loud applause, regaining faith.

descriptions.title: Soldiers, Staff, and Villagers
descriptions.scene: Staff members begin moving toward the ship's gangplank to check IDs and skills at the windows. Armed soldiers follow behind them, providing a sense of security and intimidation. People who meet the requirements begin to board the ship one by one.

location.name: The gangplank of the cruise liner

descriptions.intent: The staff wants to execute the boarding process. The soldiers want to maintain order and security. The villagers want to board the ship.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain is slowing down the boarding process. The physical check of documents is time-consuming. The presence of armed soldiers is intimidating.
descriptions.state: The staff is focused; the soldiers are stern; the villagers are anxious and hopeful.

outfits.Soldiers: Military uniforms; Staff=Official work attire; Villagers=Various everyday clothing.

descriptions.relation: The soldiers are guarding the staff and the boarding process.
descriptions.outcome: The first group of qualified people successfully boards the ship.

descriptions.title: Villagers
descriptions.scene: The gangplank is closed by soldiers after thirty minutes of boarding. The lower decks of the ship are overcrowded with people, while the third-deck is also full. Those who missed the boat look disappointed, while those on board are filled with joy despite being soaked.
descriptions.intent: The people on board want to find safety. The people left behind want to find a way to board.
descriptions.conflict: The ship is reaching capacity. The rain has soaked everyone. There is a divide between the lucky and the disappointed.
descriptions.state: The passengers are joyful and excited; the remaining people are disappointed and anxious.
descriptions.relation: The group is split between those who escaped and those left behind.
descriptions.outcome: The ship prepares to depart, leaving some people behind.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: The ship begins to depart from the community garden, creating large waves in the water. Jian Yan puts away her telescope and prepares for her own departure. She eats lunch, puts on her oldest clothes, puts on a mask, and grabs a small bag.

location.name: A private area near the community garden

descriptions.intent: The hero wants to prepare for her next move. She intends to dress in a way that is inconspicuous or practical. She aims to finish her meal and get ready to leave.
descriptions.conflict: The time is approaching 11:30 AM, and she must prepare for an upcoming task. The environment is likely still part of the ongoing crisis.
descriptions.state: Focused and methodical. She is transitioning from observation to action.
descriptions.relation: Jian Yan is acting independently of the crowd.
