descriptions.outcome: Jian Yan is ready to head out with her essentials.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finishes observing the community garden through a telescope and sets it aside. She notes the time is approaching 11:30 AM. She prepares for her departure by eating lunch and selecting her oldest clothes.

location.name: Community garden
location.description: a central area of the community

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare herself for an upcoming task. She intends to dress in inconspicuous clothing and gather her necessary supplies.
descriptions.conflict: None

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is ready to leave her current location.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls Zhang Xiong's information regarding the second boat arriving at 12:00 PM. She remembers the difficulty of hearing the loudspeaker announcements on the 32nd floor. She decides to move to a lower floor to better monitor the announcements.

location.name: 32nd floor
location.description: a high level of the building

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to position herself closer to the source of information. She aims to hear the identity checks and questions clearly.
descriptions.conflict: The loudspeaker is too quiet to hear from the 32nd floor.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to descend to a neighboring floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches room 323 near the fire door and notices the hallway is dark. She observes that the fire door is unlocked and suspects someone has recently passed through. She retrieves a flashlight from her bag to navigate the darkness.

location.name: Hallway near room 323
location.description: a dark corridor near a fire door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to investigate the movement in the hallway. She intends to use her flashlight to see the path ahead.
descriptions.conflict: The hallway is dark and visibility is low.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She begins her descent down the stairs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Wen Wangli
descriptions.scene: At the corner platform of the 32nd floor, Jiang Yan encounters Wen Wangli climbing the stairs. Wen Wangli is breathing heavily and carrying a plastic bag full of belongings. Both women freeze upon seeing each other.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to continue her descent. Wen Wangli wants to move her belongings to her new room.
descriptions.conflict: The physical exertion of climbing stairs with heavy items causes distress. The sudden encounter causes a moment of shock.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is surprised; Wen Wangli is exhausted and embarrassed.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag; Wen Wangli=Unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: They recognize each other as neighbors; Wen Wangli moved to 3.203 recently.
descriptions.outcome: They stand staring at each other in silence.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes Wen Wangli's struggle and thinks about the dangers of her pregnancy. She worries about the risk of a fall given the dark and cluttered environment. She reflects on the physical resilience of people from her mother's generation compared to today.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure the safety of the pregnant woman. She intends to provide light to prevent a stumble.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness makes it easy to trip, and the woman is carrying a heavy load.
descriptions.state: Concerned and reflective|Outras: Jiang Yan=Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan feels a sense of protective concern for Wen Wangli.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan subconsciously shines her flashlight on the steps.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The flashlight beam illuminates Wen Wangli's hands, revealing horrific scars. Jiang Yan sees numerous knife cuts and cigarette burns, some fresh and bloody, others old. The sight of the wounds causes Jiang Yan physical distress.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the nature of the injuries. She is forced to witness the trauma on the woman's hands.
descriptions.conflict: The sight of the brutal scars is deeply disturbing and painful to witness.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag; Wen Wangli=Unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan feels a deep, painful connection to the woman's visible trauma.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan feels a physical ache in her nose/sinuses from the shock.

descriptions.title: Jiangly Yan
descriptions.scene: The sight of the scars triggers a traumatic memory of Jiang Yan's previous life in the basement. She remembers the mutilation of her own hands by Sun Deming. The memory of the cold weather and the fire resurfaces.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan tries to suppress the memory, but it breaks through her defenses. She struggles to maintain her composure.
descriptions.conflict: The present sight triggers an uncontrollable psychological flashback to past torture.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag.

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She is plunged into a vivid, painful recollection of her past death.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers the cruelty of Zhang Qiqi and Sun Deming during a freezing night. She recalls how they used hot coals to burn her and her mother, blaming her for their predicament. She remembers the smell of burning flesh and the intense pain.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan relives the moment of her agony. She remembers the specific details of the betrayal and the physical sensation of the burning.
descriptions.conflict: The characters in her memory are actively torturing her with hot coals.
descriptions.relation: Zhang Qiqi and Sun Deming were her tormentors.
descriptions.outcome: The memory leaves her in a state of intense psychological distress.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan snaps back to the present, breaking into a cold sweat. She notices a distinct, indescribable smell of bodily fluids emanating from Wen Wangli. The encounter ends with Jiang Yan in a state of physical and sensory overload.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan is trying to process the sudden influx of trauma and sensory input. She is stuck in the moment of the encounter.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden physical reaction (sweat) and the unpleasant smell create a sensory conflict.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Old, worn-out clothing; a mask; and a simple small bag; Wen Wangli=Unspecified clothing

descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is left physically shaken and sensory-disturbed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan experiences a sudden, intrusive memory that causes physical distress. Cold sweat breaks out on her back as she processes the thought. She simultaneously notices a distinct, unpleasant smell of bodily fluids emanating from Wenli.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to suppress the intrusive memory and maintain her composure. She is trying to ignore the disturbing thoughts.
descriptions.conflict: An uncontrollable physical reaction to a memory. The presence of an unpleasant odor from the interlocutor.
descriptions.state: Distressed and physically reacting to trauma. She is experiencing sudden physiological symptoms.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is observing Wenli with a sense of uneating discomfort.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is physically affected by her own subconscious thoughts.

descriptions.title: Wenli
descriptions.scene: Wenli notices Jiang Yan looking at her and reacts with shame. She rolls up her sleeves to hide her scarred arm from Jiang Yan's view. Jiang Yan responds by looking away and nodding silently.
descriptions.intent: Wenli wants to hide her physical scars and maintain her dignity. She seeks to avoid judgment from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: The visibility of her scars and the shame associated with them. Jiang Yan's silent observation.
descriptions.state: Embarrassed and self-conscious. She feels exposed by the gaze of the other.

outfits.Wenli: Clothing with sleeves that can be rolled up.

descriptions.relation: Wenli feels vulnerable in front of Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Wenli successfully hides the scars but remains embarrassed.

descriptions.title: Wenli
descriptions.scene: Wenli informs Jiang Yan that they have moved to apartment 323, located below Jiang Yan's unit. She asks for Jiang Yan's permission or reassurance regarding their proximity. Jiang Yan responds with a half-smile.
descriptions.intent: Wenli wants to establish a peaceful coexistence with her new neighbor. She seeks validation that her presence won't be an issue.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of social boundaries between neighbors. Wenli's fear of being a nuisance.
descriptions.state: Wenli is anxious and seeking approval. Jiang Yan is somewhat amused but observant.
descriptions.relation: Wenli is acting submissively/cautiously toward Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan provides a non-committal, smiling response.

descriptions.title: Wenli
descriptions.scene: Wenli becomes visibly emotional, her eyes reddening as she bites her bloody lip. She pleads with Jiang Yan not to kill them, citing rumors of Jiang Yan's violent tendencies and use of a firearm. She promises they will be good neighbors.
descriptions.intent: Wenli wants to ensure her and her companion's safety. She is attempting to negotiate peace through submission.
descriptions.conflict: The perceived threat of Jiang Yan's rumored violence. The fear of being targeted by a person with a gun.
descriptions.state: Terrified and desperate. She is physically hurting herself by biting her lip.
descriptions.relation: Wenli views Jiang Yan as a dangerous predator.
descriptions.outcome: Wenli makes a plea for mercy based on rumors of Jiang Yan's lethality.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes Wenli's childish behavior and physical wounds, feeling momentarily confused. She decides she does not want to engage in a long conversation and simply agrees to the situation. She continues her descent down the stairs.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid an emotionally taxing conversation. She seeks to finish her task of moving/descending.
descriptions.conflict: The internal confusion caused by Wenli's contradictory behavior (childlike words vs. physical trauma). The desire to avoid social interaction.
descriptions.state: Confused and detached. She is emotionally withdrawing from the interaction.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan maintains a distance from Wenli.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan ends the conversation and continues moving.

descriptions.title: Wenli
descriptions.scene: Wenli attempts to speak further but is interrupted by the sound of a door creaking in room 3203. She sees heavy footsteps approaching the fire door and panics. She quickly moves toward the door while clutching her belongings.
descriptions.intent: Wenli wants to flee the immediate tension or reach her companion. She is reacting to a perceived new threat.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden noise and approaching footsteps create a sense of imminent danger. The sudden appearance of another person.
descriptions.relation: Wenli is startled by the arrival of Wangjin.
descriptions.outcome: Wenli moves toward the door in a state of high anxiety.

descriptions.title: Wangjin
descriptions.scene: Wangjin emerges from room 3203, calling out to Wenli in a tender and caring manner. He offers to help her carry her things. His voice does not reflect any signs of the rumored domestic violence.
descriptions.intent: Wangjin wants to assist his wife with her belongings. He is acting as a helpful spouse.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between his gentle voice and the rumors of violence. The tension of the moment.
descriptions.state: Gentle and attentive. He is unaware of the tension between the women.
descriptions.relation: Wangjin is the husband of Wenli; he treats her with care.
descriptions.outcome: The door to 3203 closes, leaving the interaction unresolved.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan continues her descent through the building, passing many people moving their belongings. She observes various residents, including the elderly, all focused on the upcoming cruise liner. She notices the crowd is mostly young people.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to proceed to her destination. She is observing the mass exodus/movement of the residents.
descriptions.conflict: The crowded and busy environment of the building. The distraction of the crowd.
descriptions.state: Observant and somewhat detached. She is focused on her own path.
props: Bags and luggage of various residents
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is an observer of the community's movement.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan moves through the building toward the lower floors.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reaches the 21st floor but finds the path blocked by a long queue of people waiting for the ship. She decides to divert to the 22nd floor instead. The 22nd floor is crowded with people deciding whether to stay or board the official base.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her destination (the 20th floor) but is forced to change her plan. She seeks a way to bypass the queue.
descriptions.conflict: The physical blockage caused by the queue. The logistical difficulty of navigating the crowded building.
descriptions.state: Determined but forced to adapt. She is navigating a crowded, high-pressure environment.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is navigating through a crowd of strangers.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan changes her route to the 22nd floor.

descriptions.title: Various Residents
descriptions.scene: On the 22nd floor, families are cooking food over fires, roasting fish and baking. The air is thick with smoke and the smell of oil. The atmosphere is heavy and humid.
descriptions.intent: The residents want to prepare food and sustain themselves. They are managing the cold weather and humidity.
descriptions.conflict: The cold outdoor weather versus the high temperature and humidity of the crowded hallway. The difficulty of preserving food in damp air.
descriptions.state: Busy and focused on survival/sustenance. Some are tense.
descriptions.relation: The residents are working together in a communal, survivalist manner.
descriptions.outcome: The hallway becomes filled with the scent of cooking and smoke.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the crowded 22nd floor, causing the residents to become alert and some to stand with clenched fists. They only relax when they see she is just looking through the window. She stands by the glass, observing the ocean and the dangerous fishing activities below.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the external environment through the window. She is looking at the ocean.
descriptions.conflict: The initial suspicion and hostility from the residents toward her arrival. The dangerous conditions of the ocean.
descriptions.state: Observant and calm. She is a silent witness to the scene.
descriptions.relation: The residents initially view her as a potential threat or intruder.
descriptions.outcome: The tension breaks as the residents realize she is not a threat, and Jiang Yan observes the harsh reality of the sea.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks through a cracked window covered in plastic bags to observe the rising floodwaters and the vast ocean. She observes people risking their lives to catch fish and leeches in the water. The environment is damp and flooded.

location.name: An indoor room with cracked glass windows covered in plastic bags
location.description: overlooking a flooded landscape and a vast ocean

descriptions.intent: The protagonist observes the current environmental state and the survival efforts of others. She monitors the rising water levels and the scarcity of the harvest.
descriptions.conflict: The rising water levels and the physical damage to the building threaten the inhabitants. The extreme weather makes fishing dangerous.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the water is rising but the temperature is not dropping.

descriptions.title: Unnamed Person
descriptions.scene: An individual in the corridor shouts that it has been 12 hours and the expected boat has not arrived. The group struggles with a loss of time perception due to dead electronic devices.
descriptions.intent: The person expresses anxiety regarding the delayed arrival of the boat. They highlight the lack of communication tools.
descriptions.conflict: The lack of functioning clocks and dead phones makes it impossible to track time. The delay of the boat creates growing tension.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The group realizes they have lost their sense of time.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on her recent lifestyle of sleeping excessively to conserve food. She recalls the lack of movement as a survival strategy to avoid hunger.
descriptions.intent: She contemplates the necessity of hibernation-like states to save resources. She evaluates the efficiency of her energy consumption.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of food necessitates extreme physical inactivity.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that minimizing movement is essential for food preservation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan recalls hearing an old woman's claim that the boat is delayed only by heavy rain, which Jiang Yan perceives as a lie. She feels intense anger regarding the situation.
descriptions.intent: She processes the frustration of being lied to by officials. She seeks the truth behind the delay.
descriptions.conflict: The discrepancy between official statements and the reality of the heavy rain. Her internal anger rises.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Her blood boils with indignation at the perceived deception.

descriptions.title: Xiao Zhang and Wife
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan remembers seeing Xiao Zhang and his wife waiting downstairs all morning. They are physically exhausted and desperate for the boat's arrival.
descriptions.intent: Xiao Zhang and his wife are waiting for the boat to rescue them. Jiang Yan observes their suffering.
descriptions.conflict: The physical toll of waiting for a long time without relief. The fear of losing their place in the queue.
descriptions.state: Xiao Zhang and Wife=Exhausted and desperate; Jiang Yan=Observant
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan observes them as fellow survivors.
descriptions.outcome: They remain in place despite the physical hardship.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan describes the difficulty of leaving her spot in the corridor due to the fear of others taking it. She expresses a desperate hope for the ship's arrival.
descriptions.intent: She wants to maintain her position in the queue. She hopes the ship arrives to facilitate the move to the year 2204.
descriptions.conflict: The competition for space and the fear of being displaced by others. The uncertainty of the ship's arrival.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She stays in her place to ensure her chance at relocation.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: The crowd discusses the possibility of moving to the 2204 sector but acknowledges the risk of being denied entry to the official base. Some people observe that the ship's arrival would prove the official's reliability.

location.name: The building's common areas and corridors

descriptions.intent: The people are debating the merits of the rescue plan. They are looking for signs of stability from the authorities.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the official base will accept them. The tension between trusting the official and the reality of the delay.
descriptions.state: Speculative and divided|Outlam: The arrival of the ship is the only way to validate the official's promises.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: Panic begins to spread through the crowd as the ship fails to appear. Some people start to lose their sense of security and begin to argue.
descriptions.intent: Some individuals try to maintain order while others succumb to panic. The group is divided between those who want to wait and those who want to flee.
descriptions.conflict: The breakdown of social order and the emergence of hostility. The fear of losing territory to others.
descriptions.relation: The group shifts from unity to conflict.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stands by the window with her arms folded, experiencing a bad premonition. She observes that the ship is likely not coming.
descriptions.intent: She attempts to assess the situation through intuition. She prepares herself for the worst-case scenario.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal dread versus the fading hope of the group.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the ship will likely not arrive.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: A heated debate erupts in the crowd regarding traveling to the base by themselves. Some suggest using a rubber boat, but others fear the dangers of the flooded path.
descriptions.intent: Some members of the crowd propose a self-rescue mission. Others argue against the extreme risk of the journey.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of the heavy rain and the risk of the boat being destroyed. The disagreement between those willing to risk death and those wanting to wait.
descriptions.state: Desperate and argumentative|Outfoits: The Crowd=Not specified
descriptions.relation: The group is in a state of active dispute.

descriptions.title: The Crowd
descriptions.scene: An individual attempts to stabilize the hearts of the people by reminding them of the official's promise. This attempt is met with mockery and anger from others.
descriptions.intent: The person wants to prevent a total breakdown of order. The crowd wants to vent their frustration.
descriptions.conflict: The clash between the person's attempt at peace and the crowd's descent into despair. The transition from hope to anger.
descriptions.state: The leader is trying to be calm; the crowd is cynical and angry.
descriptions.relation: The crowd rejects the person's attempt at comfort.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to leave the crowd and head home. She finds the staircase crowded with an even larger number of people than before.
descriptions.intent: She wants to escape the chaos and return to her private space. She needs to navigate through the massive crowd.
descriptions.conflict: The physical difficulty of moving through a dense, growing crowd of people.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She successfully maneuvers through the crowd.

descriptions.title: Sun Zentao, Sudai, and a Man
descriptions.scene: As Jiang Yan reaches the 24th floor, she sees Sun Zentao and Sudai exiting a fire door. They are followed by a man in glasses. Sudai notices Jiang Yan and waves to her.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zentao and Sudai are moving through the building. Sudai wants to acknowledge Jiang Yan. The man is simply following them.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden encounter in a high-tension environment.
descriptions.state: Sudai is excited; Jiang Yan is surprised.
descriptions.relation: Sudai recognizes and greets Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: On the 24th floor, Sun Zhentao and Sudai open the fire door and step outside. They are followed by a middle-aged man with a delicate appearance and black-rimmed glasses named Jianyan. Sudai notices Jianyan is fully armed and waves to her excitedly.

location.name: 24th floor
location.description: near the fire exit of a building

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao and Sudai want to exit the floor; Sudai wants to acknowledge Jianyan.
descriptions.conflict: The characters are navigating a building during a period of crisis.
descriptions.state: Sudai is excited; Jianyan is alert and armed.
descriptions.relation: Sudai recognizes Jianyan; Sun Zhentao and Jianyan are strangers.
descriptions.outcome: The group gathers at the exit.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao, Sudai, Tian Zhuliang, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Sun Zintao and the man carry heavy cement bags made of snake skin on their shoulders. Tian Zhuliang greets Jianyan, and Jianyan politely responds to the group. Jianyan tells them not to rush as she and her group will ascend first.
descriptions.intent: The group intends to move to higher floors; Jianyan wants to maintain order.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy weight of the bags makes movement difficult.
descriptions.state: Jianyan is polite but firm; Tian Zhuliang is friendly.
props: Heavy cement bags made of snake skin
descriptions.relation: Tian Zhuliang and Jianyan are meeting; Jianyan is polite to the newcomers.
descriptions.outcome: The group prepares to move upward.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Jianyan turns to ask Sudai why she descended to the lower floor. Sudai smiles mysteriously and reveals they found something valuable. She explains they found two bags of cement remains and bricks in the property distribution room.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan wants to know the reason for Sudai's descent; Sudai wants to share her discovery.
descriptions.conflict: The corridor has an unbearable, foul smell.
descriptions.state: Sudai is mysterious and excited; Jianyan is curious.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is sharing news with Jianyan.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan learns about the new resources.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Sudai covers her nose due to the stench in the hallway and explains the situation slowly. She admits she forgot to wear a mask when descending. Jianyan nods in understanding.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to communicate the news despite the smell; Jianyan wants to listen.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming smell in the corridor makes breathing difficult.
descriptions.state: Sudai is physically uncomfortable; Jianyan is attentive.
descriptions.relation: They are communicating as allies.
descriptions.outcome: They decide to stop talking and climb the stairs quietly.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: The two women climb the stairs in silence. Upon reaching the 31st floor platform and looking toward the 32nd floor, Sudai can no longer contain her excitement. She stands gripping the railing, gasping for air.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to share her plan for the materials; Jianyan is following.
descriptions.conflict: Physical exhaustion from climbing and the weight of the situation.
descriptions.state: Sudai is breathless and excited; Jianyan is physically strengthened by her space but experiencing abdominal pain.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is leading the conversation.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai prepares to reveal her plan.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Sudai whispers to Jianyan about using the cement and bricks to build an earthen stove. Jianyan recalls a similar wood-fired restaurant she saw during a landslide. She remembers the process of cooking meat and vegetables in a large clay oven with an iron pot.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to propose a construction project; Jianyan is reflecting on past experiences.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of the destroyed restaurant serves as a technical reference.
descriptions.state: Sudai is focused on utility; Jianyan is reflective.
descriptions.relation: They are discussing a shared idea.
descriptions.outcome: The idea of the stove is established.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Sudai explains her motivation for the stove, citing the dropping temperatures and the inadequacy of her small alcohol stove. She mentions that her husband and Xiao warned her about the continuous heavy rain and potential freezing. She plans to use the stove for heating and cooking.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to justify the need for the stove for survival.
descriptions.conflict: The approaching winter, freezing water, and lack of fuel.
descriptions.state: Sudai is practical and prepared; Jianable is listening.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is explaining her survival strategy.
descriptions.outcome: Jianyan agrees that the plan "kills three birds with one stone."

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Sudai suggests using the leftover cement to build the stove for Jianyan's living room. She looks at Jianyan's expression to gauge her reaction, knowing that entering someone's private space is a sensitive matter. Sun Zhentao had previously warned her to maintain propriety.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to offer help; Jianyan needs to decide if she accepts the intrusion.
descriptions.conflict: The potential violation of privacy and social etiquette.
descriptions.state: Sudai is cautious and seeking permission; Jianyan is being evaluated.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is testing the boundaries of their relationship.
descriptions.outcome: The tension of the proposal hangs in the air.

descriptions.title: Jianyan, Sudai
descriptions.scene: Jianyan declines the offer for the living room, stating her house is Western-style and already has a fireplace. She warns Sudai to be careful with ventilation and the chimney when lighting a fire. Jianyan's face is obscured by her mask in the dark corridor.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan wants to decline the offer politely and provide safety advice; Sudai wants to help.
descriptions.conflict: The darkness and the mask prevent seeing facial expressions; the privacy of the home is at stake.
descriptions.state: Jianyan is firm but helpful; Sudai is observant.
descriptions.relation: Jianyan sets a boundary.
descriptions.outcome: The conversation shifts back to moving upward.

descriptions.title: Sudai, Jianyan
descriptions.scene: Seeing that Sudai's breathing has become heavy, Jianyan suggests they continue climbing. They push open the fire door to the 32nd floor. Upon entering, they find the door to room 323 slightly ajar. From inside the room, the screams of a woman and a child are heard.
descriptions.intent: Jianyan wants to finish the climb; both characters are moving toward the source of the noise.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden discovery of people in distress/screaming.
descriptions.state: Sudai is exhausted; Jianyan is alert.
descriptions.relation: They are moving together as a unit.
descriptions.outcome: The characters encounter a new, urgent conflict involving victims in room 323.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai refuses to warm up food, so Jiang Yan suggests going upstairs. They walk toward the upper floor together.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a more comfortable place to rest since Sudai is tired.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai is physically exhausted and breathing heavily.
descriptions.state: Sudai is lethargic; Jiang Yan is observant.
descriptions.relation: Companions
descriptions.outcome: They decide to move upstairs.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: They push open the fire door to ward 323 and find it slightly ajar. They hear the screams of a woman and a child coming from inside the room.
descriptions.intent: They are investigating the source of the noise.
descriptions.conflict: The unsettling sounds of distress from the room.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan feels a sense of dread remembering Wenli's scars; Sudai is alert.
descriptions.relation: Shared tension
descriptions.outcome: They stand at the threshold of the room.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai whispers to Jiang Yan that he forgot to mention two families have moved into room 323. Jiang Yan calmly acknowledges the information.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to share recent news about the building's occupancy.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden change in the building's living situation.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is calm and unbothered; Sudai is surprised by Jiang Yan's indifference.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is surprised by Jiang Yan's composure
descriptions.outcome: The topic shifts to a previous incident involving a policeman.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai asks if Jiang Yan heard the policeman breaking the door lock with a hammer the previous night. Jiang Yan denies hearing it but mentions meeting Wen Wanli.
descriptions.intent: Sudai seeks confirmation of a disturbance; Jiang Yan provides an alternative encounter.
descriptions.conflict: Discrepancy in what was heard versus what was seen.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is composed; Sudai is curious.
descriptions.relation: Information exchange
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan notes Wen Wanli's serene expression.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan,Sudai
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan announces her intention to go home to take medicine for her stomach discomfort. She mentions needing to drink valerian.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to tend to her physical discomfort and go home.
descriptions.conflict: Her stomach is uncomfortable.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is decisive and calm.|Outlamce:
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is leaving the conversation
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan prepares to depart.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai invites Jiang Yan to dinner to eat grilled fish prepared by Xiao E. She also wants Jiang Yan's opinion on the new neighbors.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to socialize and discuss the neighborhood changes.
descriptions.conflict: The social pressure of discussing sensitive neighborhood topics.
descriptions.state: Sudai is eager to invite; Jiang Yan is contemplative.
descriptions.relation: Sudai extends an invitation
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan agrees to the invitation.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Sudai proposes a meeting time of 5:00 PM at Jiang Yan's house, noting they won't come to call her. She looks at the large iron gates.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's large iron gates

descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to finalize the logistics for the evening.
descriptions.conflict: The physical barrier of the iron gates and the fear of the electric security.
descriptions.state: Sudai is cautious; Jiang and Yan is observant.
descriptions.relation: Negotiating a meeting
descriptions.outcome: A time is set for the meeting.

descriptions.title: Sudai,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The characters reflect on the fear of the high-voltage electricity at Jiang Yan's door. They worry about being electrocuted if they forget it is active.

location.name: In front of Jiang Yan's gate

descriptions.intent: They contemplate the safety risks of the house.
descriptions.conflict: The danger of the high-voltage electric fence/door.
descriptions.state: They are fearful of accidental electrocution.
descriptions.relation: Shared concern for safety
descriptions.outcome: They acknowledge the need for caution.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her house, noting the warmth from the fireplace. She uses a metal bucket and shovel to clean the ashes and add new wood.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain the fire and clean the hearth.
descriptions.conflict: The task of cleaning the ash.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is focused and industrious.
descriptions.outcome: The fire is replenished.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan,Huabao
descriptions.scene: Huabao jumps out of the apple hut and leaps onto Jiang Yan's shoulder with excitement. Jiang Yan greets him.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to greet his mother; Jiang Yan acknowledges him.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.state: Huabao is energetic; Jiang Yan is affectionate.
descriptions.relation: Mother and child/companion
descriptions.outcome: A warm reunion occurs.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan,Huabao
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan shares news that the stream update progress has reached 8/9 and the space update is coming. She expresses happiness about the upcoming stream.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to share her technological/digital progress.
descriptions.conflict: The anticipation of the update.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is happy and excited.
descriptions.relation: Sharing good news
descriptions.outcome: Huabao reacts with excitement.

descriptions.title: Huabao,Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Huabao talks about using vines as fishing lines to tease fish and shrimp in the pool, but mentions getting pinched by a shrimp. He hides the pain from Jiang Yan.
descriptions.intent: Huabao wants to boast about his new fishing method.
descriptions.conflict: The shrimp's claws pinching him.
descriptions.state: Huabao is mischievous but secretive about his pain; Jiang Yan is maternal.
descriptions.relation: Huabao is being playful/secretive
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan tells him to keep working and not be lazy.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the pool and observes the tilapia, carp, loach, and shrimp. She notices they have grown significantly and are adapting to the temperature.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check on the health of her aquatic animals.
descriptions.conflict: The challenge of water temperature.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is observant and satisfied.
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the animals are thriving.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the fish in the pool, noting that the tilapia, carp, loach, and shrimp have grown significantly in size over a few days. She observes that the tilapia seem to have adapted to the water temperature. The turtles are sunbathing lazily by the pool.

location.name: Pool area
location.description: featuring a pool with various fish and sunbathing turtles near white lounge chairs and a large umbrella.

descriptions.intent: To monitor the health and growth of her aquatic animals.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: Caretaker of the animals.
descriptions.outcome: She confirms the animals are thriving and adapting to the environment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan approaches the turtles and begins the feeding process. She takes some corn flour from the inventory area and sprinkles it into the pool. She also prepares a plate with a piece of cabbage leaf and some minced meat for the turtles.

location.name: Poolside
location.description: near white lounge chairs and a large umbrella.

descriptions.intent: To feed the fish and the turtles.
descriptions.conflict: None.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan finishes verifying information and working for an hour. She realizes she should not visit Sudai's house empty-handed for dinner. She contemplates which items from her vast space inventory would be appropriate and non-suspicious.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a suitable gift for Sudai. She aims to select items that are useful but do not reveal her secret inventory.
descriptions.conflict: She must choose items that do not arouse suspicion from others.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to prepare food items.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan leaves her workspace and enters her kitchen area. She retrieves several large storage baskets and selects sweet potatoes, potatoes, and onions from her space. She chooses these because they are durable and fresh.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare a gift for the dinner. She seeks long-lasting, fresh vegetables to avoid waste.
descriptions.conflict: She needs to select items that are high quality but look ordinary.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She gathers the vegetables for the gift.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters her space dimension to retrieve more supplies. She grabs three large white styrofoam boxes previously used for seafood and fruit. She decides to use these for a new gardening project in her living room.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare for indoor vegetable cultivation. She intends to repurpose old containers for planting.
descriptions.conflict: She must manage her resources to balance gifting and self-sufficiency.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She retrieves the boxes to prepare for planting.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan uses a drill to create drainage holes in the bottom of the styrofoam boxes. She then fills them with fertile black soil from her space. She completes the setup for three separate planting boxes.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to create a functional planting system. She aims to ensure proper drainage and nutrient availability for the seeds.
descriptions.conflict: The physical labor of drilling and moving soil is taxing.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The planting boxes are ready for seeds.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan places the prepared boxes in her living room. She sows cabbage seeds into the soil and waters them thoroughly. She spends over thirty minutes completing this task.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to start her indoor garden. She aims to successfully grow vegetables for future use.
descriptions.conflict: The process is physically demanding and time-consuming.
descriptions.state: Tired but feeling a sense of accomplishment.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The seeds are planted and watered.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan sets an alarm on her mobile phone and lies down on a lounge chair. She reflects on her poor sleep from the previous night due to stomach pain. She decides to nap until 5:00 AM.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to get some much-needed rest. She aims to sleep for the remaining hour before her alarm.
descriptions.conflict: Previous physical discomfort and lack of sleep.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan falls asleep.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: The alarm rings at 5:00 AM and Jiang Yan wakes up. She observes the heavy rain outside and notes that the central garden is empty. She notices the official ship has not yet arrived.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the status of the environment. She seeks to see if any significant changes have occurred in the city.
descriptions.conflict: The ongoing heavy rain and the uncertainty of the official ship's arrival.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She decides to look at the surrounding buildings.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan looks through binoculars at the opposite buildings. She observes the rising water levels reaching the 18th floor and sees queues of people in nearby buildings. She notices the chaos and fighting in the Bicie residential area.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the external situation. She aims to monitor the flood levels and the social unrest.
descriptions.conflict: The rising floodwaters and the visible social chaos.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She concludes her observation and turns her attention to her departure preparations.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan prepares her black backpack for the trip to Sudai's house. She packs vacuum-packed rice, canned meat, canned peaches, peanuts, and salt. She is careful not to take too much to avoid suspicion.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to pack essential, non-suspicious supplies. She aims to carry enough for the visit without appearing overly prepared.
descriptions.conflict: The need to balance preparedness with the need for secrecy.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: The backpack is packed and ready.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan puts on a windbreaker and grabs her backpack. As she closes the fire door on the 32nd floor, she notices several heads peeking through the door and hears footsteps below. She pretends not to notice the people following her.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to leave for Sudai's house unnoticed. She aims to avoid interaction with the people following her.
descriptions.conflict: There are people potentially tracking or following her movements.
descriptions.relation: N/A
descriptions.outcome: She continues her walk toward Sudai's house.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at Sudai's house and knocks on the door. Sudai opens the door, looking surprised to see her. He notices her hands are wet and invites her in quickly.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deliver her gift and visit for dinner. Sudai wants to welcome his guest.
descriptions.conflict: The suddenness of her arrival.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is polite; Sudai is surprised.
descriptions.relation: Acquaintables
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is about to enter the house.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: As Jiang Yan enters, Zhou Wei and his wife Wang Jiamie emerge from apartment 323. They are accompanied by a small girl with a braided hair. The girl is holding a red toy calf.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan and Sudai stop to acknowledge the newcomers. Zhou Wei intends to introduce himself and his family.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected encounter with neighbors.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan pretends not to recognize Zhou Wei; the girl is in a better mood than yesterday.
descriptions.relation: New encounter between neighbors
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Wei introduces himself as "Fatty" and introduces his wife.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei introduces himself as "Fatty" and introduces his wife, Wang Jiamie. He mentions they moved in the previous night and that he has met Sudai before. Wang Jiamie, with swollen eyes, follows the girl into the area.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Wei wants to establish a social connection. He aims to introduce his new family unit to the neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: The tension of the surrounding disaster and the physical exhaustion of the wife.
descriptions.state: Zhou Wei is calm; Wang Jiamie is physically exhausted/swollen.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Wei establishes a formal introduction with Jiang Yan and Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: The group is now gathered in the hallway.

descriptions.title: Jouwei
descriptions.scene: Jouwei approaches Sudai and Jiang Yan to introduce himself and his wife. He offers his nickname "Fatty" and mentions they moved in the previous evening. He acknowledges having met Sudai before.

location.name: A hallway or common area near apartment 3.203
location.description: near the entrance of the new residents.

descriptions.intent: Jouwei wants to establish a friendly rapport with his neighbors. He seeks to introduce himself and his wife to avoid being seen as a stranger. He wants to present a polite and approachable persona.
descriptions.conflict: He is a new neighbor trying to navigate social boundaries with established residents.
descriptions.relation: Jouwei is introducing himself to Sudai and Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The introduction is completed, and the group is gathered.

descriptions.title: Wang Jiam
descriptions.scene: Wang Jiam follows behind Jouwei, leading a small girl. Her eyes are red and her eyelids are swollen, suggesting recent distress or crying.
descriptions.intent: Wang Jiam wants to move into the new living space with her child. She is following her husband's lead in the social interaction.
descriptions.conflict: Her physical appearance suggests underlying exhaustion or sadness.
descriptions.relation: Wang Jiam is the wife of Jouwei.
descriptions.outcome: The group is now fully assembled.

descriptions.title: Small Girl
descriptions.scene: The small girl looks at Jiang Yan with curiosity, though her body language betrays a sense of anxiety despite her smile.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to observe the new people. She is curious about Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: Her internal anxiety conflicts with her outward smile.
descriptions.relation: The girl is the daughter of Jouwei and Wang Jiam.
descriptions.outcome: The girl establishes visual contact with Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan smiles and greets Jouwei politely. She observes the group and waits for the purpose of their visit.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to be polite to the new neighbors. She seeks to acknowledge their presence without being rude.
descriptions.conflict: She must balance politeness with the potential intrusion of the newcomers.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is a neighbor to the newcomers.
descriptions.outcome: A polite social exchange is initiated.

descriptions.title: Jouwei
descriptions.scene: Jouwei explains that he wants to invite them to lunch as an apology for the disturbance of moving in. He mentions the tradition of a "wenzhui" banquet to bring good luck to the house.
descriptions.intent: Jouwei wants to invite the neighbors to a meal. He wants to use the banquet to foster good relations and "popularity" for their new home.
descriptions.conflict: He realizes the irony of his words because the previous residents died violently in this very room, leaving bloodstains.
descriptions.relation: Jouwei is making a social proposal to the neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The invitation is extended, but the atmosphere becomes awkward.

descriptions.title: Wang Jiam
descriptions.scene: Wang Jiam quickly agrees to the invitation to smooth over the awkwardness. She tries to normalize the situation.
descriptions.intent: Wang Jiam wants to prevent further social awkwardness. She wants to support her husband's social maneuver.
descriptions.conflict: She is aware of the inappropriate timing given the house's history.
descriptions.relation: Wang Jiam is supporting her husband.
descriptions.outcome: The tension is momentarily lowered by her agreement.

descriptions.title: Small Girl
descriptions.scene: The small girl tells her parents that they should go home to eat, prompting the adults to move.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to return to her own home for dinner.
descriptions.conflict: Her desire to leave interrupts the adult conversation.
descriptions.relation: The girl is the daughter of Wang Jiam.
descriptions.outcome: The group's focus shifts toward the end of the encounter.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai tells Jouwei that their own dinner is ready and grants him permission to live peacefully on the floor. She declines the invitation to the banquet.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to decline the invitation politely. She wants to ensure the new neighbors feel welcome to stay without causing conflict.
descriptions.conflict: She must refuse the invitation without appearing hostile.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is setting boundaries with the new neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: The invitation is officially declined.

descriptions.title: Jouwei
descriptions.scene: Jouwei and Wang Jiam express embarrassment at the rejection. Jouwei explains that the delay in inviting them was due to the arrival of the "official boat" earlier that morning.
descriptions.intent: Jouwei wants to justify why he didn't invite them sooner. He wants to maintain his dignity despite the rejection.
descriptions.conflict: He feels the embarrassment of being turned down.
descriptions.relation: Jouwei is responding to the refusal.
descriptions.outcome: The conversation reaches a temporary conclusion.

descriptions.title: Small Girl
descriptions.scene: The small girl suddenly looks up at Jiang Yan and tells her that she is very beautiful. This shocks the parents.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to compliment Jiang Yan.
descriptions.conflict: Her sudden outburst shocks the adults and changes the social dynamic.
descriptions.relation: The girl is addressing Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The adults are startled by the child's comment.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan raises her eyebrows and asks the child if she knows her. She observes the child's expression.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand why the child is complimenting her. She seeks to engage with the child.
descriptions.conflict: She is surprised by the unexpected compliment.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is interacting with the child.
descriptions.outcome: The child explains that her parents spoke highly of Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan feels happy about the child's words. She reaches into her black backpack, pretending to search, but actually uses cosmic power to retrieve a rainbow lollipop.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reward the child for the compliment. She intends to create a moment of joy.
descriptions.conflict: She must perform the action of "searching" to make it look natural.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is acting as a benefactor to the child.
descriptions.outcome: The child receives the candy.

descriptions.title: Small Girl
descriptions.scene: The girl excitedly takes the candy and introduces herself as Jouwei Haoyue. She reveals her age and mentions her brother.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to share her identity and her excitement. She wants to talk about her family.
descriptions.conflict: Her excitement leads her to speak too much and too fast.
descriptions.relation: The child is introducing herself to Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: The child's identity and family details are revealed.

descriptions.title: Wang Jiam
descriptions.scene: Wang Jiam interrupts the child with a sharp voice, causing the child to shrink back in fear. The child stops talking and becomes silent.
descriptions.intent: Wang Jiam wants to discipline her child for being too loud or improper. She wants to regain control of the social situation.
descriptions.conflict: Her harshness causes the child to become distressed.
descriptions.relation: Wang Jiam is disciplining her daughter.
descriptions.outcome: The child is silenced and becomes withdrawn.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai notices the tension and encourages the child to thank Jiang Yan. She observes the strange behavior of the parents.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to restore politeness. She wants to ensure the child acknowledges the gift.
descriptions.conflict: She senses an underlying tension in the parents' behavior.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is mediating the interaction.
descriptions.outcome: The child thanks Jiang Yan, but the tension remains.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai asks Jouwei if he has a younger son, noticing the shift in the atmosphere. The excerpt ends as she probes into their family structure.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to understand the family dynamic better. She seeks to find the source of the sudden tension.
descriptions.conflict: She is probing into a sensitive moment.
descriptions.relation: Sudai is questioning Jouwei.
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends on a note of inquiry.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The young girl holds a lollipop and looks up at Jiang Yan with a shy expression. She thanks Jiang Yan and Sudai, calling them "auntie." Jiang Yan looks back at her with an encouraging gaze.
descriptions.intent: The girl wants to express gratitude to her elders. She seeks social connection through politelss. She aims to acknowledge the kindness shown to her.
descriptions.conflict: The girl feels shy and timid in the presence of the adults. There is a subtle tension in the atmosphere.
descriptions.state: The girl is shy and timid. Jiang Yan is encouraging and warm.
descriptions.relation: The girl views Jiang Yan and Sudai as maternal figures (aunties).
descriptions.outcome: The girl successfully expresses her thanks and receives an encouraging look from Jiang Yan.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Sudai breaks the silence by asking Zhou Wei about his younger son, noting she hasn't seen him since yesterday. She realizes she is overstepping social boundaries by prying into private family matters. She feels a sense of guilt for gossiping.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to engage in small talk to ease the tension. She seeks to understand the family's situation. She intends to maintain social decorum despite her curiosity.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai's curiosity conflicts with her strong sense of social boundaries. The topic of the son is sensitive.
descriptions.state: Sudai is curious but self-aware of her intrusive behavior. She feels slightly guilty.
descriptions.relation: Sudai acts as a concerned neighbor to Zhou Wei.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai initiates a conversation that makes the other party uncomfortable.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Zhou Wei reacts to Sudai's question with visible embarrassment. He abruptly announces that he and his family will be leaving first. He reaches out to grab Wang Ziming's sleeve to hurry him away.
descriptions.intent: Zhou Wei wants to escape the awkward conversation. He aims to protect his family's privacy. He intends to move the group away from the neighbors.
descriptions.conflict: Zhou Wei's embarrassment is triggered by Sudai's personal question. He faces the social pressure of the interaction.
descriptions.state: Zhou Wei is embarrassed and rushed. Wang Zimly is caught in the middle.
descriptions.relation: Zhou Wei is the head of the departing family.
descriptions.outcome: Zhou Wei successfully initiates the departure of his family.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Wang Ziming smiles awkwardly and bids farewell to the two women. He says goodbye to Jiang Yan and Sudai. Meanwhile, Zhou Haoyue huffs and hugs a calf tightly, showing her displeasure.
descriptions.intent: Wang Ziming wants to maintain politeness while leaving. Zhou Haoyue wants to express her annoyance. The adults want to acknowledge the departure.
descriptions.conflict: Zhou Haoyue is visibly upset and resistant to the social interaction. The tension between the families is palpable.
descriptions.state: Wang Ziming is awkward. Zhou Haobby is grumpy and defensive. Jiang Yan and Sudai are observant.
descriptions.relation: The families are neighbors experiencing a moment of social friction.
descriptions.outcome: The family of three turns away and enters their apartment.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: The door to apartment 3.203 slams shut with a loud thud. Jiang Yan and Sudai watch the departing family with concern. They exchange a silent look before turning to walk into their own home.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan and Sudai want to process the interaction. They intend to return to their own living space. They seek to understand the underlying tension in the neighbors' behavior.
descriptions.conflict: The suddenness of the door slamming creates a sense of unease. The neighbors' behavior is mysterious and troubling.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan and Sudai are concerned and contemplative. They are silent and serious.
descriptions.relation: The two women share a silent, mutual understanding.
descriptions.outcome: The two women enter their home in silence.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the subtle physical cues of the departing family. She notices a sly smile on Zhou Wei's face and sees the clenched fists. She also notices the eyes of Wang Ziming flickering with hidden hatred and fear.

location.name: Hallway outside apartment/near the closed door

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to analyze the true emotional state of her neighbors. She seeks to uncover the hidden truth behind their outward behavior. She intends to remain observant without being intrusive.
descriptions.conflict: The visible signs of distress (clenched fists, hatred) conflict with the polite farewell. There is a hidden family tragedy or secret.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is highly observant and analytical. She is cautious about prying.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is an observer of the neighbors' internal struggle.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan realizes there is a deep, painful secret within the Zhou family.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Inside a different apartment, Sun Zhentao and Tian Zelian are working together to move a large three-seater leather sofa against a wall. They are clearing out accumulated supplies to make the living room feel fresher and emptier.

location.name: A living room being renovated/cleared out

descriptions.intent: The men want to reorganize their living space. They aim to declutter the room. They intend to create a more breathable environment.
descriptions.conflict: The physical labor of moving heavy furniture is difficult. They are managing the remnants of a large stockpile.
descriptions.state: The men are focused and industrious.|Outphits: None mentioned.
descriptions.relation: They are working as partners/co-residents.
descriptions.outcome: The living room becomes more spacious and organized.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Yiqing stands with his back to the door, focusing on adjusting a chimney flue. He has constructed earthen stoves from bricks and cement near the floor-to-ceiling windows. He uses a stainless steel mesh from a large steamer for the sandwich stove.

location.name: A living room with large windows and new brick stoves

descriptions.intent: Yiqing wants to complete the construction of the stoves. He aims to ensure proper ventilation via the chimney. He intends to create a functional cooking setup for the apocalypse.
descriptions.conflict: The construction is complex, involving precise placement of pipes and mesh. The smell of wet cement fills the room.
descriptions.relation: Yiqing is working independently on the technical aspects.
descriptions.outcome: The stoves are constructed, though the room remains filled with the scent of construction.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Tian Zelian and Sun Zhentao warmly greet Jiang Yan. Jiang Yan introduces Tian Zelian to the others, noting he lives on the 29th floor and is the only one left at home. She intentionally avoids mentioning the tragedy of his family's death.
descriptions.intent: The men want to be hospitable. Jiang Yan wants to introduce her acquaintance. Jiang Yan intends to protect Tian Zelian from the pain of his recent losses.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy topic of the family's death from high fever is a silent, unaddressed conflict. The social obligation to introduce people is being met.
descriptions.state: The men are friendly and welcoming. Jiang Yan is composed and tactful.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is introducing a resident to the other neighbors.
descriptions.outcome: A polite social introduction is completed without bringing up the tragedy.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao brushes dust off his hands and tells Jiang Yan to call him if she needs help. He invites her to sit and rest while they prepare dinner. He emphasizes that they are just clearing the floor.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to be helpful to his neighbor. He aims to make Jiang Yan feel comfortable. He intends to finish the cleaning so they can eat.
descriptions.conflict: The physical mess of the cleaning process is still present. The social pressure to be a good neighbor is active.
descriptions.state: Sun Zhentao is polite and helpful. Jiang Yan is receptive.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as a helpful, long-term neighbor.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan is invited to stay and eat.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan takes supplies out of her backpack and offers them to Sudai. She expresses regret that she has nothing better to give. Sudai refuses the gift, insisting that Jiang Yan should just come to eat and noting the high value of the rice and salt.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to share her resources with Sudai. She aims to show her care through gifts. She intends to ensure her family has enough.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai refuses the supplies because they are too precious. There is a conflict between Jiang Yan's desire to give and Sudai's desire to preserve resources.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is humble and slightly apologetic. Sudai is insistent and protective of the valuable goods.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is acting as a provider/benefactor to Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: A disagreement arises over the necessity of the gift.

descriptions.title: Name
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan insists that she must give the supplies because she is responsible for her whole family, not just herself. She threatens that she will not come to eat next time if the supplies are not accepted. She emphasizes that salt is vital for flavor and survival.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to force the acceptance of the supplies. She aims to ensure the survival of her family through redistribution. She intends to use a social ultimatum to win the argument.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's stubbornness conflicts with Sudai's refusal. The scarcity of salt and rice creates high stakes for the negotiation.
descriptions.state: Jiang Yan is determined and firm. Sudai is resistant and concerned.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is asserting her will over Sudai's refusal.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan uses a threat of social withdrawal to compel Sudai to take the supplies.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan confronts Sudai about the lack of salt in their supplies and insists that Sudai must take the food supplies he brought. He forcefully pushes the supplies back into her hand to ensure she accepts them. He threatens not to eat with the family next time if she refuses.

location.name: Kitchen
location.description: a domestic space where food is being managed.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure Sudai accepts the necessary supplies for survival. He wants to prevent her from being too self-sacrificing.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai's reluctance to accept more supplies and the scarcity of essential seasonings like salt.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is acting as a provider/protector toward Sudai.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai remains silent and accepts the supplies, placing them on the kitchen counter.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan walks out onto the balcony to inspect the vegetables that Sudai is growing. He observes the garden with great interest. He wanders through the balcony area alone.

location.name: Balcony
location.description: an area containing a small vegetable garden.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to observe the progress of the crops. He seeks a distraction from his boredom.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan begins studying the plants.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai finishes cleaning the kitchen and approaches Jiang Yan on the balcony. She informs him that she hasn't even had the chance to plant the seeds he gave her previously. She explains the difficulty of growing plants without soil and the challenges of low temperatures.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to explain the limitations of her current gardening setup. She wants to express her need for soil and nutrients.
descriptions.conflict: Lack of soil, lack of nutrients, and low temperatures preventing growth.
descriptions.state: Tired and slightly discouraged.|Outlar: Sudai=not specified;Jiang Yan=not specified
descriptions.relation: Sudai is sharing her struggles with Jiang Yan.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai sighs, expressing a wish to find soil.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan experiences a sudden realization as he remembers a specific location where soil might exist. He recalls landing on a building rooftop in a jet suit during a heatwave and seeing dried-out flower beds. He concludes that despite the heavy rain, some soil must remain in those beds.

location.name: Balcony
location.description: looking toward the memory of a rooftop.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to find a solution to Sudai's soil problem. He aims to identify a viable source of earth.
descriptions.conflict: The heavy rain and flooding might have washed the soil away.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan identifies the rooftop as a potential source of soil.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan points toward the top floor of the building to reveal his secret plan to Sudai. He acts mysterious to pique her interest. He confirms that the rooftop has flower beds with good drainage.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to convince Sudai to check the rooftop. He wants to share his discovery of the potential soil source.
descriptions.conflict: Sudai is confused and skeptical because the area is heavily flooded.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is leading Sudai toward a new plan.
descriptions.outcome: Sudai is surprised and confused by the suggestion.

descriptions.title: Sudai
descriptions.scene: Sudai contemplates the logistics of retrieving the soil from the rooftop. She realizes that while the rain might stop soon, the time required for vegetables to grow is a major factor. She worries about the preciousness of the seeds and the need for efficiency.
descriptions.intent: Sudai wants to evaluate the feasibility of the rooftop plan. She wants to ensure the seeds are used effectively.
descriptions.conflict: The race against time and the scarcity of valuable seeds.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Sudai agrees to go up and check the rooftop the next day.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao and Ye Qing finish clearing the dining table. A small alcohol stove is set up with a shallow pot. The aroma of spicy fried fish begins to fill the room as the pot heats up.

location.name: Dining room
location.description: featuring a table with an alcohol stove.

descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to prepare and serve a meal. He aims to complete the cooking process.
descriptions.conflict: The need to cook food properly using limited resources.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao and Ye Qing are working together.
descriptions.outcome: The aroma of the fish spreads through the room.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan enters the dining area and reacts to the delicious smell of the fish. She feels hungry and begins to salivate. Sun Zhentao invites her and Sudai to join the meal.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to eat the delicious meal. Sun Zhentao wants to invite the others to the table.
descriptions.conflict: Jiang Yan's hunger vs. the wait for the meal.
descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao acts as the host for the group.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan and Sudai move toward the table.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: Sun Zhentao takes the seat of honor, jokingly claiming it because he is the eldest. He sits with Ye Qing and Jiang Yan. He opens the lid of the pot, releasing a cloud of steam and the intense aroma of grilled fish.
descriptions.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to enjoy the meal with the group. He wants to assert his position as the elder.
descriptions.conflict: None.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: not specified;Ye Qing=not specified;Jiang Yan=not specified

descriptions.relation: Sun Zhentao is the head of the group at the table.
descriptions.outcome: The group gathers around the steaming pot of food.

descriptions.title: Sun Zhentao
descriptions.scene: The details of the dish are revealed as the pot is opened. The dish is a spicy grilled Tilapia (Shangchen fish) prepared with salt, wine, and five-spice powder. It is layered with vegetables like lotus root, cabbage, and onions, all smothered in a spicy Sichuan pepper sauce.
descriptions.intent: The scene describes the presentation of the completed dish.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: The meal is presented in its full, appetizing glory.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan observes the preparation of grilled tilapia, noting the garnishes of coriander, red pepper, and peanuts. She observes the chef removing the head and tail and slicing the meat into thin pieces. She recognizes this as a minimalist version of a grilled dish.

location.name: Dining area
location.description: a dimly lit room where food is being prepared

descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to evaluate the quality of the meal. She examines the visual presentation and the technique used for the fish.
descriptions.conflict: The lighting in the room is poor, making it difficult to see clearly.
descriptions.relation: Observer of the cooking process
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the dish as a simplified grilled tilapia.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan inspects the spicy sauce base made from dried chili and Sichuan peppercorns. She discovers fresh bean sprouts, onions, tofu skin, seaweed, and shiitake mushrooms within the dish. She notes the presence of dried ingredients that can be eaten after soaking.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to identify the ingredients in the sauce and the dish. She seeks to understand the complexity of the flavors.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She realizes the dish contains a variety of fresh and dried components.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan praises the delicious aroma of the food. Yi Qin stands nearby and reacts to her compliment.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to express her culinary appreciation. She reacts to the scent of the meal.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.relation: Yi Qin is a companion to Jian Yan
descriptions.outcome: The aroma triggers a positive reaction in Jian Yan.

descriptions.title: Yi Qin
descriptions.scene: Yi Qin looks at Jian Yan and smiles awkwardly like a young boy upon hearing her praise. Su Dai lifts her face proudly and presents a piece of fish to Jian Yan.
descriptions.intent: Yi Qin reacts to the social atmosphere. Su Dai wants to show off the quality of their "famous product."
descriptions.conflict: Yi Qin feels a slight social awkwardness.
descriptions.state: Yi-Qin is embarrassed/shy; Su Dai is proud.
descriptions.relation: Su Dai is presenting food to Jian Yan; Yi Qin is a bystander
descriptions.outcome: Su Dai successfully serves Jian Yan a piece of the fish.

descriptions.title: Tian Zhelian
descriptions.scene: Tian Zhelian places a large piece of the fish into his bowl. He observes the golden, crispy exterior and the tender white meat of the grilled fish despite the poor lighting.
descriptions.intent: Tian Zhelian wants to eat the fish. He intends to judge the texture and doneness of the meat.
descriptions.conflict: The low light makes visual inspection difficult.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He confirms the fish is well-cooked and appetizing.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan reflects on the mutated nature of the fish and the uncertainty of its origin. She decides to accept the meal as a necessity for survival in their current environment.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to justify eating the mutated food. She seeks to find a way to adapt to the new reality.
descriptions.conflict: The ethical/safety dilemma of eating mutated food.
descriptions.state: Resigned and pragmatic.|Outlamce: She accepts the necessity of stepping out of her comfort zone to survive.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She decides to proceed with eating the meal.

descriptions.title: Tian Zhelian
descriptions.scene: Tian Zhelian declares the dish the most delicious food he has ever eaten. He compares it to the high-end delicacies he used to consume as an investment director.
descriptions.intent: Tian Zhelian wants to praise the cook. He expresses his extreme satisfaction with the meal.
descriptions.conflict: The contrast between his past luxury and current survivalist diet.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: He provides full praise to the meal.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: The group discusses the origin of the ingredients, noting they used rainwater filtered through a simple purifier. Su Dai mentions their recent scavenging trip to a bank's internal restaurant.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to share the story of how they obtained the supplies. She aims to highlight the effort put into the meal.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of fresh resources and the use of filtered rainwater.
descriptions.relation: Shared history of scavenging
descriptions.outcome: The group acknowledges the difficulty of their current situation.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai expresses her desire to enjoy a moment of luxury because they rarely gather like this. She takes a piece of fish for herself.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to celebrate the rare moment of togetherness. She intends to enjoy the food as a luxury.
descriptions.conflict: The underlying hardship of their daily lives.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: She participates in the communal meal.

descriptions.title: Su Dai
descriptions.scene: Su Dai produces a bottle of "super ordinary" sake from under the table and proposes a toast. She mentions finding good items in the bank restaurant during their recent supply run.
descriptions.intent: Su Dai wants to initiate a toast. She aims to boost the group's morale through drinking.
descriptions.conflict: The scarcity of alcohol and the fact that some food was spoiled.
descriptions.relation: Leading the group in a toast
descriptions.outcome: The group prepares to drink together.

descriptions.title: Tian Zhelian
descriptions.scene: Tian Zhelian notes the dropping temperatures and expresses a desire to keep the liquor for later, but ultimately agrees to drink to stay warm. Su Dai pours the sake into disposable paper cups for everyone.
descriptions.intent: Tian Zhelian wants to manage their resources but also seeks warmth. Su Dai wants to distribute the drink to everyone.
descriptions.conflict: The cold weather and the need to ration alcohol.
descriptions.relation: None
descriptions.outcome: Everyone receives a cup of sake.

descriptions.title: Jian Yan
descriptions.scene: Jian Yan, who is not used to drinking alcohol, accepts the drink. Su Dai raises her glass first to lead the toast. Jian Yan takes a sip but finds the taste of the alcohol has become flat and tasteless.
descriptions.intent: Jian Yan wants to participate in the group activity. She tests the quality of the drink.
descriptions.conflict: Her personal lack of habit with alcohol. The loss of the alcohol's original flavor.
descriptions.relation: Participating in a communal toast
descriptions.outcome: The scene ends with the realization that the alcohol has lost its potency and flavor.
